C: 在艾迪恩公园结识被簇拥的「赌神」
E: Meet the celebrated Ace Gambler in Aideen Park

C: 卡芙卡向空中猛烈开火，然而子弹被从天而降的符玄尽数偏转。卡芙卡放下武器、束手就擒，符玄宣布接管要犯卡芙卡。
E: Kafka unleashed a barrage of gunfire toward the sky, yet Fu Xuan, dropping from above, redirected every bullet. Kafka surrendered her weapon and yielded. Fu Xuan announced she was taking Kafka into custody.

C: 「慰灵奠仪」召开，星槎载着对逝者的哀思飘向宇宙。驭空长久眺望星槎尾迹，仿佛仍在等待停云归来。
E: The soul-soothing ceremony commenced, with starskiffs bearing the sorrows of the mourners into space. Yukong gazed long at their trailing lights, as if still waiting for Tingyun's return.

C: 你在入梦池中躺下，跟随系统提示音来想象一片乐园。在纷杂的思绪中，你似乎听到有人呼唤「米哈伊尔」。
E: You lie down in the Dreampool, following the Security System's instructions to imagine a paradise. Amidst your jumbled thoughts, you seemed to hear someone calling out "Mikhail."

C: 尼卡多利驱使天谴之锋发动最后的攻击，阿格莱雅与缇宝发动半神权能保卫圣城。尼卡多利的神躯逐渐破碎，最终化作金屑飘散。
E: Nikador unleashed the final attack with the Blade of Fury, while Aglaea and Tribbie used their demigod powers to defend the holy city. Nikador's divine body gradually shattered, finally dispersing into golden dust.

C: 万敌与众多纷争眷属血战，突然听到你的提醒。回身之际，白厄挥着大剑骤然袭来。
E: While Mydei engaged in intense combat with multiple Strife Titankins, your alert unexpectedly gained his notice. The moment he looked back, Phainon attacked with his greatsword.

C: 在前往冥界之前，遐蝶将你拥入怀中。这相拥短短一瞬，却是遐蝶「活过」的证明。
E: Before heading to the nether realm, Castorice pulled you into her arms. Though brief, this embrace was proof that Castorice had once "lived."

C: 为抹除翁法罗斯的「岁月」，白厄不得不杀死昔涟。白厄带上仪式剑重返时间的起点，自此踏上永劫回归。
E: To erase the "Time" of Amphoreus, Phainon was forced to kill Cyrene. With the ceremonial blade in hand, he returned to the origin of time and began his journey of Eternal Recurrence.

C: 呼雷撕咬被其俘获的狐人。在狼血的作用下，狐人顷刻间被转化为狼卒。
E: Hoolay sank his fangs into a captured foxian. Within moments, the foxian was turned into a Wolftrooper under the influence of wolf blood.

C: 可可利亚以冰枪贯穿的你胸口。你感到身体不受控制，向后倒下、坠落。
E: Cocolia drove an ice spear through your chest. You felt your body losing control as you toppled backward.

C: 你与三月七、丹恒走出旅馆，却被<color=#f29e38ff>布洛妮娅</color>率领的银鬃铁卫包围，她奉可可利亚之命来捉拿你们。在约定的暗号后，你与同伴夺路而逃。
E: March 7th, Dan Heng, and you stepped out of the hotel only to be surrounded by the Silvermane Guards led by <color=#f29e38ff>Bronya</color>, who had orders from Cocolia to arrest you. At the agreed-upon signal, you and your companions broke through.

C: 在克拉拉的保护与劝说下，史瓦罗愿意披露「星核」相关信息。你们走到史瓦罗面前，准备访问这位古代机器人的记忆库。
E: Protected and urged on by Clara, Svarog agreed to reveal what he knew about the Stellaron. You stepped forward, ready to delve into the memory archive of this ancient machine.

C: 杰帕德将会率领铁卫坚守前线，为你们在北方裂界中的探索争取时间。只要你们做好准备，杰帕德就会打开隔绝怪物的大门。
E: Gepard swore to hold the front with his Silvermane Guards, buying you precious time to explore the Fragmentum to the north. As soon as you were ready, he would open the gate and keep the monsters at bay.

C: 桑博向发亮的屏幕讲述协助星穹列车的经历，并称自己要留在雅利洛导演下一场戏。亲爱的看客，希望你从故事中得到片刻欢愉。
E: Sampo recounted his exploits aiding the Astral Express to a glowing terminal screen. He declared his intent to stay on Jarilo — after all, the next act of this grand tale needed a proper director. Dear audience, hopefully this little story brought a little more joy into your lives.

C: 丰饶玄鹿以建木根系汲取洪炉中的能量，顷刻间治愈自身。你们力战不敌，暂时撤退。
E: The Abundant Ebon Deer harnessed the Arbor's roots to drain the Furnace's energy, healing it instantly. Without enough power to bring it down, you all retreat and regroup temporarily.

C: 同为接渡使的岩明为停云送来回礼，是一只慰灵的纸鸢。他与停云虽然不是真正的飞行士，但终其一生都在和星空打交道。
E: Yanming, an Amicassador just like Tingyun, gave a return gift, a soul-soothing paper kite. He and Tingyun were not official Pilots, but they spent their lives dealing with the starry sky.

C: 列车跃迁时，你做了一场古怪的梦…在梦中，你遇到一个奇怪的女子，她引导你离开这片现实与忆域交界的梦境。
E: As the Express warped, you had a weird dream... In the dream, you met a strange woman. She guided you out of this Dreamscape between reality and the Memory Zone.

C: 隶属公司战略投资部的<color=#f29e38ff>砂金</color>与你们打交道，称他也为<color=#f29e38ff>「钟表匠」</color>的邀请而来。在姬子的提议下，砂金愿意为你担保，以与星穹列车结识。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Aventurine</color> of the IPC's Strategic Investment Department socialized with you. He claimed that he, too, was invited by the <color=#f29e38ff>Watchmaker</color>. At Himeko's suggestion, Aventurine decided he was willing to vouch for you and got to know the Astral Express Crew.

C: 芮克先生拒绝把你们交给「蕉授」。作为忆者，他不愿意让影片在此落幕。面对「蕉授」的死亡威胁，芮克先生做好为艺术献身的准备。
E: Mr. Reca refused to hand you over to Profnana. As a Memokeeper, he wouldn't let the film end here. Faced with Profnana's death threats, Mr. Reca was ready to sacrifice himself for art.

C: 真理医生揭露，「冥火大公」专门针对对管理层不满的科员下手，目的是嫁祸于艾丝妲等人，以此挑起空间站的内乱。
E: Dr. Ratio revealed that Duke Inferno had specifically targeted researchers who were dissatisfied with the management. He aimed to frame Asta and the others, stirring unrest within the space station.

C: 螺丝咕姆指出，是真理医生在幕后化解了此次危机。真理医生称，这是为了医治科员们名为「愚钝」的顽疾，根除对「天才」的盲信。
E: Screwllum pointed out that Dr. Ratio was the one who had resolved the crisis behind the scenes. Dr. Ratio stated that it was to cure the researchers of an affliction he called "ignorance" and to eliminate their blind faith in "genius."

C: 飞霄抵达神策府，抱歉来迟，称丹鼎司的身体状况查验花了不少时间。景元与怀炎已在此等候，准备进行将军们的会谈。
E: Feixiao arrived at the Seat of Divine Foresight, apologizing for being late and explaining that the physical examination at the Alchemy Commission had taken considerable time. Jing Yuan and Huaiyan were already waiting there, prepared for the generals' meeting.

C: 你们找到「机关能源中枢」，这里守卫森严，为整个铁卫禁区供能。希露瓦打算再次用检修设备的借口混入其中。
E: You located the "mechanism energy hub," a heavily fortified stronghold that powered the entire Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone. Serval suggested sneaking in under the guise of equipment maintenance.

C: 雪衣带领众人行进，远远望见从未有过的奇异景象——建木苏生。
E: Xueyi led the group forward as you gaze at a miraculous scene that you had never seen before unfolding in the distance — The Ambrosial Arbor revived.

C: 自称为<color=#f29e38ff>加拉赫</color>的治安官向你们道歉，加拉赫称有不法分子在谐乐大典前夕潜入匹诺康尼，但他会与整个猎犬家系负责好梦境的安保工作。
E: The self-claimed security officer <color=#f29e38ff>Gallagher</color> apologized to you. He said that there were some lawbreakers who infiltrated Penacony before the Charmony Festival, but he and the Bloodhound Family would ensure the Dreamscape's security.

C: 在黑天鹅的引导下，你再次回到了神秘而诡异的梦境。
E: Under Black Swan's guidance, you once again returned to the mysterious and eerie Dreamscape.

C: 姬子答复黑天鹅，称列车组愿意与其合作。但保险起见，瓦尔特会留在现实，以备与家族交涉。
E: Himeko told Black Swan that the Crew was willing to cooperate, but just to be safe, Welt will remain in reality to prepare for negotiations with The Family.

C: 黄泉复盘砂金的计划。家族用「同谐」修筑将美梦隔绝的壁垒，唯藉「死亡」方能抵达「钟表匠的遗产」所处的真实梦境。砂金故意设计与黄泉对立，迫使其拔刀相向。
E: Acheron reviewed Aventurine's plan. The Family had used the Harmony to construct a barrier isolating the sweet dream, and only through "Death" could one reach the true dream where the Watchmaker's Legacy lay. Aventurine had deliberately positioned himself against Acheron, forcing her to draw her blade.

C: 流萤向你坦白星核猎手萨姆身份，称自己通过「死亡」抵达另一片忆域「流放之地」。流萤请你闭上双眼，她会与你一同前去见证真相。
E: Firefly confessed to you her identity as the Stellaron Hunter, SAM, and said she had reached another Memory Zone, the "Land of the Exiles," through "Death." Firefly asked you to close your eyes, saying she would go with you to witness the truth.

C: 星期日表明来意，邀请列车组进入自己的内心世界，以回忆经历阐释「秩序」理念。
E: Sunday revealed his intent to invite the Express Crew into his inner world and use his personal memories to convey the philosophy of Order.

C: 米沙回忆起折纸小鸟与罗盘号的故事，唤醒童年幻想中的伙伴与冒险梦想。
E: Revisiting tales of the Origami Bird and the Compass, Misha awakened the dreams of imaginary friends and childhood adventures.

C: 邪忍阵眼所在之处，乱破欲以缭乱•忍法将其破坏。将密咒灌注于异彩中，覆盖阵眼上的密咒，多么奇妙的忍•科学。
E: At the location of Evil Ninja Formation Core, Rappa intended to destroy the place with Dazzling Ninjutsu. Channeling the mantra into the colorful brilliance, she overlaid the seals on the matrix core. What marvelous ninja tech.

C: 迈向情节高潮的所有条件都已完备。芮克先生的电影，即将迎来华丽的终章。
E: All conditions for the climactic plot were in place. Mr. Reca's film was about to reach its grand finale.

C: 猎犬设卡排查，万维克与星期日避开锋头，踏上追寻旧梦的归程。
E: The Bloodhounds set up checkpoints. Wonweek and Sunday avoided confrontation and stepped onto a returning journey to find old dreams.

C: 万维克打开扭蛋，却引发袭击，证明扭曲规则会主动反击违规者。
E: Wonweek opened the capsule, but was attacked. This proved that the twisted rules would actively attack those who broke the rules.

C: 三月七婉拒停云分身的合作邀请，对方仍满怀期待，展现乐观与执着。
E: March 7th declined the collaboration invitation from Tingyun's split personalities, but Tingyun was still full of hope, showing her optimism and persistence.

C: 在灵水的叙述中，你得知翁法罗斯有十二位泰坦。三位编织法则，三位支撑天地，三位捏造生命，三位引发灾难。泰坦争斗不休，世间生灵涂炭。直到一道神谕降临翁法罗斯——召集能够挑战十二位泰坦的<color=#f29e38ff>黄金裔</color>，重新点亮它们的<color=#f29e38ff>「火种」</color>，世界就能回归和平。
E: The spirit water revealed that Amphoreus had twelve Titans. Three wove fate, three held up the sky and earth, three created life, and three brought disaster. These Titans constantly fought, causing endless suffering. Then a prophecy appeared, calling for <color=#f29e38ff>Chrysos Heirs</color> who could challenge the twelve Titans, rekindle their <color=#f29e38ff>Coreflames</color>, and restore peace to the world.

C: 你成功利用欧洛尼斯祷言将石柱复原，而丹恒的尝试以失败告终。你与丹恒继续探索城镇。
E: You managed to use Oronyx's Prayer to fix the pillar, though Dan Heng failed when he tried. You both continued exploring the town.

C: 迷迷发出欢快的叫声，称记忆已经收集完成，可以前往悬锋城复现过去。在动身之前，遐蝶向阿格莱雅汇报了情况。
E: Mem let out a cheerful chirp, announcing that all the memories had been gathered. It was time to head to Castrum Kremnos and relive the past. Before setting off, Castorice reported the situation to Aglaea.

C: 通路打开后，遐蝶想向格奈乌斯表明目的。格奈乌斯无意过问，只希望你们不要妨碍到他的意图——粉碎盘踞在悬锋城深处的愚蠢。
E: Once the path forward opened, Castorice tried to explain your purpose to Gnaeus, but he had no interest in your intentions. All he asked was that you not stand in his way as he eradicated the deeply entrenched roots of foolishness within Castrum Kremnos.

C: 格奈乌斯正是尼卡多利的「理智」，他选择回归本源，终结尼卡多利的疯狂。弑神的荣光于斯绽放，若你取得火种，请继续与黑潮抗争。
E: Gnaeus himself was Nikador's lost "Reason." Choosing to return to his origin, he sought to end the god's rampage once and for all. In that act, the glory of god-slaying blossomed. "If you retrieve the Coreflame," he urged, "carry on the fight against black tide."

C: 你与丹恒总结翁法罗斯的现状，认为世界的「封闭」一定另有隐情。黑潮未必与星核有关，你们需要深入调查这种神秘的灾厄现象。
E: You and Dan Heng reviewed the current state of Amphoreus, suspecting that the world's "lockdown" concealed a deeper secret. The black tide may not be tied to Stellaron, and further investigation was needed.

C: 你与万敌遇到大工匠哈托努斯。哈托努斯将悬锋印戒扔给万敌，令其离开奥赫玛。一道狭长的阴影破空而来，击散哈托努斯的幻影。
E: You and Mydei encountered the Grand Craftsman Chartonus, who tossed the Signet of Kremnos to Mydei, urging him to leave Okhema. Just then, a narrow shadow tore through the sky, shattering the illusion of Chartonus in an instant.

C: 你奉上被余火点燃的「金枝誓言」，通路果然打开。卡吕普索与神识之蝶告别，遐蝶指出卡吕普索就是<color=#f29e38ff>瑟希斯</color>本尊。你们得知，有位黑衣剑士与黑潮一同袭击树庭，意欲夺取「理性」火种。瑟希斯不得已将自己的火种分作三份，分别藏在「金枝誓言」与墨涅塔的余火中。
E: You offered the Golden Bough of Vows kindled by the ember, and the path opened as expected. Calypso bid farewell to the Butterfly of Divine Mind. Castorice then revealed that Calypso was none other than <color=#f29e38ff>Cerces</color> herself. You learned that a black-robed swordsman had invaded the Grove alongside the black tide, seeking to seize the Coreflame of "Reason". To prevent this, Cerces had split her Coreflame into three parts — one in the Golden Bough of Vows, and another in Mnestia's ember.

C: 白厄向力竭的悬锋士兵询问战况，表明自己受阿格莱雅的命令来协助围猎盗火行者。悬锋士兵对此不屑一顾，坚信他们的王即将归来。
E: Phainon asked the weary Kremnoan soldiers about the situation. He said that the two of you were dispatched by Aglaea to help the soldiers entrap the Flame Reaver. However, believing that their king was soon to return, the soldiers paid him no heed.

C: 你在浴宫中醒来。丹恒已经从迷迷处获悉试炼内容，认为关键在于找到「死亡」泰坦塞纳托斯。迷迷提议找遐蝶聊聊「死亡」。
E: You awakened, this time in the bath chamber. Dan Heng already learned about the trial's happenings from Mem, and advised you to prioritize tracking down the Death Titan, Thanatos. Mem suggested talking to Castorice about "Death."

C: 在象征「理性」的壁画前，瑟希斯探究那刻夏的记忆，得知其曾被黑潮夺去至亲。为挽回的生命，那刻夏开始研究「灵魂」与「炼金」。
E: In front of a mural symbolizing "Reason," Cerces sifted through Anaxa's memories, discovering that the black tide had stolen a loved one from him. Anaxa had begun his research into alchemy and souls to find a way to resurrect her.

C: 风堇称黑潮对翁法罗斯的「光明」格外敏锐，自己身为天空祭司的赐福可能会吸引怪物。风堇将捡到的「天空」交给丹恒。
E: Hyacine explained that the black tide was remarkably quick to detect the light of Amphoreus, and as a bearer of the Sky Priest's blessings, she might have unknowingly called the monsters to her. Dan Heng handed her the scroll about the Sky that he picked up.

C: 或许赛飞儿是全翁法罗斯过得最自由的人，灾厄并不能阻止她对财富的渴望。你决定与赛飞儿会合，前往冥河不再被阻断的斯缇科西亚。
E: It could very well be that Cipher was the freest person in all of Amphoreus, and even certain calamity could not quench her thirst for treasure. You decided to meet with Cipher in Styxia, where the River of Souls was no longer blocked.

C: 阿格莱雅的神识以若虫形态与哈托努斯交谈，这意味着她的身形已经破碎。阿格莱雅将自身神性封存，以女孩赠送的髀石护身符为容器。
E: Aglaea's soul, in the form of a nymph, was talking with Chartonus. This meant that her physical form had been shattered. Aglaea sealed her divinity, using the knucklebone talisman that a little girl had gifted her as the vessel.

C: 「君王」身经万死，只可惜未能抵挡盗火行者刺向己背的一剑。「君王」最后的心愿，就是与盗火行者正面决斗，亲手斩落其漆黑面具。
E: The Ruler, having weathered countless deaths, still could not withstand the Flame Reaver's blade driven into his back. His final wish: a duel face-to-face with the Flame Reaver, to cleave that pitch-black mask with his own hands.

C: 你的从者Saber登场，为你挡下Lancer的攻击。你得知Saber并不属于匹诺康尼，便提议带饥饿的她去吃本地特色美食。
E: Your Servant Saber appeared just in time and blocked Lancer's attack for you. You learned that Saber wasn't from Penacony, so you offered to treat her to a local meal to ease her hunger.

C: 在知更鸟的令咒下，鸢尾花家系创始人阿斯娜找回了自己的名字以及身为英灵的证明，并解除从者身份。
E: Under Robin's Command Spell, Asna, the founder of the Iris Family, reclaimed her name and her proof as a Heroic Spirit, severing her Servant contract.

C: 砂金与波提欧按照短信指引来到克劳克影视乐园，在此遭遇意欲缉拿波提欧、击败砂金成为新石心十人的斯科特，战斗一触即发。
E: Following the message's instructions, Aventurine and Boothill arrived at Clock Studios Theme Park, where they encountered Skott. Skott sought to arrest Boothill and defeat Aventurine to become a new member of the Ten Stonehearts. Tension flared, and the battle was about to begin.

C: 你与众人进行战前商讨，决定集结前往大剧院进行决战。波提欧从砂金处得知斯科特的所属部门之后，在梦境中将其狠狠教训了一顿。
E: You and the others held council before the fight and decided to head to the Grand Theater for a final showdown. Boothill, having learned what division Skott was from thanks to Aventurine, found him in the Dreamscape and gave him a serious beatdown.

C: 孤狼兄弟意欲再次对你施放变小诅咒。波提欧与游侠知更鸟赶到现场，将孤狼兄弟击败。
E: The Lonewolf Brothers tried to curse you again with shrinking magic, but Boothill and Ranger Robin swooped in just in time and took them down.

C: 拉冬人指责凯撒的暴虐，冬霖爵却对此毫不在意。冬霖爵劝众人抓紧时间享受浴场，在海瑟音将质疑「天外之界」的人尽数抹去之前。
E: The Ladonians condemned the Imperator's cruelty, but Dux Brumalis showed no concern. He advised everyone to enjoy the bathhouse while they could, before Hysilens silenced all who questioned the "world beyond the sky."

C: 千年前，黑塔、螺丝咕姆与来古士对峙，指出翁法罗斯的真身是历史上的第一台「权杖」，而来古士正是博识尊的创造者。来古士以十四行代数式重写自我意识，并将逻辑核心分布于九具躯体中，此身不过其中之一。来古士称，「智识」陨落之后，知识与真理才能自名为「命途」的牢笼中解放。
E: A thousand years ago, Herta, Screwllum, and Lygus confronted one another. They revealed that Amphoreus's true form was the first Scepter ever created, and that Lygus was Nous's creator. Lygus coded his own consciousness using quatorzain algebraic expressions, spreading his logic core over nine bodies. The one before you was only one vessel. Lygus declared that only after the Erudition falls could knowledge and truth be freed from the cage called "Path."

C: 「记忆的幼芽」努力学习新知识，认为昔涟与爱是打开监牢的钥匙，不想与昔涟分开。但要续写史诗，必须有新的「空白」。
E: The Bud of Memory tried to learn new knowledge, believing that Cyrene and love are the keys to unlocking the prison, while not wanting to be separated from Cyrene. However, to continue writing the epic, there must be a new "blank".

C: 你们在时光归墟遇到万敌。万敌称最后的十二泰坦已准备好为世界的命运鏖战，并邀请第十三位泰坦——昔涟一同抗争，书写史诗。
E: You encountered Mydei in the Ruins of Time. Mydei announced that the last Twelve Titans were ready to wage an epic battle for the world's fate, and invited Cyrene, the Thirteenth Titan, to join them and make history.

C: 昔涟回应了你的呼唤，来到你身边。果然只要和你一起，就什么都做得到。
E: Cyrene responded to your call and came to your side. Indeed, as long as she is with you, anything is possible.

C: 你回忆起，黑塔让你去寻找没有实体、但有生命的奇物「■■■■」，她自己要出门一趟。如果需要帮助，你可以去问艾丝妲。
E: You recalled that Herta had asked you to search for the Curio "■■■■■ ■■■■■," something without a body but alive. She had to leave temporarily. If you needed help, you could ask Asta.

C: 朗道姐弟终于把话说开，重归于好。希露瓦决定不再逃避，而是留在贝洛伯格与杰帕德共同处理问题。随后，你们决定同去星核所在地。
E: After finally clearing the air between them, the Landau siblings reconciled. Serval decided to stop running away and stay in Belobog to handle the situation with Gepard. Then, you all decided to head to where the Stellaron was located.

C: 无人机垂直升起，称「小飞」已完成重启。「大奔」与本机距离过远，需要开启追踪功能。你与无人机再次交互。
E: The drone lifted into the air, reporting that Little Fay had rebooted successfully. But Big Ben was too far away, so tracker function needed to be activated. You interacted with the drone again.

C: 打碎垃圾桶后，黑天鹅发现了不对劲。
E: After smashing the trashcan, Black Swan realized something was wrong.

C: 两位来自匹诺康尼的游客向你们打听仙舟罗浮上值得一去的景点。你给他们出了个主意，猜想也许日后会在仙舟上与他们重逢。
E: When two tourists from Penacony asked about scenic spots worth visiting on the Luofu, you offered a suggestion. Perhaps your paths would cross again someday.

C: 你与丹恒来到幽囚狱。判官尚未抵达，接引使者请你们稍作等待。你决定在此期间四处逛逛。
E: You and Dan Heng arrived at The Shackling Prison. The judge had yet to appear, and the Messenger asked you to wait around. You decided to explore a little in the meantime.

C: 尽管作为长生种，步离人却更接近掠食的兽类，对吞食生血生肉饥渴难耐。景元称，是狐人一族不甘心任呼雷在一夕之间痛快死去。
E: Despite being a long-life species, the borisin were more like predatory beasts that had to feed on raw blood and flesh. According to Jing Yuan, it was the foxians who refused to grant Hoolay a swift death.

C: 「罗浮杂俎」上出现了白露在众人面前凭空消失的帖子，你们决定向浮烟探听情报。
E: A post on Ghostly Grove described Bailu disappearing into thin air before witnesses. The squad decided to approach Cirrus for information.

C: 帖子的内容似乎很符合岁阳作祟的情况，先联系一下青雀吧。
E: The post's content appeared consistent with heliobus activity. You decided to contact Qingque first.

C: […log in…] 《发帖者：一生只爱花奈咪》8月10日（月）23:22 ■出大事了，那场花奈咪得生日回直播是假的，我的钱白打了！你们的钱也白打了！ [回复>一生只爱花奈咪]《发帖者：我是神人吗》8月10日（月）23:24 ■我了解的经过是：之前有黑客给花奈咪的直播间上传了个「内存休眠指令」，悄悄地在第三方云服务器节点把花奈咪所有的隐私数据都复制了，她没注意到。 ■简而言之，那一天花奈咪和假评论聊了一晚，而真观众和花奈咪的直播素材聊了一晚。 ■今天花奈咪发现钱没有进账，才知道前天的直播收入被黑客卷跑了。 [回复>我是神人吗]《发帖者：技术领域大神》8月10日（月）23:28 ■不可能吧，发出去的实时评论都不显示吗？花奈咪也没有发现评论区都是假的吗？ 《发帖者：873的传声筒》8月10日（月）23:33 ■花奈咪更新了状态：「生气了咪！ヽ(ｏ皿′ｏ)ﾉ我已经报警了，这是经济犯罪咪！」 [回复>技术领域大神]《发帖者：一生只爱花奈咪》8月10日（月）23:36 ■我上次打了钱，花奈咪也只说了「谢谢一生只爱花奈咪的SC」而已，这次也一样。 ■我怎么知道这句话是复用的上一次的素材啊喂！我分不清，真的分不清啊！ ■再说了，不打钱的聊天她一直都视而不见的…我只是觉得她没有理我而已。 《发帖者：我着火啦》8月10日（月）23:50 ■笑死了，赛博大劫案，真是活该啊活该。 ■直播间这么多人假装聊天，没一个人敢拆穿。都以为别人没发现问题，那就是没有问题。 [回复>我着火啦]《发帖者：一生只爱花奈咪》8月11日（火）00:01 ■退坑了，再也不给虚拟人打钱了。 ■她从来没真正和我交流过，我也识别不出她是不是真心的…我以为自己发出了实时评论，她就会有实时反应，现在看来这只是自欺欺人。 [回复>一生只爱花奈咪]《发帖者：我是神人吗》8月11日（火）00:15 ■别那么消极，兄弟。 ■虽然你花了钱上了当，但那一天你很快乐，这和那一天的花奈咪是真的假的又有什么关系呢？ 《发帖者：873的传声筒》8月11日（火）00:17 ■花奈咪更新了状态：「睡不着了咪！陪我来直播间聊聊天呗～」 [回复>我是神人吗]《发帖者：一生只爱花奈咪》8月11日（火）00:18 ■你说的有道理，兄弟。我看直播去了。 […log out.] 直播间倒计时亮起，在线人数不断增加。怀着不同心情的数字游民们再次躁动起来，又一场声色犬马的直播开始了—— 真实情感掺入真实谎言，真相于此一文不值。
E: [...logging in...] HanamiLover4Life posted on Aug 10 (Mon) 23:22 ■ This is bad! That birthday livestream for Hanami was fake! I wasted my money for nothing! Everyone else got scammed too! [Replying to HanamiLover4Life] Am I a God posted on Aug 10 (Mon) 23:24 ■ From what I can gather: Earlier, a hacker uploaded a "RAM Sleep Command" to Hanami's livestream, secretly copying all of Hanami's private data to third-party cloud server nodes without her noticing. ■ In short, that night, Hanami spent the evening chatting with fake comments, while real viewers were interacting with pre-recorded stream content. ■ Today, Hanami discovered her money hadn't come through, and realized the hacker had made off with her streaming revenue from two days ago. [Replying to Am I a God] Tech Guru posted on Aug 10 (Mon) 23:28 ■ No way, none of the real-time comments showed up? Didn't Hanami notice that all the comments were fake? Voice of 873 posted on Aug 10 (Mon) 23:33 ■ Hanami updated her status: "Nami-nami, I'm so mad! ヽ(ｏ皿′ｏ)ﾉ I've called the police. This is financial fraaaud!" [Replying to Tech Guru] HanamiLover4Life posted on Aug 10 (Mon) 23:36 ■ Last time I sent her money, Hanami only said "Thanks for the Super Chat, HanamiLover4Life" and it's the same this time. ■ How was I supposed to know this was reusing the same response from last time!? I can't tell the difference! I really can't! ■ Besides, she always ignores non-paying chat messages... I just thought she wasn't paying attention to me. I'm on Fire! posted on Aug 10 (Mon) 23:50 ■ LMAO, what a cyber heist. Serves her right. Totally deserved. ■ So many people in the livestream pretending to chat normally, but no one dares to call it out. Everyone thinks that if others don't bring up the issue, then there's no issue. [Replying to I'm on Fire!] HanamiLover4Life posted on Aug 11 (Tue) 00:01 ■ I'm done. Never spending money on virtual streamers again. ■ She never really interacted with me, and I can't tell if she was ever sincere... I thought she would respond in real-time to my live comments, but now I see I was just fooling myself. [Replying to HanamiLover4Life] Am I a God posted on Aug 11 (Tue) 00:15 ■ Don't be so negative, bro. ■ Sure, you got scammed out of your money, but you were happy that day. Does it really matter if that Hanami was real or not? Voice of 873 posted on Aug 11 (Tue) 00:17 ■ Hanami updated her status: "Nami-nami, I can't sleep! Come hang out with me in my livestream~" [Replying to Am I a God] HanamiLover4Life posted on Aug 11 (Tue) 00:18 ■ You've got a point there, bro. I'm off to watch the stream. [...logging off.] The livestream countdown begins, as the viewer count climbs steadily. Digital wanderers with mixed emotions stir once again as another wild and sensational broadcast is about to begin... True feelings mixed with true lies. Truth here ain't worth a dime.

C: 克里珀
E: Qlipoth

C: 丰饶星神
E: Aeon of Abundance

C: ……我很好奇，筑城者是如何获得星神的启示，提前修筑抵御外敌的高墙？毕竟克里珀不怎么关心凡人，俯瞰众生更像「秩序」太一的行为——这两位星神若有交情倒也正常，毕竟「存护」和「秩序」存在交汇的领域。说真的，我蛮欣赏太一，祂浑身散发着古老帝国的光辉，像是庄严的大理石，这也与克里珀有几分相似——祂们身上都有守护神的影子，只是形式并不相同。总之，塔伊兹育罗斯的陨落似与「存护」直接相关，我想唯有那神力缠绕的巨锤，才可能洞穿另一位神的躯体。只是历史的全貌远不止于此，我实在难以确定星神的交手方式……
E: ...I'm curious. How did the Architects receive inspiration from their Aeon in advance to build the towering walls to resist enemies from the outside? After all, Qlipoth cares little for mortals, and observing living beings is a behavior more familiar to Ena the Order. I suppose it makes sense for these two Aeons to have communal responsibilities. After all, there is some overlap between Preservation and Order. To tell the truth, I really admire Ena. THEY exude the glory of the old empires like majestic marble, which is also somewhat similar to Qlipoth — THEY both feel similar to protector gods, albeit not entirely the same. Anyway, the fall of Tayzzyronth seems to be directly linked to the Preservation. I think only that giant hammer wrapped in divine power can penetrate the body of another god. It's just that there's so much more to history than that. I'm really struggling to ascertain the way Aeons fight...

C: 生长于卡蒂亚星的食虫菌毯在受到刺激后会迅速分泌出亲水物质，可与液体结合成具有消化功能的晶体。它在一些见不得光的星际赌场里找到了自己的毕生事业——身无分文的赌徒们用悔恨的泪水酿造出最后一把宝石，孤注一掷。这些筹码很快就会消融，成为新的债务，而在淌出的消化液里，赌徒们的人生也被腐蚀得一干二净。
E: The carnivorous fungus blankets grown on the planet Katya swiftly secretes hydrophilic substances when stimulated, which can combine with liquids to form crystalline structures with digestive properties. It has found its lifelong career in some shady interstellar gambling dens — penniless gamblers brew their last gemstones with their tears of regret, staking everything in a gamble. These chips will quickly dissolve, becoming new debts, and the gamblers' lives are corroded completely in the digestive fluids that pour out.

C: 揽镜人们创造出千奇百怪的仪式，只为践行心中的「纯美」。于塔洛伦斯基而言，美则意味着「虔诚」。他将超验之镜的碎片放入脆弱的肥皂泡，以泡沫象征自己的内心，踏上漫长的朝圣之旅。每当泡泡因旅途中的颠沛而破碎，他便会重回故乡的花园，重新将镜子封进泡泡。他一次次地折返，一次次地出发，直到今日也未能走出母星。但每逢有人相问，他仍会坚定地说出自己的目的地——「纯美」之神伊德莉拉所陨落之处：「失魂星域」，拉夫卡迪奥。
E: The Mirror Holders created all manner of bizarre rituals, all in pursuit of the ideal of Beauty in their hearts. To Talorensky, beauty means "devotion." He placed the fragments of the Mirror of Transcendence into a fragile soap bubble — the foam a symbol of his inner thoughts, embarking on his pilgrimage. When the bubble bursts from the ardor of the journey, he would return to the garden of his home and reseal the mirror in the bubble. Each time he would return, and each time he would depart, never stepping foot off the home planet to this day. But to those who asked, he would resolutely mention his destination — where Idrila, the Aeon of Beauty fell: The Consternation Starzone, Lafcadio.

C: 大地与海洋是如此辽阔，哪怕是瑟希斯的学者，也难免在其中迷失。唯有雅努斯的加持，方能令世人得到指引。它慷慨地在镜中向人们揭示道路，在艾格勒紧闭百眼的夜晚，石镜散射的微弱光辉，也足以让旅者在黑暗中找到正确的方向。更有甚时，命运泰坦会以镜像昭示即将到来的灾难，以闪烁的群星，引领人们从黑潮中逃离。纵使早已陨落，万径之门也仍庇佑着翁法罗斯的众多子民。
E: The expanse of land and sea can overwhelm even the learned scholars of Cerces, leading them astray. Only with Janus's blessing can true guidance be found. The Stone Mirror of Revelation generously unveils paths, offering just enough light to navigate during the nights when Aquila's all-seeing eyes are shut. At crucial times, the Fate Titans use the mirror to predict impending calamities, guiding people away from looming disasters with the flickering of stars. Even in its decline, the Gate of Infinity continues to offer its protection to the many descendants of Amphoreus.

C: 运行它是一种风险，写作它则是一种罪孽。\n\n「这谁写的？我能不能以蓄意伤害罪名起诉他？！」
E: It's a risk to run it, but writing it was a sin.\n\n"Who wrote this? Can I charge them with deliberate assault?"

C:
又一场审判即将开席，但你早已知晓判决的结局。当人们用一万种概念解释罪过，唯有同态复仇，方能解决所有的道德难题。法庭的传唤会跟着舰炮抵达，法庭的毁灭诠释着原始的正义。

以偷盗窃取财物的，就以光束消灭他的肉体，缺少的数量，由破坏的残余估算。以战争侵扰家园的，就以杀戮亲吻他的母星，毁灭的个数，以死亡的数目清点。绝对不会多出一个信用点，也绝对不会少流一滴血。

你将裁决的重锤敲下，审判已无需继续，法庭的巨舰启航，为寰宇带去公平正义。
E:
Another judgment is about to begin, but you already know the conclusion. When humans use countless concepts to explain sin, only equal and opposite revenge can truly solve all conundrums of morality. The court summons shall arrive alongside the sounds of cannon fire, and the destruction of the court illustrates true primal justice.

They who steal personal belongings would have their bodies eradicated by a beam of light. The recompense shall be calculated from their destroyed remains. They who invade any other's home with war would have their home planet kissed by slaughter. The number to be destroyed shall be calculated by the number of the dead. Not one credit shall be paid in excess, and not one drop of blood shall be forgotten.

As you slam the gavel of judgment, the trial needs not to proceed. The great ship of the court has already taken flight to deliver justice to the entire universe.

C:
让我来讲述那支荒唐的船队吧，旗舰是沉醉的白海妖号。
他们以密底斯泰歇的蜜酿为燃料，受法吉娜垂怜，
就连沐浴了琼浆的战船也会迷醉。
水手们红着脸抓紧船舷，胡言乱语，
宴席上的老船长，与糊涂的海洋互扇巴掌。
癫狂的战船如鲸鱼般扎进大海，又骤然抬升，激荡海浪，
撞得海怪和敌人支离破碎，扰得盟友也破口大骂。
只留下，水手与鱼群在酣眠中漂浮。
我的船长，他和白海妖号沉没在琥珀色的火海里，
还有一同被焚烧的怪物们，和他最爱的蜜酿。
E:
Allow me to tell you of a ludicrous fleet, with the flagship the runk White Siren.
Phagousa bless them. They used the honey brew of Mythemis to start a great fire,
Every warship was bathed in the enchanted liquor.
The drunk sailors clung to the ship's railings, spouting gibberish.
The old captain at the banquet started brawling the sea.
The deranged warships plunged into the ocean like a whale pod and suddenly surfaced again, sending waves,
Smashing sea monsters and enemies into pieces, and leaving enraging allies behind.
In the end, the sailors all drifted with the schools of fish, lost in their drunken slumber.
My dear captain, along with the White Siren, sank in the amber-colored flames,
With the remains of burned monsters and his favorite honey brew.
