C: 男子的故事起始于一个混乱的时代。 就像一只无法安静下来的牛虻，以凡人之躯经历了圣杯战争的他离开了故乡，前往世界最为动荡的角落，擎举起替天行道的大旗——为了成为正义的伙伴。 这条道路并非一帆风顺。在世界各地，男子发动过不计其数的武装暴动，竟无一成功。他逃过了十余次暗杀、百余次伏击甚至几次枪决，却在返回故乡稍作停留时，被曾经的朋友推上了绞刑架。 但这并非他讨厌过去的自己的原因…至少失败的部分不是。 他所厌恶的，是那位梦想成为正义伙伴的少年，彼时还对这种人生的代价一无所知。 执行一人的正义，就要剥夺另一人的自由。执行万人的正义，更难免头颅滚滚、血流成河。正义的确是美丽的字眼——但它的重量，却足以让任何渴望拥抱它的少年溺死在理想的海洋。 「我的确说过类似的话，但那不过是发牢骚罢了。 「环境和情感会让人发生巨大的变化。哪怕是完全相同的存在，也会在命运的十字路口做出某些不一样的选择。 「像我的人未必是我，是我的人也未必像我。说到底，人可没法在自己的视野之外寻求救赎。」 理想会践踏理想，命运会谋杀命运——年轻人并非意识不到这些。 只是正义的伙伴，理应无所畏惧——男子学会了赞赏这一点。
E: The man's journey began in a time of turmoil. Like a persistent gadfly that refuses to settle, having lived through the Holy Grail War as a mere mortal, he abandoned his homeland for the world's most volatile regions, raising the banner of righteous judgment — determined to become a hero of justice. But his journey proved anything but easy. Throughout the world, the man sparked numerous armed rebellions, yet strangely, not one prevailed. Despite escaping over ten assassination plots, hundreds of ambushes, and even several execution squads, he found himself facing the gallows during a short visit to his homeland, betrayed by a former friend. But that's not why he resents his former self... At least, not the failures. What he truly loathes is that idealistic boy who dreamed of becoming a companion of justice, yet knew nothing of the price such a journey would demand. Enforcing one's justice necessitates robbing another of freedom. Implementing justice for thousands inevitably means mountains of severed heads and rivers of blood. Justice may sound like a beautiful word — but its unbearable weight is sufficient to drown the young dreamer in the very ocean of ideals he cherished. "I've expressed similar thoughts before, but those were simply moments of frustration speaking." "Our environment and emotions can dramatically reshape who we are. Even completely identical beings might make entirely different choices when standing at fate's crossroads." "Those who resemble me aren't necessarily me, and those who are me don't necessarily resemble me. After all, no one can find salvation beyond the boundaries of their own perspective." Ideals will always trample competing ideals, and destinies inevitably destroy other destinies. The young aren't blind to these realities. But a true companion of justice must remain fearless despite knowing this, as the man has finally learned to value this quality.

C: 「十王圣断，业报恒常。」 白衣如雪的判官从街巷幽暗处踱步而出，封死了他最后的去路。 男人靠得更近了，只是拔尖的颤音出卖了他的恐惧：「怎么…光抓住那几个家伙还不够？」 用「怎么」起头，但不是问句，是反问句——对语义的分析在思考中枢里转了个来回，除了「目标对共犯的下场一清二楚」外没有任何其他情报。 她决定直接执行被交付的使命。 眼球、额角、下颚、心脏、丹腑、下腹…一瞥之间，她标定了所有能一击奏效的部位。虽然对手是以灵敏反应著称的狐人，但他空门大开，一合…至多两合之间便能解决。 但这一击落空了。 判官略带好奇地看着他。男人体表上下如有小鼠游走般，肌肉起伏不休，双眼闪动着计划得遂的光芒。 他像得了急病般剧烈喘息，在一阵无法遏制的痛苦呐喊中，身躯攒生出大片细密的毫毛，四肢躯壳被某种看不见的力量强撑了开来。洞天月色的照耀下，一头巨狼人立而起。此刻在判官的视野下，那片笼罩人体的鲜红轮廓已烧成了一丛野火。 「汝…这是自蹈死路，」内心深处的某种习惯想让她叹一口气，可身体已没了这个功能。「服下药王秘传的药，不过是加速死亡。」 男人的目光没有丝毫动摇，「从被你们发现的那一刻起，我就没几天活了。」 狐人抓起身侧的药囊，如倒豆子般将更多药丸倒进嘴里，「你们这些无血无泪的东西又怎么会懂，我有必须离开这里的理由！」 一枚巨大的拳头倏然扩张，撑满整个视野，判官的反应机巧刚刚来得及做出响应。双臂一抖，她随身携带的锁链绷成一个圈，试图兜住这一拳。 拳头挟着惊人的力量轰入胸膛，白衣判官双足所踏之地也裂开密如蛛网的碎纹，深深凹陷。 没有疼痛，只有机巧器官损坏的轻响。白衣判官一阵恍惚。
E: "Ten Lords perceptual, Karma perpetual." Dressed as white as the driven snow, the Judge strolled out from the dim street, obscuring his final escape. The man drew closer, but the shrill tremble in his voice betrayed his fear: "How... is catching them not enough?" It may have started with a "How," but not as a question, rather as a rhetorical one. The semantic analysis goes back and forth in the mind, and there's no other intel other than "the target clearly knew who the accomplice was." She decided to execute the mission assigned to her straight away. The eyeballs, forehead, chin, heart, the Core Esse, and the lower abdomen... With a glance, she marked off all the parts that might make for a single effective strike. Despite foxians being known for their quick reactions, her opponent had left himself wide open and one round... two rounds, max, should be enough to take care of things. But this blow missed. The Judge looked at him with an air of curiosity. The man's body seemed to move like scurrying mice, with muscles undulating, and his eyes sparkled with the gleam of a well-executed plan. He panted violently as though suffering from a critical illness, and during a burst of uncontrollable pain his body shot out large swathes of fine hairs as his limbs and body swelled and tore open by some invisible force. Under the glow of moonlight within the delve, a monstrous wolfman stood up. In the view of the Judge, the sanguine silhouette enveloping its body had burned up into a wildfire. "You... are seeking death." She has an urge to sigh out of habit, but her body no longer has that function. "The partaking of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus' concoction will only hasten your demise." The man's gaze barely wavers at all. "The second I was discovered by you, I only ever had a few more days to live." The foxian grabs the medicine pouch, and pours out more pills into his mouth as though it were candy. "You are a tool that sheds no blood and cry no tears. You could never understand — I have my reason for leaving here!" A huge fist suddenly expanded, filling up the entire field of vision, and the Judge barely had any time to react. Shaking her arms, the chain she clutched whipped into a circle as she tried to lasso the fist. The fist punched into her chest with astonishing force, splitting cracks into the ground like cobwebs and creating a crater beneath where the white-robed Judge was standing. There was no pain, only the gentle ringing of damaged ingenium parts. The white-robed Judge was left befuddled.

C: 仙舟「罗浮」丹鼎司新任司鼎，伶俐秀慧的持明医士。\n嗅觉敏锐，常以此识别病症，并以香薰安定他人心神。\n善于处理混杂的人际关系，即使心底暴躁如雷，表面上依旧滴水不漏。
E: The new Cauldron Master of the Xianzhou Luofu's Alchemy Commission is one perceptive and intelligent Vidyadhara healer.\nWith a keen sense of smell, she diagnoses ailments and calms minds with aromatic therapy.\nAdept at navigating complex social relationships, she can remain impeccably composed even when turmoil rages within.

C: 「人和人总需要某种契机才能开始交流，美梦中的各种特调便是化学反应的催化剂。 我观察四周，很快就找到一个习惯左右逢源的形象。 借着美梦特调的名头，他从糖浆与苏乐达的历史讲起，向客人解释摇晃的时间与成品风味的关联，再后来，是特调的香气与一个人性格的适配程度，如何掌握搭配成分的秘诀…周遭的脸沉没在黑暗里，他倾听着或悲伤或喜悦的絮语，在觥筹交错中冷眼看着众人的心。 他等待客人一个个散去，独自将银色的酒杯擦得锃亮，望着门外。日复一日，他等待着一个永远也不会回来的人，等待那个人给他一个永远的谎言来终结如此漫长的命运。 灯光尽数熄灭，他独自行在街上，投下的影子很长很长—— 也许，我最后也会踏上与他一样的命定之路。」 ——《手记•美梦调饮师》
E: "People need an opportunity to connect with each other, and the diverse special mixes within the Dreamscape serve as catalysts for such reactions. As I check out my surroundings, I soon notice an individual who's used to suavely navigating through life. Using the Dreamjoy Special's fame as a starting point, he starts the conversation with the history of syrups and SoulGlad, explaining to the guests the connection between the time spent shaking the drink and the flavor of the final product. Then, he talks about the degrees of fit between the special mix's aroma with an individual's personality, and how to master the secret of matching the right ingredients... The surrounding faces drown in darkness. He listens to the whispers of sorrow or joy, all the while coldly observing the hearts of the masses as the drinking party continues. He waits for all the guests to depart, then polishes the silver cups on his own until they gleam while gazing out the door. Day after day, he waits for someone who will never return, waiting for that person to give him an eternal lie that will end such a never-ending destiny. He walks alone down the street as lights go out one after another, and he casts a long shadow behind him — Perhaps I, too, will step on to the same predetermined path as he is on." — Note: Dreamjoy Drinksmith

C: 「亲爱的妹妹： 寄来的唱片我已收到，我跟着弹了几首，十分精彩。现在匹诺康尼的唱片店人满为患，街上到处都是你的新专辑海报，好多人总是向我赞美你，并打听是否能拿到你的签名。 你最近不回来也好。现在的匹诺康尼今时不同往昔，逐梦客蜂拥而入，经济像井喷一样发展，但梦境也比以前混乱多了，换作以前，我不曾想到「铎音」会面临如此艰巨的挑战。 企业家为了垄断行业，制定了极其不合理的工作时间，梦境里的工人经常要连续工作十二个系统时才能休息，但到手的却只有一笔微薄的工资。投机和高风险产业遍布匹诺康尼，逐梦客们为了泡沫般的愿望来到这里，最终却成了流浪汉中的一员…… 此前一位偷渡客向我求助，说他倾尽所有才能留在匹诺康尼，却被猎犬家系发现。他向我保证日后一定会还清自己的所有欠债，因此我才向猎犬家系请求，对他网开一面。只是每当我想到这样的人在匹诺康尼还有许多，便不免怀疑是否所有人都能做出正确的选择。 算算日期，信寄到的时候你应该也要启程开始下一轮巡演了。匹诺康尼的事你不必操心，我知道你心地善良，但不是所有人都如你这般。一定记得保护好自己。 你永远的后盾， 星期日」 ——一封泛黄的家书，放在唱片盒中
E: "To my dearest sister: I received the records you sent and played along with a few songs — they were wonderful. The record store on Penacony is now bustling with activity, and posters of your new album are adorning the streets everywhere. There are so many people complimenting you and asking if they can get your autograph. It's probably for the best that you're not coming back right now. Penacony has changed. Dreamchasers are flocking in, and the economy is booming like never before. However, the Dreamscape has become much more chaotic than it used to be. I never would have imagined that the Bronze Melodia would face such significant challenges. Entrepreneurs have imposed extremely unreasonable working hours to monopolize the industry, forcing workers in the Dreamscape to work twelve-hour shifts before they can take a break — only to receive meager paychecks in return. Speculative and high-risk industries are all over Penacony, where dreamchasers arrive with lofty aspirations, only to find themselves among the destitute... Recently, a stowaway approached me for help, explaining that he had spent everything he had just to stay on Penacony, only to be discovered by the Bloodhound Family. He assured me that he would repay all his debts later, which is why I asked the Bloodhound Family to show him some leniency. However, every time I consider how many others like him there are on Penacony, I can't help but wonder if everyone has the opportunity to make the right choices. If I've calculated correctly, you should be starting your next concert tour by the time this letter reaches you. You don't have to worry about Penacony. I know you are a kind person, but not everyone shares your heart. Always remember to take care of yourself. There For You Always, Sunday" — A yellowed family letter, stored in a record case.

C: 哀丽秘榭，少年的家乡。 村庄日出而作，日落而息，如同他的身世，朴实无华。 只能容纳数人的校舍内，少年听着令人昏昏欲睡的历史课，心思早已跟手中飞舞的木屑一同飘向遥远的地方。  一笔一划，藏在桌屉里的木头逐渐显现出战士的模样。 「要有一把沉重的大剑，才配得上这样的实力……」 对着阳光，他磨利木片的边缘。 「铠甲闪耀着荣誉的伤痕，披风好似搏击风云的翅膀。 「还有……」 「白厄！想要成为最强的战士…就该好好听讲。」 皮西厄斯老师总是不厌其烦地打破他的幻想。 相比学校，少年更喜欢那麦秸堆垛的训练场。 那里是他的战场，稻草人时而是来袭的兵团，时而是横冲直撞的恶兽。 不上学的时候，他常常在这里与木头雕成的伙伴消磨一整天的时光，直到每一隅村户飘散出烹调的香味。 清凉的树荫下，疲惫的少年枕在草地便能安睡。 支离破碎的梦境中，他眺望着从未见过的城邦，见证波澜壮阔的故事。 「去成为英雄吧……」 那心声如同哀丽秘榭翻涌不息的麦浪，引领少年踏上远行的路。
E: Aedes Elysiae, the boy's hometown. The village lived by the rhythm of the sun: working at daybreak, resting at sundown, just like his own life, simple and unadorned. In a tiny schoolhouse that could barely fit a handful of students, the boy drifted off during a droning history lesson, his thoughts floating away with the wood shavings dancing from his hands. Stroke by stroke, the figure of a warrior slowly emerged from the block of wood hidden in his desk drawer. "A mighty greatsword... only a blade like that could match this strength..." He sharpened the edges of the wood chip in the sunlight. "Armor scarred by honor, a cloak like wings soaring through the storm." "And then..." "Phainon! If you want to be the strongest warrior... you'd better start paying attention." Miss Pythias never gets tired of dragging him back to reality. The boy preferred the training yard stacked with hay bales far more than school. It was his battlefield — where scarecrows turned into charging soldiers, or wild beasts on the rampage. When he was not at school, he often spent entire days there with his carved wooden comrades, until the smell of cooking wafted from every household. Beneath the cool shade of the trees, the exhausted boy could fall asleep right on the grass. In his broken dreams, he gazed at city-states he had never seen and witnessed grand tales unfold. "Go... become a hero." That voice, like the endless waves of wheat in Aedes Elysiae, guided the boy onto the road of adventure.

C: 飞剑弱点被击破后，会转移弱点给随机剩余飞剑；二阶段，飞剑的初始弱点隐藏，受到正确属性的攻击后，解除该效果。
E: After a Flying Sword is Weakness Broken, its Weakness will be transferred to the remaining Flying Swords. In the second phase, the Weaknesses of Flying Swords are hidden initially and will be revealed after being attacked with the correct Type.

C: 缇宝：门帷的涟漪
E: Tribbie: Passages' Ripples

C: 先前出手相救的姬子终于登场，她的笃定与从容几乎让你忘了他们也是被卷入这场险境的外来者。\n如今，只有空间站的代理站长艾丝妲知道，这场危机是否已经得到了缓和……
E: Himeko, who helped you before, has finally made her appearance. Her relaxed and confident posture almost makes you forget about the fact that they're also outsiders who were dragged into this crisis.\nAt this point, only Asta, the acting lead researcher of the space station, knows whether the crisis has been adverted...

C: 新的危机——末日兽已经袭来，而你似乎成为了某种「关键」。\n想要摆脱这样的困境，让空间站免于毁灭的命运，或许只有前往月台，与列车、与那个被称为「瓦尔特」的男人会合后，才有解法。\n离开月台已经越来越近了，加快脚步吧。
E: New crisis — the Doomsday Beast is coming, and it seems that you've become some sort of "key element."\nIf you want to get out of this predicament and save the space station from destruction, the only way may be to head to the railway platform and meet up with the Express and the man named Welt.\nYou're getting closer to the railway platform, hurry.

C: 你乘上了神奇的星穹列车，现在熟悉一下乘员和设施吧！今后，这里就是你的家了。
E: You boarded the amazing Astral Express, and it's time to get familiar with its passengers and facilities! From now on, this will be your home.

C: 打开第二道大门的权限只掌握在克拉拉手里，而克拉拉此时又回到了铆钉镇搜集材料。\n不久前刚从那里回来的你很清楚：铆钉镇究竟是个怎样凶险的地方。就算克拉拉有护卫机器人跟着，你也绝不能放任这个年纪的小女孩独自在铆钉镇探险…\n证明你是克拉拉家人的时候到了——前往铆钉镇吧！
E: Only Clara, who has returned to Rivet Town to collect materials, has the authorization to open the second gate.\nBeing there not long ago, you are well aware of how vicious of a place Rivet Town is. You wouldn't allow such a little girl to be exploring Rivet Town alone, even if she has a robot guardian by her side...\nIt's time to prove that you're truly a member of Clara's family — head to Rivet Town!

C: 你在这个神秘的空间醒来，被朦混的星空笼罩，被琥珀色的命运包裹。\n你记得自己的身体被可可利亚的枪尖贯穿——这里是死后的世界吗？但你的意识如此清醒，身体也轻盈如初…脑海中某个浑厚的声音似乎在指引着你，告诉你「我还活着」。\n也许你的同伴们还在与可可利亚厮杀。无论如何，你必须找到办法回到他们的身边。
E: You wake up in a strange place surrounded by nebulous stars, seemingly enveloped by an amber-colored destiny.\nThe last thing you remember is being pierced by Cocolia's lance... Could this be the afterlife? But your mind is still very clear and your body still has strength... These resounding voices in your head seem to be guiding you, telling you that you are still alive.\nYour companions might still be in fierce combat with Cocolia. You have to find a way to get back to their side, no matter what.

C: 司辰宫中，满心以为会获得支持的你们却遭到了驭空的回绝。\n所幸云骑军将军景元现身定策。但他并未将搜索星核的重任交给你们，而是让你们找到行踪无定的卡芙卡。\n出得司辰宫，你们暂得片刻休憩，而后，你们将开始猎手与猎物间的追逐。
E: In the Palace of Astrum, the hopeful Trailblazers are rejected by Yukong.\nFortunately, General Jing Yuan of Luofu's Cloud Knights appears and intervenes. However, he does not entrust you with the task of searching for the Stellaron, instead instructing you to locate Kafka's unpredictable whereabouts.\nAfter leaving the Palace of Astrum, you have a short rest before commencing with your game of cat and mouse.

C: 司辰宫中，满心以为会获得支持的你们却遭到了驭空的回绝。\n所幸云骑军将军景元现身定策。但他并未将搜索星核的重任交给你们，而是让你们找到行踪无定的卡芙卡。\n出得司辰宫，你们暂得片刻休憩，而后，你们将开始猎手与猎物间的追逐。
E: In the Palace of Astrum, the hopeful Trailblazers are rejected by Yukong.\nFortunately, General Jing Yuan of Luofu's Cloud Knights appears and intervenes. However, he does not entrust you with the task of searching for the Stellaron, instead instructing you to locate Kafka's unpredictable whereabouts.\nAfter leaving the Palace of Astrum, you have a short rest before commencing with your game of cat and mouse.

C: 抵达「迴星港」，你们展开搜索行动。猎物总会不自觉留下痕迹，而分辨痕迹是否属于猎物，则是考验猎人技巧的时候了。
E: Having arrived at the "Stargazer Navalia," you begin searching for Kafka and the hunt is on. Prey always leaves behind traces of its presence unwittingly, and now is the time to hone your hunting skills and determine whether the traces you find belong to the prey or not.

C: 建木重生，意味着罗浮上的星核所在已然明了。然而造成这一切的祸首却尚未露全貌。\n符玄受命率领云骑军监视毗邻「建木」的丹鼎司洞天。而你们，本着好用就往死里用…不是，本着能者多劳的原则，景元请你们往音信全无的工造司一探究竟，并借捷径赶往丹鼎司。
E: The revival of the Ambrosial Arbor makes the location of the Stellaron on the Luofu abundantly clear, but the culprit of this disaster remains obscure.\nFu Xuan is tasked to lead the Cloud Knights and keep watch over the Alchemy Commission delve next to the Ambrosial Arbor. As for you, based on the principle that a good tool should be used until it breaks — Errr, that the reward for hard work is more work! Jing Yuan asks you to find out what is happening in the radio-silent Artisanship Commission, and head to the Alchemy Commission via a shortcut.

C: 在踏入鳞渊境时，你并未想到自己会遭遇如此纷乱的局势。旧恨寻仇拦住你的去路，而追猎他行踪的少年剑士也决意不放你们二人离开。及至景元将军登场，你才明白，自己在仙舟上的过去终于还是卷土重来。\n身为持明龙尊的转世之身，有人将你引至此处，有人要你重现过去的奇迹——唯独没有人问你，你是否接受这一切。
E: When you stepped into Scalegorge Waterscape, you never thought that you would encounter such a chaotic situation. The old nemesis who sought vengeance blocked your way, and the young swordsman pursuing him was determined to not let either of you leave. It wasn't until General Jing Yuan appeared that you realized your past on the Xianzhou was finally catching up to you.\nSomeone had led you, the reincarnation of the Vidyadhara high elder, to this place. Someone is asking you to reproduce the miracles of the past — except no one ever asked you whether you consent to all this.

C: 受符玄之托，你们要前往天舶司将「停云」留下的扇子送交驭空。无论幻胧究竟是幻化伪装停云，抑或是操控了她，这其中都潜藏着某种危险的可能性——那位停云也许遭遇了不测。\n驭空司舵在悲伤中撑持，力主举办一场「仪式」，来安抚所有人内心的伤痛。司辰宫中，你们与岩明一同整理了停云所留的物品，其中有些竟是尚未送出的礼物……
E: Fu Xuan had entrusted you to head to the Sky-Faring Commission and give to Yukong the fan "Tingyun" left behind. Whether Phantylia was disguised as Tingyun or mind-controlled her — both spell out dangerous possibilities. The real Tingyun might have suffered a lethal accident.\nBarely holding herself up in her immense sorrow, Helm Master Yukong insists on holding a "soul-soothing ceremony" to appease the pain everyone must be feeling. You and Yanming work through the items Tingyun left behind in the Palace of Astrum, only to discover that some were in fact gifts yet to be sent out...

C: 仪式结束，景元邀请你们前往神策府一叙。在那里，他代表罗浮送出对列车团的赠礼——一枚结盟玉兆。凭此信物，云骑将不畏遥远，赶赴盟友的身边。而此次仙舟的开拓之行，终于抵达了尾声。在离开前，你想也许可以和与此行结识的人们一一告别。\n你列了列清单，神策府、星槎海、长乐天、太卜司，还有工造司…这一趟朋友结交的可真不少啊。
E: Jing Yuan invites you to have a chat at the Seat of Divine Foresight when the ceremony ends. Once there, he presents Luofu's gift to the Express Crew — a jade abacus of allying oath. With this token in hand, the Cloud Knights swear to come to the aid of their allies, no matter the distance they must cross. Your current trailblazing journey on the Xianzhou has finally come to an end. Before you leave, you might be able to bid farewell to the people you got to know on this journey.\nYou take a mental note of everything. The Seat of Divine Foresight, Starskiff Haven, Exalting Sanctum, the Divination Commission, and the Artisanship Commission... You've made quite a few friends this trip.

C: 流萤继续带领你在城中各处知名景点打卡——匹诺康尼的苏乐达主题休闲区「艾迪恩公园」就在前方不远处，跟上她吧。
E: Firefly continues to lead you through the various tourist hotspots in the area — Penacony's SoulGlad-themed rest area Aideen Park is just ahead. Follow her!

C: 跟随钟表小子来到事发现场，你注意到正在被围攻的不仅有米沙，还有那位容易迷路的巡海游侠。事出紧急，钟表小子亲自传授了你一门独门绝技「钟表把戏」，据说能用来「把好情绪灌注到他人体内」…真的吗？试试看就知道了。
E: As you follow Clockie to the scene of the incident, you realize that it's not only Misha who is under siege but also that Galaxy Ranger who is bad with directions. The situation seems bleak, so Clockie personally bestows you with a special technique: "Clockwork." According to Clockie, it can be used to "fill a person's body with positive emotions." ...Will this really work? You will have to try to find out.

C: 流萤向你解释了此处是为何地：黄金时刻的边境，梦境的更深处，家族的建设改造地（换句话说，梦中的工地），她还补充说，自己的「秘密据点」就在深处…只是「家族」眼线密布，两人得偷偷溜进去才行。\n你们成功跨越了此行必经的一切阻碍，可喜可贺——终点就在前方不远处。
E: Firefly explains this place to you: It is the edge of the Golden Hour, the inner depths of the Dreamscape, and The Family's construction and remodeling zone (in other words, a construction site within the dream). She adds that her "secret stronghold" is further on... The only problem is that "The Family" has eyes everywhere and you will have to sneak in to get inside.\nYou have successfully overcome every obstacle on your path. Congratulations! Your final destination lies just ahead.

C: 返回现实果然没有你想象中的那么简单——你和流萤甫一抵达黄金的时刻，就遭到了桑博的袭击。在你失去意识之前，你看到桑博似乎幻化成一女人的身形…如果不是他惯于女装，那袭击你们的一定另有其人。\n你在神秘的空间里找到了流萤——看来陌生人也没有放过她。现在，你们可以一起寻找离开这里的出路。
E: As expected, returning to reality isn't as simple as you expected — Firefly and you are attacked by Sampo as soon as you arrive at the Golden Hour. Before you lose consciousness, you see Sampo shift into what appears to be the figure of a woman... Either he has always had a petite feminine build, or your assailant is actually someone else.\nYou find Firefly in the mysterious space — It seems the stranger didn't leave her alone, either. Now, you can look for the way out together.

C: 你从嘴巴不牢靠的猎犬们那里打听到了加拉赫的所在位置，筑梦边境。好巧不巧，你此前和他有过一面之缘——或许你可以靠刷脸突破猎犬们布下的调查现场，从加拉赫嘴里打听到有关案情的进一步信息。
E: You learn that Gallagher is currently at the Dream's Edge from some blabbing Bloodhound members. Coincidentally, you had an encounter with Gallagher before. You might be able to access the investigation scene set up by the Bloodhounds by showing your face to Gallagher and glean more information about the cases from him.

C: 加拉赫略施小计，便为你呈现出一杯精致的特饮。希望在这杯特饮的陪伴下，你们的对话不会变得过于枯燥乏味。
E: Effortlessly, Gallagher presents you with an exquisite drink. Hopefully, the drink can keep your conversation with him from getting too boring.

C: 即便砂金以生命为代价向众人揭示了家族在匹诺康尼的黑暗秘密，但经由万众一心的家族运作，谐乐大典的倒计时仍未中止。这都多亏了你——身为家族（暂时）的骄傲，你现在的一举一动都将牵动整个匹诺康尼的心。\n是时候做你该做的事了，「知更鸟」。
E: Despite Aventurine revealing The Family's dark secrets in Penacony to all at the cost of his own life, the countdown to the Charmony Festival continues thanks to the operations of The Family's united efforts. This is all thanks to you... As the (temporary) pride of The Family, your every move from now will affect the very beating heart of Penacony.\nIt is time to do what you must, "Robin."

C: 流萤向你解释了此前她种种不寻常举动背后的深层原因，并指引你下潜至家族宣扬的「噩梦」——美梦之外的原初忆域——「流梦礁」。而这一举动也揭露了「死亡」的部分真相：不过是协助有心之人往返美梦的驯化迷因，而「闭上眼睛」则是唤来它的奇妙咒语。\n短暂的不适后，你发现自己已经抵达了一座荒废的旧镇。与众人交流过、准备停当后，就开始此次废弃车站下车之旅吧。
E: Firefly explains to you the deeper reasons behind her various inexplicable behaviors, and guides you to dive deeper into a place declared as a "nightmare" by The Family... The primitive Memory Zone outside the sweet dream: "Dreamflux Reef." This move also exposes some of the truths behind "Death" — It is nothing but a tamed memetic entity that assists specific people who wish to travel between dreams. "Closing your eyes" is merely a strange invocation used to summon them.\nAfter a brief moment of discomfort, you realize that you have arrived at an abandoned old town. Once you have spoken with everyone and prepared yourself, alight and begin your adventure at this abandoned station.

C: 你来到了一片——长满香蕉的小岛，睡蕉小猴的爱巢！蕉蕉蕉蕉~蕉蕉蕉蕉…这里看起来像是筑梦边境，但如果你没记错，筑梦边境应该没有开设动物园的业务。\n看看这猴子是怎么回事吧，万一折纸大学教课的真是猴子呢？
E: You find yourself on... An island full of bananas, a lovely nest for Slumbernana Monkeys! Bana bana... Bana bana... This place resembles Dream's Edge, but as far as you remember, there are no zoos in that area.\nCheck out that bizarre monkey. What if it's actually monkeys teaching at Paperfold University?

C: 考试结束，课程还未开始，现在是最令人欣喜的学院游览时间。一般来说，一段浪漫的邂逅、一场奇妙的冒险、一次世界毁灭的过程都是从学生在学校闲逛开始的。\n在校庆的创意集市逛逛吧，不保证有趣，但一定比上课轻松。
E: The test has concluded, and classes have yet to start. Now is the ideal time to explore the academy. Typically, a romantic encounter, a thrilling adventure, or the prelude to world destruction often begins with a leisurely stroll through the campus.\nEnjoy yourself in the anniversary's Creator's Market. While excitement is not guaranteed, it promises a more relaxed atmosphere than the classroom.

C: 这次的巡猎有还不错的麦芽汁、有搞笑的猴子，还有爽到漏油的派对，真他宝贝的有意思！但总感觉有点太乱来了，很多事想不通，但你上次看的电影说过…该死，那台词怎么说的来着——\n「如果一切都要解释清楚的话，这个世界就少了一丝神秘。」
E: This hunt is a blast, with tasty malt juice, hilarious monkeys, and a fudgin' awesome party! Yeah, it's a bit off the wall, and things don't always add up, but just like they say in the movie you watched last time... Dang, what was that line again...?\n"If everything can be explained, this world would lose its touch of enigma."

C: 最终的壮绝•狩猎已经开始！踏入狩猎场的众忍，握紧手中的忍法帖，挥洒那些你们曾见过的血泪——那不只是缭乱•忍侠的血泪，而是成万上亿被御猿•邪忍迫害之人的血泪！此战并非为忍义，而是为往日那些遮蔽银河群星的仇恨，以及断绝未来的仇恨的种子而战！化作大岚神的箭矢，照亮黑夜，唤醒众生，刺穿邪祟吧！\n唤醒迷惘的小猴，追猎逃窜的蕉授，不死不休，不死不休！
E: The final Grand Hunt has begun! The ninjas, who have entered the hunting grounds, grasp their ninjutsu talisman tight, and shed blood and tears that they have seen — It's not just the blood and tears of the Dazzling Ninja Hero, but the blood and tears of the billions of victims ruined by Evil Ninja Osaru! This battle is not fought for ninja honor, but for the vengeance that had covered the very stars in the past, and to uproot the seeds of hatred in the future once and for all! Transform into the arrows of the Great Lan, lighting up the night, awakening those affected, and piercing through the fiendish foes!\nAwaken the bewildered monkeys and pursue the fleeing Profnana! To the death! TO THE DEATH!

C: 或许他与人们同行已然太久，让人们对此有些生疏——当瓦尔特作为「敌人」站在面前时，绝对称得上可怕。\n寻找脱身的手段，继续自己的回望之行。
E: Perhaps Welt has spent too much time travelling with people, and they are starting to forget how it feels to face him as a foe... It's truly terrifying to have Welt as your "enemy."\nFind a way to get away from him and continue your journey of reflection.

C: 名为缇宝的女孩借助奇妙的时空复现能力帮助难民脱离了险境，一行人即将安全奔赴奥赫玛。
E: A girl named Tribbie aids the refugees to lead them out of danger, using her remarkable ability to replicate space and time. The group is now preparing for a safe departure to Okhema.

C: 「圣城」奥赫玛…据说是如今的末世长夜中，唯一的永昼之地。我们决定在城中游历一番，了解此处风土人情，同时收集可靠信息。
E: Okhema, the holy city... It is said to be the only place with eternal daylight amidst the end times' long night. We decide to tour the city to familiarize ourselves with the area and gather reliable information.

C: 遐蝶发觉尼卡多利的不死身源于它对「死亡」的背叛。为揭露深埋于岁月中的谜团，我们需要前往重渊借助欧洛尼斯的力量复现往日。
E: Castorice realizes that Nikador's immortality is rooted in a betrayal of Death itself. To unravel the mystery hidden in the past, we must journey to the Abyss and borrow the power of Oronyx to replicate the past.

C: 据{NICKNAME}所说，欧洛尼斯让{F#她}{M#他}看到了星核猎手…那是一段理应不存在，却无比鲜明的记忆。
E: According to {NICKNAME}, Oronyx showed {F#her}{M#him} the Stellaron Hunters... It was a memory that should not exist, yet it seems so vivid and realistic.

C: 为尽可能安全地推行计划，遐蝶与{NICKNAME}决定融入祭典，与一名沉默的斗士组成三人小组，向悬锋城深处进发。
E: To execute their plan as safely as possible, Castorice and {NICKNAME} decided to blend into the festival celebration, forming a trio with a silent warrior and venturing deeper into Castrum Kremnos.

C: 为尽可能安全地推行计划，遐蝶与{NICKNAME}决定融入祭典，与一名沉默的斗士组成三人小组，向悬锋城深处进发。
E: To execute their plan as safely as possible, Castorice and {NICKNAME} decided to blend into the festival celebration, forming a trio with a silent warrior and venturing deeper into Castrum Kremnos.

C: 遐蝶向寡言的斗士格奈乌斯坦露了此行的目的。一行人继续前行，沿途收集情报，誓要将尼卡多利的五瓣神魂归位，阻止不死神躯的诞生、重铸纷争泰坦的荣耀。
E: Castorice reveals the true purpose of our mission to Gnaeus, the silent gladiator. The party presses on, gathering information on the way, vowing to return Nikador's five soul fragments to their rightful place to prevent the creation of their immortal divine body, and to reforge the glory of the Strife Titan.

C: 前进路上，自称卡吕普索的神秘人突然出现，她声称已救下那刻夏，并带领{NICKNAME}他们向「启蒙王座」前进。
E: During their advance, a mysterious woman identifying herself as Calypso appears suddenly, stating she saved Anaxa and offering guidance to {NICKNAME}'s group to the Luminary Throne.

C: 克拉特鲁斯向我传达了阿格莱雅的死讯，而随后衣匠发来的短信也证明了他所言非虚，我相当震惊。摆脱「清洗者」的纠缠，我立即赶回奥赫玛，和{NICKNAME}汇合后，向同伴们了解情况…
E: Krateros brought word of Aglaea's death, and the Garmentmaker's message that followed confirmed it, I was stunned. After shaking off the "Cleaners," I returned to Okhema at once. Upon reuniting with {NICKNAME}, I sought out our companions to learn what had happened...

C: 克拉特鲁斯向我传达了阿格莱雅的死讯，而随后衣匠发来的短信也证明了他所言非虚，我相当震惊。摆脱「清洗者」的纠缠，我立即赶回奥赫玛，和{NICKNAME}汇合后，向同伴们了解情况…
E: Krateros brought word of Aglaea's death, and the Garmentmaker's message that followed confirmed it, I was stunned. After shaking off the "Cleaners," I returned to Okhema at once. Upon reuniting with {NICKNAME}, I sought out our companions to learn what had happened...

C: 赛飞儿将刻法勒的火种带至斯缇科西亚保护起来，并独自解决了前来抢夺的「清洗者」。只是，威胁并非只有元老院的刺客，于此同时，盗火行者的身影也已触抵冥岸。
E: Cipher brought Kephale's Coreflame to Styxia for safeguarding, then single-handedly fended off the Cleaners who sought to seize it. Yet the threat goes beyond the Council's assassins, for at the same moment, the Flame Reaver's figure has settled upon the nether shore.

C: 「戏剧」的第二幕，是白厄与那位我们熟知的悬锋王子——万敌的初遇…
E: The second act of this "drama" is Phainon's first encounter with Mydei, the Kremnos prince we all know...

C:
你还记得他吗，无缘黎明的卡厄斯兰那？
礼赞迈德漠斯，最伟大的征服者，最伟大的守护者，最强者；垂死的雄狮，目光如炬，无邦之王。
说啊，倘若刻法勒永志不忘：你已为他刻留多少伤疤，击碎多少骨节，自背后贯穿他的胸膛？
歌耳巴尼帕耳图书馆如何在火海中瓦解，最后一名悬锋人，他的毁灭是何颜色？
可悲的伶人，你不仅适合歌舞、把戏和玩笑，也精于刀口舔血的背叛。
大可用全世之重粉饰你的愚蠢，再用它装点自相残杀，惨剧的风味。
E:
Do you still remember him, Khaslana, the one who won't reach the dawn?
All hail Mydeimos, the greatest conqueror, the mightiest protector, the strongest of all. The dying lion, eyes blazing, the king with no kingdom.
Tell me, if Kephale never forgets — how many scars have you already carved on him? How many vertebrae have you shattered? How many times did you drive your blade through his back?
How did the Library of Garbaniphoro fall to flame? What color was the destruction of the last Kremnoan?
You pitiful jester, fit not only for singing, dancing, and jests, but also for treachery that walks the razor's edge.
Go on, veil your folly with the weight of the world, then adorn your fratricide with it — just to savor the taste of tragedy.

C: 作为匹诺康尼的资深老饕，你能想出一百种好吃又实惠的吃法。
E: As a seasoned Penaconian foodie, you've got a hundred ways to eat well on the cheap.

C: 你会踩上一颗拥有炫彩涂层的星际反物质地雷吗？同理，你会主动靠近一台明显是陷阱的电视机吗？
E: Would you step on a rainbow-coated interstellar antimatter mine? Likewise, would you go near a TV that's obviously a trap?

C: 你们很强吗？强有什么用？匹诺康尼讲的不是打打杀杀，是人情世故。
E: You think you're tough? So what? Penacony isn't about fists and firepower. It's about people and connections.

C: 我不是烂片导演！我是匹诺康尼史上最伟大艺术家！听懂了吗？艺术家！
E: I'm not some third-grade director! I'm the greatest artist in Penacony's cinematic history! Got it? Artist!

C: 为什么父亲要献祭自己的女儿？为什么女儿要杀死自己的母亲？为什么神明在折磨凡人？为什么飞鹰要将龟壳掷向诗人的脑袋？\n在数不胜数的酒神诗歌中，人们愤恨、哀叹、无奈，因为那悲剧的起因总是无情无形的，无法被斩首或施以绞刑。就像水手杀不死海。
E: Why would a father sacrifice his daughter? Why would a daughter slay her mother? Why do gods torment mortals? Why would an eagle cast a tortoise shell upon a poet's head?\nIn countless poems of the wine god, people rage, grieve, and despair. It was because the roots of these tragedies are elusive and impassive, beyond the reach of blade or noose. Just as sailors cannot slay the sea.

C: 烈阳焚毁了神悟树庭之下的祭坛，那是「大地」的封印。在我到达神悟树庭之后，这里俨然已受到了「记忆」的影响，「毁灭」既是偶然也是必然，我必须继续前进，深入迷雾之中。\n神悟树庭灵水淤积，按「贼灵」的说法解决难题吧。
E: The Blazing Sun ravaged the altar beneath the Grove of Epiphany, which was the seal of "Earth." By the time I arrived, the Grove was already warped by the Remembrance. Destruction is accidental, yet inevitable. I must press on, deeper into the mist.\nThe spirit water has stagnated in the Grove of Epiphany. Resolve this with the Spirithief's tricks.

C: 按照黑塔制定的作战计划，列车组众人将深入翁法罗斯内部，与银河联军里应外合，共同击败「铁墓」。
E: According to Herta's battle plan, the Express Crew will infiltrate deep into Amphoreus and coordinate with the Cosmic Alliance in a pincer attack to defeat Irontomb together.

C: 我追上了德谬歌的记忆，踏入一处静谧的花园——这是一页永恒的美好记忆。
E: I caught up with the Demiurge's memories and stepped into a tranquil garden... This is an eternal page of beautiful memories.

C: 一番混乱乌龙后，「异星水魈」再度逃窜。\n今后，也许你还会在意想不到的地方与它相见……
E: The Xenohydro escapes once again after the entire ruckus.\nMaybe you'll run into it again somewhere unexpectedly in the future...

C: 拉明娜履行承诺，帮助你寻访「水魈」踪迹，抵达第一可疑藏匿点后，你们决定守株待兔——虽然似乎早已猜到无功而返的结局。
E: Lamina keeps her promise and helps you look for the Xenohydro. After arriving at its first potential hiding place, you decide to wait here... Although you know you might find nothing in the end.

C: 你履行承诺，抵达希拉记忆中的房间，取得了《希拉的人物剧本》与一封由科员古恩撰写的《告罪书》。\n《剧本》记录着希拉的日常言论，《告罪书》中则提到了一项神秘实验，两相联结，令人不寒而栗。
E: You fulfill your promise, arriving at the room from Sheila's memories and getting Sheila's character script and a confession letter written by the researcher Gunn.\nThe script records Sheila's day-to-day thoughts, while the confession mentions a mysterious experiment. Connecting the dots between the two sends a shiver down your spine.

C: 就在你打算将《剧本》与《告罪书》交还给希拉的关头，却发现古恩抢先一步接管希拉的治疗，封锁了医疗舱。
E: You decide to give the character script and the confession letter to Sheila, but Gunn seals off the Medical Cabin and is now in charge of Sheila's treatment.

C: 在查清楚艾丝妲所谓的「中饱私囊」的谣言后，你决定找艾丝妲坦白此事。\n但出乎你意料的，不仅有艾丝妲惊人的财力，还有匿名群背后的真相……
E: After understanding the rumor about Asta's alleged embezzlement, you decide to report everything to Asta.\nWhat was surprising is not only Asta's wealth, but also the truth behind the anonymous chat group...

C: 看来阿兰并不打算在大家面前说出实情。\n通过先前收集的线索，协助艾丝妲证明她的猜想是正确的。
E: Looks like Arlan doesn't plan on spilling the beans in front of everyone.\nUse the clues you've already gathered to help Asta prove her hypothesis is correct.

C: 空间站的网络安全工程师认为军团入侵事件的背后另有隐情。你回想起自己苏醒时的遭遇，决定与他一同追踪星核猎手「银狼」的行迹。
E: The network security engineer of the space station thinks there is something else behind the invasion of the Legion. You recall what happened to you when you woke up and decide to join him in tracking down the Stellaron Hunter, Silver Wolf.

C: 冥火的力量肉眼可见的虚弱下去，这是捕获它的好机会
E: The power of the infernal fire is visibly declining. This is a great chance to capture it.

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n下矿区救人。\n帕姆注：{NICKNAME}乘客的日报，也太敷衍了帕！给我认真点写帕！
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nHeading down in the mines to save people.\nPom-Pom's Notes: {NICKNAME} is not putting their heart into the report at all! Write it properly!

C: 矿车工老师傅为你准备了眼前的「矿车难题」——三下五除二地解决掉吧。
E: The senior mine cart operator prepared the Mine Cart Puzzle in front of you. Solve it promptly.

C: 娜塔莎已经下定决心，要借助你的力量一举捣毁倒卖假药的虚假「互助会」。\n前往铆钉镇寻找「特效药」的源头吧，顺便将沿途遇到的「互助会」帮凶全都修理一遍。
E: Natasha has decided to dismantle the mutual aid society that sells counterfeit drugs with your help.\nHead to Rivet Town to find where the wonder medicine comes from. Also, if you meet any organizers of the mutual aid society along the way, it's best to teach them a lesson.

C: 合同上写着合同人的名字…这位就是被机器人抢走合同的可怜虫吗？还是赶紧去找到他吧。\n帮他找到丢失的合同，他就会去参加「菌菌」的竞价吗？这种想法可太功利了，但也不是不行，对吧？
E: You find a name on the contract... Is he the poor soul whose contract was stolen by this robot? You'd better find him.\nIf you return this contract to him, maybe he'll participate in the auction for "Junjun." This sounds scheming, but maybe it will work!

C: 你与克拉拉在机械墓场仔细搜索了一番，总算找到了可供使用的零部件。\n返回史瓦罗基地，看看这次的外壳能否让帕斯卡恢复正常吧。
E: Clara and you had a thorough search in the machine graveyard and finally found parts you can use.\nReturn to Svarog's Base and see if the shell can get Pascal back to normal.

C: 你不得不按照那位「绿芙蓉」的要求，抄写《千手慈怀药王救世品》。但五百遍确实太多了…也许有其他办法？
E: You have to copy the Thousand-Handed Merciful Medicus' Salvation according to Green Hibiscus's demands, but 500 times is just too much... Maybe there's another way?

C: 陶德破译了他老师留下来的内容，可惜这似乎和他的下落并无联系。他拜托你前往鳞渊境，几十年前，他的老师在此消失，这里必然藏着更多标识……
E: Todd deciphered the content left by his teacher, but unfortunately this seems to have no connection to the teacher's whereabouts. He asks you to go to Scalegorge Waterscape, where his teacher disappeared decades ago. There must be more markings hidden there...

C: 你总算等来了陶德的消息，他约你前往某处见面再聊……
E: You finally receive a message from Todd. He's asking you to meet somewhere to talk...

C: 就在你以为这只是一次平凡的测速体验时，交通事故发生了。一辆超速的星槎呼啸而过，肇事后逃逸…赶紧去往事故现场，看看有没有能帮忙的。
E: Just when you think this is going to be a normal shift, an accident happens. A speeding starskiff bolts along the lanes, hits another vehicle, then escapes... Hurry to the scene of the accident to see if anyone needs help.

C: 无论前半生接受过什么科学、魔法、信仰其他随便什么的教育，当一个三流网络红人向你发来垃圾短消息宣称她在某处荒废园子里撞见灵异鬼怪时，你的反应是——1、好耶，可以和她贴贴！2、什么新式诈骗短信，拉黑不送。3、算了，去看看吧。\n当然，不管选什么，你都暗自下定决心，任她巧舌如簧，绝不为此行掏哪怕五十信用点，绝不！再说了，你兜里哪儿有闲钱啊。
E: No matter what kind of science-, magic-, faith-, or whatever-based upbringing you've had, when a third-tier influencer sends you a spam message claiming to have encountered supernatural entities in a deserted garden, your reaction would be: 1. "Sweet lol, I can meet up with this hot babe!" 2. "A new online scam? Blocked." 3. "Whatever. Let's check this out."\nNaturally, no matter which one you choose, you would have steeled your mind to not give even <unbreak>50</unbreak> credits for this trip no matter what she says! No matter what! Besides, it's not like you have any disposable income.

C: 铜镜中传出雪衣的声音，可这些声音似乎真真假假，难以分辨。也许只有藿藿这样的当事人才能自其中廓清虚实。
E: Xueyi's voice comes from the mirror, but it's hard to tell whether these voices are real. Perhaps only someone involved like Huohuo could possibly clarify the truth.

C: 此刻陈放在黑天鹅面前的，毫无疑问，是一个垃圾桶。一个贝洛伯格款式的垃圾桶。你本该对这一幕感到惊讶，但你没有。你早就见怪不怪了。这份见怪不怪的淡定，使你感到自己有些沧桑。
E: What stands before Black Swan in this moment is undoubtedly a trashcan. A Belobogian-style trashcan. This sight is supposed to shock you, but it does not. You have seen many strange things on your journeys. This sense of being unfazed by the bizarre makes you feel like you have really gained some life experience.

C: 这场奇妙的梦境终于结束了。爱德华医生似乎想听听你的感受，和他聊聊吧。哦对了，别忘了黑天鹅最开始的叮嘱：「这段记忆的性质有些特殊，为了其他顾客的梦境体验，还请不要向任何人透露它的结局。」
E: This wonderful dream has finally come to an end. Dr. Edward would like to hear your thoughts — go and talk with him. Oh, don't forget what Black Swan told you at the start: "The nature of this memory is special. Don't ruin the dreamscape experience for anyone else by spoiling the ending."

C: 神策府中，景元邀请你们与怀炎将军一番恳谈，并剖陈曜青与朱明将军的来意。\n此刻你们意识到，在解决建木危机的同时，星穹列车已然进入了仙舟联盟的视野之中。令你们颇为意外的，则是怀炎将军那若有似无，推波助澜的态度。
E: In the Seat of Divine Foresight, Jing Yuan invited all of you to commune with General Huaiyan and scrutinize the reason of the Yaoqing and Zhuming generals' presences.\nAt this moment, you realized that, in the midst of quelling the Ambrosial Arbor crisis, the Astral Express had already caught the attention of the Xianzhou Alliance. What surprised you even more was General Huaiyan's attitude in pressing the issue subtly.

C: 在金人巷，驭空见到了老朋友
E: Yukong encounters an old friend in Aurum Alley

C: 在怀炎半是玩笑、半是试探的邀请下，三月七意外得到了登上演武仪典的机会。受学于罗浮与朱明两大将军的高足，有机会一窥仙舟剑术的堂奥，三月真是前途无量、可喜可贺啊。
E: Under Huaiyan's invitation, laced with both levity and inquiry, March 7th fortuitously earned a chance to participate in the Wardance. Trained by the star pupils of the two great Luofu and Zhuming generals, she was now gifted with the chance to delve into the intricacies of Xianzhou swordplay. March's future prospects were boundless, a matter worth much celebration.

C: 在怀炎半是玩笑、半是试探的邀请下，三月七意外得到了登上演武仪典的机会。受学于罗浮与朱明两大将军的高足，有机会一窥仙舟剑术的堂奥，三月真是前途无量、可喜可贺啊。
E: Under Huaiyan's invitation, laced with both levity and inquiry, March 7th fortuitously earned a chance to participate in the Wardance. Trained by the star pupils of the two great Luofu and Zhuming generals, she was now gifted with the chance to delve into the intricacies of Xianzhou swordplay. March's future prospects were boundless, a matter worth much celebration.

C: 幽囚狱中，来历不明的机械与劫狱者横行无忌，意在救出步离战首。而曜青的使节生死不明。受寒鸦请托，你们不得不深入幽囚狱之底，确认犯人是否依然在押……
E: In the Shackling Prison, unidentified machines and prison breakers wreak chaos with impunity. Their goal is to rescue the borisin Warhead. Meanwhile, the Yaoqing messenger's fate is unknown. At the behest of Hanya, you all have no choice but to delve deeper into the Shackling Prison to confirm if the convict is still behind bars...

C: 幽囚狱中，来历不明的机械与劫狱者横行无忌，意在救出步离战首。而曜青的使节生死不明。受寒鸦请托，你们不得不深入幽囚狱之底，确认犯人是否依然在押……
E: In the Shackling Prison, unidentified machines and prison breakers wreak chaos with impunity. Their goal is to rescue the borisin Warhead. Meanwhile, the Yaoqing messenger's fate is unknown. At the behest of Hanya, you all have no choice but to delve deeper into the Shackling Prison to confirm if the convict is still behind bars...

C: 空无一物的战场中，新死的顽敌再度现身于眼前。老练的猎手将面对一场特殊的逐猎……而她，已成猎物。
E: On the empty battlefield, a tenacious and freshly-dead foe makes an appearance once more. The veteran hunter is primed to go on a special hunt... but this time, she is the prey.

C: 联觉梦境的第一位作者名叫罗伯特。调查他在心绪空间中留下的影像，了解他的故事吧。
E: The first creator of the Synesthesia Dreamscape is named Robert. Investigate the images he has left in the Emoscape and uncover his stories.

C: 见证查德威克生命中最后的时光。\n在密闭的书房中调查一下，看看是否能找到什么有用的信息。
E: Witness the final moments of Chadwick's life.\nInvestigate the secluded study for any potential clues.

C: 跟随乔伊和冯恩去寻找那个孩子究竟藏在哪吧，说不定他会和「湛蓝爵士」有些关系。
E: Follow Joey and Vaughn to find where that child is hiding. Maybe he is related to Dr. Blues.

C: 现在，你已经是白日梦酒店的临时大堂经理了。\n但只要那些自动服务终端还在运作，它们就会持续不断地抢走你的工作。你必须把它们关掉。
E: You are now the interim lobby manager of the Reverie.\nHowever, those pesky automated service terminals are encroaching upon your role as long as they're operating. You need to deactivate them all.

C: 呜呜，呜呜…有怪物呜！
E: Wubba-woo, woo-whoo... Monsters!

C: 科员以斯帖正在为自己的形象而苦恼，你发现她在为戴什么款式的眼镜而发愁。带着你独特的审美，过去指导一下以斯帖吧！
E: Researcher Esther is having a rough day with her appearance. She's trying to figure out what style of glasses to wear. With your unique perspective on beauty, go and advise Esther!

C: 为了「鼹鼠党振兴计划」，尤利安打算继续秘密配送「地火」留下的快递。\n前往「地火」堆放快递的地点看看情况吧。
E: For the Moles' Reinvigoration Plan, Julian plans to keep secretly delivering the packages Wildfire had left behind.\nHead to where Wildfire stores the packages to assess the situation.

C: 老吉尔伯特希望你能把他推迟退役的消息转达给女儿莉拉。\n你买好了花——现在，把老吉尔伯特的信和花束一起转交给莉拉吧。
E: Old Gilbert wants you to tell his daughter Lila that his retirement will be delayed.\nYou bought the flowers — Now, pass old Gilbert's letter and the bouquet to Lila.

C: 前往上层区的公告板处，看看「正当权益会社」是否有新的委托吧。
E: Go to the noticeboard in the Overworld and see whether the Rightful Rights Society has any new commissions.

C: 「仲裁官」的试炼再度到来。它的内容、形式、好处和损害你已经很清楚了，不是吗？去吧，为了「均衡」……
E: The Arbitrator's trial is here once again. You are already well aware of its content, format, pros, and cons, aren't you? Go then. For the sake of Equilibrium...

C: 你遇到几位自称是「四大天王」的迷钟，在修好它们之后，你收到了一条奇怪的短信。生活又不是青春深夜剧，你实在摸不着头脑，但还是去有「藏着礼物」的「秘密房间」看一下吧？万一你就是主角呢？
E: You met several Tickers who self-proclaimed to be the Formidable Four. After fixing them, you receive a strange text message. Life isn't a late-night or even teen drama, so you're utterly baffled. However, why not check out the "secret room" with the "hidden gift"? Who knows, maybe you really are the main character?

C: 避难的祭司请求你找到伊来内。在半神议院或许能找到他的踪迹。
E: The refuge-seeking priest requests you to find Alain. There may be a clue of his whereabouts in the Demigod Council.

C: 一个自称「仲裁官」的生物为你安排了一项试炼。根据它模棱两可却言之凿凿的说法：如果通过试炼，在今后的旅程中你会遇到更强大的敌人，但也会获得更好的奖励。两者好像都不是坏事？
E: A creature calling himself the Arbitrator gave you a trial. According to its vague but convinced declaration, you will meet stronger foes but receive better rewards in the future by passing the trial. This doesn't seem to be a bad thing?

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 你再次加入了铁卫禁区的联合演习。\n这次演练的目标是击败<unbreak>40</unbreak>名银鬃铁卫——加油。
E: Once again, you join a joint training in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone.\nThe objective this time is to defeat <unbreak>40</unbreak> Silvermane Guards... Good luck.

C: 清理残响回廊，击败在此处出没的所有裂界怪物。
E: Clear out the Corridor of Fading Echoes and defeat all of the Fragmentum monsters roaming in the area.

C: 地衡司已经判明「模拟云吟术」并非是次元扑满个体行为，接下来你和地衡司决定展开「牧场行动」。\n接下来就是抓扑满、抓很多扑满，直到完成行动、彻底收官……
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission has ascertained that the "imitated cloudhymn magic" isn't something caused by one Warp Trotter alone. Following this, you and the Realm-Keeping Commission have decided to begin a "Herding Operation."\nWhat you need to do next is capturing Trotters. Lots and lots of Trotters. Capture them until the operation concludes and the whole thing comes to a close...

C: 清理区域内的所有污染。
E: Cleanse all contamination within the area.

C: 奥列格发来消息，希望你能协助银鬃铁卫扫荡残响回廊中徘徊的裂界怪物。\n奥列格希望你去铁卫禁区找一位叫威廉的联络员聊聊，他会带你前往残响回廊，完成第一次反攻行动。
E: Oleg sent you a message asking for help with the Silvermane Guards' raid against Fragmentum monsters in the Corridor of Fading Echoes.\nOleg wants you to go to the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone and look for a liaison officer named William. William will take you to the Corridor of Fading Echoes for the first counter attack operation.

C: 建木生发导致罗浮的货运系统出现了故障，鹤运物流请求你操纵机巧鸟寻回他们失事的星槎。\n和梓桥谈一谈，听听她的具体需求吧。
E: The Ambrosial Arbor's growth made Luofu's logistic system malfunction. Now, Heron Express is asking you to control cycranes to find a starskiff of theirs, which had an accident.\nSpeak with Ziqiao and see what she actually needs from you.

C: 根据梓桥的记录，这艘星槎应该丢失在太真丹室了，去那里仔细找找看吧。
E: Ziqiao's records say this starskiff was lost near the Aureate Elixir Furnace. Go there to have a closer look.

C: 现在，继续深入黎明云崖、向负世泰坦的所在进发吧。
E: Now, proceed further into Dawncloud toward the Worldbearing Titan.

C: 进行修复的尝试失败了，但如果能得知它的运作原理，司祭或许可以重新制造一个新的祭台——不如动用你的岁月权能，直接找泰坦问问看？
E: The attempt to repair failed, but if we could understand how it operates, the priest might be able to build a new altar—why not use your authority of time to ask the Titan directly?

C: 你收到了名叫布凯辛的科员的消息，她希望你能去黑塔空间站找她聊聊。\n根据以往的经验，类似的请求往往伴随着不错的奖励…下次路过空间站就去找找看吧。
E: You receive a message from a researcher named Grumpy hoping to talk with you in the Herta Space Station.\nAccording to past experiences, similar requests usually come with pretty considerable rewards... Go find her the next time you pass by the space station.

C: 雷金的感应仪又有了新动静！去歌德宾馆瞧瞧具体情况吧！
E: Regin's sensor found something again! Head to the Goethe Hotel to learn about the details!

C: 接受了小秘书的邀请，接下来就是正式得到金人巷商会的承认，你将担当「金人巷商业顾问」一职。\n前往陈机铺，去和会长谈谈吧…等等，为什么会是陈机铺？
E: After accepting Mingxi's invitation, what's left is to formally get an official acknowledgment from the Aurum Alley Merchant Guild. To achieve this, you will serve as the "Aurum Alley Business Consultant."\nHead to Oldies Depot and speak to the president and... wait, why Oldies Depot?

C: 至此，你已经是小秘书「金人巷复兴计划」中不可缺少的一环了，尽你所能帮助金人巷恢复繁荣。\n去和小秘书谈谈，看看眼下有什么可以帮忙的。
E: As of now, you are an essential aspect of Mingxi's planned "Aurum Alley Revival Project." Do what you can to restore the prosperity of Aurum Alley.\nGo talk with Mingxi and see what you can help with right now.

C: 金人巷复兴计划还需要继续，码头还需要你。\n总之先去经营码头吧，多赚些钱总是没有错的。
E: There is yet more work to do for the Aurum Alley revival project. The docks still need you.\nNo matter work, you should go operate the docks. It never hurts to make a bit more money.

C: 大矿区的试炼居然是用机器人引爆「托帕后援团」——当然这只是特效，并不会有人真受到伤害。爆炸乃艺术，不是吗？\n就让这些倒霉蛋化作艺术的一部分吧。
E: The trial of the Great Mine involves blowing up Topaz's Support Squad with robots, though as the explosions are rooted in special effects, no one actually risks getting hurt. Still, blowing things up is a form of art, right?\nSuppose you best incorporate your unfortunate adversaries into this artistic expression.

C: 根据发帖人的线索，幽灵星槎曾经出现在这附近，继续搜寻应该能找到什么线索——即便找不到什么也不奇怪，毕竟那是来无影去无踪的幽灵星槎。
E: According to the post, the phantom starskiff has appeared in this area. Continue searching, and you might discover something. However, even if your search ends up fruitless, it shouldn't come as a surprise. After all, it's an exclusive phantom starskiff.

C: 美食庆典正在进行中！去问问杰伊今日需要什么食材吧。
E: The gourmet carnival is in progress! Ask Jay what ingredients are needed for today.

C: 监狱的狱警们破坏了球笼航道，你必须手动调整路线将它们修复，不然就永远没法跟伙伴们汇合了。
E: The prison wardens have destroyed the Spheroid lane. You have to manually reroute the course to repair the lanes, or you'll never be able to reunite with your companions.

C: 和司令约好了去寻找舒翁。它好像有什么发现，跟着司令去看看吧。
E: Meet up with Mr. Bigwig to search for Siobhan. It seems like Bigwig has discovered something. Follow Mr. Bigwig.

C: 克劳克影视乐园推荐了《钟表小子》外传拍摄体验项目，虽然感觉不太对劲，但还是去玩玩看吧。\n这到底是游戏还是苦力活，还是得去亲身体验才能一探究竟。
E: Clock Studios Theme Park has recommended the Clockie's Extras Filming Experience project. Something feels off, but let's go try it out anyway.\nWill it be a game, or will it be hard labor? Gotta personally experience it to find out.

C: 在克劳克影视乐园中，似乎有两伙人发生了争执，走，去凑个热闹！
E: It looks like two groups are clashing in Clock Studios Theme Park! Go and check it out!

C: 《美梦往事》的影片已经全部剪辑完成，去和观众们一起观看吧。
E: Editing has ended for Dreamjoy Memoir. Go and enjoy the film with the rest of the audience.

C: 《爱汽水的钟表小子》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！\n找到宝箱了，快去打开它吧！
E: Filming for Bubbly Clockie has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nYou've found a treasure chest. Open it!

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•枪火的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将扮演钟表小子动画系列亦正亦邪、充满魅力的形象——哈努兄弟。\n「这到底是要比什么？」你想，「比谁的『哼』更酷吗？」
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Gunfire Trial arena. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role of the evil-retributing, charisma-overflowing character from the Clockie series — Brother Hanu.\n"What is this competition supposed to be about?" You wonder. "Are we trying to see who has the coolest 'hmph'?"

C: 这里的引导员消失了…和流萤聊聊发生了什么吧。
E: The guide here vanished... Speak with Firefly about what happened.

C: 终极挑战就在眼前，但周围似乎发生了一些奇怪的事情。
E: The final showdown is just ahead. But strange things are happening around you.

C: 十五日约定的时间已经到了，无论是凭剑艺一决胜负，还是向多日相处的同伴求助，三月七总该去面对嚣张跋扈的斯科特了。\n想必你们已经想好该怎么收拾他了吧？
E: The promised time of fifteen days had already passed. March 7th needs to face the arrogant and domineering Skott, whether dueling him with her sword skills or seeking help from friends with whom she had spent a long time.\nYou must have figured out how to deal with him, right?

C: 叩关赛的规则非常简单——战胜对手，赢取积分。\n卢卡选手只需要做三件事，胜利、胜利、胜利！
E: The rules of the Knockout Matches are easy — Just defeat opponents and win points\nContestant Luka just needs to do three things: Win, win, and keep winning!

C: 新闻发布会是体育比赛的特色，不能不品尝。\n准备好应付捕风捉影的、各怀鬼胎的、唯恐天下不乱的媒体朋友们了吗？\n是时候和他们斗智斗勇了。
E: Press conferences are a specialty of sporting events. You've gotta experience it.\nAre you prepared to face the cunning, plotting, devious, and conniving friends working in the media industry?\nIt's time to have a battle of wits against them.

C: 叩关赛的规则非常简单——战胜对手，赢取积分。\n卢卡选手只需要做三件事，胜利、胜利、胜利！
E: The rules of the Knockout Matches are easy — Just defeat opponents and win points\nContestant Luka just needs to do three things: Win, win, and keep winning!

C: 你和卢卡刚回到休息室，就听到了坏消息：\n有人在报纸上抹黑卢卡，引起了非常恶劣的影响。\n不用说，这就是传说中的「盘外招」了。
E: You and Luka receive bad news as soon as you return to the rest area:\nSomeone is smearing Luka's reputation in the newspaper and generating very bad press.\nThis is undoubtedly the rumored "dirty trick."

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n得到佩佩的节奏记录，帮助乱破收集作曲用的灵感吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nObtain a record of Peppy's beats to help Rappa collect inspiration for composing.

C: 三月七似乎有了新的灵感，和她聊聊今日的摄影课题吧。
E: March 7th seems to have a new inspiration. Discuss the Photography Task of the day with her.

C: 为了完成每日课题、角逐最终奖项，你作为摄影助理，陪同三月七踏上了摄影之旅。\n依据摄影灵感进行拍摄吧。
E: To complete the daily tasks and compete for the final prize, you, as a photography assistant, accompanied March 7th on a photography journey.\nTake a photo based on the photography inspiration.

C: 虽然奖杯被窃让你有些心痛，但还有冠军的荣耀等待你去角逐。前往赛场，准备开始冠军赛吧。
E: Although the stolen trophy pains you, the glory of the championship still awaits. Head to the competition area and get ready for the final match!

C: 迷路迷境的村长向你提出了复兴餐馆的委托，还说妖精的肚子空空的就想毁灭世界…所以，你是穿越到了昔涟讲的故事中吗？

C: 迷其林美食评审会的举办时间推迟了，现在就安心经营餐馆，优先完成营业目标吧。

C: 原以为驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大能够顺利成长下去，实现它的梦想，却没想到，在它身上出现了一种会变小的奇怪症状。据称，这代表它有欧洛尼斯相关的潜质…？那刻夏提出了一个出乎所有人意料的解决方案－让驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大修习欧洛尼斯祷言，进而稳定这一特性。好吧，神奇的第二次养成，开始啦！
E: You thought Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas would grow without a hitch and achieve its dreams, but unexpectedly, it developed a strange condition that made it shrink. Supposedly, this indicates it has potential related to Oronyx...? Anaxa proposed a solution that surprised everyone: Having Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas study Oronyx's Prayer to stabilize this trait. Well, time for a second round of magical nurturing!
