C: 可不是嘛，像是在观察什么奇怪的宇宙生物一样——不过这也不怪他们啦，毕竟大家都不知道我到底是什么来历。
E: Uh-huh! Like I was some kind of weird alien! I don't really blame them for being curious though — they had no idea where I came from.

C: 啊，列车长来了！
E: Ah, here comes the conductor!

C: 走吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 是啊，但…如果她所说属实，而我们又置若罔闻，「罗浮」上的人就会遭遇危险。
E: Yes, however... if she is telling the truth and we turn a deaf ear, then those on the Luofu will be in great danger.

C: 你想啊，管理资料室的是丹恒，下一个目的地的情况他一清二楚。然后这信息姬子姐和杨叔也知道——那不就瞒着我和你两个人嘛！
E: Think about it, Dan Heng's the one managing the archives — he'll already be clued in to our next destination. Himeko and Welt know already, of course... so it's just me and you in the dark!

C: 在她的身边还有一群坚定、正直的支持者，这是大幸。可命运难以捉摸，时常荒谬——就算在他们的有生之年里，雅利洛-Ⅵ能够恢复一定程度的繁荣……
E: The firm and honest support she gets from people around her will also prove immensely useful. But fate likes to play tricks on people. Even if during their lifetime they managed to make Jarilo-VI prosper again to a certain degree...

C: 托你们的福，空间崩裂现象已经逐渐复原，星轨的稳定程度也达到了合格标准…
E: Thanks to you, the Space Fissure is healing up, and the star rail has become stable enough for us to dispatch the Express...

C: 坏了，忘带纪念品回来了。
E: Oops, I forgot to bring you souvenirs.

C: 累了，想歇息一会儿。
E: I'm tired. I need some rest.

C: 从湛蓝星直达黑塔的太空电梯。星核猎手入侵事件之后，这座电梯就封闭了。
E: The space elevator that goes from The Blue directly to Herta Space Station. It's closed off after the invasion of the Stellaron Hunters.

C: 她还记得多少？
E: How much does she remember?

C: 你没事吧，听得清我说话吗？记不记得自己叫什么名字？
E: Are you all right? Can you hear me? Do you remember your name?

C: 成功了？
E: It worked?

C: 那我们去和他会合吧！
E: Then let's go talk to him!

C: 抱歉…空间站是黑塔女士交给小姐的东西，我必须优先考虑主控舱段和科员们的安全。
E: Sorry... This space station was entrusted to Lady Asta by Madam Herta. I must do this for the safety of the master control zone and the staff there.

C: 要不我借你个肩膀？
E: You can use me as a crutch.

C: 看来还是有好好完成委托呢，欢迎回来。
E: It looks like you did well completing that task. Welcome back.

C: 空间站情况如何？
E: How's the space station?

C: 摇杆的方向，「上」是频谱仪，「下」是滤波器，「左」是参考电平，「右」是衰耗器。
E: The controls are "Up" for the spectrometer, "Down" for the filter, "Left" for the reference level, and "Right" for the attenuator.

C: 没错…没错，「怨灵的痴缠化作有形之手，旧日的灾影凝为掩映诸天之尾」！
E: That's right... that's right. "The resentful spirit's senseless obsession turns into a tangible hand, and the shadow of the old disaster will conceal the heavens!"

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着阿兰：「<unbreak>55</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Arlan: "<unbreak>55</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 几块深红的碎片悬浮在空中，被一股看不见的力量牵引着，勾勒出断刃的轮廓。斑驳的表面像是烈火燃尽的荒原，诉说着它的曾经。
E: A few crimson fragments float in the air. Drawn by an invisible force, they trace the shape of a broken blade. The rusted surface looks like a barren field scorched by flames as it narrates its past.

C: …既如此。好吧，接下来该怎么做？
E: ...As you say so. Alright, what should we do next?

C: 别急，黑塔，艾丝妲也在主控舱段，让{NICKNAME}也和艾丝妲聊聊，好好考虑一下。
E: There's no need to rush into this, Herta. Asta's in the master control zone. Let's let {NICKNAME} have a talk with Asta first and decide for {M#himself}{F#herself}.

C: 我还有别的问题…
E: I still have some questions...

C: 嗯，个人兴趣。
E: Yes, just my personal interest.

C: 其中有一些文字难以解读，图画也晦涩难懂，想要深入理解看来非一朝一夕能够解读……
E: Some of the words are barely legible, and illustrations faded beyond recognition. It would take many moons for one to decipher their contents.

C: 这面镜子照不出你的模样，也许它有认主的恶习。
E: This mirror doesn't reflect your appearance. Maybe it only wants to show March 7th's.

C: 我想给你点更务实的东西，能够对你有帮助，你确实用得上的东西。所以形式上可能和你想象的不一样……
E: I want to give you something more practical and realistic, something that can really help you. So, it may be different from how you imagined...

C: 嗯，我们正在与之对抗…告辞了，祝你们一切顺利。
E: Yes, we're mounting a resistance as we speak. I must leave now, I hope all goes well for you.

C: 岂止是熟，呵呵…我们曾经是形影不离的好姐妹。当然了，那是在她当上大守护者之前的事了……
E: Hehe, you could say that... We were like sisters once — inseparable. Of course, that was all before she became the supreme guardian...

C: 讨厌？我们曾经可是形影不离的好姐妹。当然了，那是在她当上大守护者之前的事了……
E: Dislike? We were like sisters once — inseparable. Of course, that was all before she became the supreme guardian...

C: 大守护者怀疑之前的三个「入侵者」没有落入裂界，而是尾随布洛妮娅返回行政区。她下令全城戒严，逮捕行迹可疑的人。
E: The Supreme Guardian is worried that the three intruders may have followed Bronya out of the Fragmentum and back into the Administrative District. She issued a curfew for the entire city, and ordered us to pursue and capture any suspicious individuals.

C: 解读、解读…对啊！希露瓦小姐，{NICKNAME}，你们说，这会不会是铁卫的加密技术？毕竟我们家世世代代都在技术部任职，会用到铁卫的密码也很正常吧？
E: Decipher... Oh, yes! Miss Serval, {NICKNAME}, could this be the Silvermane Guards encryption technology? After all, our family has worked in the Technology Division for generations, so it won't be a stretch to presume that my ancestors used codes from the Guard, right?

C: 不对，关我什么事？我根本就是在帮那帮人擦屁股…替他们操心那么多干什么？又不是我的错！
E: No, wait. Why should it have anything to do with me? All I ended up doing was just cleaning up the mess left behind by those guys... Why should I worry so much for them? It's not like it's my fault!

C: 而且，根据勋章的造型来看，这位理查德•巴拉金十有八九是『造物引擎』计划的首席工程师之一。
E: Also, according to the shape of the medal, this Richard Balakin was probably one of the chief engineers of the Engine of Creation project.

C: 真舍不得这宾馆的床呀…好松好软好舒服！
E: *sigh* But the beds here are so nice!

C: （希露瓦回去了…发短信找姬子小姐问问希露瓦的请求吧。）
E: (There goes Serval... I better send Himeko a text and ask about the request...)

C: …当然。我猜这乐器的背后大概有一段故事…但这涉及你的隐私，我就不多过问了。
E: ...Of course. I—I'm sure there's a story behind it, but that's between you and mother — I won't pry.

C: …那可说来话长了。
E: ...Well, it'll take a while to tell.

C: 不过这植物是叫什么来着？我有点忘了……
E: As for the name... I can't quite recall...

C: 不容易。不过，姐姐，我想再问你一次……
E: No easy job. Serval, I want to ask you again...

C: 姐姐的东西…比我的还乱啊。
E: ...And I thought I was messy.

C: 况且…他没有落下大碍，能看出你们有刻意留手。
E: Not to mention... he wasn't in bad shape when we found him. Thank you for holding back.

C: 你看见《水晶日报•周末版》，它已经不剩几张了。
E: You spot the Crystal Daily — Weekend Edition. There are not many copies left behind.

C: 你回过头，只见同伴们神情复杂地看着你。
E: You look back at your companions and see their complicated expressions.

C: 真不知道你想搞什么鬼，桑博。上层的事和你有什么关系，干嘛非要趟这摊浑水？你还嫌自己不够显眼，非得被「地火」盯上才满意？
E: What are you up to, Sampo? Why do you insist on getting caught up in Overworld affairs that have nothing to do with you? If it's a whole lot more attention from Wildfire you want, you're going about it the right way.

C: 那个有点闹腾的女孩子，醒过来没多久就跑出去了，估计在附近转悠吧？
E: Your rowdier friend took off soon after waking up. I imagine she'll be taking a stroll nearby.

C: 十多年前银鬃铁卫撤出地下，下层区的状况就更糟了。除了围绕地髓进行的物资交换外，我们和地上几乎断绝了往来。
E: It's been over a decade since the Silvermane Guards withdrew from the Underworld, and the situation here has only gotten worse. The only contact we have is the exchange of Geomarrow for goods.

C: 说到物资，我那点微不足道的面子就是从这儿来的……
E: The sliver of trust they have for me has to do with the last one...

C: 阿七说得对，回去休息吧。
E: March is right. Does anyone have popcorn?

C: 我是不懂，而且也没打算帮你们传话。「地火」在大矿区遇到了点麻烦，头儿正在忙着处理。你们要是真想见他，就到矿区入口来找我吧。
E: You're right, I don't understand it, and I don't plan on passing the message on either. Wildfire's encountered trouble at the Great Mine — the chief's busy. If you really want to find him, come look for me at the mine entrance.

C: 娜塔！没想到连你都来了，奥列格去哪了？
E: Nat! I didn't think you'd be here. Where's Oleg?

C: 他们要动手！对面那群矿工没带武器。
E: They're getting ready to attack! Those miners are unarmed.

C: 对，这事不能就这么算了。首领他们还在下面呢。一堆破铜烂铁机器人而已，咱们可不怕它。
E: Right, there's unfinished business here — the chief is still down there. It's only a bunch of scrap metal. What are we afraid of?

C: 正在计算——基于平均开采效率，这片矿脉可以维系贝洛伯格两百三十一天，正负误差七天的能量供给。
E: Calculating... Based on the average rate of excavation, this vein is enough to supply Belobog with <unbreak>231</unbreak> days of energy, with a margin of error of 7 days.

C: …米尔斯，拜托了，请不要下手太重……
E: ...Please, Mills, don't hit them too hard.

C: 别跑！抓到你啦，虎克！
E: Don't run! I got you, Hook!

C: 想听听你对下层区的观察…
E: I want to hear about your observations....

C: 好啊，有空再聊。
E: A pleasure! Until next time.

C: 你信任「地火」吗？
E: Do you trust Wildfire?

C: 啊，有些不好的回忆涌上来了……
E: Uhh, not the most pleasant memories of that place...

C: 你的意思是……
E: You mean...

C: 不要明白得这么快啊！
E: How come you catch on this quick!?

C: 你尽力了，不用有负担，事先考虑不周是我的疏漏。况且，那时是史瓦罗先动手的，没别的办法。
E: You tried your best, don't blame yourself. I should've considered such a situation in advance. And it was Svarog who attacked first, we didn't have any other choice.

C: 但还有很多事情没有弄清楚。比如……
E: But we still have a lot left to figure out. For instance...

C: 不管作为女儿还是作为银鬃铁卫，我都必须尽到当面谏言的责任。哪怕……
E: Be it my duties as her heir, or a Silvermane Guard, I must face my problems head-on. Even if...

C: 反应挺快哈。
E: Were those lines rehearsed?

C: 说起来还真是对不住各位，我只是娜塔莎的代理这回事一直瞒着你们。哈哈哈。
E: By the way, sorry for keeping that whole thing about her being the actual leader of Wildfire a secret. Hahaha...

C: 才不是！她只是…有很多责任。虽然不大能理解，但我相信她在尝试用自己的方式解决问题。
E: It's not like that! She... just has many responsibilities to bear. I don't completely understand, I trust that she's trying to solve the problem.

C: 还说什么呢，也是你们的老朋友了。挺好的小伙子，正直刚毅，年轻帅气，在缺乏魅力这方面极具魅力。
E: What else is there to say? You know him as well as I do. He's an upstanding guy, as well as young, handsome, and charming in his lack of charm.

C: 那就有点儿吓人了。
E: Ugh, please don't say that...

C: 娜塔莎信任我。在她看来，我这个前军官比她一个医生更适合做组织的领袖。
E: Natasha trusts me. In her eyes, an ex-military officer was more suited to be the leader of the organization than a doctor.

C: 布洛妮娅有和你说什么吗？
E: Did Bronya say anything to you?

C: 哈哈哈，我没看错，不愧是「外来者」！我看你年纪不大，身手倒是不同凡响，比那几个只会按固定套路出拳的土鳖强多了。
E: Hahaha, I was right about you, you're quite a fighter! Green but extraordinary, much better than those boring old farts with fixed routines.

C: 真的吗？我不信。
E: Oh yeah? I don't believe you.

C: 不，我好得很，不劳你费神了。
E: No, I'm fine, thanks.

C: 什么事？
E: What is it?

C: 哼，你要是不乐意就把他带回来嘛。他去找怪物，肯定就往铆钉镇去了。
E: Hmph. If you don't like this, you can just bring him back. He went looking for monsters, so he must have gone to Rivet Town.

C: 本场比赛，我们隆重有请——搏击俱乐部传说中的客座拳手、来自高墙之外的超级新星——{NICKNAME}！
E: Coming up, we are honored by a legendary guest fighter from the Fight Club, a superstar from beyond the walls— {NICKNAME}!

C: 但你们可别以为这是吓唬小孩子的花把式！短短数天的时间，「灰背鲸」以惊人的速度登上了天梯的榜首，期间未曾落得一败！
E: But this is no kiddie trick! In only a few days' time, Grayback Whale has surged up to No. 1 without a single defeat!

C: 那怎么会！我们费了那么大力气才走到这步，怎么能错过最后的庆功宴？你说对吧，{NICKNAME}？
E: No way! After all our hard work, how could we miss out on the final celebration? Right, {NICKNAME}?

C: 嘘…那可是铁卫的戍卫官！
E: Shhh! That's the captain of the Silvermane Guards!

C: {M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}，我有个问题。越是让人期待的作品，越是让人等得很久。是不是期待让时间变慢了呢？
E: I have a question for you. The more I look forward to something, the longer I have to wait. Is time being slowed down by expectations?

C: 期待确实会让等待变得更长。
E: Expectation does make waiting longer.

C: 动手脚！
E: Do it!

C: 不关我事。
E: None of my business.

C: 哇！你是真的很关心每一个能互动的垃圾桶…答对了！5个是正确答案！这只垃圾桶因为你对它的重视而快乐，就连它体内的垃圾都变得美丽了起来。
E: Wow! You really do take note of each interactable trashcan... You are correct! Five is the correct answer! This trashcan brims with happiness because of your attention, even the garbage inside it is becoming more beautiful.

C: 瞧见了没，城里最高的建筑。那儿就是天舶司的总部。事不宜迟，咱们快些去吧。
E: Right there, the tallest building in the city. It's also the headquarters of the Sky-Faring Commission. Let's hurry. We haven't got much time.

C: 好主意，咱们两个在旁边扮演氛围组，给杨叔加油助威。
E: Good idea! We can be his cheerleaders in the background.

C: 是列车。
E: The Express.

C: 这是把我们当钓饵用呢…
E: He's using us as bait...

C: 有些可疑。
E: Suspicious.

C: 天舶司订了「浥尘客栈」的上房。恩公们办完这里的事情，就请随我一起去旅店里喝杯茶，暂作歇息吧。
E: The Sky-Faring Commission has reserved rooms for you at the Petrichor Inn. When you finish your business here, how about some tea together?

C: 是是是，咱是外行，你这个内行给我说说门道呗？
E: Yeah, yeah, yeah — so I'm a layman. Why don't you enlighten me, oh connoisseur?

C: 要使这人犯「开口」，太卜司得用上特殊手段。事涉秘密，无法公开。请你们见谅，但本座发誓：即使准备就绪，不待各位到来，审讯绝不开始。
E: To have this prisoner speak, the commission must resort to unconventional means... the nature of which is confidential and cannot be disclosed — forgive me. But I can assure you that the questioning will not begin until you arrive, even if that means wasting precious time.

C: 这样啊…我对这种人不是很有办法。
E: Hmm... I don't know how to deal with people like that.

C: 既然她不愿示秘，只能耐心等候回音啦～
E: If she doesn't want to reveal the commission's secrets, then you have no choice but to wait.

C: 没有，脑袋里没有噼啪闪过的回忆喔。拜托，你看我的头发，看我的眼睛，像仙舟人吗？你总归见过丹恒的吧。
E: No, I'm not getting any flashbacks. Please — do I look Xianzhouish to you? You must be thinking of Dan Heng.

C: 她的投降很蹊跷…
E: Her surrender seemed odd...

C: 我是不是刚才也跟谁这么抱怨过来着…？
E: Huh, now I'm getting déjà vu...

C: 哈！这牌还不麻烦吗？哎呀，这是摸了个什么鬼……
E: Ha! Isn't this hand a problem? I have the worst luck...

C: 别吓唬自己，有丹鼎司的龙女在，什么疑难杂症都能治好。
E: Don't scare yourself — the Alchemy Commission's dragon lady can cure anything.

C: 长相和性格，也没有必然联系吧。
E: Bold of you to assume my appearance betrays my nature.

C: 再等等。
E: One second.

C: 这问题可问对人了。星槎海终日狐人来来往往，没个一两千也有七八百。您问的狐人，与我们见过的狐人，那未必是同一个人。
E: Well that's a heck of a question, miss! I'd say nearly one in every two people passing through Starskiff Haven is foxian. We might have seen the lady you're looking for, but we wouldn't have batted an eyelid.

C: 您受累，再展开讲讲，她有没有什么明显特征——头上有耳朵，身后有尾巴可不算。
E: As tedious as it is, I'm afraid you'll have to describe her in more detail. Please don't say "two ears, one tail."

C: 疯狂…
E: They're mad...

C: 万一你现在暴起发病…
E: But if your condition worsens...

C: {NICKNAME}，当心哦。那些怪物的生命力可顽强了……
E: Be careful, {NICKNAME}. Those monsters are pretty tough...

C: 为何…为何如此？她明明说过……
E: Why... why? She said...

C: 我知道你会来的，因为提到仙舟时，你的眼神有着强烈的悲伤。
E: I knew you'd come. When we first mentioned the Xianzhou, there was a sad look in your eyes.

C: …不可思议。
E: ...Whoaaaa...

C: 「药师」的神迹吗？确实不赖……
E: The miracles of Yaoshi? Aren't they fine...

C: 将军！
E: General!

C: 希望穷观阵能灵验，希望太卜不会拒绝咱们…
E: Here's hoping the Matrix is accurate, and that Diviner Fu won't decline our request...

C: 她热爱的菜肴
E: Her favorite dish

C: 我收到了姬子的消息。列车观测到了玉界门重新打开，她问咱们什么时候回列车。
E: Himeko messaged me — the Express detected the Jade Gate's re-opening. She asked whether we'd be heading back any time soon.

C: 一程旅行又到了尽头，万事万物都得有个结局。结局之后就是全新的开始。
E: This little excursion has reached its conclusion — all things must come to an end. Still, some endings spark a new beginning.

C: 那万万不能够啊，咱们这无非是假意顺从那些大人，日后找到机会再弃明投暗！
E: No way. We pretend to obey the grownups, then get back to business as soon as we get the chance!

C: 我我我我我我知道了…那个，你！我们答应你，以后再也不找小鱼的麻烦了！你们能保证不来找我们麻烦吗？
E: Y—Yeah... Ahem! Hey, you — we promise not to bully Xiaoyu again, if you promise not to mess with us.

C: 质地如玉，又如久历年月的青铜，看起来质朴无华的信物，不过其上的嵌金纹饰出卖了它的尊贵身份。
E: Looking at the plain color of jade and patina, it's easy to think that such an item is of no particular value. But the golden inlay points to its noble origin.

C: 啊？我才刚刚收拾好行李欸！
E: Huh? But I only just finished packing my bags!

C: （是要我往墙上走吗…？）
E: (Am I supposed to walk up the wall...?)

C: （竟然真的能做到？！）
E: (How is this even possible!?)

C: 我可以再问你几个问题吗？我…时常会忘记一些事，因此比起回忆，我更习惯用「感受」去捕捉些什么。答案正确与否不重要，重要的是你当下的反应。
E: May I ask you a few more questions? I... tend to forget things — which is why, rather than memories, I'm accustomed to using my emotions to capture what I normally wouldn't otherwise. The answer is inconsequential. Your spontaneous reaction is what matters.

C: 我听不懂你在说什么。
E: I don't know what you're talking about.

C: 我说了，不用急着答复，因为无论如何…结果都不会变。
E: I already said there's no rush to give me an answer. Because no matter what happens... the outcome will remain the same.

C: 同时，它还是一份特别的匹诺康尼纪念品，独一无二，只属于您！
E: At the same time, it is also Penacony's special one-of-a-kind souvenir that belongs only to you!

C: 成语储备还挺多。
E: You've got quite the active imagination.

C: 欢迎来到匹诺康尼，尊贵的客人……
E: Welcome to Penacony, honored guest...

C: （「梦境贩售店」…要去看看吗？）
E: (The Dreamscape Sales Store... Should I visit it?)

C: 放心，爱德华医生会为您提供无微不至的帮助，助您选购第一款梦境，尽情享受在梦中才能体会到的视听盛宴——
E: Please be rest assured that Dr. Edward will provide the best service you can find in helping you purchase your first Dreamscape and indulge in an exclusive and marvelous dreamland journey...

C: （而对梦泡中模糊不清的部分，您的潜意识会主动提取相似的概念进行补全。）
E: (If any details are missing from the dream bubble, your subconscious will make up for it by substituting the missing content with something similar.)

C: 对不起…我真是世界上最糟糕的无名客。
E: Sorry... I am indeed the worst Nameless in the universe.

C: 你这开拓之旅还挺「欢愉」…
E: This trailblazing expedition of yours is indeed an "Elating" one...

C: …我承认。
E: ...Yes, I plead guilty.

C: 这可不是免费的帮助…
E: Well, my help doesn't come free...

C: 咦，怎么了？钟表小子脸上有什么东西吗？
E: Eh, what's that? It looks like there's something on Clockie's face.

C: 幸会，幸会！我叫桑博，是{NICKNAME}的老朋友，请多关照！
E: It's my pleasure to meet you! My name is Sampo — and I'm an old pal of {NICKNAME}'s.

C: 「我好像被吸进电视机里了…」——你很想对二人这么说，但不知怎地，你现在变成了某位…卡通人物。
E: "Looks like I got sucked into the TV" — You desperately want to say this, but somehow, you've transformed into a certain... cartoon character.

C: 哦，该死！别动我珍贵的财宝！那可是我辛辛苦苦剥削来的！
E: Oh, rats! Hands off my treasures! You've no idea how hard I worked to swindle those off other people!

C: 你一连发出几个很酷的*哼*，都没能让两人的注意力从电视机转移到你身上。
E: You release a series of cool grunts, but they failed to draw the attention of the twosome from the television to you.

C: 来吧，{NICKNAME}——祝你度过一段快乐的时光。
E: Jump on in, {NICKNAME}. I wish you a pleasant time.

C: 不用道歉，我没有怀疑你。
E: You don't have to apologize. I don't find you suspicious.

C: 好，我相信你。
E: Sure. I believe you.

C: 那你要先去帮帮这位…呃，只有你能看到的钟表小子吗？
E: Are you going to help this... um, Clockie that only you can see?

C: 哈哈，这也不失为一种原因。
E: Haha, that can be one of the reasons.

C: 我们现在该怎么办？
E: What do we do now?

C: 也很高兴认识你，美丽的小姐。
E: It's my pleasure to meet you, beautiful lady.

C: 我感觉自己好有负罪感……
E: I feel really bad...

C: 我们往那个方向走。
E: Let's go that way.

C: 那就让我们过去吧。
E: Let's go.

C: …小心，墙上还有些奇怪的东西…不像是惊梦剧团……
E: ...Careful, there are some strange things on the wall... And they don't look like they're from the Dreamjolt Troupe...

C: 为什么梦里的世界这么奇怪…
E: This dream world is very strange...

C: （不知道啊，我做梦时完全没来过这个地方。）
E: (I have no idea. I didn't come here when I had this dream.)

C: 终于——我重获自由了！我是「垃垃撕圾」，一个无比邪恶的桶。塔塔洛夫用卑劣的手段击败我，把我封印进这深邃的垃圾袋。
E: Finally — I am free! I am "Garboski," a can of unmatched evil. Tatalov used despicable means to defeat me and sealed me in this deep and cramped trash bag.

C: 什么时候才是个头啊…
E: When will this come to an end...

C: 是时候为民除害了！用你的球棒告诉它，这里是「存护」的王国！
E: It is time to rid the people of this menace — Use your bat to tell it that this is a Kingdom of Preservation!

C: …以及，你要明白挥出那一刀的意义和代价。
E: ...And then, with one swing of your blade, you must understand its meaning and the price you pay.

C: 不可能，我凭什么相信你？
E: Impossible. Why should I believe you?

C: 那来说说我的发现吧——很遗憾，是个坏消息。
E: Well, let me tell you what I discovered, and I'm sorry — it's bad news.

C: <color=#ff3a3e>说来话长，我因机缘巧合——{M#他}{F#她}应该记得——与猎犬家系的一部分人成了朋友，正在帮助他们追查要犯…不知怎的，就误入了这里。</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>It's a long story. I fortuitously — as {M#he}{F#she} should remember — became friends with some of the Bloodhounds, and was helping them track down a wanted criminal... Except I ended up here for some reason.</color>

C: 我非常愿意，但现在还不是时候。
E: Why of course, but now's not the time.

C: …但她却死了，就死在我的眼皮底下。
E: ...but she died, right before my very eyes.

C: 你好，我是是是是——
E: Hello, I a—a—a—am...

C: 是。隐患固然存在…但也只能等各方心思明了后，再做进一步判断了。
E: Yes... It's risky, but we can only wait until both sides have played their cards before making any further judgments.

C: 泯灭帮，那群遇见你后便不知去向的亡命徒…他们究竟经历了什么？让我来揭示吧。
E: The Annihilation Gang, that band of desperadoes who all disappeared after meeting you... What exactly happened to them? Well, let me reveal all.

C: 「祝你留下『难忘』的回忆。」
E: "I wish you 'unforgettable' memories."

C: 嗯…但这真的是隐夜鸫吗？
E: Hmm... but are these Nightingales?

C: 我猜，你身边这位博学的朋友帮了不少忙吧？
E: I imagine this knowledgeable doctor friend of yours has been of great help, yes?

C: …无耻的伪君子，你没收了我所有的东西，还要我给你真相？这不公平，在你们这座充满铜臭味的游乐园里，没钱办不成任何事。
E: Shameless hypocrites... You took everything from me and still demand the truth? That isn't fair. Your carnival reeks with the stench of cash. Nothing is achievable without it!

C: 听说他处境不太乐观，你们在帮忙调查一些…对家族不利的事，对吧？在梦境外边，有什么需要随时和我说，公司向来不会亏待合作伙伴。
E: His situation isn't optimistic, I hear. You're all helping to investigate some... dirt on The Family, are you not? Let me know if you need anything outside the Dreamscape. The IPC always treats its partners well.

C: {NICKNAME}，你究竟做了多么伤天害理的事啊……
E: {NICKNAME}, what kind of heinous crime have you committed now...

C: 拜托你啦，{NICKNAME}！
E: Please, {NICKNAME}!

C: 而那个男人…他也从来不是失败者。他与那世界的每个人一样，将人性的可能铭记于心。
E: And that man... He was NEVER a failure. Like everyone in that world, he etched the possibilities of human nature into his heart.

C: …我很遗憾。
E: ...I am sorry.

C: 它们看见那遥远的，来自天外的光芒洞穿云翳，普照大地。于是一次又一次，一代又一代，鸟儿们展翅高翔，试图触碰天顶，只因太阳就在那里。
E: They saw that faraway ray of light from above the heavens, piercing through the clouds and blanketing the earth. And so, time and time again, generation after generation, the birds spread their wings and took to the sky, attempting to touch its ceiling — all because the sun was there.

C: 那么，如果当最后的鸟儿终于飞上天际，却看见光芒的尽头并非太阳，而是{RUBY_B#吞噬一切的黑洞}漆黑的大日{RUBY_E#}……
E: Then, what if the last bird finally soars into the sky, only to realize that the end of the light is not the sun, but {RUBY_B#All-Consuming Black Hole}darkness{RUBY_E#}...

C: 好久不见啊！在匹诺康尼玩得还开心吗——「黄泉」？
E: Long time no see! Having fun on Penacony, Acheron?

C: （这声音…不是先前那位康士坦丝。是她的同伴？）
E: (This voice... It's not Constance. Could it be her companion?)

C: …「商品编码」也能当做护身符么？
E: ...Can a "commodity code" really be considered a lucky charm?

C: （家族果然不会告诉公司任何事…唉，简直是废话。）
E: (What was I even thinking...? The Family would never share intel with the IPC...)

C: ——「死亡」的血腥味就那么勾人吗，小孔雀？
E: Is the smell of "Death" so enticing, my fine fellow?

C: 我已见过这景象无数次，虽然是在梦里，但每一回都令我心醉神迷。也正因如此，无论如何我都要把她带回那个世界。
E: I've seen that scene countless times in my dreams, and every time, it mesmerizes me. That's why I have to bring her back to that world, no matter what it takes.

C: 米哈伊尔…？
E: Mikhail...?

C: 口感丰富、层次分明，真是杰作。尤其是辅料的处理，我能尝到某种别样的风味，辛辣、酸涩，却又带一点甘甜……
E: The richness and layers of these flavors are a masterpiece, especially with the adjuncts. I can taste the spicy and sour notes with a hint of sweetness...

C: 这也和之前的信息对得上，流萤小姐正是为了那份遗产才会被卷入这场惨剧…我们也更能确信，砂金对黄泉的指控并无根据。
E: That lines up with what we've gathered so far. Firefly got involved in this mess because of the Legacy... And now we're sure that Aventurine's accusations against Acheron are baseless.

C: 不对劲，如此宏伟的宅邸，竟然连个接待客人的管家都没有…是因为突发事件造成的空窗？
E: Something feels off... A grand mansion like this and not a butler or servant in sight... Could it be due to the disruption caused by the emergency?

C: 可以为我拍张照吗？就当是留个纪念。
E: Can you take a photo for me? I want a memento.

C: 哦…那你马上要登台演出了，是吗？
E: Oh... You're about to go on stage, aren't you?

C: 你才能借「梦中的死亡」去往那里，在这场盛会中，人们时刻寻求的那片应许之地……
E: To use this "dream death" to get there, to that promised land people constantly seek in this grand gathering...

C: 用不着你提醒。那位使节一出公馆的门，我就明白他想干什么，我的*仆人*全都看在眼里。他的小魔术确实骗过了我，但无妨，我非常乐意看见现在的局面。
E: I don't need you to remind me. The moment that ambassador walked out the doors of the mansion, I knew what he was trying to do. My servants see everything. His little magic tricks may have fooled me, but no matter, I'm happy to see how things have turned out.

C: 诚然，你身上的每一处都是真实的。棕色的头发，像{RUBY_B#梦境制作人}班尼{RUBY_E#}一样柔软、卷曲；橙色的眼珠，令我怀念{RUBY_B#隐夜鸫家主}惠特克爵士{RUBY_E#}的视线；古怪的伤疤，它是{RUBY_B#猎犬护卫长}伍尔西{RUBY_E#}的勋章……
E: Indeed, every part of you is real. The brown hair, soft and curly like {RUBY_B#Dreamscape Producer}Benny's{RUBY_E#}; the orange eyes, which make me miss the gaze of {RUBY_B#Head of the Nightingale Family}Sir Whittaker{RUBY_E#}; that odd scar, the mark of {RUBY_B#Head Bloodhound Guard}Woolsey{RUBY_E#}...

C: 不能让你留下的理由，又多了一个。
E: That's just another reason that you can't stay.

C: 感谢你们对家族的忠诚，盛会之星确实遇到了些麻烦，那位公司的代表…试图收回匹诺康尼的所有权，甚至做好了采取强硬手段的准备。
E: Thank you all for your loyalty towards The Family. The Planet of Festivities has indeed run into some trouble. The representative from the IPC... He's trying to regain ownership of Penacony, and is prepared for a hostile takeover.

C: 你知道我要做什么。我的「虚构」也已被你看穿，不剩多少时日了，没必要再虚与委蛇……
E: You are aware of my plan and see through my Fictionology. Time is running out, so let's drop the charades...

C: 哼…说「见过」还谈不上，但答案确实很好猜。我之前的提示，够明显了。
E: Hm... it's not enough to say "meet," but the answer is pretty obvious. After all, I've hinted at it in quite an evident way.

C: 上前去吧，他的终点…就在前面的花园里。
E: Go ahead. His resting place... lies in the garden up ahead.

C: …所以我同样理解，「相信」对于「开拓」意味着什么。我也想知道他到底留下了什么。呵，看你们了。
E: ...That's why I understand what "faith" means in the Path of Trailblaze, and I also want to know what he left behind. Heh, I'll leave it to you guys then.

C: 刚才那位先生…一点都不幸福。
E: The man we ran into... he doesn't seem happy at all.

C: 这里没有悲剧，只有幸福——虽然只有雏形，但这不正是我们心目中乐园的样子么？
E: No tragedies exist here, only happiness, although in its nascent form. Isn't that the same paradise we yearn for in our dreams?

C: （同伴下落不明，丹恒兄弟应该是有点急了。给他些时间吧，担忧是判断力的毒药。）
E: (Dan Heng seems pretty worried about his companions. I should give him some space. Stressing out about it won't help anything.)

C: …呃，不好意思。两位，我这边似乎联系不上星穹列车的住客们。
E: ...I'm sorry, dear guests, but it seems I'm unable to reach the other members of the Astral Express.

C: 诚然，血罪灵的行为，乃至它们的一生，在我们的视角下都毫无意义。可如果，我是说如果……
E: It is true that their actions and even their entire lives may seem pointless from our perspective, but if, and it's just an "if"...

C: 嗯…你们不用隐藏身份吗？
E: Ahem... Don't you guys need to hide your identities?

C: 喂！你也该改改那失败主义的毛病了吧……
E: Hey! You should really fix that defeatist mentality of yours...

C: 是的，虽然听起来很难以置信，但匹诺康尼现在很危险…我们必须去立刻阻止才行。
E: I know that this may sound like an exaggeration, but Penacony is actually in danger right now... We have to prevent it at all costs, sooner rather than later.

C: 匹诺康尼，还真是人才济济啊…希望我们还来得及。
E: Penacony's really thronging with talent... I hope we make it in time.

C: 听哪！玫瑰色的「纯美」已让各位哑口无言——多么荣幸！
E: Hear ye! The rosy glow of the Beauty has rendered you speechless — what an honor!

C: 这则故事发生在我就任橡木家主当天。那时歌斐木先生已成了如今的梦主，应他要求，我们进行了一场私人对谈。
E: This story happened the day I was appointed the Oak Family Head. At that time, Mr. Gopher Wood was the current Dreammaster, and as per his wish, we had a private conversation.

C: 「当然是家妹的手笔。梦主为何要为我兄妹的日常琐事登门拜访？」
E: "My sister, of course. But why would you personally visit me to hand me a letter from my sister containing mere trivialities?"

C: 小米沙，能再讲讲那艘「罗盘号」的故事吗？
E: Could you tell us more about the "Compass," Misha?

C: 我也发现了。
E: Yeah, I noticed that, too.

C: 别担心，一通百通，哪里缺了补哪里，我教你。
E: Don't worry, you've got what it takes. I'll teach you what you need to know.

C: 原来，你就是「钟表匠」本人？！
E: So, you're the Watchmaker himself?

C: …会产生极其辛辣的刺激。
E: ...It becomes extremely spicy.

C: 真是难以想象…一个看惯了鲜血、破灭和混乱的「游侠」居然能从红色里看出温暖。
E: Hard to imagine... a "Ranger" accustomed to bloodshed, destruction, and chaos finding warmth in the red color.

C: 「最先退出内战的是黑布林家系，在苜蓿草家系策划的『白色沙漠』事件中，他们永远成为了历史。」
E: "The Blackplum Family was the first to fall. They withered away in the White Desert event orchestrated by the Alfalfa Family."

C: 这大概就是匹诺康尼的建成史。囚犯们在外来者的帮助下，终于走向自由，建立起了宇宙中的「流放之地」。
E: This must be how Penacony was constructed. With the aid of outsiders, the prisoners were finally liberated and established the Land of the Exiles.

C: 距「谐乐大典」开幕<unbreak>10</unbreak>系统时 现实「白日梦」酒店
E: <unbreak>10</unbreak> system hours until Charmony Festival - The Reverie Hotel (Reality)

C: 「战胜虚伪的幻影——拥入彼此的怀抱吧！」
E: "Cast aside the veils of hypocrisy! And embrace one another!"

C: 「就让我们过去的君王讲述给诸君吧。现在，该开始最后的仪式了。」
E: "Let our previous king recount it to you. Now, it is time for the final rite."

C: 不过，要想见到它，你们也必须向我展现与星核伟力相称的信念才行。
E: However, if you want to see it, you must display faith equal to its immense power.

C: 醒醒…醒醒……
E: Wake up... Wake up...

C: 那可麻烦了，能努力回忆一下吗？你的名字是……
E: Not good. Try to remember. Your name is...

C: 这对你们有什么好处？
E: What's in it for you guys?

C: 放心吧。我们能在列车上一起相处的时间还有很长，这样的机会也一定不会少的。
E: Don't worry. We'll have plenty of time to spend together on the Express, so there'll definitely be more chances for adventures like this.

C: 有机生命对内在精神世界的不懈探索既令我赞叹，又令我羡慕。无机生命没有做梦的机能。但当智能脉冲激活，灵感回路开始运作，我会进入被定义为「想象」的状态。
E: Organic life's unrelenting search to understand the realm of inner spirituality is something I both admire and envy. Inorganic life has no mechanism to evoke dreams. But when my mechanical impulses are activated, my inspiration circuits will start to operate, and I will enter a state defined as "imagination."

C: 我们走吧，{NICKNAME}。匹诺康尼之旅…到这里就算圆满结束了。
E: Let's go, {NICKNAME}. Our time on Penacony... has come to a fruitful end.

C: 虽然「求救信号突然中断」意味着我们多半来不及了…但我觉得还是先去确认一下为好。
E: Though the fact that the distress signals have ceased means we're probably too late... but I still think we should investigate the situation there.

C: 又一个……
E: Not another one...

C: 不过，多亏了你的「记忆」，我们现在还有绝处逢生的机会。
E: However, thanks to your memories, now we still have a chance to turn the tide.

C: 而此时此刻，整个阿斯德纳星系只有一片梦境。
E: At this very moment, there is only one dream encompassing the entire Asdana system.

C: 欢迎来到「存在的地平线」……
E: Welcome to Horizon of Existence...

C: 纵使人性的弱点让他们驻足停步，但在真正无法前行的时候，人类一定会试图拯救自己。而现在…匹诺康尼有足够多的英雄，能引领他们前行。
E: The fragility of humankind often freezes them in their tracks, but in truly desperate situations they will strive to save themselves. And now... Penacony has enough heroes to lead them forward.

C: 「晖长石号」是？
E: What is the "Radiant Feldspar"?

C: 听着更适合小女生，你还是留给自己吧。
E: Those sound more like something for young girls. Maybe you should keep them for yourself.

C: 我什么也不会做，只是想走走，用自己的双腿，再多感受下这个世界。我想去买橡木蛋糕卷，在匹诺康尼的日子，我每天都会吃一个蛋糕卷，从第一天到最后一天。
E: I won't do anything crazy. I just want to wander around and see more of the world for myself. I want to buy some Oak Cake Rolls. I've had a cake roll every day since I arrived in Penacony, from the first day to the last.

C: 我已经为「命运」添上了新的注脚呀。
E: I've added new footnotes to my destiny.
Hmm...

C: 哦唷，不愧是托帕总监，脑子真是清楚！等大老板来了，您也要提醒她多留个心眼，当心对方挖坑……
E: Ohh! Your mind is always so sharp, Director Topaz! When the Big Boss arrives, please remind her to be cautious and watch out for any traps...

C: 哼…您可能对匹诺康尼还不够了解吧？来到这里的客人都有一个共同点：特别惜命。
E: Well... perhaps you don't know much about Penacony? All the guests here have one thing in common: They're terrified of death.

C: 假设您方才的猜想是真，奥帝先生——面对公司的这步棋，您又打算作何回应呢？
E: Let's assume your assumptions are correct, Mr. Alfalfa. How would you respond to the IPC's actions?

C: 这次的「开拓」之旅可谓惊险万分，却充满回味。但愿我们都能从这次旅途中汲取未来的养分，关于理想与偏执，关于清醒与梦想。
E: This Trailblazing expedition has been thrilling and memorable. Hopefully we've all gained insights about ideals, paranoia, clarity, and dreams from the experiences we've had.

C: 一只眷顾大地的鸟，一只向往天空的鸟…即便知更鸟亲手阻止了兄长的愿望，她依然不愿放弃他。
E: One bird longs for the earth, and the other longs for the sky... Even if Robin had to stop her brother with her own hands, she won't give up on him.

C: 但如今，宇宙中有更多势力知道了这个秘密，银河形势…会变得更加复杂吧。
E: However, now that more powers in the universe are aware of this secret, the situation in the cosmos... will become more complicated.

C: 久等了，奥帝先生。会谈可以继续了。
E: Thank you for your patience, Mr. Alfalfa. Let's continue our discussion.

C: 沃克挂断了电话，他金属构成的深邃眼窝里渗出了一滴燃料…那是智械的泪水。
E: Walker hangs up the phone, and a drop of fuel seeped out from his deep, metal-constructed eye sockets... those were the tears of an Intellitron.

C: 很有趣的现象，不是吗？我满足一些人的渴望，施与他们恩惠。而这恩惠很快又会回到我这里，伴随着更大的渴望。
E: Interesting, don't you think? I fulfill people's desires and grant them favors, and soon, they come back to me with even greater desires.

C: 那可真是我的荣幸…放心吧，我最讨厌的就是在赌桌上出千。
E: That'd be my honor... Don't worry. I hate cheating at the table.

C: 那么，星期日{M#先生}{F#小姐}——你想要什么？你又愿意为之付出什么？
E: So, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Sunday, what do you wish for? And what are you willing to sacrifice for it?

C: 拉帝奥教授，请给我签名！
E: Can I please get your autograph, Dr. Ratio!

C: 漏了吗？哦，还真是。但没关系，其实我根本没有上过学——我是说，「炸弹恶魔」娃娃没有上过学。
E: Did I miss a number? Oh, so I did. No matter though, I've never learned how to count before — I mean, Bomb Demon doll has never learned how to count.

C: 我可以就在这里快速等待吗？
E: Can I just wait around here for a moment?

C: 无论如何，它就只是个普通的毛绒玩具而已。你还能指望它说句话不成？
E: Anyway, it's just an ordinary plush toy. Can you really expect it to utter a single word?

C: 不知道她们有什么过节…但这条路也被堵死了。
E: I don't know what grudges they have... but this path is a dead end, too.

C: 但人们会因此记得：如果夜空中总有什么要亮起，那么在第一颗星星落下后…还会有无数的流星划过天际。
E: But because of this, people will remember: As long as something shines in the night sky, then when the first star falls... countless more will follow, streaking across the horizon.

C: 如果你们能在宇宙中铺下一段崭新的银轨，那列车恐怕就再也不用为能源发愁了。
E: Should you be able to lay down a new stretch of silver rail, the Express may never have to worry about energy ever again.

C: 你说谁是小孩？
E: Hey, who are you calling a child?

C: {NICKNAME}，怎么来这么晚？又跟谁跑艾迪恩公园玩去了？
E: {NICKNAME}, you're late! Did you run off to Aideen Park with someone to clown about again?

C: 她好像被抓住了把柄。
E: It sounded like blackmail.

C: 那位灰头发的同学——轮到你了！快去演艺教室吧！
E: Hey, student with the gray hair, it's your turn! Go to the performing arts classroom.

C: 银河球棒侠，亦是球棒•忍者。
E: I am Galactic Baseballer, AKA Baseball Bat Ninja.

C: 而且…唔！
E: And... Ugh!

C: 太好了，谢谢惠顾！这个月的生活费应该够了……
E: Wonderful! Thank you for your purchase! Now I can afford living expenses this month...

C: 嗯？怎么有群人把路挡了……
E: Hm? Why is there a crowd blocking the way?

C: 等等，部长，我在折纸论坛上见过他们，是来参观的匹诺康尼股东……
E: Wait, president, I've read about them on the Paperfold forums. They're the Penacony shareholders who have come to visit...

C: 先等会儿，我走神了？哪些人？
E: Huh? Did I miss something? Who's they?

C: 别害怕，这位伯伯是好人，你先去其他地方玩吧。
E: It's okay. This big brother here is a good man. Why don't you go and have fun somewhere else for now?

C: 没错！那再来最后一题——
E: Bingo! On to the last question now:

C: 其实我最近一直在，只是我们没遇见。但别担心，这样的日子还会持续一段时间呢。
E: I've been frequenting this place lately actually. We just hadn't crossed paths until now. Don't worry, you'll be seeing me around these parts for a while more.

C: 你尽管猜吧，但别想听见半个字儿，滚。
E: Rack your brain all you want, but you ain't gettin' a word outta me. Now scram.

C: 能见到猴子以外的演员，实在令人愉快。
E: Being able to see an actor who isn't a monkey... fills me with such joy.

C: 而他也相信，无论自己看到什么，都能维系惯常的不屑，狠狠嘲笑对方的故弄玄虚。
E: He also believes that no matter what he sees, he can maintain his usual contempt and mock the other for his trickery.
You...

C: 开始招呼吧！等到最高潮的时候，我非得请大家伙儿都喝一杯，你们这儿的人不赖。
E: Alright, let's get the party going! Once the hype is at its peak, I'm gonna treat everyone to a drink! Heh, I'm starting to like you guys now.

C: 哎，跟老师干架的学生在哪呢？不会错过了吧……
E: Geez, please tell me they're still duking it out with the teacher!

C: 在下已委托银枪•修罗殿下深入禁地，一探虚实。敬请放心，银枪•修罗殿下乃是一骑当千的大•忍侠，定能完成任务。
E: Rest assured, I've delegated Silvergun Shura to investigate the forbidden ground. Being the chivalrous and exceptional Ninja Hero he is, I have faith Silvergun Shura will accomplish the assigned mission.

C: 蕉…蕉蕉蕉…蕉蕉……
E: Bana, bana bana, bana...

C: AKA压力魔王来自地狱，学生赶紧收起你们的闲情逸趣。我的一语就能让所有忆域陷入抑郁，留下的创伤要用一生治愈。
E: Name's Devil of Stress, straight outta hell, students better quit playin', ring the alarm bell. One word from me, the whole Zone's in despair, leavin' scars so deep,{M# take} a lifetime to repair.

C: 你的顽强真是让人佩服，但再顽强的废物还是废物。我的实力是你的几何倍数， 立刻跪伏否则粉身碎骨！
E: Your grit's worth a nod, but you're no less of a dud. Better learn how to flow or get lost in the flood. With me spittin' power, a zillion times yours, gonna have to concede or crawl home on all fours!

C: 果不其然，这也是邪忍的陷阱呐。
E: Just as I thought, this is yet another snare laid down by the Evil Ninja.

C: 没错，只能人工繁殖的睡蕉没有进化的可能性，相同的基因赋予了它们相同的弱点。当一种致命的太空真菌随着生产线开始传播……
E: Exactly. Because it was cultivated by humans, the Slumbernana lacked room for evolution. Having the same set of genes also meant sharing the same vulnerabilities. And when a fatal cosmic fungus wormed its way into the production line...

C: 亲爱的制片人，您的要求已经全部完成，按照约定，请为我解除这毫无艺术细胞的{RUBY_B#模因病毒}诅咒{RUBY_E#}吧。
E: I've already met all your demands, dearest producer. Please hold up your end of the deal as we've agreed: Lift this abominable {RUBY_B#memetic virus}curse{RUBY_E#} that stifles my artistic expression.

C: 废话，打假靶子会让你有兴致？
E: What a load of hogwash, you reckon takin' aim at phony targets is gonna get your blood pumpin'?

C: 自蕉？
E: Bana yourself?

C: 好险！在千钧一发之际，你战胜了心中的*蕉声*。
E: Phew! At the last possible moment, you conquered the inner Banagibberish.

C: 先等一下。
E: Hold on a second.

C: 服下它吧，为了忍之都——
E: Swallow it, for the sake of the Ninja Capital...

C: 三号，应激能力培养-Ⅳ级，对抗下级战斗猿……
E: No. 3. Stress Response Training Tier IV. Fighting low-level combat apes...

C: 尤其是庸俗的善恶观，你还嫌巡海游侠带来的麻烦不够多吗？
E: That's especially true for the banal concepts of good and evil... Haven't the Galaxy Rangers given us enough trouble already?

C: 这个梦，就是我们的梦想。
E: And that is the dreams woven by our highest ambitions.

C: 「那白发的战士，明知力不能敌，也凭其勇力厮杀至最后一刻……」
E: "That white-haired warrior knew he was no match for me, yet he chose to fight till his very last breath..."

C: 「向我证明，你称得上这力量！」
E: "Prove to me that you are worthy of this power!"

C: 试炼里的东西，就像太阳一样…他要被烧焦了…！
E: There's a sun-like existence in the trial... It's burning him up...!

C: 「以尔勇力，推走黑暗，重现普射的阳光——令迷途的诸位战勇，明晰归乡的远途。」
E: "And with thy strength, banish the darkness and usher in sunlight — let all lost souls find courage on a long journey back home."

C: 万敌，你身为悬锋的继业者，自然明白：若只是在「纷争」的疆场上取胜，对你们而言易如反掌……
E: As the successor to Kremnos, Mydei, you know better than anyone that if it were simply about emerging triumphant on the battlefield of Strife, you and your people could manage it with ease.

C: 「纷争」之试炼告一段落。在阿格莱雅示意下，众人沉默着各自散去。
E: The trial of "Strife" is concluded. At Aglaea's signal, the group disperses in silence.

C: 哈哈…帕狄卡斯！就连牲口待宰时的哀嚎都要比这名字更动听。
E: Hahaha! ...Perdikkas? Even the tragic cries of beasts at the slaughterhouse sound better than your name!

C: 我只要你告诉我，白厄身在何处？
E: I just need you to tell me where Phainon is.

C: 缇安，这不是真品。*我们*都知道的，这种易碎的制品，不可能保存完好至今……
E: Trianne, this is a counterfeit. We both know it's impossible for something this fragile to have survived all those years in one piece...

C: 呱，礼物，我要礼物！
E: The gift! Gimme the gift!

C: …列车有规定，就是我也不能喝。
E: ...The Express has house rules about drinking, and even I'm not exempt to them.

C: 呀…大胆，大胆！阿格莱雅得叫女士啦！
E: Wah! You can't say that! Lady Aglaea should always be "Lady Aglaea"!

C: 阿格莱雅大人对他的态度，恐怕截然相反吧。
E: Lady Aglaea doesn't "trust" Anaxa at all, I'm afraid.

C: 那刻夏老师身为黄金裔…却坚定地认为「泰坦」和「神谕」都是一场笑话。
E: Despite being a Chrysos Heir, Anaxa resolutely believes that Titans and prophecies are a load of nonsense.

C: 「炼金术」还能做到这种事？
E: Alchemy can do that?

C: 那刻夏老师？信息量还真大…抱歉，请让我消化一下。
E: Professor Anaxa? That's a lot to digest at once... I'm sorry, please give me some time.

C: 空气？
E: The air?

C: …要是祂们也能干涉泰坦的事务就好了。
E: ...If only THEY could interfere in the affairs of the Titans.

C: 你考验我们的目的是？
E: What is your purpose in testing us?

C: 试问：你方才的回答是否字字属实，毫无隐瞒？
E: My question is: Was your previous answer the whole truth and nothing but the truth?

C: 一位路过的迷之好心人。
E: A kind-hearted and mysterious passer-by.

C: 神奇的是，火焰并未吞噬整个花朵，仅有些微火星汇聚于瓣尖，隐隐燃烧。
E: Curiously, the fire does not consume the entire flower. Only faint sparks gather at the tips, subtly burning.

C: …还有，与诸位一道会猎于王座，将那黑衣的剑士一举拿下。
E: ...We'll also take down the black-robed swordmaster at the throne, together in one go.

C: …杀戮、死亡和毁灭。
E: ...Carnage. Death and destruction.

C: 什、什么声音？
E: Wh—What's that sound?

C: 不知道。好一会儿没见他了，不会是找不着我们了吧？
E: Sorry, I don't. Come to think of it, we haven't seen him in a while. Did he get lost while trying to find us?

C: 但我们不在乎。所有人都知道，总有一天，王子会带我们还乡！
E: But we don't care. We all know that the crown prince will take us home one day!

C: 我曾向你的母亲发誓，要以生命捍卫你的王冠。但我未曾想过，歌耳戈之子会带头质疑…背叛悬锋精神。
E: I swore to your mother that I would guard your crown with my life... I never foresaw that the son of Gorgo himself would be the first to turn his back on the Kremnoan spirit.

C: 走吧，万敌——那些黄金裔是这么称呼你的——走你自以为正确的道路。你骨子里是个我行我素的战士，一旦下定决心，没人能阻止你。
E: Go, Mydei... Hah, that's what those Chrysos Heirs call you, isn't it? Go down the path you have deemed correct. Deep down, you have always been one to do as you please, and I am well aware that no one can deter you once you've made up your mind.

C: 你这…嗜血的蛮族…
E: You... barbaric bloodseeker...

C: 小敌！你把大家怎么了？！
E: De! What did you do to everybody!?

C: （失败乃兵家常事，别在意。）
E: (Winning and losing are all part of a warrior's life. Don't let it get to you.)

C: 发现一件很有趣的事。还记得么？翁法罗斯的天空被一位泰坦封锁了，{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}…它的存在让这个世界与天外隔绝。
E: I discovered something interesting. Do you remember that Amphoreus's sky was sealed away by a Titan? {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila's{RUBY_E#} presence keeps this world isolated from the rest of the world beyond the sky.

C: 我…不记得了…我要找谁？
E: I don't... remember... Who am I looking for?

C: 我也想当老师！不对，我很厉害，所以要当老师的老师！
E: I wanna be a teacher too! Oh, wait, I'm super-duper smart! So I wanna be the teacher's teacher!

C: 那刻夏老师，好久不见。
E: Long time no see, Professor Anaxa.

C: 这是…打算动摇*我们*吗？{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}为什么要做这种事？
E: Could {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} be trying to make us falter? But why would they do that?

C: 但这股疯狂也是我们的机会：既然火种是它的目标，人类就能诱导它落入陷阱。
E: But its madness is also an opportunity for us. If its goal is the Coreflame, then that means us humans can lure it into a trap.

C: 自然。与盗火行者交锋后，若阁下心力不支，自可抽身脱离战场，我们另寻他法。
E: Of course. Should you feel fatigued after our confrontation with the Flame Reaver, you are free to withdraw from the battlefield. We will find another way.

C: 剩下的…就看*我们*的默契啦。
E: The rest... will be up to how well we work together.

C: 「开山者」吉奥刻勒斯——他的故事，你听过么？
E: Have you heard the story of Geocles the Mountainbreaker?

C: 那折磨{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的疯狂，吞噬整个翁法罗斯的黑暗……
E: The madness that has plagued {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} and the darkness that has consumed Amphoreus...

C: 在思考什么…鼓舞人心的话语么？
E: Are you thinking about... saying something inspiring?

C: 嘿…这是句夸奖，对吧？
E: Heh... I can take that as a compliment, right?

C: 母亲…我有一件事想问。
E: Mother... There's something I want to ask you.

C: 愿你战无不胜，悬锋的王。
E: May triumph always be yours, King of Kremnos.

C: 悬锋人…果真和他们的王如出一辙。
E: ...The Kremnoans really are just like their king.

C: 但也有人…愿意为圣女铺平道路。
E: While others were willing to clear the way for the Holy Maiden.

C: 埋葬众神，和制约吾等的命运。
E: Bury the gods, and bury the fate that binds us all.

C: 如果是她一个人做到的，过程中我们的存在感…是不是又太强了？
E: If she pulled it off alone, were we too involved in this process?

C: 元老院…是坏人吗？
E: The Council of Elders... are they the bad guys?

C: 眼下唯一能确认的，就是<color=#dbc291ff>元老院中有人对黄金裔颇为不满</color>。最坏的情况…我们可能会被卷入圣城的内斗漩涡。
E: The only thing we know for sure is that <color=#dbc291ff>some members of the Council of Elders aren't happy with the Chrysos Heirs</color>. In the worst-case scenario... we could be caught up in the internal conflicts of the holy city.

C: 愿雅努斯为您引路。
E: May Janus guide your path.

C: 密钥之一解锁，迷津隆隆作响，变换成新的通路；再让石球落入池中一次，即可打开暗门。
E: One of the encryption keys has been locked, and the confusion rumbles, becoming a new path. Let the stone ball fall into the pool once more, to open the hidden door.

C: 等等…缇安呢？她回来了吗？
E: Wait... where's Trianne? Is she back?

C: 不知道你还记不记得，之前在匹诺康尼召开的那场「圣杯战争」？
E: Do you still remember the Holy Grail War we had back in Penacony?

C: 不瞒您说，就在刚才的电视节目里，我又见到了那个数次让我跌落人生谷底的宿敌…是命运使然，{F#她}{M#他}也来到了同一片战场。
E: But I'm not gonna lie, Mr. Oti... Just now, during that broadcast, I saw someone. Someone who's dragged me down to rock bottom more times than I can count. Funny how fate works. {F#She's}{M#He's} here on this battlefield, too.

C: 呃…因为一些小小的个人恩怨，他对我们部门的同事下手时格外残暴……
E: Uh... let's just say there's some personal history. He's got a, uh... particularly brutal way of handling my department's people...

C: 你就是我的从者吗？
E: Are you my Servant?

C: 哦，不客气。我的本意是连你一起打倒的。
E: Oh, don't thank me just yet. My plan was to take you out next.

C: 接下来，换我来抓你咯？
E: Guess it's my turn to hunt you down now.

C: 真是受不了，外行人居然在打圣杯战争，这哪是未来世界，简直就是世界末日。
E: Unbelievable. Amateurs playing at a Holy Grail War? This isn't a future world, it's the end of the world.

C: 放心吧，我有的是钱！
E: Don't sweat it, I've got plenty of cash!

C: 人类踏入了群星的时代，过去难以想象的知识也变得稀松平常起来了……
E: Humanity has entered the age of the stars. Wisdom that was once unimaginably arcane has now become common knowledge...

C: 你正欲破口大骂，但内心却不由地生出一丝怀疑。
E: You're on the verge of shouting, but just then, a sliver of doubt creeps inside you.

C: 可我真的感觉我们有…
E: But I really feel like we've...

C: 今天上午。
E: This morning.

C: 那三月七呢？
E: What about March 7th?

C: （星穹列车，我拒绝了他们的邀请……）
E: (The Astral Express... I turned down their invitation back then...)

C: 你呢？你又被送去了哪里？
E: And you? Where did she send you?

C: 所以到底是为什么？
E: What's your real reason, then?

C: …很高兴能应你的召唤，来到这个奇妙的世界游历一番。
E: ...I'm glad I was summoned to this strange world and got to experience it with you.

C: 那么，这笔生意两清了，容我告退。
E: In that case, my business here is settled. I'll take my leave.

C: 庸俗？还是庸俗点好啊！
E: Too crude? No no no. Crude's good!

C: 你和葛瑞迪他们好像很熟…
E: You and Grady seem to have a bit of history...

C: 多亏音符小姐的保护，我才能成功用同谐的力量摸索出正确的方向。
E: I managed to feel out the right path using the power of Harmony, all thanks to Miss Note's protection.

C: 源源不断的力量正在我的身体里喷涌，分裂！一个斯科特、两个斯科特、三个斯科特…后脑勺好痒，有两个我卡住了。
E: The power inside me is breaking out, trying to be free! One Skott, two Skotts, three Skotts... Omph, my scalp is scratchy. Two got stuck in there.

C: 我们的技能优先级更高。
E: Our abilities prioritize over yours.

C: 你以为能靠这台电视机变回去？但孤狼兄弟已经早你一步，破坏了影视乐园里所有的哈努电视机。
E: Think you can turn back using a TV? The Lonewolf Brothers already smashed every Hanu TV in the theme park ahead of time.

C: 对！疯狂地踢。
E: Yes! Kick like crazy.

C: 你的技能范围怎么这么大？
E: How is your power's range so ridiculously broad?

C: 总之，残存在最后一位御主身上的情绪，并没有随着敌人的死亡消失。
E: Anyway, the emotion affecting the last Master hasn't disappeared despite the enemy's demise.

C: 不不不，鉴于你此前「出色」的表演，我们的合作关系就此终止。至于老奥帝那边，我会替你申请一笔意外伤亡保险，发放给你的家人。
E: No no no, given your "stellar" performance earlier, our partnership ends here. As for Old Oti, I'll file a claim for accidental casualty compensation on your behalf. It'll be issued to your family.

C: 我要吐了。
E: I may vomit.

C: 砂金总监，这就是我的诚意！实装吧——<size=36><color=#dbc291ff>「员工通道，一键跳过宝具！」</color></size>
E: Director Aventurine, this is my show of commitment to you! Deploying — <size=36><color=#dbc291ff>"Staff Access: One-Click Noble Phantasm Skip!"</color></size>

C: 就像此时此地，被扭曲过后的「秩序」余音…只会徒增混乱。
E: This place is no exception. The distorted Afterechoes of the Order... will only add to the chaos.

C: 你尝试投入了一些东西，但它完全没有任何反应——小垃圾桶真有个性，成功引起了你的注意力。
E: You attempt to insert some things, but no reaction is observed — This little trashcan has quite the personality, successfully grabbing your attention.

C: 哎，我倒是听懂了，给你翻译翻译：「这点钱糊弄谁呢？」
E: Ahaha, let me translate that for you: "Who are you trying to pay with your spare change?"

C: 虽然「星核」风波已经平息，但别有用心之人未必就不存在了。
E: The Stellaron incident may have been quelled, but who is to say that nobody has another agenda?

C: 跟我去见他们吧。你也一起。
E: Come with me — we'll go find them. You come along too.

C: 不用担心，类似的事在美梦中不算少见。
E: There is no cause for concern. We've experienced similar incidents from time to time in the sweet dream.

C: 声音？
E: A voice?

C: 那幻胧夺走了我的人生，狐人睚眦必报，绝不吃亏，小女子一定得从她手里拿回些什么才是。
E: Phantylia had stolen a piece of my life, and a foxian always gets even. I will not be taken advantage of. I must take something back from her as well.

C: 但思来想去，可称得上等价之物的…也只有「和各位的缘分」了。
E: But after thinking it over, the only thing that could be considered equal value... is the bond I have with all of you.

C: 而此时此刻，也有一桩旁证能为驭空大人展现我的本心。
E: There is someone who can attest to my true intentions.

C: 她正沉醉于某件令我无比迷恋的事物。
E: She is captivated by something that has deeply mesmerized me.

C: 在那场失败中，他或许采用了错误的手段，但我不觉得他抱有错误的初衷。我们曾站在同一个起点，现在轮到他飞向群星了。我相信他能找到正确的路，即便孤身一人。
E: He may have taken the wrong approach when he failed, but I don't think he had the wrong intentions. We once stood together at the same starting line, but now it's his turn to fly for the stars. I believe he'll find the right path, even if he has to do it alone.

C: 但在出发前，瓦尔特先生，我还想请教您一个问题。
E: But before we leave, I have a question I'd like to ask you, Mr. Yang.

C: 我毕竟是一介逃犯，理应断绝所有被家族感知的可能。
E: I am a fugitive, after all. I must remove any chance of being detected by The Family.

C: 又或者，是另一种可能吧。
E: You could say he's another possibility of me.

C: 但在那之前，我同样会履行乘客的职责，尽心尽力。
E: Until then, I will do my best to fulfill my duty as a passenger.

C: 知道你不畏生死，但别冲动，大伙都挺珍惜你的。
E: I know you're fearless even in the face of death, but don't act recklessly. Everyone values you.

C: 咦，三月七呢？
E: Hey, where's March 7th?

C: {NICKNAME}，这趟「开拓」之旅，我想交给你和丹恒打头阵，可以吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, I want you and Dan Heng to take the lead in this trailblazing expedition. Are you up for it?

C: 这是紧急情况下的备案，可不要觉得列车能随便当积木拆哦！
E: Only in extenuating circumstances~! Don't go thinking you can detach cars from the Express every which way, alright!

C: （三月七，没事吧？）
E: (Is March 7th okay?)

C: 噢，初登场的仪式感……
E: Hm. So, a dramatic debut...?

C: 呼，好险…差点碎了一地……
E: Phew, that was close... I almost shattered...

C: 等等…他们想干嘛？
E: Wait... What are they up to?

C: 失礼了，黑塔女士——
E: Please pardon me, Madam Herta—

C: 还有别的办法吗？
E: Is there something else we can try?

C: （说起来，印象里小三月从来都没有生过病。）
E: (Now that I think about it, I don't think March has ever fallen sick before.)

C: …丹恒？
E: ...Dan Heng?

C: …借一步说话吧，野外实在不安全。你们也看见了，就在神殿里还有不少难民未能脱困。
E: ...Let's talk somewhere else. You've seen it first-hand. It isn't safe out here. As you saw, there are still many refugees who haven't been freed in the temple.

C: 好奇怪的名字。
E: That's an unusual name.

C: 确切地说，是整个世界将要终结。
E: To be precise, it's the whole world that's coming to an end.

C: 刚才的神迹是什么？
E: What is the miracle performed earlier?

C: 是眼花了吗，你总觉得它们的位置变了。还是别太靠近了。
E: Are your eyes playing tricks on you? You keep thinking that their positions have changed. Best not to get too close.

C: 二位如此勇武，莫非是异邦的黄金裔？
E: You both fought so bravely. Are you Chrysos Heirs from a foreign land?

C: 不必惊慌，奥赫玛也不是毫无准备，神谕早已警示我们。这是天灾，但并非死劫。
E: There's no need to panic. Okhema is not completely unprepared. The prophecy had warned us about this. This is a catastrophe, but it's not the end.

C: 小白——
E: Snowy...

C: 这也是我想说的，犯不着在这些小卒身上使用你的力量。
E: I was about to say the same. It's pointless to waste your strength on these pawns.

C: 的确，和星期日不分高下。
E: Indeed, her manner of speaking is comparable to Sunday's.

C: 死亡的阴影…过去吧……
E: Shadow of Death... Begone...

C: 「至少现在先配合一下，争取她的信任吧」——你如此说服自己。
E: "At least cooperate for now and try to earn her trust," you persuade yourself.

C: 和丹恒先生一同参观下「圣城」吧，看看人们是如何在困境中谋生的。晚些时候，我会为两位贵客准备好见面礼。
E: Why don't you and Mr. Dan Heng tour our "holy city"? See how our people make ends meet in this difficult time. I will have your welcome gifts ready later today.

C: 将从阿格莱雅那里获得的信息，以及与她达成的约定转述给了丹恒……
E: Relay the information obtained from Aglaea and the agreement reached with her to Dan Heng...

C: 莫非，你也有学习<color=#dbc291ff>欧洛尼斯祷言</color>的资质？
E: Maybe... you also have the ability to learn <color=#dbc291ff>Oronyx's prayers</color>, too?

C: 哇…{NICKNAME}真是天赋异禀，一教就会！
E: Wow... {NICKNAME} got it on the first try! You're a natural!

C: 喔——你是想说「拍照」吧？
E: Oh... You mean to say "take a photo," don't you?

C: 怎么不说话了？
E: What is it? Cat got your tongue?

C: 我们得更小心了。
E: Looks like we have to be even more cautious.

C: 你将三月七的相机放在了地上，遐蝶弯腰将它拾起……
E: You put March 7th's camera on the ground, and Castorice bends down to pick it up...

C: 光圈、感光度、还有预设的滤镜…虽然外观不同，但实际构造是一样的。没问题。
E: The aperture, exposure index, and preset filter... Although it looks different on the outside, it actually has the same internal structure. There won't be any issues.

C: 你见过达米亚诺斯吗？
E: Have you seen Damionis?

C: 好吧。要是您改主意了，随时找我哈。
E: Alright, feel free to look for me at anytime if you change your mind.

C: 现在先不拍照了。去见阿格莱雅吧。
E: We'll take photos later. Let's go and meet Aglaea now.

C: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的领地，也是它如今的居所，一座隐于迷雾的移动城邦。
E: {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} territory and their current abode — it's a moving city-state enveloped in fog.

C: 掬一捧清水，将手掌悬于胸前，感受流水从指缝间轻柔流走……
E: Take a handful of the pristine water, lift your palms in front of your chest, and feel the water gently flow away through your fingers...

C: 你们三人赶赴悬锋城，来到斗技场的中央
E: The three of you rush into Castrum Kremnos and arrive at the arena

C: 有一天，我也要当天女！
E: I want to become a celestial maiden one day!

C: 愤怒吞没了你。记作一步。
E: You've let your anger consume you. A step will be recorded.

C: 前路艰险，我不会强迫你们。但如果二位决定留下，我——哀丽秘榭的白厄，定会努力修补你们和黄金裔之间的嫌隙，不遗余力。
E: The path ahead is bound to be perilous, and I won't impose my will upon you. Yet, if you choose to stay, I, Phainon from Aedes Elysiae, will spare no effort to bridge the gap between you and the Chrysos Heirs.

C: 阿格莱雅这一通发难也有些突然，背后可能另有原因。
E: Aglaea's verbal attack on us was also quite sudden. There might be a reason behind it.

C: 走哇，走哇~风风…旋风…悬锋城！
E: Blow, wind, blow~! All the way to Castrum Kremnos!

C: 给{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的最后一击。
E: The privilege of delivering the final blow to {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}.

C: 我们打认识起就是这样，亦敌亦友。和他一起行动总能激起我的好胜心。
E: We've been both friends and foes since the day we met. Working with him always brings out my competitive side.

C: 坏人。麻烦。帮助，需要。
E: Bad people. Troublesome. Help, needed.

C: 我还要尽最大的努力向你直抒胸襟…因为现在，我还做不到这点。
E: I will also try my best to express my thoughts openly to you... Because right now, I'm still unable to do it.

C: 我猜，在那篇我还未曾读到的剧本上，你一定会遇到很多危险，置身可怕的困境。
E: I suppose, in that script I haven't yet read, you'll face plenty of danger and end up in dreadful predicaments.

C: 如果它真是浮黎的造物，亦或和那位星神存在某种关联，我愿意相信它能施展比「{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}奇迹」更强大的力量。
E: If they are truly a creation of Fuli, or have some connection to that Aeon, I'm willing to believe they can wield a power greater than {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s Miracle.

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 如何，大工匠？用于封印神性的「剑皿」，你造得出来吗？
E: Grand Craftsman, would it be possible for you to craft a Sword Vessel that can seal divinity?

C: 味道，浓烈…继续，下一个！
E: Scent, strong... Onward, next!

C: 那家伙，差点没把我们害死！
E: That guy... He almost got us killed!

C: 之前差点被你害死！
E: You almost got me killed!

C: …孩子？
E: ...Child?

C: （…谢谢你，孩子。）
E: (...Thank you, child.)

C: …下一组！下一组前来挑战的斗士在哪？欧利庞王还在等待，等待第一位能活着站在他面前的勇士！
E: ...Next! Do we have any more warriors ready for the challenge? King Eurypon awaits, longing for the first brave soul to survive and stand before him!

C: 嘘…听。
E: Hush... Listen.

C: 因为…他还对死亡心存畏惧。尽管卑劣、肮脏，但他罪不至死，不应沦为{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}「灰黯之手」{RUBY_E#}的祭品。
E: Because... he still knows how to fear death. Despicable or scum he may be, but he doesn't deserve to die here, nor become a sacrifice to the {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Hand of Shadow{RUBY_E#}.

C: 依照你的说法，在刚才的瞬间…你一定是克服了莫大的恐惧，才胆敢拦在我的剑前。
E: If I understand you correctly, you must have overcome tremendous fear to dare to stand in the way of my sword.

C: 袭击奥赫玛的计划，在如此久远的年代就已有雏形了吗？
E: So their plan to attack Okhema was conceived that long ago?

C: 裂分…灵魂……
E: Split... soul...

C: 它说了什么？我需要知道……
E: What did they say? Please, I need to know...

C: 翁法罗斯已经许久未见一位新的半神诞生了。若你能填补{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}留下的空缺，对于圣城的公民将会是极大的鼓舞。
E: It has been far too long since Amphoreus last saw the birth of a demigod. Having you take {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s place will surely invigorate the spirits of those in the holy city.

C: 你搞错了，我才是主角。
E: Sorry to burst your bubble, but I'm the protagonist here.

C: …你还在回想<color=#dbc291ff>那时</color>的事吗，白厄阁下？
E: ...Are you still thinking about <color=#dbc291ff>the past</color>, Lord Phainon?

C: 我准备好了。
E: So, I'm ready to begin.

C: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}「天谴之矛」{RUBY_E#}的星辰被点亮了……
E: The {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#}'s constellation is illuminated...

C: 嗯，如果发生了那种事…也就代表世界必须有人去拯救了。
E: Mm-hmm. If something like that happens, someone will have to save the world.

C: 还有事没解决？好吧。但别过分折腾，记得管理好精力。
E: There are still things that you need to attend to? Alright, but don't overexert yourself. Make sure to keep yourself well rested.

C: 虽然{NICKNAME}爱开不合时宜的玩笑，但{F#她}{M#他}的决心同黄金裔一样坚定。{F#她}{M#他}一定会成功。
E: Although {NICKNAME} loves cracking jokes at inopportune times, {M#his}{F#her} determination is as strong as the Chrysos Heirs. {M#He}{F#She} will definitely succeed.

C: 没错，我活在当下。
E: That's right, I live in the moment.

C: 即便那意味着…你要骗过死亡……
E: Even if that means... you'll have to cheat death...

C: 请站好，然后慢慢地，转过身……
E: Please stay there and slowly turn around...

C: 并非…冥界……
E: Not... nether realm...

C: 生者必灭。但{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}尚未抵达它的终点，而是在这条漫长的道路上缓缓迈进。
E: While all living beings must ultimately face their demise, {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} has yet to meet theirs. Their journey continues unhurriedly along this long path.

C: 这壁画，着实有些抽象了。
E: This mural is quite abstract.

C: 喔…汝那厚重的眼罩下，竟掩藏着如此秘密。
E: Hmm... Who would have thought such a secret lay concealed beneath that hefty eye patch of yours?

C: 能够看到两位以文明的方式握手言和，是我莫大的荣幸。然而，请容我稍事打断——
E: I am incredibly honored to have witnessed the both of you bury the hatchet in a civilized manner. However, I'm afraid that I must interrupt for a brief moment...

C: 若它能够做到…那接替了它神权的半神也至少该有这点本事。
E: And if they could do that... then it follows that the demigod who inherited their divinity must be capable of the same.

C: 敢请阁下…听听我的请求。我想拜托阁下陪我去取一样东西。
E: If it isn't too much to ask, I'd really like it if you could come along with me to retrieve something.

C: 你的表情…似乎很迷茫。
E: ...You look very confused.

C: 呵，孩子，我明白。我也曾有过如你这般的迷茫。
E: Ahh. I know that feeling, child. I was once as lost as you are now.

C: 一尊去向不明的泰坦，何以成为人们心中最深的恐惧……
E: How did a disappeared Titan become the deepest fear of humankind...

C: 咦？这是……
E: Hmm? What's this...

C: 真是性格顽劣…阁下，跟我来！
E: Ugh, she's incorrigible... Follow me!

C: 赛飞儿——如果这头大地兽真的是她——那么她看起来似乎十分惬意，眼神里饱含三分真诚、三分赞许、三分得逞，和三分「哈哈，灰子，认真你就输了」。
E: Cipher — if this dromas truly is her — appears to be quite content, her gaze filled with three parts sincerity, three parts approval, three parts triumph, and three parts "Hahah, Gray Mystery, you've lost if you take this seriously."

C: 我真有点看不懂了……
E: I really don't get how...

C: 因为…我等生来背负的宿命，远比个人的生命更为沉重。
E: That's because... the fate that we were born with is a burden far heavier than that of an individual's life.

C: 同情？同情那个战无不胜的少年人？
E: Sympathy? Sympathy for that youth who triumphed in every battle?

C: 「遐蝶」…我想，这就是她的名字。
E: "Castorice"... That shall be her name.

C: 万敌阁下，我一直都想知道…死亡为何会抗拒你？
E: Lord Mydei, I have always wanted to... Why does Death reject you?

C: 但是，小小蝶可以不用再害怕：因为，在逐火的旅途里，我们大家，都陪在你的身边！
E: But Little Cas no longer has anything to fear now, because everyone is here with you in this Flame-Chase Journey!

C: 那刻夏老师或许推导出了「再创世」的原理。你我…也许将在下一世化为「纷争」与「死亡」，成为降在世间的灾厄。
E: Professor Anaxa may have deduced the principles behind the Era Nova. You and I... may be reincarnated as "Strife" and "Death" in the next cycle, becoming calamities wreaking havoc upon the world.

C: （这是…怎么了……）
E: (What's... happening...)

C: 路又堵住了。
E: The path is blocked yet again.

C: 别过来…别过来！
E: Stay back... Don't come any closer!

C: 直到…我们见到了那名叫玻吕茜亚的少女和她的姐姐。
E: That is, until I met a girl named Polyxia and her sister.

C: 刻法勒在上，各位奥赫玛的公民——
E: By Kephale above, dear citizens of Okhema...

C: 看吧，{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}——此刻，在世界的中心，我将写下最后一步证明……
E: Behold, {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}. Here at the center of the world, I shall write the final step of my proof...

C: 有趣。
E: Interesting...

C: 而包庇我、纵容我，协助我完成渎神罪行的元老院，应与我同罪！
E: And the Council of Elders, which granted me consent and aided me in committing this atrocity, should face punishment alongside me!

C: 死刑！死刑！死刑！死刑！
E: Let him die! Let him die! Let him die! Let him die!

C: 现在 奥赫玛
E: Presently, in Okhema

C: 这…怎么可能？仅凭如此稀薄的灵魂…你真是疯了。
E: That's... impossible. To persist with your soul thinned to such an extent... You're insane.

C: 呵…何其讽刺。若你我能早些如这般交流，想必能免除不少误会吧。
E: Heh, how ironic. We would have avoided so many misunderstandings if you and I had just spoken this candidly before.

C: 看来，她不仅为我完成了证明，也为你们完成了使命。
E: It looks like she not only helped me prove my theory, but helped you fulfill your mission as well.

C: 再会，遐蝶。
E: Goodbye, Castorice.

C: 昂首挺胸，和*我们*一起走向明天吧！
E: Lift your chin up high and step forward with us toward tomorrow!

C: 然后，就等着看好戏吧。
E: Then, sit back and enjoy the show.

C: ——你打算怎么消解我这任性的念头？
E: ...How do you plan to dispel this notion of mine?

C: 但总有地上的人怀抱着飞向天空的梦想。树庭不乏对{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的研究，这也是我们此行的目的。
E: But there will always be people who dream of soaring toward the sky. The Grove has a wealth of research on {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}, and that is exactly what we are here for.

C: 阿那克…萨戈拉斯，是那位与「理性」火种合为一体的学者。
E: Anaxa... goras. He's the scholar who fused himself with the Coreflame of Reason.

C: 说「可能」有些委婉了。老师一向不敬神明，对神谕也持否定态度，即便在自由的树庭，他也被视作异端。
E: "Might" is an understatement. Anaxa has never been one to venerate the gods, nor has he ever found it within himself to put any faith in the prophecy. People have come to think of him as a heretic, even in a place as liberal as the Grove.

C: 风堇将两份记录拼凑到一起……
E: Hyacine combines both records together...

C: 且慢。容吾打断一下，汝是准备同时证明{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}之所在，以及「我们」究竟为何物？
E: Indulge me: Am I correct to say that you intend to prove {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}' whereabouts and prove the nature of our existence now?

C: 我想，答案已经显而易见了——
E: The answer is evident, is it not?

C: 那你怎么看待这个故事？
E: In that case, what do you think of it?

C: 如果，吾将「炼金」之法传习与汝……
E: If I imparted my knowledge of the art of alchemy to you...

C: 我已走过漫长的寻索，不介意再做一次尝试。在我们交谈的当下，{NICKNAME}的生命也在一分一秒地流逝……
E: I've already searched for so long, I'm willing to try one more time. While we converse, {NICKNAME}'s life is also slowly slipping away...

C: 不过是向至纯粹者转化时，必要的牺牲罢了。
E: This is but a necessary sacrifice on my path to transform into the purest of them all.

C: 只是联想到塞涅俄丝向泰坦宣战前怀揣的单纯愿景，这副画面会令我格外痛心……
E: It's just... thinking about the vision Seliose held before declaring war on the Titan... this sight is deeply heartbreaking.

C: 为了反抗，那些旧日的信众不择手段，甚至不惜与清洗者合作……
E: In their desperation, those ancient disciples were willing to do anything — even ally themselves with the Cleaners.

C: 强者欺压弱者；信仰成为迫害的借口。
E: The strong crush the weak, twisting faith into a tool for oppression.

C: …这段由悲痛和惨剧酿成的历史，将以此作结。
E: ...This history, brewed from sorrow and tragedy, shall end here.

C: 为了凡人在万丈足下建立起的一切，我会听从神谕的指引，索取{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}「晨昏之眼」{RUBY_E#}的火种——
E: For all that mortals have built, I will follow the guidance of the prophecy and claim the Coreflame of the {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Eye of Twilight{RUBY_E#} —

C: 人子…你们倾覆了我在幻灭中做出的判决啊。
E: Children of humanity... you have overturned the judgment I once cast in disillusionment.

C: 天空之城在坍塌，是艾格勒的陨落导致的？
E: Is the Sky Castrum collapsing because of Aquila's fall?

C: 这颗宝珠更加不稳定……
E: It's getting even more unstable...

C: （等、等会儿，那老头刚才是不是说了…<color=#dbc291ff>今后三百年？</color>？）
E: (Wait, did he just say... <color=#dbc291ff>"the next three hundred years"</color>?)

C: 患者们都很信任你，你也配得上他们的信任…这样就足够了，对吧？
E: The patients trust you, and you've earned that trust... That's what matters, isn't it?

C: 老实说，先前我还半信半疑。但这会儿，我开始认同你的观点了……
E: To be honest, I was initially skeptical. But right now, I'm starting to see your point...

C: 会有那么一天的，我相信！只要你好好长大……
E: That day will come! I believe it! Just keep growing...

C: 阿那克萨戈拉斯令各位在公民面前颜面尽失。若你们还心存廉耻，就该在幕匿时纵身跃下黎明云崖，以保全自己最后一丝尊严。
E: Anaxagoras humiliated all of you before the citizens. If you still had any shred of shame, you'd throw yourselves from Dawncloud at the Curtain-Fall Hour to salvage the last fragments of your dignity.

C: （哼…破绽百出啊。）
E: (Hmph... Not a good imitation.)

C: 好了好了，不耍你了。真品给你——接着带路吧。
E: Alright, enough fooling around. Here's the real thing. Lead the way.

C: 「呵…你的赞赏令我百般安心，大工匠。现在……」
E: "Heh... your praise puts my heart at ease, Grand Craftsman. Now..."

C: 她知道自己看不到逐火之旅的尾声，但还是毫无保留地燃烧自己…为了所有人的明天。
E: She knew she wouldn't see the end of the Flame-Chase Journey, yet she gave everything without hesitation... for the future of everyone.

C: 好，我明白了。
E: Understood.

C: 为它注入黎明之力，我已经。听从你的意念，它的锋刃将附着金焰。
E: Imbued it with the power of Dawn, I already have. Guided by your will, gleam with golden flames, its blade will.

C: 文化人就是不一样。
E: There's something special about a man of letters.

C: 哼…忘了谁了？
E: Hmph... Did you forget me?

C: 你不在的时间里…很多事都变了。我认识了各种各样的人，也做了很多不同的事。我拾起了一些决心…也放下了一些执念。
E: A lot has changed while you were away. I've met so many people and tried so many things. I've found new resolve... and I've let go of some attachments.

C: 嘿，难道丹宝现在也拥有了某种隐藏的预言之力？
E: Oh? Could it be that you, too, have some kind of hidden powers to make prophecies now?

C: 赛飞儿小姐，真是个急性子呀。
E: Miss Cipher is in such a hurry.

C: 那位和她展开死斗的悬锋勇士……
E: And the Kremnoan warrior she fought against...

C: 可是他们却忘了——那照拂世间的微光…正是由多种色彩和谐构成。
E: They forgot that... the light that illuminates the world is made of countless different colors.

C: …好沉重，压得人家喘不过气。
E: ...It's so heavy that it's hard to breathe.

C: 「变幻吧，『天象画壁』！」
E: "Change, Celestial Mural!"

C: 我们要怎么对抗你？你是强大的阳雷骑士，是力敌万邦的女武神……
E: How can we even fight you? You're the powerful Daythunder Knight, a warrior goddess capable of trampling all lands...

C: 至于此番回乡——在我踏上弑神的征程前，信仰将死之神的人们理应知晓一切。
E: As for this return home — before I embark on my god-slaying quest, those who worship the god who is about to die deserve to know everything.

C: 别着急走，搭档——先把这里的事处理完吧。
E: Don't go just yet, partner — let's wrap up what needs to be done here first.

C: 这里，一片寂静……
E: It's so quiet here...

C: 丹恒，{NICKNAME}——除了信任，我们现在已经没有别的选择。
E: Dan Heng, {NICKNAME} — we have no choice other than to trust her.

C: 要检验你的特训成果么？
E: You gonna test the results of your training?

C: 庇佑我们…天父，救救我们！
E: Protect us... Sky father, save us!

C: 紧急…情况。交给我…怪物。
E: Urgent... the situation is. Leave them to me... the monsters.

C: 必须尽快赶去创世涡心！
E: We have to get to the Vortex of Genesis quickly!

C: 所以，千年以来…维系奥赫玛永昼的并非刻法勒的神迹，而是赛飞儿以「诡计」的神权编织的谎言……
E: So, for the last thousand years... what maintained Okhema's eternal daylight was not Kephale's miracle, but Cipher's lie woven using the divine authority of Trickery...

C: 您，可曾听闻过「学派战争」？
E: Do you know of the "Scholars' Strife"?

C: 有种似曾相识的感觉呢♪
E: It's that déjà vu~♪

C: 这般高贵的身份，大概与我这种人无缘…吧。
E: Such high standing... I doubt someone like me could ever reach it.

C: （怎么回事……）

You can either meet the Titan, convince the demigod, or take the Coreflame by force... It doesn't matter what you do, so long as you bend it to your favor.

Huh...?

C: 我还记得他当时瞳孔扩张，满头大汗，手也冰冰凉，连喉咙也隐约发出了咕噜咕噜的声音。
E: I still remember that his pupils were dilated, head covered in sweat, hands cold, and even his throat made a faint gurgling sound.

C: 都怪我办事不力。这下，我该如何向艾丝妲站长交代啊……
E: It's all my fault. Now, how should I explain this to Lead Researcher Asta...

C: 这也就是第一次被何塞•拉萨罗钻了空子，打那以后，有点火星儿，就会拉响全站警报。
E: And that was the first time Hosea Lazaro exploited us. After that, whenever there is a tiny spark, the whole station would go up in alarm.

C: 这东西藏在空间站的犄角旮旯，被不相干的人翻了出来，以为是废纸。
E: This thing was hidden in a corner somewhere in the space station. Someone found it and thought it was trash.

C: 我最大的愿望，就是闷头躲在这机修间，拧拧螺丝，动动扳手。醒了就干，累了就睡。在我眼里，和机器打交道，可比跟人打交道快乐多了……
E: My biggest wish was to hide in this maintenance room and play with the tools. Work when I wake up and sleep when I get tired. In my opinion, dealing with machines is much more fun than dealing with people...

C: 他也把你当兄弟。
E: He also thinks of you as a brother.

C: 什么什么，在拍什么？
E: Huh? What are you taking pictures of?

C: 随着偶然的光线折射，可以发现上面印着完全磨损的「██」字样。
E: When the light is at a certain angle, the words "██" can vaguely be seen printed on the card.

C: 罢了，都是身外之物，至少还有头发陪着我。
E: Whatever, they are merely worldly possessions anyway. At least I have my hair with me.

C: 也许她有苦衷…
E: Maybe she has her own reason...

C: 这不是你的错…
E: It's not your fault...

C: 希望你也能找到忠于自己的伙伴，也希望这个伙伴，不是一件无法遗忘的憾事。
E: I hope you can find a partner who's loyal to you. And I hope this partner will never become a regret in your life.

C: 奇物再收容小队，安全区划立，「星际和平公司」定损，这些都包含在复兴计划内。
E: Curio Collection Squad, security zoning, and the damage assessment of Interastral Peace Corporation are all part of Project Revival.

C: 「黑塔」科员本领各异，多接触一些，你就见怪不怪了。
E: The staff of Herta Space Station possess many different abilities. After meeting a few of us, you won't be surprised anymore.

C: ——谁？甚么人在此骚扰？若是<color=#dbc291ff>水魈</color>冒替，还不速速现出原形！
E: ...Who? Who is interrupting me? If it is the <color=#dbc291ff>Xenohydro</color>, then show yourself at once!

C: 取出录像带。
E: Take out the videotape.

C: 刚刚法政科的古恩过来暂时接管了医疗舱的权限，说他知道该怎么治好希拉。
E: Gunn from the Dept. of Galactic Geopolitics came and temporarily took over the authority of the medical cabin, saying he knows how to cure Sheila.

C: 希拉你你你没事儿吗——
E: Sheila, are... are you okay?

C: 你手上怎么拿着鄙人的手稿？在我印象中，它们已经尘封很久了。
E: Why do you have my manuscript? I distinctly remember putting it away a long time ago.

C: 我的思想、话语乃至日复一日的行为，都是古恩先生事先设定好的产物。
E: My thoughts, my speech, and even my behavior are the product of Mr. Gunn's preset.

C: 您好，我的名字是希拉•诺娃，「黑塔•银河法政科」的向导。
E: Hello, I am Sheila Nova, the guide from the Herta Department of Galactic Geopolitics.

C: 「螺中笑声」？
E: Crackup Conch?

C: 生怕我不会被打死？
E: So, you just want me to get beaten up?

C: （原来她只是个普通的云养猫爱好者啊，那没事了，感染者不是她。）
E: (Turns out she's just a run-of-the-mill cat lover. That's all good. She can't be the one who got infected.)

C: 没想到你这么快就查出来了，真是辛苦了，所以结论是？
E: So I didn't expect you to finish the investigation so soon. Thank you for your hard work. So what's the conclusion?

C: 让乔安继续这样不好吗？
E: Isn't it a good thing to keep Joanne this way?

C: （没想到关键线索会以这种方式出现……）
E: (I didn't think a clue like that would suddenly pop up...)

C: 你啊你，怎么会想出这样的坏主意，歪点子呢？你不是迷失，你这是彻底走上了歧途！
E: How could you think up something so terrible? You're not just lost, my friend — you've completely strayed from the narrow path!

C: 为什么你们分开了？
E: Why did you split up?

C: 平日里，你虽然不多言语，但绝不是性情暴戾的人。打坏天花板，足以见得你当时力道之大，侧面反映出你心中压力之巨，愤恨之深！
E: I know you can be tough, but you're not violent by nature, Arlan — quite the opposite! Breaking a ceiling tile like this shows how much pressure and anger you were carrying around!

C: 呼…幸好幸好，要是和阿兰一起去执行了任务，可能就没有那么大的压力了。
E: Phew... Good thing I let him go alone — my calming influence would've ruined his training.

C: 它们的危害等级，防卫科自有判断，但首先，我需要找到一只「呜呜伯」做验证……
E: The level of danger they pose will be determined by the Security Department. But first, I need to find a Wubbaboo just to see for myself...

C: 艾丝妲也有一份吧？
E: Did you save any for Asta?

C: 没关系。
E: That's alright.

C: 所以才说是不幸中的万幸呀……黑塔女士的作风你也知道，她要真对什么东西感兴趣，就没别人什么事儿了。
E: Hence my "silver lining..." You know Madam Herta — if she's really interested in something, it doesn't matter what anyone else says.

C: 要重新开启吗？
E: Do we need to do a restart?

C: 我会凭借自己在模拟宇宙中的殊异，为你们提供力所能及的帮助，这也是为了表达我单方面关停模拟宇宙的歉意，
E: By way of apology for shutting down the Simulated Universe, I will use my abilities in the Universe to provide you with what assistance I can.

C: 他们正在把整个星球的语言、思想、乃至感情，编织成无机生命也能理解的字符。
E: They are compiling the languages, thoughts, and even emotions of the entire planet into symbols that even inorganic lifeforms can understand.

C: 「你明白吗，有了这张卡带，你甚至能知道他在电影首映礼上吃的第四粒混合爆米花是什么味道，就是这么厉害。」
E: "Do you understand what that actually means? With that cartridge, if a guy went to a movie premiere and bought some mixed popcorn, you'd be able to know the flavor of the fourth kernel he picked out of the bucket. It's truly amazing."

C: 仿佛不是我们在追踪她，而是她出现在我们行进的路径上。
E: I must admit, this feels less like a chase and more like a chance encounter.

C: 假设我们看到的银狼是过去的影像，她一定不可能抵达这里，否则卡带就不会安然无恙。所以假设与事实产生了矛盾。
E: If what we are seeing constitutes past images of Silver Wolf, then for her to have made it this far would've entailed the disappearance of the cartridge. We can only assume that the facts don't align with the theory.

C: 是的。这下子，您费尽心思准备的这场游戏才算是「功亏一篑」了，不是吗？只要没有乐趣，游戏就再无意义。
E: That's right. This way, the game that you so carefully orchestrated is now "pointless," is it not? There's no point in a game if it's no longer fun.

C: 好简单啊。
E: It's so easy.

C: 这次测试让我产生了一些新的想法，方案的流程还有很大提升空间…如果你感兴趣，再来找我啊！
E: This test gave me some new ideas. There is still a lot of room for improvement in the flow of the program... If you're interested, come back again!

C: 以前怎么见不到你。
E: Why haven't I seen you before?

C: 还未自我介绍——我名为银枝，来自「纯美骑士团」，不知可否领教二位尊名？
E: Allow me to introduce myself. I am Argenti — I belong to the Knights of Beauty. May I know your names?

C: 「纯美女神伊德莉拉美貌盖世无双！！」
E: "Idrila, the Beauty, is the most peerless beauty of them all!"

C: 小时候呢，我还觉得自己会有主角一样的人生，特别想做个飞行员，飞上太空，开着气派的飞船去探索宇宙。但爹妈忽悠我说，想实现理想就得先赚大钱，想赚大钱就得努力进公司。
E: When I was young, I assumed my life would be like a novel. I wanted to be a pilot, flying through outer space, exploring the universe in a grand spaceship. But then my parents told me I'd have to work for the IPC and make a bunch of money to fulfill my dreams.

C: 他这样如此英俊伟岸的骑士，要是包装下一定会很不错吧！
E: He's a tall, handsome, and a knight! Packaged and marketed the right way, I'm sure he'll pique a lot of interest!

C: 这是……
E: Is...

C: 这么说来，那就真的只是幻觉而已…怎么还有点失望……
E: So that was just a hallucination? Huh, why do I feel kinda disappointed...

C: 你作为列车长就没点应对紧急情况的法子？！
E: Uhh, well, a—as a conductor, don't you have any emergency procedures in place!?

C: 你的意思是，那虫子在咽气前向你传达了信息？
E: Are you implying that the insect imparted you with a message prior to its demise?

C: 我有些明白了。我们…很可能已在它的胃中。
E: I think I understand. We are in the belly of the beast.

C: 我刚打了个盹，梦里看到窗外有另一个自己。驾驶着银枝的希世难得号在天空上飞……
E: *yawn* I took a nap just now and dreamt there was another me piloting Argenti's One and Only...

C: 啊？银枝嘴里一直念的伊德莉拉吗？他不是还一直说要去找伊德莉拉，尽骑士职责保护伊德莉拉吗？
E: Huh? You mean Idrila — the one he wouldn't stop talking about? But... he said he'd find them... and fulfill his duty to protect them.

C: 怎么样，有什么解决办法吗？
E: How do we stand? Is there a way to resolve this situation?

C: 得赶紧从真蛰虫胃里出去帕！帕姆，帕姆一点也不想列车受到伤害帕…
E: We need to get out of the Sting's stomach as soon as possible! Pom-Pom doesn't want the Express to sustain damage...

C: 虽然相识不久，但这家伙人也挺不错的。
E: We didn't know him very long, but he was a pretty nice guy.

C: {NICKNAME}乘客不知道吧？哼哼，在这宇宙里啊，存在着不少洗车星，它们就像宇宙中为交通工具提供的休息站，而且彼此距离很近，不用启动跃迁装置就能到达！
E: {NICKNAME}, have you ever heard of a "Washtopia"? It's a place where space vehicles can stop to rest — there are plenty of them throughout the universe. They're close enough together that you can travel between them without even activating a warp device.

C: 好久不见，{NICKNAME}，最近可好？
E: Long time no see, {NICKNAME}. How have you been?

C: {NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，告诉我——最后一次见到那具人偶时，你做了什么？
E: Excuse me, {NICKNAME}, tell me — what were you doing the last time you saw that puppet?

C: 那您可太看得起我了，我就是一搞内购的，顺带做点无本买卖。
E: You flatter me — I'm just a peddler doing a little business on the side.

C: 留在当前回忆
E: Stay in the current memory

C: 最后一次见他，是在主控舱段，和应物科的温世玲在一起。
E: The last time I saw him was in the master control zone. He was with Wen Shiling from the Department of Implement Arts.

C: 怀着否定的心态求索，也是一种求索，同样能帮助我们抵达正确的终点。一群庸人若要开悟，这是必经的过程。
E: Pursuit tinged with negativity is still pursuit, and it is capable of leading us to the right conclusion. For the masses of the mediocre to reach a level of awareness — this is a necessary rite of passage.

C: 不知道，我都用收音机听相声。
E: No idea. I just listen to comedy skits.

C: 如果有机会，如果你愿意——等再次相识后，我们可以一同去「无人之地」，航行于平静的冰川上。
E: If fate allows and you're interested, upon our next meeting, we could journey to No Man's Land and traverse its tranquil glaciers...

C: 小机器人好棒！
E: You're amazing, little robot!

C: 我…我只是做了应该做的事……
E: I... I just did what needed to be done...

C: 啊啊啊！！他们又来了！
E: Agggghh! They're back!

C: 好喝，但你是不是放了盐？
E: It's delicious. But did you put salt in it?

C: 帕姆呢？
E: What about Pom-Pom?

C: 与此同时，托帕和史瓦罗一边…
E: Meanwhile, with Topaz and Svarog...

C: 我看看…睡衣、保暖袋、还有帕姆的玩偶…齐活啦，准备出发！
E: Pajamas, hot water bottle, Pom-Pom doll... That should be everything! Let's go!

C: 我才不信呢，别想唬住我！
E: Other people might fall for that, but I won't!

C: 有{NICKNAME}的三寸不烂之舌，我们去试着说服她吧。
E: With {NICKNAME}'s silver tongue, I'm sure we'll make some progress.

C: 其实我们给你发了消息。
E: Actually, we sent you a message.

C: 讲讲情况吧。
E: What's going on?

C: 嗯。看他们那副慌张的样子，大概是没胆量回来了。
E: Yeah. Judging by the looks on their faces, I don't think they'll be back.

C: 我也是在那时到了年纪，正式成为了「战略投资部」的一员。我亲眼目睹了家乡经历的变化，也决心将同样的变化带给银河中诸多有着类似经历的世界。
E: When I was finally old enough, I officially became a member of the Strategic Investment Department. I witnessed the changes that took place on my home world and was determined to bring the same changes to many other worlds in the galaxy that were experiencing the same plight.

C: 但也正因如此，我相信你一定会做出正确的决定——能让你的子民真正从中获益的决定。
E: But because of this, I believe that you will make the right decision — a decision that will truly benefit your people.

C: 嗯…毕竟是身居高位的公司使者，她很明白怎么运用「真诚」这件武器。
E: Yes... she is a high-ranking member of the IPC, after all. She knows how to use words to her advantage.

C: 要是能提前得知您前来的消息，筑城者肯定会以礼相迎。只是现在的情况特殊……
E: If we'd known of your arrival beforehand, the Architects would have given you a proper welcome. I'm afraid the current circumstances are quite exceptional...

C: …呵，有趣的家伙。要是我的同事都跟你一样有自知之明就好了~
E: Ha... If only my colleagues had the same self-awareness as you.

C: 幸会，托帕小姐。我是姬子，星穹列车的领航员。
E: Pleasure to meet you, Miss Topaz. I'm Himeko, the Astral Express' navigator.

C: 三月，{NICKNAME}——那边支离破碎的大家伙，你们还有印象吧？
E: ...Do you two recognize that broken-down machine over there?

C: 「造物引擎」…
E: The Engine of Creation...

C: 呃…{NICKNAME}的表情怎么这么凝重？是有什么心事吗？
E: Uh-oh... That look on {NICKNAME}'s face tells me something's wrong. I hope it's nothing too serious.

C: 反对票又多了一张——谢谢你的回答，娜塔。
E: Another vote for the against pile. Thanks for your insight, Nat.

C: ——票数居然完全持平啊。怎么办…支持和反对的人都有自己的理由，而且听上去都合情合理……
E: ...The votes are completely even! Ugh, I don't know what to do — both sides have really compelling arguments.

C: 没问题，我对你的评价可是很高的，{NICKNAME}~
E: Sure thing! I'll put in the best words I can, {NICKNAME}.

C: （合唱）
E: (Singing along)

C: 等待歌蒂烙饼中……
E: Waiting for Gertie's suncakes...

C: 希望你们这一路上还算顺利，没有派出铁卫迎接各位是我的失职……
E: I hope you had a smooth journey. I should have dispatched Silvermane Guards to welcome you on arrival — my apologies.

C: 姬子小姐所言正是。为了能尽量隐蔽行踪，我们准备启用「潜爆机兵」。
E: You're right, Miss Himeko. We'll be using the Automaton Stealth Bomb to cover our tracks.

C: 只是散步经过…
E: Just taking a walk...

C: …都、都怪你，害得我们买不上特效药了！
E: ...Th—This is all your fault! How are we supposed to get our wonder medicine now!?

C: 你、你怎么来了？该死，麻烦事一桩接一桩……
E: Wh—What are you doing here? Ugh, as if we didn't have enough trouble already...

C: 他是你的亲生哥哥吗？
E: Was he your biological brother?

C: 不过，五大赛事将依次隔天开启——若您想要体验更加激烈的战斗，可千万别扑空了！
E: However, each of the five leagues will start on the following day in turn. If you want to experience a heart-racing battle, don't miss out!

C: 我盒饭中的芥末、制服背后的大洞、回复女科员的干瘪信件，这些难道不是你的手笔？
E: The mustard in my lunch box, the big hole on the back of my uniform, and this boring letter in reply to the female researcher. Aren't they your doing?

C: 那个…我们确定要在这里蹲它吗？其实可以试着做个捕猎装置，也算是我们界种科的工作规范。
E: Well... Are you sure we want to ambush it here? We can try making a trap, it's one of our standard procedures in the Department of Ecology.

C: 水魈也会联网冲浪？如此荒诞的情景是你没想到的。
E: Can the Xenohydro surf the Internet? You didn't expect to find such an absurd scene.

C: 别老是责怪自己。
E: Stop blaming yourself.

C: 所以如果密信揭露的是事实，那么水魈就藏在一个既有不世之材，又要经过三个房间的地方……
E: So if the letter is correct, the Xenohydro should be hiding in a place where there's Unearthly Marvel, but also you have to pass through three rooms to get there.

C: 但一辈子做流水工，对得起我自己，却对不起我的家人。
E: But working on the assembly line all my life... It's fine for me, but how can I face my family?

C: 嗯，不急，水魈倒是次要的事…那边和卡波特站在一起的，是拉明娜吧？
E: Well, don't worry, the Xenohydro is of secondary importance... Is that Lamina standing with Capote over there?
