C: 咕噜噜，我从卡波特那里偷了些好东西，送给{NICKNAME}。
E: *gurgle* I stole some good stuff from Capote. They're for you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 这位叫做…呃的科员说得对！各位先请回吧。
E: Miss... uh... researcher is right! Please go back for now.

C: 你在那儿神神叨叨什么呢？
E: What are you babbling on about there?

C: 话说回来，不是还有那么句话吗？「无事不登三宝殿」…你这回主动跑来跟我搭讪，想必是有什么要紧事吧？
E: Anyway... To what do I owe the pleasure, this time? You've gone through all the trouble to find me here, so you must have something urgent, right?

C: 原来如此…你们「外来者」倒是有不少有用的小玩意呢。
E: I see... You outsiders sure have a lot of gadgets that come in handy.

C: 对对对，太对了。需要找东西的时候，呼唤查宝就对了。
E: Yes, yes, yes. When you need to find something, just call Findie.

C: 将肖像翻转，你们看到一<color=#dbc291ff>「顺时针旋转箭头」</color>的图案，墨迹已然干涸。
E: You flipped the portrait over to its back side and see a pattern of <color=#dbc291ff>a clockwise rotating arrow</color>, and the ink has dried up.

C: 你还好吗？
E: Are you all right?

C: 而且，最重要的问题是——我按照终端里的指令试着操作了一番，结果旋转栈桥纹丝不动。
E: Anyway, the strange thing is... I tried operating the terminal according to the instructions, and the gear bridge didn't move at all.

C: 一边小心前进，一边寻找那个可能藏着线索的<color=#dbc291ff>「拱门」</color>吧。
E: Let's proceed with caution, and keep an eye out for the <color=#dbc291ff>arch</color> that may contain clues.

C: 但光是销毁瓦赫留下的试剂，并不能解决医疗物资短缺的问题。很多患者还是没法及时处理病情，我的药物储备也有些捉襟见肘。
E: But disposing of Vache's reagents isn't enough to solve the medical supply shortage. Many of my patients can't be seen promptly, and my stock of medicine is running low.

C: 一株「侯爵夫人」。
E: A bouquet of Marquises, please.

C: 队长，你看这位医生的项链…或许她说的是真的。
E: Captain, look at her necklace... Maybe she's telling the truth.

C: 不过话说回来，距离上次有人撞见瓦赫医生已经过去很长时间了…大概有两三年了吧？希望他还平安……
E: Speaking of the doctor, it's been a long time since we last saw him... at least two or three years. I hope he's alive and well...

C: 是瓦赫的笔迹，这里一定就是他最后的实验据点。{NICKNAME}，你也过来看看吧。
E: It's Vache's handwriting. This must be the location of his final lab. {NICKNAME}, come have a look.

C: 我…也许我该感到高兴才对。他的坚持最终还是获得了回报，哪怕没能做到完美的地步…也许他能获得一丝安宁……
E: I... maybe I should feel glad. The medicine might not have been what he wanted it to be, but it came to something... Maybe he found some inner peace...

C: 走吧，约好的时间快到了。可不能让老人家等太久。
E: Let's go, my mom will be there soon. Best not to leave old folks waiting!

C: 就像是为了奖励好奇的孩子，原本平坦的地面悄悄地凸出一块，珍贵的宝物猛然出现在你的眼前。
E: The flat ground slowly bulges out before you and the precious treasure suddenly appears before your eyes, as if it was rewarding a curious child.

C: 就像是为了鼓励勤勉的士兵，看似随意摆放的沙包发出机关的声音，珍贵的宝物突然出现在你的眼前。
E: The sandbags seemingly placed at random give off a mechanical sound and the precious treasure suddenly appears before your eyes, as if it was encouraging diligent troops.

C: 能赚多少？
E: How much can you make?

C: 第一件事…我听说这个团伙办事非常张扬，甚至会把招募告示贴的满街都是。你们要是能找到他们的告示，说不定能从印在上面的信息里获取到些线索。
E: Firstly, the group in question has a very public presence — they post recruitment notices all over the street. If you can find a notice, you might be able to glean some clues from it.

C: 哎呀，小事而已。
E: Oh, it's nothing.

C: 我来找你之前刚刚收到线报，有人说在下层区的机械聚落找到了和盗窃团伙相关的线索——不知道这些线索能不能指向「齿轮与智慧」，但我觉得值得一试。
E: I received some intel just earlier today. Someone said they found clues related to a gang of thieves in the Underworld's Robot Settlement. I don't know if they'll lead us to the sculpture, but it's worth a try.

C: 您打算在请愿表上签字了吗？还是说，您有其它问题想问呢？
E: Ready to sign the petition? Have any other questions?

C: …这下可算被我们找到了，{NICKNAME}！今天我们一定要抓他个现行！
E: We've found the culprit, {NICKNAME}! Now we just have to catch him red-handed!

C: 哈、哈、哈。真好笑……
E: Haha... Someone write that for you?

C: 这段时间真是辛苦你协助啦，{NICKNAME}。你已经帮了我们足够多了，后面的追查交给铁卫巡逻队就好。
E: Thank you for all your hard work, {NICKNAME} — you've helped us enough already. Leave the rest to the Silvermane Guards.

C: 这次想要请您帮忙联系的是磐岩镇的鼹鼠党首领<color=#dbc291ff>虎克</color>——拜托您了，{NICKNAME}！
E: Could you help us contact the chief of Boulder Town's Moles, <color=#dbc291ff>Hook</color> — thanks, {NICKNAME}!

C: 如今克里珀堡办事效率意外地高呢…{NICKNAME}，就请你再陪我稍等一会儿吧？
E: Qlipoth Fort has been running surprisingly efficiently recently... {NICKNAME}, can you stay on with me a while longer?

C: 呵呵，既然你也这么好奇，那我就解释一下吧。
E: Hehe, since you're so curious, I'll fill you in.

C: 今天也辛苦你了，{NICKNAME}。我先带娜塔莎小姐去做入职准备，回见！
E: Good work today, {NICKNAME}. I'll help Miss Natasha finish getting all signed up. See you later!

C: 对不起！下意识就……
E: Sorry! I just blurted it out...

C: 要来找我们玩哦，荣誉队员！我和克拉拉都会等着你的！
E: Remember to visit us, honorary member! Clara and I will wait for you!

C: 好啊，你说了算。还有其他地方需要调整吗？
E: Sure, it's your decision. Anything else?

C: 有道理……
E: You have a point...

C: 布洛妮娅派我来的。
E: Yeah, sure, Bronya sent me here. Totally.

C: 好了吗？好了就下一问吧。
E: Are you done? Let's move on to the next question when you're ready.

C: 首先是姓名…「希儿」，这确实是你的名字。
E: First of all, the name is "Seele," which is indeed your name.

C: 咦？可我确实没有听过这么奇怪的——
E: Eh? I really haven't heard of such a weird surname...

C: 对不起，这也是我的恶作剧。
E: Sorry. It's another prank of mine.

C: 至于{NICKNAME}——谢谢你为本次面试提供的帮助。也多亏了你，我才能趁着这个机会更深入地了解希儿。
E: {NICKNAME}, thank you for your help in the interview. Thanks to you, I've had the chance to get to know Seele better.

C: 情报都交换完啦？走，去那个什么「大矿区」看看！
E: Got all your intel? Come on, let's head over to that Great Mine, or whatever they call it.

C: 得在周围找找能用的替换部件。嘁，真是浪费时间……
E: We need to find spare parts we can use nearby. Argh, we're wasting time...

C: 哎哟哟哟，你们又是什么人啊？知道这是谁的地盘吗！
E: Aha, and who do we have here? Do you know whose territory this is!?

C: 我饿了。
E: I'm hungry.

C: 老爹…？
E: Daddy...?

C: 那就好，那就好…这位{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}呢，有没有受伤？多谢你伸出援手……
E: Good, that's good... And you, {F#young lady}{M#young man}, are you hurt? Thank you for your help...

C: 啊我想起来了…你就是娜塔莎提过的外来者吧？听说你们刚来就解决了矿山的冲突，没想到今天又被你救了……
E: Ah, I remember... You are the outsiders Natasha mentioned before, right? I heard that you helped resolve some conflicts around the mines when you arrived. And again today, when you saved my life...

C: 我想…应该不会。问心无愧的人何必说谎呢？
E: Hmm, doesn't seem likely.

C: 我拒绝评论。
E: No comment.

C: 确实是我弄错了…
E: I had it wrong...

C: 我早就不鉴定古代遗物了，除非这探测器是什么稀罕的宝贝……
E: I'm already retired from appraising ancient relics. So unless this detector is some kind of precious treasure...

C: （原来匹克就是桑博的供货商吗？算了，还是别多想了，回去找桑博领赏吧。）
E: (So, Peak is Sampo's supplier? Whatever, none of my business. I should head back to Sampo and collect the reward.)

C: 喂！你们这帮家伙，是不是又在挑事？
E: Hey! Are you guys causing trouble again?

C: 没错，我们正在和「地火」一起搜救被卷入战斗的矿民。除了你们，前方还有非战斗人员吗？
E: That's right. We're evacuating the miners together with Wildfire. Are there any other civilians up ahead?

C: 好好享受你的私人空间吧。
E: You need some space. I understand.

C: 您也要前往雪原吗？
E: ...are you headed there too?

C: …也不是啦，只是贝洛伯格之外的自然条件比较恶劣而已。
E: ...Not really, but the environment outside of Belobog is very tough.

C: 唔，我来检查一下……
E: Mm, lemme have a check...

C: 极光啊…什么时候才会出现呢？
E: So... when's the aurora due...?
Mm...

C: 接下来…让我们稍微独处一会儿吧，谢谢你啦。
E: I think we need a little private time. See you soon.

C: （还是不要跑太远吧……）
E: (It's probably better not to separate...)

C: 说真的，你要钢板跟纱布有什么用？我们可是要拿它们救人的。
E: Tell us, what do you even want metal plates and gauze bandages for? We need them to save people.

C: …那玩意，对你来说挺贵重的吧？
E: ...That object was pretty important to you, right?

C: 不行，老爹说那个叔叔走丢了，后来再也没见过他。听说，他好像是去了很遥远的地方……
E: Not possible. Daddy said that guy went missing one day, and he never saw him again. Maybe he went to someplace far away...

C: 哼，你们三个，给我记住！从今天起，你们就是鼹鼠党最大的竞争对手！
E: Hmph, you three listen up. Starting from today, you are The Moles' number one rivals!

C: …虎克和尤利安，他们一直以来的梦想，就是有朝一日能打败上面的坏人，带着下层大家夺回家园。
E: ...Hook and Julian always wanted to defeat the villains on the surface and take back our homeland.

C: …虎克，是你？
E: ...Hook? You...

C: …原来这就是认证标记吗？
E: ...So this is the certification mark?

C: 正在调取音频资料，请稍候……
E: Obtaining audio data, please wait...

C: 回去找克拉拉吧。
E: We should go and find Clara.

C: …没错。假如能让史瓦罗相信，我们的确能够颠覆「计算结果」，就有推进和谈的希望。
E: ...Precisely. If we can make Svarog believe in us, we can almost certainly overturn the result of his calculation, and we'll be one step closer to peace talks.

C: 但是，要怎么证明呢…这回光拿照片出来怕是不够用了吧？
E: But, how we can get him to do that... Showing him some of our photos wouldn't cut it, right?

C: 嗯…怎么会……
E: Hmm... why won't it...

C: 别的…星球？
E: Different planet...?

C: 请、请不要把克拉拉当小孩子！那些故事都是大人们想象出来的，克拉拉知道……
E: D—Don't treat me like a child! Those are just made-up stories that grown-ups like to tell. I don't...

C: 过去这段时间，克拉拉学到了一件事——「计算」得到的结果，并不一定能带给大家幸福。
E: Recently, I learned something new... Calculation results can't always bring people happiness.

C: 估计是克拉拉吧？我想不到还有谁会这么好心了。
E: Clara, I assume? I can't think of anyone else that'd do something that generous.

C: 记忆模块检索开始……
E: Retrieving memory module...

C: 所、所以，记忆模块应该没问题了？
E: S—So, your memory module is okay?

C: …有关「睡懒觉」的记录也？
E: ...Even the one about sleeping in?

C: 放弃挣扎吧…
E: I think we should give up...

C: 你说话好像有那个大病…
E: This is a heck of a way to tell a story...

C: {NICKNAME}，快救救我！
E: {NICKNAME}, help!

C: 五百五十冬城盾两次——镶有黑宝石的手工玩偶，五百五十冬城盾，还有要加价的买家吗？
E: <unbreak>550</unbreak> shield for the erebus teddy bear, going twice! Any other offers?

C: 我可是贝洛伯格富豪榜前十…
E: I'm one of the ten wealthiest people in Belobog...

C: 各位，技术性调整结束了——下半场拍卖会即将开始，请大家依序入场！
E: Ahem, ladies and gentlemen, the technical issue has been resolved. The second half of the auction is about to commence — please gather in an orderly manner!

C: 六百五十！
E: <unbreak>650</unbreak>!

C: 七百五十。
E: <unbreak>750</unbreak>.

C: 七百五十冬城盾三次！成交！恭喜这位买家！
E: <unbreak>750</unbreak> shield going three times... aaaand sold! Congratulations to the winner!

C: 有钱人的世界……
E: It's a rich person's world...

C: 确实是方脑壳，但不像悍匪…
E: It does have a square head, but it doesn't look like a criminal...

C: 克、克拉拉也不懂…但它似乎并不打算逃跑，也不打算攻击我们……
E: I—I don't understand what it's saying... but it doesn't appear to be trying to flee or attack us...

C: 我的耐心是有极限的…
E: My patience is limited...

C: 战斗？太没人性了！
E: Battle each other!? That's awful!

C: 已到达第二个目标地点。该机体型号为「甲虫」，与本机为同一型号。
E: We have arrived at our second destination. This module is called the Beetle, which is the same as mine.

C: 嗯…还是先修帕斯卡吧，毕竟我们先捡到了那个小家伙嘛。而且，史瓦罗先生也说了，如果放着不管，它还有可能会做出不好的事……
E: Let's start with Pascal. We found him first, after all. Also, like Mr. Svarog warned, if he's not supervised, he might cause trouble...

C: 史瓦罗的计算这次可能很准确…
E: Svarog's calculations are extremely precise.

C: 不，不能就这样放弃…一定、一定还有办法……
E: No, I can't just give up. There has to be another way!

C: 为了保障克拉拉顺利成长，我始终避免让她承受过大的负担。
E: To ensure that Clara grows up well, I've always avoided overburdening her.

C: 等等…我再去劝劝克拉拉。
E: Wait... I should try to persuade Clara again.

C: 好久不见！今天，天气，很好！
E: Long time no see! Today, weather, great!

C: 那个…我没听说管线有问题啊……
E: Uh... I didn't hear anything about the energy lines malfunctioning...

C: 在这禁区，前有裂界怪物虎视眈眈，后要提防渗透城市的阴谋团体——
E: This is the restricted zone. The Fragmentum before you conceals monsters that watch your every move. Behind us, we have a band of conspirators that have infiltrated the city...

C: 我现在的键盘手也不赖，但还是怀念在部队里玩乐队的时光啊……
E: My keyboard guy is pretty good, but I still miss our military days playing in the band...

C: 那怎么办呀！
E: Then what's our plan!?

C: 所以…你们下定决心了吗？
E: So... have you made up your minds?

C: 啊…你、你来了！那个，你可以先等一下……
E: Oh... You are here! Well, just wait a moment...

C: 放弃吧，小姑娘！你以为只靠自己就能粉碎贝洛伯格所有军商串谋的勾当？这水可比你想的深多了。
E: Give it up, little girl... You think you alone can put an end to all of Belobog's shady dealings between its military and its merchants? This is so much bigger than you could possibly imagine.

C: …真的吗？你有办法？
E: ...Really? Do you know how?

C: 呜、呜哇！你们快看！
E: Wh—Whoa! Quick, look!

C: 难道她们都做错了吗，母亲？
E: Can all of them have been wrong, mother?

C: 就像被琥珀困住的昆虫……
E: ...It's like an insect trapped in amber...

C: 不过，冰块里这些家伙还活着吗……
E: Even in the ice... could these guys still be alive...?

C: 我们来掩护你！
E: We'll cover you!

C: 没错。但在那之前，我们还有太多工作要做……
E: Right. But before that, we have lots of work to do...

C: 还是免不了要战斗吗？
E: Do I still have to fight?

C: 想放弃了也没关系…我不过是个影子，哪怕被欺骗也不会记恨…不会悲伤。
E: If you want to give up, that's okay... I'm just a shadow, and I'm not able to begrudge anyone, even if they trick me... And I don't feel sad either.

C: 我愿意。
E: Yes.

C: 嗯？什么……
E: Huh? What...

C: …你就别欺负{NICKNAME}了。不过姬子说得不错——奖励就等这事彻底了结后再交给你吧。
E: ...Don't take advantage of {NICKNAME}. But Himeko does have a point. We will give you your reward after this matter has been completely resolved.

C: 谢谢你站长，站长最好了…
E: Thank you. You're the best...

C: 梅姐求求你了，俺记不住事儿，帮俺找找笔记吧。
E: Please help old Mei here. I can't remember things anymore. My notes are all I have.

C: 梅姐这人没有家人，很久以前就在一直做家政工作，目前是我在雇佣她。
E: Mei doesn't have a family. She has been working as a housekeeper for a long time, and I'm her current employer.

C: 我不要赔偿，不用给我赔偿。嘿嘿嘿，没事没事。
E: I don't want it. There's no need. Hehe, I'm alright, mighty fine.

C: {F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}谢谢你，这样就好。
E: Thank you, {F#Young lass}{M#Young fella}. This is fine as it is.

C: 还、还有什么事情吗？
E: I—is something else the matter?

C: 就是这艘了，我来查查它的记录。
E: Alright, let me check this starskiff's record.

C: 放心？怎么放心，家里活儿很多的嘞！
E: Relax? How can I relax? How are you going to do all the chores by yourself?

C: 你用力跳了起来，举高双手试图触碰树枝，在起跳的瞬间，时间凝滞了。
E: You jump as high as you can and lift your arms to try to reach the branch. Time stops the moment your feet leave the ground.

C: 从夹缝处不明显的油渍来看，这里或许存放过食物，又或者是新鲜出土的药材。
E: From the minute traces of oil stains at the creases, you think this place might have been used to store food or freshly-dug medical ingredients.

C: 云骑的人说这附近不大安全，让我先回家休息几天。但我医书还没背熟呢，我就花了大价钱找「鹤运速递」寄件，把书从丹鼎司托运回家。
E: The Cloud Knights said it's not safe around here and that I should stay at home for a few days, but I still haven't memorized my medical textbooks. So, I spent a hefty sum to have Heron Express deliver the books from the Alchemy Commission to my home.

C: 结果那机巧鸟还没飞出丹鼎司，一路上不是撞到墙就是撞树上去了！气死我了，我就眼睁睁看着我的书从天上掉下来……
E: But that cycrane kept running into walls and trees before it even left the Alchemy Commission! I'm so angry! I watched helplessly as my books fell from the sky...

C: 蘑菇只是想待在原地，独自悲伤。
E: This mushroom just wants to wallow here alone in its own shroomy misery.

C: 噢。我好悲伤。
E: Oh, I'm so sad.

C: 啧…我怕你伤心，原想着悄悄离开，没想到还是被发现了。
E: Tsk... I was planning on sneaking out so you wouldn't be sad about it, but you noticed it right away.

C: 横霄飞桥跨浑云，行舟徙倚入画屏。临行千言作无言，父子______。
E: Flying over the skyborne bridge, I row my boat into a scene as beautiful as a painting. Silence replaces thousands of words at separation, for the father and his son...

C: 我不理解。
E: I don't understand.

C: 你有真正了解过静斋吗？
E: Have you made the effort to understand Jingzhai?

C: 我准备了自己写的诗，还给你准备了礼物。{NICKNAME}，礼物，帮我拿出来一下。
E: I've written a poem and prepared a gift for you. {NICKNAME}, the gift. Give it to me.

C: 小聪，你还没有明白。
E: Cong, you don't get it.

C: 「我手足无措，不知道如何修补你的心。」
E: "I'm at a loss, helpless in ways to mend your broken heart."

C: 你要是能帮人把东西找回来，这好处不就多了嘛。
E: You'll get more rewards if you can find the lost item for the owner.

C: 那我就等着你的好消息了。
E: So I shall await your good news.

C: 注意一下公共场合。
E: Keep it down, this is a public space.

C: 那好吧，你刚才说的我其实听清了，但是我确实不太明白。
E: Alright then. I actually did hear you perfectly fine, but I just don't understand it.

C: 你来晚了，工作人员都已经回去了。我这些牌友们也为了「狐仙聊天」而来，你一看就明白，他们也是「美丽狐仙」重度沉迷的粉丝。
E: You're too late. All the operatives have already gone home. My acquaintances here are also here for the Beauty Chat. You just can tell, they are hardcore fans of the Foxian Beauty.

C: 你骗钱的时候还挺熟练的呀。
E: You seemed like you've done this a lot.

C: 其实我只想帮朋友搞到会员资格。这下可好，「高级会员资格」，有赚到。
E: Actually, I was just trying to help my friend get a membership. Never thought we'd be so lucky to get a premium membership.

C: （完整讲述狐仙黛青的真相）
E: (Recount the whole story about Foxian Beauty Daiqing)

C: （上面的内容似乎具有某种连续性…看来这就是陶德所说的，记载持明族历史的壁画了。）
E: (There's a continuity in the story... Looks like this is the mural that records the Vidyadhara history that Todd mentioned.)

C: 我就知道事情不会那么简单。
E: I knew it wouldn't be so simple.

C: 陶德的自动笔记随着他触碰开始迅速录入信息。
E: Todd's auto-note starts taking down information rapidly upon his touch.

C: 是因为自己始终只能找到毫无价值的研究结果而失心疯了？还是其中另有深意？…让我好好想想。
E: Did he lose his mind because his research was fruitless? Or is there more to this than meets the eye? Let me think about this.

C: 半晌，陶德从沉迷中回过神来，激动地细喘起来。
E: After some time, Todd snaps out of his trance and starts gasping in agitation.

C: 而我，识别了这些图案内在的编码，也理解了图案的涵义——持明，持明才是寻求长生最正确的答案。
E: And now that I've deciphered the code to these patterns, I now understand their hidden meaning — the Vidyadhara pursue longevity in the correct manner.

C: 无名客那艰辛的道路对年轻更有吸引力吗？我不勉强你。
E: Is the path of the Nameless more popular with the kids these days? I won't force things.

C: 那边没有我要找的人？
E: And why's that?

C: 稍、稍等一下！我再找找。
E: W—Wait a minute! I'll keep looking.

C: 直接说吧，你想要我做什么？
E: Cut to the chase, what do you want me to do?

C: 我实现了愿望，只是它不是以我所想的形式。人类最古老的故事都是这么个调调。现在看来，这些陈腔滥调也不无道理。
E: My wish came true — just not in the form I thought it would take. The oldest stories in human civilization are fables that take this line. Seems like they aren't just a cliche, after all.

C: 需要我请丹鼎司的医生吗？
E: Do you want me to fetch a healer from the Alchemy Commission?

C: 想吃什么？
E: What'll it be?

C: 是你啊，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}。
E: Oh it's you, {F#Miss}{M#Sir}.

C: 因为我向梁沐承诺，要给他带去长生不老药。要让他和我一样，成为仙舟人。
E: Because I promised Liangmu I'd bring him an elixir of immortality... to make him one of the people of the Xianzhou, like me.

C: …先不要乱动，半夏。
E: ...Try not to move, Banxia.

C: 病患这边就交给我了，毕竟我才是丹鼎司的衔药龙女嘛！
E: Leave the patient to me — I'm the Healer Lady of the Alchemy Commission, after all!

C: 你们可算是来了，刚才我被药王秘传追杀，又遇见了云骑军，仿佛听见半夏的声音，却碰到了一只怪物，真是倒霉！
E: *sigh* You're finally here... First I was being chased by the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, then I ran into the Cloud Knights. Then, I thought I heard Banxia's voice, but I ran straight into a monster. What a day!

C: 梁沐讲述了自己以为听见了半夏的呼喊，实际上却遇见了怪物的经历。
E: Liangmu narrates how he thought he heard Banxia shouting, but then ran into a monster.

C: 说吧。
E: Go ahead.

C: 白露小姐年轻识浅，易受他人摆布。只怕会在有心人的压力下，认为自己能肩负起这份责任。
E: Miss Bailu is young, naive, and easily manipulated by others. I worry that under the pressure of others, she would be convinced into taking up too great a burden.

C: 出发。
E: Depart.

C: 事情办妥了吗？大人们请随我登船，白露小姐在显龙大雩殿等候。
E: Please alight, Your Highness. Miss Bailu awaits you at Dragonvista Rain Hall.

C: 这也是我来鳞渊境寻求的答案。
E: That's exactly what I've come to Scalegorge Waterscape to find out.

C: 可是，按浣溪的说法，之前那些刺客只是冲着丹恒先生而来的…但我们在废墟里遇到的，却是对我动手的。
E: You said those assassins only came for Mr. Dan Heng... But the ones we met in the ruins were coming for me instead.

C: 麻烦各位看看，这里是否有我们仙舟没认出来的危险人物呢？
E: We'd like you to take a look — do you recognize any of them as a threat?

C: 有吗？我一直都这样啊。不过嘛，这个事情确实燃起了我三月七的神探之魂，忍不住想要一探究竟……
E: Am I? I feel pretty normal. Anyway, this case has really got my detective blood pumping. I need to get to the bottom of it...

C: 也许有一部分可以修复…未必能行，我得试试。当然了，这需要一段时间，我没办法立刻给您变出来。
E: For some of them, maybe... but I can't guarantee anything. I'll do my best, of course. It'll take more time — I can't hand them over just now.

C: 我的意思是，也许罗刹在罗浮上有内应，而他和内应之间就通过书的扉页来相互联系。
E: What I'm trying to say is — I think Luocha may have friends on the Luofu, and they're using the title page to communicate.

C: 他还想讹我们五百镝呢，纯纯的坏家伙。
E: That crook wanted to cheat us out of <unbreak>500</unbreak> strales.

C: （「普洱」不是茶的名字吗？）
E: (Isn't pu'er a type of tea?)

C: 至味盛苑。请你们俩吃好吃的。
E: Garden of Gourmet. You two deserve a treat.

C: {NICKNAME}，你怎么一个人就跑过来了？
E: {NICKNAME}, why are you here on your own?

C: 区区孽物，何谈危险？
E: They're only abominations — we got this.

C: 咱们是去和天舶司的司舵喝茶，不是去朋友家玩。在外交场合，说话做事都要更加得体庄重些。
E: Remember, this is no field trip, we're having tea with the helm master of the Sky-Faring Commission. We'll need to act with diplomatic decorum.

C: 司舵公务繁忙，我们也不便叨扰。希望以后还有机会和您多多交流。
E: We'll head off now — the Commission must be busy. I look forward to our next meeting, Madam Yukong.

C: 妈妈小时候选中了星槎，她果然展现出了极高的飞行天赋。才刚成年，就被景元将军招进了云骑军，成为了一名斗舰飞行士。
E: Mom reached for the starskiff and showed a natural talent for flying. General Jing Yuan recruited her to the Cloud Knights as soon as she was old enough — that's how she became a fighter pilot.

C: 如果我告诉当年的自己：「这个小姑娘以后会成为老成持重的司舵。」恐怕自己怎么也不会信的。
E: If I were to turn back the sands of time and try to convince my past self that the little girl in front of me would one day become a wise and experienced helm master... I would probably never have believed it.

C: 真难想象，性格这样极端的两个人竟然能合作无间。如果没有那场重创了仙舟空军的战役的话……
E: It's hard to imagine such contrasting personalities working in perfect harmony... As I mentioned, the campaign inflicted heavy losses on the Xianzhou air force...

C: 保护公共财产和公共秩序，这是每个仙舟人民应尽的责任。
E: Ensuring the security of public assets and order is the duty of every Xianzhou citizen.

C: 下边。
E: Under the desktop.

C: 收件人{NICKNAME}已确认，请取走您的包裹。
E: Recipient {NICKNAME} confirmed. Please take your package.

C: 是的，阿刃的情况很棘手，在这仙舟上…我能拜托的只有你了。
E: I do, Blade is in a prickly situation. On the Xianzhou... you're the only one I can turn to.

C: 我留下来帮你。
E: I'll stay and help you.

C: （应该问什么呢？）
E: (What should I ask?)

C: 他醒来的时候什么也不记得，后来有个女人找到了他，教他剑术，然后杀死他，一次又一次，直到他不堪忍受。
E: When he woke up, he didn't remember anything. Sometime later, a woman found him. She taught him swordplay, and then killed him, over and over again, until it was too much for him to bear.

C: 想要改变「预言」，还要付出更多的努力才行呢，{NICKNAME}。
E: If you want to change my prediction, you'll have to put in more effort, {NICKNAME}.

C: 满意…一部分吧。
E: Partly...

C: 我为什么能容纳星核？
E: How am I able to host a Stellaron?

C: 你看不见我，你看不见我，你看…
E: You can't see me, you can't see me, you can't...

C: 行星的位置也太近了吧。
E: The planets look way too close to each other.

C: {NICKNAME}，三月，这附近刚发生过一场激烈的战斗。
E: {NICKNAME}, March, this area saw fierce fighting only recently.

C: 怎么会变异得如此严重…是星核的影响吗？
E: How could the mutations get this bad... is the Stellaron exerting an effect?

C: 好耶好耶，全看你的啦。
E: Yeah, yeah, we're watching.

C: 一页信纸静静躺在观景客厢的桌上，从质地与样式看来是仙舟所出。
E: A letter quietly lies on the table in the passenger car. Judging from its texture and style, it's from the Xianzhou.

C: 你展开信纸，墨迹随即浮现，仿佛有看不见的手执笔如剑，利落挥洒。片刻后，纸上的内容恢复如初。
E: You unfold the letter, and the ink immediately becomes visible. It's as if an invisible hand holds the pen like a sword, making swift, decisive strokes. After a moment, the content regains its original appearance.

C: 也可能是敌人…刃？
E: Enemies... Blade...?

C: …带路吧。
E: Lead the way...

C: 选个地方而已，有那么难吗？我替你选吧，就去迴星港。
E: How hard is it to choose a destination? We're going to Stargazer Navalia — problem solved.

C: 运气也是实力的一种…希望这艘专为「星槎杀手」造的船，也能像她一样回归星空。
E: Luck is a type of strength, after all... I hope that this ship, built for the Starskiff Killer, will also be able to return to the stars.

C: 嗯，你还记得这个名字。
E: Mm... you still remember his name.

C: 她只身陷阵，令联盟士卒得以冲破倏忽的「血涂狱界」，更从龙狂中唤回了你。但她却没能走出那片战场，我们都欠下了一笔无法偿还的债。
E: She charged ahead and shattered the enemy's defenses, allowing the Xianzhou soldiers to break through Shuhu's Sanguinary Abyss and awaken you from your Dragon's Delirium... She was not able to walk out of that fight. We all shoulder a debt that we will never be able to repay.

C: 真是…熟悉的感觉……
E: ...A familiar feeling...

C: 还是说，你需要我道出那个拗口的名字？
E: ...or must I utter that tongue-twister of a name?

C: 你对他做了什么？
E: What did you do to him?

C: 奇妙的是，在这短暂如梦的死亡里，我不再感到那么痛苦了……
E: The miraculous thing is that in my brief moment of death... all the pain went away...

C: 汪汪汪汪！
E: Woof woof woof!

C: 喵喵喵喵！
E: Meow meow meow!

C: 说到能够听懂谛听汪汪叫的人，你立马想起了那个人……
E: Speaking of someone who can understand Diting's woofs, you immediately think of...

C: 嗷呜？
E: Awooo?

C: 三月，来帮我翻译翻译…
E: March, can you help me translate something?

C: {NICKNAME}，咱们是不是得赶快把这个东西交到景元的手里？
E: {NICKNAME}, shouldn't we hand this over to Jing Yuan as soon as possible?

C: 嘘，安静。有麻烦要对付。
E: Shh, quiet... We've got trouble to deal with first.

C: 唔？
E: Huh...?

C: …看来琴曲与剑术当真有相通之处呢。将军也评过类似的话，说我的剑洋洋意气，棱角过盛，想要夺得「剑首」之名，还欠一分成熟…
E: ...I guess the connection between music and swordplay is real after all. The general told me something similar — he said my swordplay was too proud and angular. He said it lacked the maturity required to win the title of Sword Champion...

C: 要像这样，剑出无回，一击必杀。
E: Once you draw your sword you must strike down your adversary in one blow without turning back.

C: 「魔阴身」是仙舟人一直以来所避忌的宿命，在十王司的守望下，它本不该如此频繁地出现。
E: Thanks to the Ten-Lords Commission, being stricken with mara had long since become a terrifying but avoidable fate for Xianzhou natives... The puzzling thing is that despite the Commission's protection, we're now seeing an increase.

C: 实际上，在几个月前我曾派出了一位调查人员加以刺探，有了些眉目。
E: We sent an undercover investigator out a few months ago — they provided us with a rough idea of the situation.

C: 当然了，这只是第一步。成为莳者之后，你还要经过很多其他的考验。
E: Of course, this is but the first trial. Once you have become a disciple, you will undergo numerous others.

C: 很好，我也是。我曾以为只要努力训练，就能够成为强者…但事实并非如此。
E: Good, so do I. I used to think determination and hard work were enough to achieve that... But I've come to realize it's not that simple.

C: 向丹士说明了情况。
E: You explain what's transpired to the alchemist.

C: 丹枢大人喜欢在若木亭休息，你去那里应该就能找到她。
E: Lady Dan Shu likes to pass the time over at Synwood Pavilion — I'm sure you'll run into her if you head that way.

C: 别啊，现在罗浮这么危险，放你一个人乱跑我哪儿放心呀。
E: Not a smart way to operate. The Luofu is more dangerous than ever — I can't let you put yourself in harm's way.

C: 对不住，姑娘。我也寻思没给小家伙安装人声……
E: Oh! M—My apologies, miss. No wonder I was confused, I never installed a human speech module in the little guy... No.

C: 学生们退到门口，那是应该的。我却不能教他们瞧见老师傅贪生怕死。跟你们到这儿就够了，接下来我得看看，自己还能为工造司做些什么。
E: The apprentices fled, as they should have... but I cannot let them see their master flee from peril. This is as far as I go with you — I must see what more I can do for the Artisanship Commission.

C: 小丫头不必再劝了，老夫惜命得很，绝不会乱来的，快走吧。
E: No use in trying to talk me out of it, young miss. This old man cherishes his life — he won't do anything rash. On your way, now.

C: 工造司有了大麻烦，哪有逃跑的道理？
E: How could I desert the Artisanship Commission in its time of need?

C: 呃…这怎么是我的房间呀…我都还没来得及收拾，让你看笑话了……
E: Uh... is this my room? I didn't get a chance to tidy up. Don't judge...!

C: 更早以前的事，于你而言没有任何意义。你生命的价值并不在于过去发生过的一切，而在于当下，在于未来。
E: What happened prior is meaningless to you. The value of your life does not lie in what happened in the past, but in the present — and the future.

C: 很遗憾，她没在那里工作过哪怕一天。
E: Actually, this won't do. She never really worked there.

C: 一杯仙人快乐茶…
E: A cup of Immortal's Delight...

C: 哈哈，你真是慧眼识英才。
E: Haha, you don't need a jade abacus to get a feel for Sampo...

C: 请问三月小姐有什么事吗？没事的话，请不要打扰保安执勤。
E: Excuse me, Miss March. Do you need anything? If there's nothing else, please let me get back to my duty.

C: 这不是三月七吗？好久不见了啊…你们离开贝洛伯格后，一切还顺利吗？
E: March? Long time no see... How's everything been going since you left Belobog?

C: （触摸「异物」）
E: (Touch the "foreign object")

C: 谢谢你出手，符玄小姐…
E: Thanks for your help, Miss Fu Xuan...

C: 穷观阵在刚才的那一瞬间停转了。
E: ...And the Matrix of Prescience stopped at precisely the same moment!

C: 剑比语言更为真诚。比起判断一百句话，判断一柄剑更容易，所以我很少犯错。
E: Swords are more honest than words. It's much easier to judge a sword than to judge someone's words, so I rarely make mistakes.

C: 喔，你说「米卡•奇瓦沙」啊！那可是把不得了的剑。它在我的故乡有着崇高的地位，曾经帮助神话英雄斩妖除魔。
E: Oh, you mean the Miekka Kivessä! It's an incredible sword. That weapon helped the legendary heroes of my homeland slay demons and is highly revered.

C: 爷爷，现在就把那柄魔剑给我，我要熔了那人留下的祸根！
E: Grandpa! Give me that cursed sword right now! I'll melt away the remnants of that man's curse once and for all!

C: 所以孤云也是魔剑？
E: So, Guyun is one of those cursed swords?

C: 它会像其他魔剑一样——岁阳将被彻底分离，剑身化为铁水被铸进「熔铁剑骸」之中。
E: Like all the other cursed swords... I'll separate it from the heliobus, then I'll melt it down and make it part of the "Blade of Forged Remnants."

C: 你详细述说了事情经过，怀炎紧张的神色也变得缓和了一些。
E: You explain what happened in detail, and Huaiyan's nervous expression eases a little.

C: 我知道，剑不是我偷的。
E: Yeah, but I didn't steal the sword.

C: 也许使团后悔了？
E: Maybe they regretted their decision?

C: 你拿走「记忆」，我收获「欢愉」，我们能从彼此身上各取所需。既然这么投缘，你我又都是孤身一人…何不与我同行，一起跳支双人舞呢？
E: You take memories, and I get joy. We get what we need from each other. Seeing as we're such kindred spirits but also such loners... Why don't you come and work with me? We can dance ballet together~

C: 真不愧是忆者。
E: No wonder you're a Memokeeper.

C: 你们发现的两件证物，是和沙马里遇袭相关的东西。花火大人物尽其用，将它们也当做了谜题的线索。
E: The two pieces of evidence that you found are related to the attack on Shamari. Miss Sparkle didn't leave them lying around for no reason — they are clues to the puzzle.

C: 这又是什么东西…毛绒玩具？
E: What's this... a plush toy?

C: 然后是富商佐罗。他想加入匹诺康尼的商事集团，同花火大人是竞争关系。也许这就是他的杀人动机。
E: Next up, you have the merchant Lefton. He wants to join up with the Penacony trading guild, and is in direct competition with Miss Sparkle. That could be a motive for killing her.

C: 指认凶手。
E: Identify the murderer.

C: 佐罗潜入试衣间，等待可怜的花火大人进入后，就用领带残忍地杀害了她！而后，他将钟珊的戒指塞入受害者口中，以此嫁祸他人。
E: Lefton snuck into the changing room and waited for poor Miss Sparkle to enter, before using this very tie to brutally kill her! And then he stuffed Zhongshan's ring into her mouth as a way to try and frame him.

C: 搞不懂，大门被锁住了，以前没锁过啊…也没人提醒我带上钥匙……
E: I don't understand, it's never been locked before... And no one told me to take a key.

C: 你真是太卜司的人吗？
E: Are you really from the Divination Commission?

C: 你看见了什么？
E: What did you see?

C: …你没什么变化呢。
E: ...You haven't changed a bit.

C: …知道吗，{NICKNAME}，即使「星神」，也是可以被杀死的。
E: ...You know, {NICKNAME}, even Aeons can be killed.

C: 我已嘱咐太卜备好星槎，为你们打开捷径。
E: I have requested that the master diviner prepare a starskiff and open a way through the shortcut.

C: 抱歉，让卡芙卡逃走了…
E: I'm sorry... Kafka escaped.

C: 公输先生是工造司「镕金坊」里资格最老的匠人，也是带咱们这个课题组的师傅。
E: Master Gongshu is the most experienced craftsman in the Artisanship Commission's smelting works — he's in charge of our research project.

C: 果然，占卜结果没错。
E: As expected, the divination was correct.

C: 噢？你是将军派来的人？一场误会，一场误会！罢了，那些小玩意儿，坏了就坏了！
E: R—Really? The general sent you? Then this must be a mere misunderstanding! Ah — don't worry about those things, easy to fix!

C: 不仅如此，它的反应就像受伤一样…或许正可以从这一点入手。
E: Not only that — its reaction suggested we'd hurt it... perhaps that's our starting point.

C: 看鹿死谁手！
E: Say hello to our very "deer" friend! ...Get it?

C: 嘿，您别着急…请听我下回分解。
E: Heh, don't get ahead of yourself... All will be revealed next time.

C: 确实还不错。
E: You've got that right.

C: 麻烦你了。若是她遇上什么困难，请{NICKNAME}回来时也告诉我。
E: Thank you. The patient in question is a little girl. If she's gotten into any trouble, {NICKNAME}, be sure to let me know when you get back.

C: 我也曾不信邪，为自己装上过义眼。不过很快，被摘除的盲眼又再度生成原状，让我痛不欲生。
E: I too was once a non-believer — I fooled myself into acquiring artificial eye implants... Soon thereafter, my sightless eyes began to regenerate, and I was left in pain and despair...

C: 这又是为什么？
E: What do you mean?

C: 你听起来似乎并无异状？你的呼吸并没有变得更绵长，气息也不像是经历过变化的样子…？
E: ...and yet — you don't sound any different. Your breaths are not prolonged, and your presence doesn't feel like it's been altered in any way...

C: 关于报酬…
E: About my pay...

C: 你谈起贝娜和「法什么玩意红毛羊」的事情。
E: You talked about Benna and the matter about the Fau-whatever Red Sheep.

C: 请留职察看人员不要在这里扇阴风点鬼火！
E: A certain suspended employee shouldn't be fanning the flames here!

C: 我，同意。
E: I have no problem with that.

C: 这三个人放生的小生命构成了食物链，相互猎杀，对他们之间的友谊和信仰造成了致命打击……
E: The living creatures released by this trio formed a food chain and consumed each other. This has dealt a devastating blow to their friendship and beliefs...

C: 有*仙舟粗口*这么报恩的吗！咳咳咳咳咳咳……
E: Do people actually *Xianzhou profanity* repay favors like this!? *coughs*

C: 嗐，你想那么多干什么？你的目的不就是解决「放生帮」带来的麻烦？现在目的达成了，皆大欢喜。
E: Why are you being such a worrywart? Aren't you here to solve the trouble caused by the Unshackled? Now that you've done your job, you should be pleased.

C: 帮帮我，尾巴大爷！
E: Help me, Mr. Tail!

C: 是雪衣大人还有…桂乃芬小姐！太好了，她没事……
E: It's Madam Xueyi... and Miss Guinaifen! Thank goodness she's alright...

C: 入得十王司，你们尽可以把我当成已死之人了。小女子代号「寒鸦」，身为判官，执掌拘、锁、刑、问四部职责之末。故而，我对你们二位并非一无所知。
E: As a member of the Ten-Lords Commission, you may as well consider me a member of the dead. I am a judge, alias "Hanya." Of the four duties of detention, incarceration, interrogation, and punishment, I'm responsible for interrogation. Therefore, I know a thing or two about you.

C: {F#小姑娘}{M#臭小子}怎么说话的！什么叫「也很危险」？老子就是最危险的那一挂！
E: Dangerous!? You don't know the half of it! The other heliobi are nothing compared to me!

C: 先找到桂乃芬小姐再出去吧…别离我太远了，求求你了……
E: We need to find Miss Guinaifen, first... Stay close to me — please...!

C: 现在的你，连离开那个判官的身体都办不到了吧？既没有办法彻底吞掉她，也没法逃离。嘿嘿，尾巴大爷，现在的你，好可怜呀~
E: You couldn't leave that judge's body if you tried! You can't eat her, let alone escape from her. Ahahaha, "Mr. Tail." You're pathetic~

C: 恚炎！恚炎——！
E: Furynox! Furynox...!

C: 你觉得藿藿性格怎么样？
E: What do you think about Huohuo's personality?

C: 可是……
E: But...

C: 那位声音很好听的女士，她的身上好像缺了某样东西——你也看到她写的了吧？她觉得心里很空洞，好像把什么很重要的东西忘记了。
E: That lady with the nice voice... she's lacking something in her. You saw what she wrote too, right? She thinks there's a void in her heart, like she forgot something really important.

C: 她一下子变得特别沮丧。
E: She suddenly became very depressed.

C: 不行哦——现在是工作时间，我不能擅离职位。
E: I can't. It's work hours now. I can't simply leave my station.

C: 这个行业的竞争非常残酷，能在聚光灯下享受掌声的永远只有寥寥几人。
E: The competition in this industry is brutal. Only a fair few can stand under the limelight and bask in applause.

C: 你又没受过正规训练，长得又不算漂亮，声线也只能说普通…小娜，我们还是想点实际的出路吧，好吗？
E: You're not even classically trained, and you're not exactly pretty, and your voice is ordinary at best... Cocona, let's think of something more practical, shall we?

C: 演唱会门票？
E: A concert ticket?

C: 传话…为什么？他和我约好了要在这里见面，然后我们一起离开……
E: In his stead... Why? He promised to meet me here, and then we would leave together...

C: 以那声响动为界，她再也无法逃脱悲伤之网。
E: As if that sound marks the end of a sentence, she is also a prisoner in this web of tragedy.

C: 你没事就好。
E: It's good that you're all right.

C: 别怕，我是你最忠诚的听众。
E: Don't be afraid. I'm your most avid fan.

C: 「那里也会有梦吗？」
E: "Will there be a dream there too?"

C: 请您不用难过，在梦境的世界里，这也是时常会发生的事情。
E: Don't be too upset. Stuff like this happens all the time in the Dreamscape.

C: 难道是银枝…
E: Could that have been Argenti?

C: 「{NICKNAME}，愿星光撒遍你的道路。你忠实的——莱斯利•迪恩。」
E: "{NICKNAME}, may the stars shine to light your path. Yours faithfully, Lesley Dean."

C: 这个房间的客人去哪了？
E: Where did the guest in this room go?

C: 如此沉重的情感…你期望获得怎样的回应呢，姬莲小姐？
E: Such heavy emotions... What do you expect as a response to this, Ms. Jillian?

C: 我感觉身体十分…轻盈，使不上力。意识…好像在变得轻薄，感知有些模糊了。
E: My body feels so... light, so powerless. My mind... I feel it growing thin. My senses are becoming dull...

C: 我对细节的追求无人能及，有机会的话希望能与您共事。
E: I am relentless when it comes to the pursuit of detail. I hope to work with you if I get the chance.

C: 就选你了。
E: I'll pick you then.

C: 不急，您可以慢慢考虑。
E: There's no hurry. Please take your time.

C: 很明显，眼前的皮皮西人对于自己名字的滑稽程度毫无自觉。讥笑别人的姓名是粗鲁的行为——所以你决定只是默默在心里对他进行彻头彻尾的嘲弄…多么仁慈。
E: It's clear to you that this Pepeshi has no idea how funny his name sounds. It's rude to just laugh at someone's name — and so you decide to just do so quietly in your head. How kind!

C: 玩什么玩！私下告诉你吧，我可是还有重要的任务在身——人命关天，相当重要！
E: Enough of what? Just between you and me, I've got a critical mission to carry out — a matter of life and death. Something extremely important!

C: （问托帕）起薪多少？
E: (Ask Topaz) What's the base salary?

C: （她是不是遇上麻烦了？这种时候就该大堂经理出手维持秩序了……）
E: (Is she in trouble? The lobby manager should step in and maintain order...)

C: 之前在晖长石号上，我本来打算花些时间和星穹列车的各位好好聊聊，没想到却被那出炸弹闹剧给搅乱了。
E: Back on the Radiant Feldspar, I thought of spending some time chatting with everyone from the Express, but the bomb scare threw everything off the course.

C: 从不知哪一刻开始，我变得有些厌烦头顶上过于明亮的聚光灯了。这一次，如果可以，我想选择自己的听众，我想为生长在路边的花草献上歌声。
E: Since some point in time, I've grown tired of the overly bright spotlight over my head. This time, if possible, I want to choose my audience. I'd like to sing for the flowers and grass on the roadside.

C: 喂喂喂，那边的小可爱们，看这儿看这儿！
E: Hey, you lil' fudgehead over there! Look here!

C: 幸会，青雀女士。
E: It's my pleasure to meet you, Miss Qingque.

C: 帝垣琼玉在匹诺康尼很火？
E: Is Celestial Jade popular in Penacony?

C: 眨眼间，三个系统时过去了……
E: Three system hours fly by without you even realizing it...

C: （挺住，{NICKNAME}…再坚持几个系统时就能下班了。）
E: (Hang in there, {NICKNAME}... Just a few more system hours, and you can clock out.)

C: 没想到是今天。
E: I had no idea that was today.

C: 太卜大人要回来早告诉我们嘛！
E: You should have told us you were coming back!

C: 太好了，{NICKNAME}，你真的愿意帮我找回手稿吗？
E: That's great, {NICKNAME}. Are you really willing to help me find the lost manuscript?

C: 这样啊，丢了就丢了嘛。
E: I see. If it's lost, it's lost.

C: 下一份。
E: Next.

C: 像我这样的就是「学徒」，水平高一些的叫「高徒」，再高一些的叫「爱徒」。
E: Take me for example, I'm an "apprentice." Those a bit higher will be called "disciples." Those a bit higher again will be called "prized pupils".

C: 因为他想继续留在工造司里。
E: Because he wanted to stay at the Artisanship Commission.

C: 因为他想研究星槎。
E: Because he wanted to study starskiffs.

C: …要真是小问题就好了。
E: ...If only that were true.

C: 我看可以。
E: I think it can work.

C: 拜托你了，公输师傅！
E: Please help us, Master Gongshu!

C: 过问死生之事，十王司能答应吗？
E: Will the Ten-Lords Commission allow us to meddle in matters of life and death?

C: 你又是怎么知道的？
E: How did you find out about that?

C: 铖杰？我这是…在俯视你？我有这么高吗……
E: Chengjie? Am I looking down at you from a distance? Where am I...

C: 我明白，人活着更重要。唉，但…人生哪能没有个盼头呢？
E: You've got a point. It's more important to do something that can earn me a living. But how can life be without passion?

C: 这就对了，这广交朋友多是一件美事！希望你跟我的爱徒能合得来，{NICKNAME}。
E: That's more like it. The more friends the merrier! I hope you can get along with my favorite student.

C: 卢卡…能听见吗？
E: Luka... can you hear me?

C: 都说了史瓦罗是机器人…就算他再怎么会计算，也很难把下手轻重控制得正正好好吧？
E: Like I said, he's a robot... No matter how good his calculations are, he's not designed to pull punches.

C: 哈哈…这么较真，是你的风格。我都说了，这就是我的试炼计…咳咳、咳！
E: Hahaha... you're always so serious. I've said it before — this is my train— *coughing*

C: …我实在放不下这个心。卢卡那家伙，以前从来不会这样。
E: ...I can't just let it go. Luka didn't use to be like this.

C: 嗯…正在评估……
E: Hmm... evaluating...

C: 看着像是小孩子的字迹，还有涂鸦…{NICKNAME}，你也来看看。
E: It looks like a kid's handwriting, and some scribbled art... {NICKNAME}, have a look.

C: 我想带着小伙伴一起，帮人们解决烦恼，看着他们露出可爱的笑脸。
E: I wanna team up with my friends and help everyone together so they can smile again.

C: 近日罗浮仙舟即将举行庆礼「星天演武」仪典。诸位曾帮助罗浮弭平灾厄，是仙舟联盟的好朋友。在此景元代表神策府诚邀诸位莅临观礼，请诸位务必拨冗赏光。
E: Soon, the Xianzhou Luofu will be holding the Luminary Wardance. Those who have aided the Luofu in overcoming the crisis are cherished allies of the Xianzhou, thus, on behalf of the Seat of Divine Foresight, I'm extending an invitation to attend the ceremony. Your presence would be greatly appreciated.

C: 好久不见！
E: Long time no see!

C: 我原本还有些担心，建木危机刚刚过去，举行演武仪典是否有些仓促。但看看现在的星槎海，将军选择的时机是恰当的。
E: I was a bit worried that holding the Wardance right after the Ambrosial Arbor crisis might be too soon, but seeing the bustling Starskiff Haven, I understand why General Jing Yuan chose this timing.

C: 来，说说吧，演武仪典召开在即，罗浮的一切以安全稳定为上。为什么在星槎海会出现步离囚犯？
E: With the Wardance approaching, safety should be a top priority. Now, tell me, how did borisin prisoners end up in Starskiff Haven?

C: 天击将军帐下幕僚，椒丘、貊泽，拜见两位天将。
E: We are Jiaoqiu and Moze, retainers of the Merlin's Claw. It's an honor to meet you in person, Arbiter-Generals.

C: 那怎么又拉到工造司来了？还找来个獐头鼠目的匠人，这不明摆着要偷学公司的专利技术吗？
E: Then why did you bring the cargo to the Artisanship Commission? You even brought in some shady craftsman. It's obvious that you're trying to steal the IPC's patented technology!

C: 倒是三月小姐…仍是块未开凿的璞玉。
E: As for Miss March... she's like a piece of jade in the rough, just waiting to be shaped.

C: 我明白了，抱歉，是我失仪了。我也知道自己现在不该多嘴为景元将军辩护…但，你也了解我的性格。
E: I understand. I'm sorry, I was out of line. I know I shouldn't be defending General Jing Yuan right now... but, well, you know how I am.

C: 奇怪…？
E: Strange...?

C: 任务要紧。
E: This mission is critical.

C: 请一定要阻拦逃犯…
E: Please stop those fugitives...

C: 一边待着去。我让你瞧瞧，朱明仙舟的剑士是如何宠爱弟子的。
E: Stand aside, rookie. Let me show you how we Zhuming swordmasters treat their apprentices.

C: 容我稍微再准备一下……
E: I need some more time to prepare myself...

C: 到时候就看我在演武赛场上大显身手，拿下一胜，告慰两位！
E: Just you wait and see! I'll show off my skills in the ring and win a match. I'll make both of you proud!

C: 你这个人啊，满脑子都是剑。
E: Sounds like that mind of yours is just filled with swords.

C: 两位尽管据实回答，无需担心。
E: Don't worry. Just tell her the truth.

C: 你既然没有擅入仙舟的打算，那为何在流放令终止前却重返仙舟？
E: If you had no intention to trespass, then why did you return to the Xianzhou ship before your exile was lifted?

C: 正是。客人，请入内。
E: Exactly. Please come on in, dear guests.

C: 这一路行去，各位一定要留神自己的落脚处。
E: Be very careful and watch your step as you make your way through.

C: 也许吧，从外观看，这座幽囚狱的许多建筑都留有持明的制式…也许在古早之前，持明确实参与营建了此处。
E: Perhaps. Judging from the appearance, much of the architecture in this prison has a Vidyadharan style... So perhaps they did have a hand in building this place back then.

C: 点灯所需的图示吾已交给你了。看看吧。
E: I've given you the diagrams for lighting the lanterns. Please take a look.

C: 依循常例，曜青使节每百年一次抵达罗浮仙舟，确认这头孽物的关押事宜与其生死状况。
E: According to custom, envoys from the Yaoqing visit the Xianzhou Luofu once every century to check on this abomination's imprisonment and condition.

C: 欢迎回来，姐姐。我不知道这时候该做什么表情好。高兴？喜极而泣？算了，我已经习惯了你用各种面目回来。
E: Welcome back, sister. I don't know what kind of expression I should have at a time like this. Happy? Tears of joy? Ah, forget it. I'm used to you coming back in all sorts of forms.

C: 非也，非也。
E: No, that's not the case.

C: 对我而言，罗浮眼下的安全更优先。在担起守擂剑士这份荣耀前，我必须先履行作为云骑骁卫的职责。
E: The security of the Luofu is more important to me than anything else. I need to fulfill my duties as a Cloud Knight Lieutenant before taking on the honor of being a ringmaster.

C: 不，如果只是单纯为了向公司和学会复仇，他们大可以破坏舰船，毁掉所有的货物。这样一来，它就不会出现在幽囚狱里了。
E: No, if it were only about revenge, they could just wreck the ship and destroy all the cargo, instead of allowing it to end up in The Shackling Prison.

C: 珍馐美味…那不就是一种味道盖过了另一种味道吗？
E: Delicacy... but isn't that just one flavor overpowering the others?

C: 可惜我手头没有青椒，不然真想把你嘴塞上，入锅煮了。
E: It's a shame I don't have any green peppers right now. Otherwise, I'd happily stuff them into your mouth and cook you alive in a pot.

C: 别问了，不走，找别人吧。
E: Stop asking. I'm off-duty now. Go bother someone else.

C: 战首问能走了吗？
E: The Warhead wants to know if we can leave now.

C: 请详细说明需要怎样的帮助。
E: Could you please provide more details?

C: 接下来是那边的云骑士兵，如果是来巡逻的，那就是没有遵守两人一组的执勤规制。
E: Then, there's a Cloud Knight soldier over there. Perhaps he's here for patrol, but each patrol team must consist of two members, and obviously, he's not following the rules.

C: 接到消息了，我会时刻保持警惕！
E: Yeah, I've received the news, and I'll be on the alert!

C: （质疑他所处的位置）
E: (Question his location)

C: 我的天，这不是来自朱明仙舟的选手云璃小姐吗！
E: Goodness! Isn't that the Xianzhou Zhuming's contestant, Miss Yunli?

C: 这是什么反派登场台词吗？
E: Is this some kind of villain entrance line?

C: 挥舞这么巨大的武器…云璃师傅比起策略更喜欢压倒性的暴力呢。
E: Waving around such a giant weapon... Master Yunli favors using overwhelming force over strategy.

C: 对了，你就是代替彦卿骁卫登场的三月七选手！没错吧？
E: Oh! You're March 7th, the stand-in for Lieutenant Yanqing, correct?

C: 没错。您是…？
E: That's right, and you are...?

C: 竟然是这样，请问他是为什么身负重伤呢？
E: If that's the case, could you please tell me how these serious injuries came about?

C: 「我要托付你们的绝不只是擂台上的胜负荣辱，还有竞锋舰的安全。」
E: I'm entrusting you not only with the honor of the ring, but also with the security of the Skysplitter.

C: 毕竟你不用去活着见证你的将军所要面临的悲惨未来。
E: After all, you will avoid having to see the tragic future that awaits your general.

C: 找我有什么事吗？
E: Is there anything that I can do for you?

C: 睁开双眼看看，在这场战争中，你只是一颗受他们摆布的棋子。
E: Open your eyes. You are nothing more than a pawn in their war.

C: 为了终有一日，不再有人目睹「流星」落下…为了能多一个人活着，和我一起回到曜青。
E: I fight so that one day, I will never have to witness another "shooting star" falling to the ground... So that just one more person can live and return to the Yaoqing alongside me.

C: 那就如你所愿！我会以你的恐惧和怀疑为养料，抓住你，吞下你——我会取代你…成为「飞霄」！
E: Then have it your way! I will use your fear and doubt as my nourishment. I will seize you and devour you! I will replace you and... become "Feixiao"!

C: 各位现在退出鳞渊境，上书联盟高层，由六御公审降罪，处我以褪鳞之刑，转世重生。
E: Leave the Scalegorge Waterscape immediately, and appeal to the top echelons of the Alliance. Let the Six Charioteers hold a trial and sentence me to exuviation and rebirth.

C: 呵呵…哈哈…哈哈哈哈哈哈……
E: Heh... Haha... Hahahahaha...

C: 那就依炎老的意思。罗浮会尽力抚恤死伤，裨补损失，务求在数周之内重开演武仪典。
E: As Elder Huaiyan suggests, the Luofu will do its best to heal the wounded and compensate those who were affected. We aim to reopen the Wardance in the coming weeks.

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent.)

C: 怎么了？你东张西望什么？
E: What's wrong? Why are you glancing around?

C: 如果到了那个份上，陛下还不肯让那些边民的日子好过些，那时候产生的舆论压力一定会狠狠折磨我的傻哥哥的。
E: If the scene's reached that stage, and His Majesty still refuses to soften those people's hardships, the resulting pressure will surely be excruciatingly torturous for my silly older brother.

C: 公主殿下，人情义理只对您这个岁数的人，或是您身边这种贱民才有意义。
E: Your Highness, affairs of sentiment only mean something to people of your age, and that filthy commoner beside you.

C: 街上到处都是二姐的人…我们找辆车快点出发吧，尽可能不要惊动这些叛军。
E: Second Sister's soldiers are crawling the streets... Let's find a car and set off and try not to alert these turncoats.

C: 进入花店
E: Enter the Florist

C: 谢主隆恩！我就不客气了！
E: I thank you for your graces! Allow me then!

C: 快过来，有很多事需要你处理！我一个人忙不过来！
E: Get over here. There are plenty of matters I need you to handle! I can't do it all by myself!

C: 朕曾以为…在这世上，朕至少还能相信一人…现在看来，是朕太天真了。
E: I once thought... that in this world, there was at least one person I could trust... But it appears that I was too naive.

C: 哭什么哭，好像那些事不是你做的一样！
E: What're you crying about? As if you didn't do anything of those things!

C: 呵…好人。你能这么想，也好。
E: Heh... Good person. You've certainly got some imagination, and that's good.

C: 哪怕透过梦境这层厚重的滤镜，我也能感受到你身体里翻涌的生命力。你停不下来，每时每刻都在追求冒险——或者说，「开拓」——的路上。
E: I can feel the surging vitality in you even through the thick filter of the dreamscape. You can't stop. You spend every moment of your life going on an adventure — or more precisely, a trailblazing journey.

C: 闯入者——需要我提醒你，这片城区不对逐梦客开放吗？违反家族规定的闹事者，猎犬有权将其逐出梦境。
E: Intruder, do I have to remind you that this area isn't open to Dreamchasers? We have the authority to expel anyone who violates The Family's rules from the dreamscape.

C: …十分抱歉，给两位添麻烦了。家主指示，对螺丝咕姆先生…还有这位无名客{F#小姐}{M#先生}放行。
E: ...My sincerest apologies for the inconvenience. The family head has instructed me to let Mr. Screwllum... and this Nameless {F#lady}{M#gentleman} here through.

C: 大概取决于你如何定义「活着」。银河中也有许多人认为，由冰冷的机械和电子回路组成的机体不能被称之为「生命」。
E: It depends on how you define "alive." Many in the galaxy opine that machines, which are made of cold, metallic chassis and veined by electric circuits, cannot be seen as lifeforms.

C: 我是来帮你的，查德威克博士。
E: I'm here to help you, Dr. Chadwick.

C: 帮我…啊，这件事我大概还记得。我必须承认…我没抱太大希望。那对我来说太奢侈了。
E: Help me... Oh, I still remember something about this. I must confess... that I didn't get my hopes up. Hope is a luxury for me.

C: 再等我一会儿。
E: Just a moment, please.

C: 我不知道该怎么看待你。
E: I'm not sure what to make of you.

C: 他们大概认为，无论我用了何种手段缄口不言，一旦等到肉身消亡的一刻，余留下来的东西就只能任他们摆布。
E: They probably think that no matter how tight-lipped I am now, whatever remains of my dead body will be at their disposal.

C: （我该去和他聊聊。）
E: (I should go talk to him.)

C: {NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，我想…我大概知道查德威克在哪了。
E: {F#Madam}{M#Sir} {NICKNAME}, I think... I might know where Chadwick is.

C: 行了，比起在这跟我说废话，你更该去找找那家伙留下的东西。
E: All right, rather than talking about the pointless, you'd be better off looking for the stuff that fella left behind.

C: 为建成真正的盛会之星，担任隐夜鸫家主的格拉克斯教授开始向全宇宙募集最优秀的人才，带领他们探索改造梦境的方法——也就是筑梦技术。
E: To build a true Planet of Festivities, Professor Glaux — who was the Nightingale's family head — began recruiting the most stellar talents across the cosmos, leading them in the exploration of methods to modify the Dreamscape — what you know as dreamweaving technology.

C: 或许…他是将冯恩先生看做同龄人，在别扭地示好呢？
E: Perhaps... he saw Mr. Vaughn as someone of his age, and was expressing affection, albeit inappropriately?

C: 一点闲话罢了，常听常新，算不上什么大事。
E: It's just some chatter. You get used to it after a while, it's nothing major.

C: 这样的话，湛蓝爵士也能常常见到我们的样子了啾。
E: This way, Dr. Blues can always see our faces, tweet!

C: 确实，虽然我不懂大地兽，但这个外邦人未免太不守规矩了……
E: That's right, I don't know much about dromases, but this outlander is overstepping his boundaries...

C: 我也想给大地兽搓背…
E: I also want to massage the back of a dromas...

C: 吾师，你怎么在这儿？真是让我好找…我有消息要告诉你。
E: Master, what are you doing here? I had such a hard time finding you... I have news for you.

C: 就是现在！
E: Now!

C: 不能向官方反映吗？
E: Can't we notify the officials?

C: 我要了。
E: I'll take it.

C: 按照圣城法律，他们将对我进行审判，结果大概率不会仁慈。
E: According to the holy city's laws, they will make me stand trial. There's a high chance they won't be lenient.

C: 拉莱德代表，如果你有异议，还请堂堂正正地驳倒{F#她}{M#他}。
E: Representative Liluder, if you have any objections, please respond to {F#her}{M#him} without contempt.

C: 你以为谁都能从圣城仓库里偷东西吗？你们的安保这么不严密？
E: You think anyone can waltz into the holy city's warehouse and plunder its supplies? Is your security that lax?

C: 黑潮的威胁仍旧很大，我们必须随时保持战备状态。难道你要让那些与黑潮对抗的战士得不到药吗？
E: The black tide's threat looms ever so great. We must always be ready for battle. Are you going to deprive our warriors battling the black tide of precious medicine?

C: 既然你这么关心那些外邦人，为什么不自己接几个回家？
E: Since you care so much about the outlanders, why not bring a few of them home?

C: 阿格莱雅的出现让本已沉寂的观众再次激动起来——很少有民事案件能引来黄金裔的关注。
E: Aglaea's appearance spurs the spectators once more — few civil cases can catch the attention of the Chrysos Heirs.

C: 帕…帕里斯……
E: Pa... Paris...

C: 凯旋尚且不能为傲，败退更是玷污悬锋的恶行。它曾告诉它们的先祖：悬锋上的泥垢，必须用血洗去。
E: There is no pride in victory, and defeat is an even more disgraceful act that tarnishes Kremnos. The god told their ancestors: "The filth of Kremnos must be washed clean in blood."

C: 看啊，你所守护的人和部下挽着敌人的手步入城中，而那被挽起的手可能在前日刚刚射杀了你的父兄。
E: Do you see? The person and subordinate whom you protect has marched into the city hand-in-hand with the enemy. Your fathers and brothers could have just lost their lives to those very hands a few days ago.

C: 面对不公的死亡，你不选择抗争，甚至不愿选择挣扎。我要救下你的命，就是要向你证明：命运可不是不能战胜的东西！
E: You chose not to fight back even in the face of an unfair execution — you would not even put up a struggle. I saved your life to prove to you: Destiny is something that can be defeated!

C: 唉，你这孩子怎么还惦记着这事儿，婆婆得再说说你了……
E: Tsk, you are still obsessed with that idea? I need to sit you down for a good talking to...

C: …我不知道，因为我从来没有勇气直面过那些身为敌人的眷属。
E: ...I do not know. To this day, I have never had the courage to face Titankin enemies.

C: 那挂毯上绣的是奄奄一息的奥赫玛人，和挥舞着青铜武器的悬锋城人——因为你而在尼卡多利手中遭受的无数血战，被你织进了一根根纬线之中。
E: The tapestry shows the people of Okhema breathing their last, with those from Castrum Kremnos wielding the bronze weapons... The countless bloody battles that Okhema suffered under Nikador's rule, all because of you, have been woven to life in the tapestries forevermore.

C: 什么义务，什么使命，我根本不在乎，让悬锋城和奥赫玛带着它们一起见冥河去吧！
E: Duty? Mission? I don't care about those things! Castrum Kremnos and Okhema can disappear into the River of Souls with them for all I care!

C: 尘土飘向的地方会是真正的阿卡迪亚吗？{RUBY_B#理性}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}知晓那个地方吗？{RUBY_B#浪漫}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}会在那里等候它吗？
E: Perhaps the land that this dust will be carried to is the true Arcadia? Does {RUBY_B#Reason}Cerces{RUBY_E#} know that place? Will {RUBY_B#Romance}Mnestia{RUBY_E#} await them there?

C: 怎么可能？囚房明明没法从内部打开…那个眷属应该已经不能动了，他们肯定走不远！
E: How is that possible? The prison gates cannot be opened from inside... That Titankin can't walk anymore, so they can't have gone far!

C: （要让这么大的东西动起来，或许只能靠「欧洛尼斯祷言了」……）
E: (Maybe the only way to get something this big to move is to use the "Oronyx's Prayer"...)

C: 初次见面，帕西提亚。
E: An honor to meet you, Pasithea.

C: 需要看看里面写了什么吗？
E: Do I need to take a look at what's written inside?

C: 看，狠狠地看。
E: Yes, take a good look.

C: …她下笔好重，纸都被戳穿了。
E: ...She's writing with such force that she's almost piercing through the paper.

C: 可这么多年以来，我的梦里一直掺杂着另一种杂音。
E: Yet, for many years, my dreams have always been plagued with another noise.

C: 可我要告诉你，真正需要神谕的，不是我们，恰恰是他们！
E: But let me tell you: The ones who truly need prophecies are not us, but them!

C: 我好想她。
E: I miss her dearly.

C: 高高在上地指责我们是杜撰神谕的骗子，如此维护它，欧洛尼斯是如何对待你的？
E: Accusing us of being liars fabricating prophecies from your ivory tower, defending it with fervor. And how is Oronyx treating you?

C: 如果真的有谁应当受到惩罚，只应该是抛弃了她的我，如果我能再努力一点，如果我能不让她挨饿……
E: If there's anyone who deserves to be punished, it should be me, the one who abandoned her. If only I tried harder... if only I could have kept her from growing hungry...

C: 是啊，无论我们是否身在命运之中，都有无力改变的事情。但只要我们去做了，也总能改变什么。
E: Yes, there are always things that we are powerless to change regardless of destiny. However, as long as we take action, we will end up changing some things.

C: 恭迎船长归位！
E: Welcome back to your post, Captain!

C: 就这样，《如我所书》在匹诺康尼上市了。
E: And so, As I've Written was published in Penacony.

C: 你还能陪在我们身边吗？
E: Can you stay with us?

C: 你看见：星云绽放光芒，勾勒出花圃的轮廓。一个新生的世界将要萌芽。
E: You see: The nebula blooms with radiance, tracing the silhouette of a garden. A newborn world is about to sprout.

C: 我想好了。就从头开始讲起……
E: I've made up my mind. Let me start from the beginning...

C: 我早就试过了，可惜结果不太理想。早先我制作的原型机<unbreak>157</unbreak>虽然有了一定自主思考的能力，但她对这个世界的疑惑，我却无法解答。
E: I did, but the result was not ideal. Although Prototype <unbreak>157</unbreak> I made earlier had independent thinking capability to a certain degree, I couldn't answer her questions about our world.

C: 我虽掌握了许多深奥的知识，但和普通人类之间还有很大的差距。我想和大家一样，成为真正的人类。
E: Although I have mastered a lot of advanced knowledge, there is still a big gap between me and ordinary humans. I want to be a real human like everyone else.

C: 你有什么兴趣爱好吗？
E: Do you have any hobbies?

C: 虽然我没能从中学到什么真正有用的东西，不过，我现在对外界的很多东西都充满着莫名的探索欲。
E: Despite the little useful information I found, I'm still very intrigued to explore the outside world.

C: 学得还不错。
E: You're a fast learner.

C: 当然是真的！有目共睹嘛！
E: Of course it's true! It's obvious to all!

C: 你详细说说。
E: Tell me the details.

C: 就是，还得赶奇物报告呢。
E: Seriously, I need to work on my Curio report.

C: 机器人也能做饭？
E: Robots can cook?

C: 错误编号<unbreak>00040</unbreak>，负荷已满，推进装置无法响应。
E: Error code <unbreak>00040</unbreak>. Maximum load reached. Thruster compartment unresponsive.

C: （将报错信息报给他）
E: (Give him the error logs)

C: 不过我还没有打听到是哪个科的…麻烦你就帮我去找到这个晋升的家伙，看看能不能从他嘴里挖出点有用的情报吧！
E: But I haven't found out which department this story is from... Could you please find this promoted person and see what useful information you can get out of them?

C: 再有趣的怪谈在调查清楚之后，都变得相当无趣，这研究报告…不写也罢！
E: No matter how interesting a ghost story is, they stop being interesting once you've investigated them... I might as well stop writing this report!

C: 现在流行哪款隐形眼镜？
E: Which type of contact lenses is in fashion these days?

C: 这样吧，要不…你在这附近转转，看看有没有什么奇怪的地方？要是我真的遇到了什么事，一定会留下痕迹的，没错吧？
E: Well... why don't you walk around here and see if you can find anything strange? If something did happen to me, there should be traces left behind, right?
...Huh?

C: 有娜塔莎姐姐在，你的头晕病一定能被治好的！一定要相信娜塔莎姐姐……
E: Natasha will definitely heal your dizziness! Have faith in her...

C: 那个，你要是不介意的话，能不能和我分享些刺激的冒险经历？我不想让女儿觉得她老爹是个没本事的老家伙，但自己的想象力也实在有限……
E: Well, if you don't mind, can you share some exciting adventures with me? I don't want my daughter to think that her dad is a useless old bum, but my imagination is really limited...

C: …啊，正好，{NICKNAME}来了！这件事你来评评理吧。
E: ...Ah, right on time, here comes {NICKNAME}! What do you make of his request?

C: {NICKNAME}，吉尔伯特，你们回来了！我已经收到铁卫的汇报了，任务圆满完成。
E: {NICKNAME}, Gilbert, you're back! I received a report from the Guards that your mission was a success.

C: 动作可真快！谢谢你们，这就行了。正好，我的回信也写好了。等你下次见到老爸的时候，麻烦连着花一起带给他吧。
E: You sure are quick! Thank you, that should be perfect. I just finished writing my reply letter as well. Please give it to my father the next time you go see him.

C: 谢谢你们帮我这么多忙，陌生人！请一定收下这些…现在我该去好好收拾收拾东西，准备回家了。
E: Thank you for all your help, stranger! Please take these... Now I need to go get my things together and get ready to return home.

C: {NICKNAME}，年轻人，你来的真是时候！来来来，我正好有个大新闻要跟你分享……
E: {NICKNAME}, young one, you arrive just in time! Come here, I have big news to share with you...

C: 不过，你可千万别灰心丧气。这是我的真心话。像你这样聪明的年轻人，欠缺的只是正规的教育。
E: However, don't be discouraged. I am being utterly sincere with you. All a bright youngster like you lacks is formal education.

C: 窃贼到底为什么只偷一个轮子？
E: Why on earth did the thief only grab one wheel?

C: 我看看…这…这是…「大宇宙时间隧道」？这……
E: Let me see... Is... Is this the big universe time tunnel theory? That's...

C: 如果你有这个意向，我随时可以给你安排学校。我还是很欣赏你的。
E: I can arrange some lessons for you any time, should you have the inclination. I quite admire you.

C: 我来追问论文申请的进度。
E: I'm here to ask about that thesis paper.

C: （这样就算刺探成功了吧…该回去找雷金了。）
E: (Mission accomplished... let's report back to Regin.)

C: 事先提醒您，这些题目的难度可不低…答不上来也不丢人哦。不多说了，看题面吧。
E: I would like to remind you in advance that these questions are far from simple... and it's no shame to get them wrong. Onto the quiz, then.

C: 啊——我明白了，您是带着任务来的，对吗？您是想来验收一下教育部的题库储备，对吧？
E: Ah, I see. You've come on a mission, haven't you? You've come to test the variety of questions in our quiz pool, haven't you?

C: 这个问题…好像有点太私人了。
E: That's... starting to get a little too personal.

C: 所以我想找你交流一下…也许你那些摇滚乐的发声技巧，能给我一些新的突破呢。
E: That's why I came to chat with you... Maybe your rock music vocals can help me make a breakthrough to a higher level.

C: 气死我了——你这臭小子又想上哪儿去？
E: I'm so annoyed — Where are you trying to go, boy!?

C: 如果其他社友发布了委托，我就会通知到你。你可以自行判断是否提供协助。
E: I'll contact you when other members put up commissions, and you can decide whether to help them.

C: 对不起，可能是我太悲观了。请你别放在心上。
E: Sorry. Maybe I'm being too pessimistic. Don't take it to heart.

C: 这么理解可就太片面了！你想啊，「正当权益会社」是帮助人行使「正当权益」的，而我的工作则是确保别人的「正当权益」不受侵犯……
E: That's not the whole picture! Think about it — The Rightful Rights Society helps people to exercise their rightful rights, and my job is to ensure people's rights are not violated...

C: 不过算了，毕竟你特意跑一趟，我再胡乱提要求也不合适。谢谢你啊。
E: Never mind. You came all the way out here for this, and I can't ask too much from you. Thank you.

C: 我…这怎么可能？什么叫被困在了过去？
E: I — How? What do you mean, trapped in the past?

C: 这是…什么意思…？
E: What does that mean...?

C: 你见过我的爸爸妈妈？他们说什么了…？
E: You saw my Mom and Dad? What did they say?

C: 这家店已经废弃了。
E: This shop is abandoned.

C: 行啊，但怎么这么突然？
E: Sure. Why though?

C: 面前的铁卫如获至宝，仰天大笑。你仿佛能从那严密的铁盔下看到他激动的神情。
E: The guard standing in front of you laughs heartily as if he has found a treasure. You can almost see his excited expression through his tightly secured iron helmet.

C: 写点什么，然后扔回海里。
E: I'll write something in reply and throw it back.

C: 老板你头发掉得有点多啊…
E: Looks like you've experienced some hair loss...

C: 我也不知道嗝。
E: I don't know, either. *burp*

C: 门上的每轮木纹，都唱诵着它所经历的一段岁月——但也有些是大地兽和奇美拉们留下的划痕伪装出来的。
E: Every wooden grain on the door is an ode to the years it has endured... though some of them are patched-up works of scratches made by dromases and chimeras.

C: 尚未完工的靛钢雕像。根据工匠的需求，它可能成为军锋、铁卫或射手——无论哪种，最后都要投身战争。
E: An unfinished statue crafted from indigo steel. Depending on the craftsman's requirements, it may be sculpted into a legionnaire, a city guard, or an archer. No matter the result, it will eventually be used for war.

C: 话虽如此，有一点你很清楚…比起如何解释一个世界，更重要的是如何去改变一个世界——让它变成某种更美好的样子。
E: Even so, you are sure of one thing... Rather than being able to explain a world, what's more important is to be able to change it for the better, no matter what that may be.

C: 哎哟，我这后脑勺好疼，我现在感觉还有点晕…呕…呕…还有点想吐，你别走，我要是有什么三长两短……
E: Ooh, the back of my head hurts. I'm starting to feel faint... Ugh... Urp... I think I'm going to throw up. You wait right there. If something bad happens to me...

C: 你够不着。
E: You can't reach it.

C: 在多方势力协作下，绝灭大君「铁墓」威胁已被肃清。
E: Through the combined efforts of multiple factions, the menace of the Lord Ravager known as "Irontomb" has been successfully neutralized.

C: 天边的墓碑，邪物的乐园，市民避讳看向的方位。
E: A tombstone at the end of the sky and a paradise of evil. The people do their best to not look in its general direction.

C: 或背负黄昏，或背负黎明。
E: It bears the dusk on its back, and it bears the dawn on its back.

C: 身后的下人们气喘吁吁，生怕踩中了落雷。
E: His servants huff and puff behind him, terrified to step upon a bolt of lightning.

C: 万事万物灭绝有其原因，难以扭转。依靠着这些「种子」，你们只是在「创造」，而不是让已经逝去的「重现」。
E: Every being that goes extinct does so for a reason, and it is difficult to undo. By relying on these "seeds," you are only "creating," and you are not allowing the dead to "return."

C: 我腹中的王子，迈德漠斯，数月后将来到这个世界。他继承了王欧利庞与我的铮铮铁骨，又日夜沐浴在尼卡多利的神性照耀之下，必将成为新的悬锋之王。
E: Mydeimos, the prince that I carry in my body, will be born to this world in a number of months. He has inherited the iron bones of myself and King Eurypon and been bathed in the divine light of Nikador day and night. He must become the new King of Kremnos.

C: 你记住了「曾与缇宝交谈过」
E: You remembered "Talking with Tribbie."

C: 残像们所处的位置有些古怪…也许过去此处的环境与现在有所不同。
E: The placement of the afterimages seems a little off... Perhaps the environment here is different now to how it once was.

C: 感谢。愿瑟希斯捍卫你的思想。
E: Thank you. May Cerces safeguard your thoughts.

C: 没关系！只要是妈妈讲的故事，怎么都听不厌的！
E: I don't mind! I'll never get sick of them as long as you're reading them to me, mommy!

C: 再说，您贵为黄金裔，要走，也是您走！
E: You're a Chrysos Heir! If anyone is going, it should be you!

C: 元老。
E: The elder.

C: o((⊙'ω´- )っ「那么，我们各自修行，两年之后再在这里会合吧，伙伴！」)∋
E: o((⊙'ω´- )っ "Well then, let's go our separate ways and meet back here in two years, partner!" )∋

C: Σ(:３っ「直到现在，本豹每天都还在用。相信它一定能助我豹仇雪恨，夺回冠军！」)∋
E: Σ(:３っ "I still use the balm daily. I believe it will unlock my inner seal of vengeance and help me reclaim the championship!" )∋

C: 我们用麸皮和罐子祭拜…
E: We offer bran and jars as tribute...

C: 金色的流体在圣烛中起落，周围的植物似乎在轻轻摇曳，回应着金色流体的律动。
E: The golden liquid within the holy candle rises and falls, while the surrounding plants seem to sway gently in response to its rhythm.

C: 黎明云崖。
E: Dawncloud.

C: 谢谢你们的好意。只是，新昏光庭院地处宅巷，一旦被黑潮怪物包围，你们的处境会非常危险。
E: Thank you for your kindness. However, the new Twilight Courtyard is in a residential alley. If it gets surrounded by the black tide monsters, you will be all in grave danger.

C: 那孩子，还是嚷嚷着要去外面看看…可万一遇上什么麻烦，我们在家里又帮不上忙，真放心不下啊。
E: The kid is still talking about going out to see the world... but I'm really worried. What if something happens to him out there, and we're too far away to do anything?

C: 「请问你掉的是这个金色的怪物，还是这个银色的怪物？」
E: "Tell me, did you drop this golden monster, or this silver one?"

C: 「大地之半神」荒笛，生于光历前约<unbreak>2000</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>3961</unbreak>年。
E: Terravox, the Demigod of Earth. Born approx. <unbreak>2000</unbreak> years before the Light Calendar system. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>3961</unbreak>.

C: 「天空之半神」雅辛忒丝，生于光历<unbreak>4297</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>4602</unbreak>年。
E: Hyacinthia, the Demigod of Sky. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>4297</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>4602</unbreak>.

C: 不如窝家里。
E: I'd rather stay cozy at home.

C: 换句话说，你若是撰写短文对「论大地兽优于泰坦」的观点批驳一番，我倒是愿意给你个及格的评价…但是一份白卷只能换得一份空白的评价。
E: In other words, if you write an essay critiquing the idea that dromas surpasses Titans, I'd be willing to give you a passing score. But a blank sheet only gets a blank grade.

C: …那么，请敬拜学派的辩友复述你们对神性的定义。
E: ...Alright, let's hear the Venerationism's definition of divinity.

C: 我不是那个意思……
E: That's not what I meant...

C: 空旷的地势最宜侦察…
E: Open terrain is perfect for scouting...

C: 我想问别的…
E: I'd like to ask about something else...

C: …如果是担心我会偷看、窃取、操作你的记忆，那你就多虑了。忆者接受过严格的训练，任何违背律令的记忆操作会立刻终止我的存续。
E: But you don't have to worry about me peeping, stealing, or controlling your memories. Memokeepers have undergone rigorous training. Anything we do that goes against the rules will result in the immediate termination of our existence.

C: 你…在试探我？
E: Are you... testing me?

C: 你看着镜子旁的女孩：该怎么向同伴交代呢？她像是读出了你的心声，轻轻一笑。
E: You look at the girl in the mirror. How will you explain this to your companions? She laughs softly, as if she saw through your concerns.

C: 向你致敬，教官。
E: Hats off to you, drillmaster.

C: 我和我的小伙伴就是因为质疑它，才被赶到这里来…可惜，其他人都相信它那套说辞。
E: My buddies and I were banished here because we doubted it... Such a shame that everyone else believed its lies.

C: （走吧，先出去看看。）
E: (Let's go and take a look.)

C: 有点恶心，还是别碰了。
E: Kinda gross. Don't touch it.

C: 你说这个我听不懂哦。
E: I don't understand what you're saying.

C: 我的肚肚很饿，你要是能搞来美味的点心投喂我，那我就能听懂了。
E: My tummy is growling. If you can get me a tasty treat, then I might be able to understand.

C: 质疑
E: Interrogate

C: （它<color=#dbc291ff>在对门禁系统做什么？等等，难道这是它做的手脚</color>？！）
E: (What did it do to <color=#dbc291ff>the access control system? Wait, did it tamper with it!?</color>)

C: 佩佩解除了同步。
E: Peppy desynchronized.

C: 你从佩佩的眼神里看出了几分钦佩，几分赞赏。
E: You can see the admiration and appreciation from Peppy's gaze.

C: 为了这些特别的故事，人家会耐心等待哦，就在梦里…你也会回来的，对不对？
E: I'll wait patiently for these enchanting tales, right here in dreamland... You're coming back, aren't you?

C: 那人家会更开心哦？说明值得留念的瞬间太多，都记不过来啦！
E: That would make me even happier! It means there are so many moments worth treasuring that you can't keep track of them all!

C: 呀！{NICKNAME}，这个时间了，有没有好好吃饭？
E: Oh! {NICKNAME}, look at the time! Have you eaten properly?

C: 即便每个人的故事都有结局，人家也还是想让一切重新开始。
E: Even though every story has an ending, I still wish everything could start over again.

C: 让我们来续写它吧。
E: Let's continue writing the rest of the story.

C: （这应该就是鹤运物流的时刻表了。确认一下下艘货运星槎的到港时间吧。）
E: (This should be the timetable for Heron Express. Confirm the arrival time of the next freight starskiff.)

C: 小鸟鸟，最会闹！
E: I'm the life of the party!

C: 今天还有武器测试吗？
E: Are there weapon tests today?

C: 你说彗星才多大质量？要是用这「匣里流光」作推进器，随随便便就能给它推回去。
E: Comets are not that heavy. If we use the Luminflux Pyxis as a thruster, we can push a comet to wherever we want.

C: 占算用的方案已准备好了，这就开始？
E: The divination plan is ready. Shall we begin?

C: 不过是几个数字的组合罢了。
E: It's just a string of numbers.

C: 我来做和你来做有什么区别吗？
E: What's the difference between you and me doing it?

C: 你以为我不知道吗？
E: Did you think I didn't know?

C: 棋鬼，你说话呀。
E: Chess Ghost, say something.

C: {NICKNAME}大人说笑了，当然是「寻径指津」啦，整个仙舟还有比您更会玩这个游戏的人么？
E: Oh, you're such a jokester, {NICKNAME}. I'm talking about "Pathfinder," of course! Nobody else in the Xianzhou plays it better than you, after all.

C: 他说过，但我忘了。
E: He told me, but I forgot about it.

C: 你准备好了就跟我说一声，我帮你摆棋盘。
E: Let me know when you're ready. I'll set up the chessboard for you.

C: 我再准备下。
E: I need a moment to get ready.

C: 我没想走啊。
E: I wasn't going anywhere.

C: 在哪里开发不是开发呢？在工造司的工位上，在丹鼎司的病房里，在十王司的牢房里，其实开发环境都差不多的。
E: Why not? Whether in the workplace of the Artisanship Commission, the hospital ward of the Alchemy Commission, or the cell of the Ten-Lords Commission, the environment for game development is similar.

C: 滴、答…游客，我们又见面了。
E: Tick, tock... We meet again, guest.

C: 我不是故意碰这东西的！
E: I didn't mean to touch this thing!

C: 我没有怪罪你的意思，只是有件事要请你帮忙…即使现在我们没有被金丝相连，我也想向你传达我的真诚。
E: I'm not blaming you. I just have something to ask for your help with... Even though we're not currently connected by the golden thread, I want to convey my sincerity to you.

C: 金丝在人台周围凝聚，构成了一个包裹它身体的茧。
E: The golden thread solidifies around the mannequin, creating a cocoon that envelops it.

C: 说来话长，若虫们本质上…都曾是生活在黄金世的人类。
E: That's a little complicated. In short, nymphs were essentially... human beings who had lived in the Era Chrysea.

C: 嗯…有位织者立志成为预言中的勇者，扫清世上的一切黑暗。金丝带来消息，它正尝试拔出<color=#dbc291ff>某柄传说中的勇者之剑</color>，在那里或许可以觅得它的踪迹。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who dreams of becoming the hero foretold in the prophecy, determined to vanquish all darkness from the world. The golden thread brings tidings: They now strive to pull out <color=#dbc291ff>a legendary Sword of Valor</color>. Perhaps you can find them there.

C: 嗯…有位织者似乎对已经灭绝的生物颇有兴趣。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>牛头雕像的面部</color>，去那里找找看吧。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver with a fascination for extinct creatures. The golden thread brings tidings: They now lie low <color=#dbc291ff>on the face of a bull's head statue</color>. Go there and seek it out.

C: 孩子，你抓错人了。我不是那位大名鼎鼎、身怀绝技的「贼灵」巴特鲁斯，而是老巴特，一个不起眼的搬运工。奉元老院之命，我来搬走这个宝箱。
E: Child, you have the wrong man. I am not the infamous Spirithief Bartholos. My name is Old Bart, a mere porter. I have come to move this chest on the orders of the Council of Elders.

C: 小偷也是能打的！
E: Thieves can fight too, you know!

C: 你人设没问题？
E: Is your character setting okay?

C: ——嗷！嗷呜呜！
E: Oww! Awoooo!

C: 好啦，老伙计，咱们言归正传，还是来整点好玩的东西吧！
E: Alright, my friend! Back to business, time for a little fun!

C: 仔细观察后，你发现这里有宝箱在地面上压出的痕迹。平白无故消失的宝箱会与谁有关？真是好难猜呢……
E: On closer inspection, you notice indentations where a chest once rested. Now it's gone without a trace. Hmm, who might be behind this? That's a tough guess...

C: 什么？难道刚才你真刀真枪的打了？好家伙，看来咱幸亏认输得够快，这才保住了宝贝肚皮，没有让兄弟分家……
E: What? You were actually fighting for real just now!? Oh gosh, good thing I surrendered early, or my precious tummy would've gotten split in two...

C: 咿…耶……
E: Yeh... heh...

C: 啊——咱不是说你的记忆有什么问题。每个人的记忆都是这样…过去并非一帧不差地留在了你们的心里。
E: But I'm not saying there's anything wrong with how you remember things. Everyone's memory works the same way... The past doesn't just sit there in your mind like some perfect recording.

C: 那谁知道啊。
E: I have no idea.

C: 在下就想，你们的战利品好像正适合在这里展出？放心，作为回报，我也会协助你们，一同解读那些疑似来自遥远时代的神秘信息。
E: I thought your trophies might be perfect for display here. Don't worry, in return, I'll assist you in decoding the mysterious information that seems to come from a distant era.

C: 没有理智的怪物…能做到这样的事情？
E: Mindless monsters... capable of doing something like this?

C: 来得太迟了，辅祭，迅速就位。还有数个失物委托，正等候被溯寻。
E: You're late, acolyte. Quickly, take your position. Several lost-item requests are still waiting to be traced.

C: 你果然有天赋。这便是迷津的推演流程，提出问题，推演路径，得到解答。而我要做的，是将路径化作文法，呈现在石板上，且看——
E: You've got talent. This is how the extrapolation works: Pose a question, deduce the path, and find the answer. My job is to transcribe the path into text on the slate. Let's see —

C: {RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}万径之门{RUBY_E#}，请指引我们——「冥界究竟在何处？」
E: O {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Gate of Infinity{RUBY_E#}, please guide us — "Where exactly is the nether realm"?

C: 但…接触人们的信仰时，总会有那么几件事，能让我暂时忘掉那些烦闷，全身心投入到职务中去，这些委托便是如此。
E: But... when interacting with people's faith, there are always a few moments that make me forget those frustrations and immerse myself in my duties. These requests were such moments.

C: 要是我不会呢？
E: What if I don't?

C: 哗啦啦，好多东西呀。我都不知道，祭司居然收集了这么多稀奇古怪的东西吗？
E: *whoosh* Look at all this stuff! I had no idea the priest collected so many bizarre items.

C: 要是你感兴趣，就自己去摸索摸索吧。我要去接着玩大铁球了！下次走路小心点嗷，哗啦啦~
E: If you're interested, explore it yourself. I'm going back to play with the iron ball! Watch your step next time. *whoosh*

C: 这是之前挂在神殿亭廊里的黄金世古画「欢宴之盟」。它记录了诸多城邦签订盟约时，云石天宫初次奠基的场景，曾被拍出千万利衡币的高价！
E: This is Feast of the Covenant, an ancient mural of the Era Chrysea that once hung in the temple pavilion. It depicts the foundation of Marmoreal Palace during the signing of a great city-state alliance. It was once auctioned for millions of Balance Coins!

C: 这是天父的赎罪膏油…只要为泰坦断崖的篝火添加膏油，天父就会原谅一切罪过，在末日中准许你前往下一个黄金世。
E: This is the Atoning Balm of the sky father... We claim that just a single drop of this into the bonfire in Titan Cliff will atone for all your sins, and the sky father will forgive you and grant you passage to the next Era Chrysea in the apocalypse.

C: 我还能开更多火种匣！
E: I can open more Coreflame Caskets!

C: 啊，这是！！！
E: Ah... This is—!!!

C: 「再创世」就要完成了…
E: The Era Nova is almost complete...

C: 等一下！
E: Wait!

C: 你是说晨昏之眼？
E: Are you talking about the Eye of Twilight?

C: 世上没有绝对的无敌，也没有永恒的不朽，这只是凡人视角下的夸张而已。不过「繁育」的陨落，倒确实超越凡人的尺度。祂陨于其祂星神之手。
E: There is no true invincibility or immortality in the world — such exaggerations are born of the perspectives of ordinary beings. Nonetheless, ordinary beings could not have orchestrated the fall of the Propagation... That Aeon was slain at the hands of another Aeon.

C: 对，站在那儿就好，机器会读取你的脑波，自动匹配沉浸模拟系统……
E: Yes, just stand there and the computer will read your brainwaves, then automatically generate an immersive simulated experience...

C: 利用「存护」的祝福提升生存能力，再寻找提升战斗力的机会，然后再见一次琥珀王！
E: Use Preservation Blessings to increase your survivability, look for opportunities to improve your combat strength, and have an audience with the Amber Lord again!

C: 「巡猎」？
E: The Hunt?
You —

C: 所以我们打算另辟蹊径，找一个特别的人假扮成某个星神和祂们套近乎，可能神与神之间更容易交流一些。
E: So we plan on finding another way by sourcing a special person who can disguise as one of the Aeons. Someone who can get close to THEM. It may be easier for Aeons to communicate directly with Aeons.

C: 你发现自己是啼哭的<color=#dbc291ff>亚德丽芬婴儿</color>，拥抱脐带还未剪断的胞胎。你记得身上有条<color=#dbc291ff>金色伤痕</color>，金血流淌在消亡星球。你发现自己皮肤黝黑，长袍席卷荒原。你发现你是跨越深渊的<color=#dbc291ff>迅影</color>，伸手揽住流星。
E: You find yourself become a weeping <color=#dbc291ff>Adlivun baby</color> with an uncut umbilical cord. You remember that there is a <color=#dbc291ff>golden scar</color> on your body, and golden blood flowing on the dying planet. You find yourself dark-skinned and wearing a robe on the wasteland. You find that you are a <color=#dbc291ff>swift shadow</color> across the abyss, reaching out to catch the shooting star.

C: 接着，祂的声音突然传来——<color=#dbc291ff>「…长袍飘拂包裹游历你张开黑色皮肤你嗤笑探索丝线旋转交叠经纬织成海洋词语…」</color>从祂口中说出每个字都连接着彼此，仿佛呢喃。不等你回答，祂突然消失了。
E: Then, THEIR voice suddenly came... <color=#dbc291ff>"...robe flutter wrap travel you expand dark skin you laugh explore thread rotation intertwine coordinate weave ocean vocabulary..."</color> Every word THEY say is connected to each other like a whisper. Before you could say anything, THEY suddenly disappear.

C: 「有涯之身岂可济渡无涯之海？愿汝弃舍重担，不受后有，解脱自在。」话毕，祂亲吻你，然后离去。
E: "How can a body bounded by its limits cross the boundless oceans? May you give up your burdens, be removed from the cycle of being, and set yourself free from suffering." When THEY finish speaking, THEY kiss you and leave.

C: 你身处一片白昼中。你抬头，巨大的身影跨过裂界，身影如王储般英勇。
E: You stand in a vast expanse of whiteness and raise your head. You see a tall, valiant figure like a crown prince striding across the Fragmentum.

C: 敌人纷纷倒下，你无法控制兴奋情绪。你是天才，你很确信。你的注意力开始溃散，你爱每片叶子的震颤，你享受无穷思维的破坏力，直至你察觉自己的不对劲——这不是你。
E: Enemies are falling, and you can't contain your excitement. You are a genius, you are sure of it. Your concentration starts to crumble, you love the shaking of every leaf, you enjoy the destructive power of endless thoughts, until you realize that something is wrong with you — this is not you.

C: 「机器利用你的意识，为『模拟宇宙』增添变量，从而产生『或然的世界』。接着，外面的我利用研究裂界掌握的遗器复制技术，把这部分数据提取出来，制作成『位面饰品』。它就像是一种遗器，只不过更庞大…也更浓缩。」
E: "The machine uses your mind to add variables into the Simulated Universe, thereby generating what we call a Probable World. Then, I use Relic-cloning tech mastered from my Fragmentum research to extract this part out of all the data, creating a Planar Ornament. It's like a kind of Relic, but much bigger... and much more condensed."

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「在你测试的时候。」</color>黑塔回答，<color=#dbc291ff>「我们有些比公司和博识学会厉害得多的通讯手段，而且，就我们这个智商的人群来说，交流效率很高。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"While you were testing,"</color> Herta replies. <color=#dbc291ff>"We have methods of communication far more powerful than those possessed by the IPC or the Intelligentsia Guild. As far as people with our IQ are concerned, this communication is highly efficient."</color>

C: 如果我们评估下来不可行，大概会放任这个阿哈随便玩耍，隔绝掉祂和其它虚拟星神的交流吧。
E: If we feel that method is unfeasible, then we'll probably leave this Aha to play however THEY like, while isolating THEM from communicating with the other simulated Aeons.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「真势利…」</color>你听见黑塔仿佛咬牙切齿地嘟囔，<color=#dbc291ff>「玩游戏不就是把看到的一切都打烂吗……」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"What a snob..."</color> You can hear Herta muttering angrily with gritted teeth. <color=#dbc291ff>"Isn't playing games all about smashing up everything you can see...?"</color>

C: 哈，你得到了一个「奇物」！我从收藏里挑了点有趣的东西放进「模拟宇宙」里了。
E: Ha, you got a Curio! I picked out some interesting stuff from my collection and uploaded them to the Simulated Universe.

C: 不太适应。
E: Not really.

C: 穿过图画，感官对知识的索取如同狂热的欲望一般加速。直觉像鲜艳的螃蟹爬过你的脑海，最终你在那幅最疯狂的、散发着怪异色彩的<color=#dbc291ff>贡多拉</color>前停下了。在虚与实的边界中，你甚至有献祭自我的冲动，寻找「繁育」陨落的真相……
E: Moving through the paintings, your senses' demand for knowledge elevates to a burning desire, and your intuition creeps through your brain like a brightly-colored crab. At last, you stop before the craziest painting of a <color=#dbc291ff>gondola</color> in odd colors. In the boundary between the virtual and the real, you even feel the urge to sacrifice yourself in return for the truth behind the fall of the Propagation...

C: 「提问：是否有与阿哈交流之概率？」你仍在原地，螺丝咕姆礼貌地开口，「无机；有机；星神；我赞美三者间思想的充分涌流与平等。」
E: "Question: Do you have a possibility to interact with Aha?" While you wait in place, Screwllum speaks in a polite tone, "I laud the equality and exchange of ideas among the organic lifeforms, inorganic lifeforms, and Aeons."

C: <color=#6f7cda>阿基维利</color> / <color=#ad5e68>开拓</color> 是你吗？我们以为你<color=#6f7cda>死了</color> / <color=#ad5e68>失踪了</color>。成千上万的<color=#6f7cda>命运</color> / <color=#ad5e68>历史</color>塑造了宇宙的<color=#6f7cda>长势</color> / <color=#ad5e68>走向</color>。我们几乎<color=#6f7cda>相信</color> / <color=#ad5e68>判断</color>你已成为它的<color=#6f7cda>养料</color> / <color=#ad5e68>注脚</color>。
E: <color=#6f7cda>Akivili</color> / <color=#ad5e68>The Trailblaze</color> Is that you? We thought you were <color=#6f7cda>dead</color> / <color=#ad5e68>missing</color>. Countless <color=#6f7cda>destinies</color> / <color=#ad5e68>histories</color> have shaped the universe's <color=#6f7cda>trajectory</color> / <color=#ad5e68>direction</color>. We nearly <color=#6f7cda>believed</color> / <color=#ad5e68>judged</color> that you had become its <color=#6f7cda>nourishment</color> / <color=#ad5e68>footnote</color>.

C: 你发现一些虫子已被征用作军队的武器。部分蛰虫秉承自我复制的特性，正在战场上持续不断地分裂，如同无限再生的军团；还有一些巨型蠹虫正被用于扫荡地表……
E: You discern that certain insects are being utilized by the army as weapons due to their self-replication features. Some insects are reproducing on the battlefield like a legion that regenerates infinitely, while some colossal insects are purging the surface of all hostile entities.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>垃圾山星系联觉中心信号</color>：垃圾山人向宇宙发出信号，期许在两个系统时内得到救援：「秩序」的护卫队闻讯前往，却发现垃圾山星系已然沦陷。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>A signal from the Synesthesia Center on Trashill</color>: Residents of Trashill send out a distress signal to the universe, hoping to be rescued within two system hours. When an escort sent by the Order arrives, they find that the entire star system has already succumbed to the Swarm.

C: …虫类图谱！你正要为此发笑，硝烟突然涌入了你的眼睛——你突然看见这位金发的女军官命运更深处的结局：一位戴帽的赏金猎人，与她互相举枪对准彼此！而你忽然发现，自己正手握那把枪…指着她！
E: ...Chart compilation! Just as you are about to chuckle at the absurdity, your vision becomes clouded by a sudden haze of smoke. Through the mist, you see the sealed fate of this blonde leader: She and a bounty hunter in a hat raise their guns at each other! Then you suddenly realize that you are the one holding the gun... pointing directly at her!

C: 你真的不知道。
E: Not even the slightest idea.

C: 「银河数据纷杂，犹如点缀的繁星。将耐心与爱心灌注于每一位平凡的生命，是宇宙创始者的初心。」螺丝咕姆问，「黑塔，询问：诺巴蒂II型现状如何？」
E: "The data of the Cosmos is as varied as the stars embellished upon it. The original intent of the universe's creator was to instill patience and love into every ordinary being," Screwllum asks, "Inquiry, Herta, what's the status of Norbati II?"

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it.
