Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了一群哭泣的伶人。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face and THEIR voice changes into a chorus of weeping Mourning Actors.

C: 变化不大。
E: I don't feel anything different.

C: 继续结束一切吧。
E: Finish it up.

C: 我躺会儿。
E: I'm lying down for a while.

C: 「{NICKNAME}，向前走。」阮•梅示意你，「不要问，祂会在前方给你解答。」
E: "{NICKNAME}, move forward." Ruan Mei signals to you and says: "Don't ask questions. THEY will give you the answer up ahead."

C: 阮•梅没有言语，但你从她的眸弯中感受到了某种扑朔的享受…她在享受这种微微的*兴奋*。
E: Ruan Mei is silent, but you can discern a mysterious hint of delight in her eyes... She is relishing this faint sense of *excitement*.

C: 判定「自我认知」 - 我存在。
E: Intra-Cognition Assessment — I exist.

C: 但卡彭犯了一个错误：他可以杀人放火，但应当及时纳税。而他的失误，更是不幸波及了法恩莎势力重要的「惑神星」星系政体。
E: Yet, Cappon made a mistake. He could commit any heinous crimes, but he should have paid his taxes timely. Unfortunately, his blunder even undermined the political system on the Planet Temptra, which was crucial to Farnsha's power.

C: 渐渐地，「护卫队」的一些人消失了，另一些人依次走上台前，成为光鲜亮丽的大人物。这种*光辉*令你感到讽刺——但你会扮演好一个卧底，继续等待，直到帝皇发出神谕的那一刻。
E: Over time, the Guardians are gone, and others take over the center stage and become the new big shots. The *glory* strikes you as ironic, but you will play your part as an undercover well and keep waiting for the emperor to issue a divine edict.

C: 你感到遗憾。
E: You feel sorry.

C: 你跪倒在荒原上，任凭碎石扎破膝盖，刺眼的风吹干了嚎啕大哭的泪水，仿佛在讥笑你的愚蠢，又像是抚慰你的悲戚。
E: You kneel down upon the wasteland, letting the gravel dig into your knee and draw blood. The blinding winds dry up your pouring tears, as though laughing at your foolishness or comforting your sorrows.

C: 脚下的道路消失，你再也抓不住常世的丝线，它断裂，放任你落入地平线尽头的深渊。
E: The path beneath you disappears, and you no longer have any grasp on eternity. It snaps, letting you fall down into the abyss at the edge of the horizon.

C: 一切就此沉寂。
E: Everything falls silent.

C: 不就是往那个该死的没耳朵博士脑门上开了一枪么？至于这么拼命？
E: Didn't that darn Doctor No-Ears get his brains blown out? Were things really that desperate?

C: 你睁开眼，一片巨大的空洞将你的周身笼罩。你被无限次地分解，然后无限期地坠落。大脑中发出嗡鸣，你尝试寻找过去的记忆，却屡屡无功而返。
E: As you open your eyes, a giant void engulfs you. You begin to be broken down over and over, then fall endlessly. Your brain is buzzing as you try to search for past memories, but to no avail.

C: 宇宙的伤口。
E: A scar on the universe.

C: 改变成员的视野。
E: Change members' outlooks.

C: 一台存储仪。
E: A memory storage device.

C: 「确实有些迷你，先凑合用吧。咱们现在就开工，把手抄本都录进去。」导师朝书架走去。
E: "It is a little small, but it will do for now. Let's get to work on getting these manuscripts recorded." The teacher walks towards the bookshelves.

C: 小雅拍拍你的顶盖。「T<unbreak>500</unbreak>啊，以后咱们就是同志了。」
E: Xiaoya pats your cover. "T<unbreak>500</unbreak>, from now on, we are comrades in arms!"

C: 你对博识学会向来没有好感。这些夸夸其谈的学者，每天做着改变世界的大梦，却连一颗螺丝都不会拧，到头来还是你们工程师受苦。
E: You've never been fond of the Intelligentsia Guild. These self-indulgent scholars spend all day spouting dreams about changing the world, but they can't even handle a screwdriver. When it comes down to it, it's you engineers that end up doing all the hard work.

C: 不过想到能源，你的胃比大脑反应更快——确实该去食堂补充能源了。
E: Although, speaking of energy, your stomach has woken up faster than your brain... It's time to go to the canteen and recharge.

C: 「新来的，把虚数背景校准仪的观测精度调到最高，基于量子间隔的记录频率，还有，别忘了给自己倒上一杯咖啡。」女学士向你发出指令。
E: "Newcomer, adjust the observation precision of the Imaginary background calibrator to max settings, in accordance with the recording frequency of the quantum intervals. And, don't forget to pour yourself a cup of coffee." The lady scholar instructs you.

C: 一座坍塌的实验室，一座停留在她记忆中的，象征失败与耻辱的废墟。
E: A collapsed lab. A pile of debris symbolizing failure and shame that remains eternal in her memories.

C: 你是一个落魄的学士…难民，或二者皆是的某个流浪汉。你蹒跚走进帝皇战争的重建区，只想求得三两口粮，养活家里的弟弟妹妹。伊格莱的信徒们焚烧图书，分发印有他画像的传单，他们将其戏称为：学派战争的入场券。
E: You are a disheveled scholar... a refugee, or a vagrant who's kind of both. You hobble into the reconstructed zone of the Emperor's War, seeking a mere few morsels of sustenance, to feed your siblings at home. Eagleye's zealots are razing books and handing out fliers in his image. They derisively refer to these papers as: admission tickets for the Scholars' Strife.

C: 「星神根本就不存在，一切都是假的！」你怒吼。
E: "Aeons don't exist! It is all a lie!!" You roar in a ferocious rage.

C: 「这道孤波，或许它只是个无意义的现象。」帕提维娅对即将面对的答案心感不安，她看似自言自语，却又希望冰冷的机器能做出回应。
E: "Perhaps this solitary wave is just a meaningless phenomenon..." Patavia seemed nervous about the answer that awaited her. She seemed to be half talking to herself, half hoping the cold machinery before her could give her a response.

C: 「这样啊…」帕提维娅闭上眼睛，她想要哭出来，想要呐喊，可当语言从舌尖涌出，却化作一声叹息。
E: "I see..." Patavia closes her eyes, wanting to cry and scream, but when the words leave her lips, they form only a gentle sigh.

C: 「螺丝咕姆让我转告你们，{RUBY_B#核}饵{RUBY_E#}已经布好，只待猎物上钩。相信你们能读懂这晦涩的比喻。」
E: "Screwllum asked me to send you a message: The {RUBY_B#core}bait{RUBY_E#} has been laid, and we're just waiting for the prey to bite. I trust you all comprehend this obscure metaphor."

C: 为了更好的生存。
E: For greater survival.

C: 我还有别的问题…
E: I still have some questions...

C: 为了赚星际货币。
E: It was to earn more galactic currencies.

C: 「潮流扭蛋人」随着「抓夹」上升...成功了！
E: The trendy gachapon figure rises with the claw... You've got it!

C: 「又见到你了！我们正准备建立咕咕钟爱好者协会！你还想体会一下其他的咕咕钟魔力吗？」…你还未做好心理准备，他的热情就已扑面而来。
E: "It's you again! We're going to establish the Cuckoo Clock Fan Club! Would you like to experience the charm of other cuckoo clocks?" His enthusiasm is at full power before you are even ready for it.

C: 「好啊，让我为你传授。我想『魅力』就是简化事物。越简单纯粹，按照自我想法行事，魅力就将越璀璨夺目。当你掌握绝对的*置若罔闻*，就可以超越自我的限制。」
E: "Let me teach you a thing or two. I think charisma is all about making things simple. The simpler you are and the more you do things your way, the more charismatic you'll be. When you exhibit absolute *indifference*, you'll be able to do beyond the limits of the self."

C: 你又一次来到了夫莱昂机械联盟的停泊港湾，一位机械招待员带你走上台阶…你发现这台阶是由一条条机械手臂托举而成的，你在上面走得摇摇晃晃。你一直向前，直到看见「星际和平机械分部商城」的招牌。
E: Once again, you arrive at the docking bay of the Freon Mechanical Alliance. A mechanical attendant leads you up a staircase, which you notice is formed by numerous mechanical arms. You wobble as you walk on it. You keep going until you see the sign of "Interastral Peace Mechanical Branch Shopping Mall."

C: 青幽色的火焰将无名客的列车吞没，车厢里传来一阵无比熟悉的奸笑，徘徊的阴冷气息让你不由得后背发寒。
E: Dark-green flames engulf the Express. An extremely familiar, evil sneer booms out from the carriage, and the shimmering cold air makes the hairs stick up on the back of your neck.

C: 「我哪儿还记得？」老智械晃了晃自己的脑袋，一串被咬断的缆线从里面掉出来，还连带着几块刻有鲁珀特帝国徽记的氧化芯片，「他们都说我坏掉了，和这孩子一样。」
E: "How could I possibly remember?" The ancient Intellitron shakes his head, and a string of chewed cables falls out along with several oxidized chips engraved with the crest of the Rubert Empire. "They say I'm broken, just like this kid here."

C: 老翁呆滞地望着你，老旧的逻辑芯片无法理解你的行为，他颤抖着接过你手中的差分机，就像一个普通的、落寞的故国遗民。
E: The old man stares at you blankly, his obsolete logic chip unable to comprehend your actions. With his hands trembling, he takes the difference machine from you, looking just like an ordinary, despondent citizen of a fallen kingdom.

C: 「变化是宇宙的常态，没有哪位学者期待一成不变的数据。基因深处的遗传变异，对撞实验的误差数据…」阮•梅悠然的看向实验室里的作品们，表情似笑非笑，「科学并不排斥这样的惊喜，它们往往意味着突破。」
E: "Change is a norm in the universe. No scholar would expect data to stay static. The mutations in the depth of genes and the anomalies in collision experiments..." Ruan Mei casts a relaxed glance at her creations in the lab with a faint and amused smile. "This kind of surprise isn't frowned upon in science because they often lead to breakthroughs."

C: 「基于您的投资价值，本机将评估对您的服务标准。」
E: "This machine will evaluate the standards of your service based on your investment value."

C: 「造物工作已完成，请验收——注：由本设备制造的任何物品，其专利及解释权归▄▀▄▄学派所有。」
E: "Creation complete. Please take your item. Please note: The patent and right to interpretation of any items created by this equipment are the sole property of the School of ▄▀▄▄."

C: 什么也没有发生，或许是太久没动，所以卡住了？你决定再按一次。
E: Nothing happened. Maybe it hasn't been pushed in so long that it's gotten stuck? You decide to press it again.

C: 西红柿的末端。
E: The extremity of a tomato.

C: 智人。
E: Homo sapiens.

C: 苍猿没有拒绝你的接触，它头部的毛发并不浓密，却有溪流般的柔顺。它主动向你的手掌蹭了蹭，发出亲昵的哼哼声。
E: The ape doesn't reject your touch. The fur on its head isn't too thick, but has the suppleness of a river stream. It actively rubs against the palm of your hand, cooing in an affectionate tone.

C: 亢奋的蛰虫振翅掠过海面，恍惚间，极昼的冰雪世界似乎迎来了黑夜。
E: The flapping wings of the excited insects whip over the ocean's surface and the ever-bright arctic world around you seems to be plunged into darkness in an instant.

C: 事后检查发现，驾驶员把时间稳定仪设置成了相对模式——外部的世界相对飞船内是亚光速。
E: After inspection, it is discovered that the pilot set the temporal stabilizer to Relative Mode, with the cosmos outside the ship considered as sub-light velocity.

C: 由于没几个人押中了这艘飞船，你一下子赚得盆满钵满。
E: As not many people placed bids on this ship, you ended up making a massive fortune in an instant.

C: 「谢谢你，好心人。」你第一次知道，原来售货机还有磕头的技能。
E: "Thank you. You have a good heart." This is how you find out for the first time that a vending machine has the ability to touch its head to the ground.

C: 你的手穿过它的翅膀，让幻影溃散，指尖唯余一缕旧时的沉吟。
E: Your hand passes through its wings, allowing the illusion to dissipate, leaving nary but a lingering murmur of the past upon your fingertips.

C: 你听说悬锋城正在举办新的竞技比赛，刻法勒在上，看来你注定要在那里夺得最初的荣誉。
E: You hear that Castrum Kremnos is holding a new tournament. Kephale above, it appears you are destined to seize your inaugural glory there.

C: 人们习得它的勇猛。
E: People learned their bravery.

C: 战争需要胜利，但胜利并非战争的目的。曾几何时，正是由尼卡多利维护着这样的秩序，以暴力的威慑，支撑短暂却宝贵的和平。
E: War necessitates victory, yet victory isn't its sole objective. Nikador once upheld such order through intimidating force, fostering a fragile yet cherished peace.

C: 贼灵自讨没趣地离开，「扎格列斯老祖的秘密，可都藏在它老人家的传说里。」
E: Annoyed, the Spirithief departs. "Old Zagreus' secrets are hidden within their legendary tales."

C: 一只灰黯的手臂自长河中浮起，塞纳托斯，在它诞生的刹那，黄金世便宣告终结。
E: A shadowy arm emerged from the river — Thanatos, heralding the Era Chrysea's demise with their birth.

C: 海风吹过，英雄们倾倒，向眩晕的海浪抱怨。
E: Sea breezes blow, and heroes stagger, complaining to the dazed waves.

C: 年轻的战士，未死于战场的刀锋，却亡于挚友的妒忌。他背着冰冷的身躯回到故乡，假作哀悼，在少女面前痛哭流涕。
E: A young warrior is not felled by battlefield blades but by his friend's envy. The murderer carries the cold body home, feigning grief as he weeps before a maiden.

C: 但这个问题的反面，墨涅塔却知道答案。
E: Yet, Mnestia knows the answer to the converse question.

C: 什么是丑陋？纷争与鲜血涂抹的世界，美丽的华装被撕裂，宏伟的雕塑被推倒，悦耳的歌喉被刺穿。
E: What is ugliness? A world marred by strife and bloodshed, where beautiful garments are ripped apart, grand sculptures toppled, and melodious voices stilled.

C: 无人还记得，雅努斯的最后一次垂迹。土地破碎，海洋被吞噬分割，残存的大地上，只留下笼中困兽般的人子。
E: No one recalls the last time Janus descended. The land shattered, the seas engulfed and divided. Only the remnants of the earth remain, trapping humanity like caged beasts.

C: 「这宝贝现在是你的了，交易愉快！」
E: "And just like that, it's yours! A pleasure doing business with you!"

C: 但是艾格勒小看了你，这架飞行器的引擎同时也是一台棉花糖机，你迅速生产出大量棉花糖填补了空缺的伪装，甚至还有余量填自己的肚子。
E: But Aquila has underestimated your ingenuity. The machine's engine is also a cotton candy machine. You immediately crank out many fresh layers of cotton candy, reinforcing your disguise. You even make enough to sneak a snack.

C: 吉奥里亚也是有脾气的。
E: Even Georios's got some temper.

C: 无人不感喟瑟希斯的赐福。它为人子留下了两件至伟的礼物，其一是智慧与理性，其二便是耕种之术。
E: All marveled at Cerces's blessing. It left two magnificent gifts for humanity: one was wisdom and reason, the other the art of cultivation.

C: 但他仍旧是位勇士。
E: But he is still a fighter.

C: 你就直说吧，我顶得住。
E: Just give it to me straight, doc. I can take it.

C: 这枚千纸鹤虽无飞天神力，但却可以解决权限缺失问题。你迫不及待将它展开……
E: This origami crane doesn't have the power to fly, but it can solve your lack of access permissions. You can't wait to unfold it...

C: 算了，你开心就好。
E: Whatever. So long as you're happy.

C: 触碰忆泡。
E: Touch the Memory Bubble.

C: 「你看看她，」你扬起手，「那帮老掉牙的政客…竟然以为这个黯点就是世界的中心，他们就因此在宇宙中享有生杀大权！还有比这更可笑的事吗？」
E: "Look at her." You lift your hand. "How dare those ancient politicians assume this dark spot to be the center of the world, and therefore meant they have the power to control the universe? Could there be anything more ridiculous than that?"

C: 席下爆发出热烈的掌声。那人续道：「普朗托是我国首部拥有强人工智能的超级电脑，搭载了自然语言及图形处理、情感行为识别反馈等划时代的功能……」
E: A thunderous applause erupts from the audience. The speaker continues. "Pronto is the first supercomputer with powerful artificial intelligence in our country. It features groundbreaking functions, such as natural language and graphics processing, and emotional and behavioral recognition and responses..."

C: 触碰忆泡。
E: Touch the Memory Bubble.

C: 你的视野被数道细长且冰冷的铁栅分割。凭借指尖触感，你才确认那铁栅究竟为何物——一只精致的鸟笼——这是月桂冠系首脑「哲人王」才可拥有的冠冕。
E: Your field of vision is split by long, narrow, and cold iron bars. Based on what you feel with your fingertips, you confirm that the iron bars are a part of an exquisite cage — the crown that exclusively belongs to the Philosopher King, the head of the Laurel Wreath Galaxy.

C: 狂热的音浪淹没了你的话语。你大笑，将鸩毒一饮而尽。
E: Your words are drowned by the maddening cacophony. You roar with laughter, and down the cup of poison in one go.

C: 你喜欢在立交航道上飙车。在这里，新伦蒂尼恩看起来就像生日矿石糕上的烛光——闪亮，渺小，一吹即熄。你觉得工作上的不如意根本不算什么了。
E: You like joyriding along the interchange lane. From here, the city looks like the tiny flickering candlelights on a mineral birthday cake, easily blown out. The troubles you face at work all fade away at that moment.

C: 你也想喝嗡？那可不行，这坛都是属于我一只蝶…奇怪，头突然好晕啊嗡。
E: Wanna try some? No way, this jar's all mine... That's weird, I suddenly feel dizzy.

C: 唉，我也知道自己不可能进入壁画…但我好想和传说中的英雄们一起冒险啊嗡！
E: *sigh* I know I can't go into the mural... But I really want to go on a heroic adventure with heroes of legend!

C: 看吧嗡，黄金色的池水自高空流下，其中蕴藏着多少权与力？雨水是公平的，下给富人也下给穷人，但池水不是……
E: Look! *flutter* The golden pool waters are pouring down from the skies. How much power and might is contained therein? Rain water is equal opportunity — it falls on both the rich and the poor. But not this pool of water...

C: Zzz…
E: Zzz...

C: 在哪里呢…
E: Where is it...

C: 吾主啊，惟愿你能如昔日一般将启示留在风中，送到我的耳畔喀。
E: O master, how I wish you could whisper those revelations into my ear, as you always used to.

C: 只收你五百信用点，怎么样？
E: How about just <unbreak>500</unbreak> credits?

C: 嗯，听说了。
E: Oh, yeah. I heard.

C: 激流勇退啊…
E: To bow out when you're at your prime...

C: 第三口…该死的添加剂，你感到口渴和恶心。此外，你还在心中暗骂——凭什么设置里没有加快文字展示速度的选项？
E: The third bite... These stupid additives. You feel thirsty and nauseous. You also complain internally about having no option in the settings to speed up the text display.

C: 运气？
E: Luck?

C: 不…你没理解。
E: No... You don't understand.

C: 你决定离开。你诚心地希望这是你今天做出的最明智的决定。
E: You decide to leave. You earnestly hope that is the wisest decision you've made today.

C: 至于窗景…你知道设计、建造这座宾馆的人们已经足够尽力了。你很难要求更多。
E: As for the view... You knew the people who designed and built this hotel did their best. You could hardly ask for more.

C: 房间里似乎还有一女性——她忧郁地叹了一口气，声音有些颤抖：「不，亲爱的。我们走吧，这酒店里一定有什么东西……」
E: There seems to be another woman in the room. She sighs sullenly. Her voice is trembling. "No, dear. Let's leave. There's something in this hotel..."

C: （要帮她的忙吗？）
E: (Should I help her?)

C: 那么…就拜托你了！
E: So... I'll leave that to your capable hands!

C: 可我都在这等了这么久，它却还是迟迟没有出现。难道被我的威名吓住了喀？
E: But I've been waiting here all this time, and they still haven't shown up. Could they be cowering in awe at my reputation?

C: 嗨，朋友——快看，我找到了个好玩的喀！
E: Hey buddy — check out this cool thing!

C: 不要思考，要去感受…
E: Feel, don't think...

C: 原来你能看见我？
E: So you can see me?

C: 不需要冗杂的鉴定步骤，你内心已经十分清楚——这下发财了。
E: A rock like this doesn't need complex appraisal. You know full well what this is — big money.

C: 霸，劲霸！燃！这只虫的热血已经沸腾，恨不得将扎格列斯的把戏尽数驱逐出去——如果它推得动的话。
E: Absolute domination! Unbridled fire! This worm's passion has boiled over and is hell-bent on thwarting all of Zagreus' tricky antics — if it can even move it in the first place.

C: 太好了嘤！它还是它，这条河流没有本质上的改变嘤。
E: That's wonderful, eep! It's still the same. This river hasn't fundamentally changed, eep.

C: 一只忧伤的机巧鸟。
E: A depressed cycrane.

C: 你可千万不要来可怜我，如果我输了，我会欣然接受！
E: Don't take pity on me. If I lose, I'll accept it with glee.

C: 这都是没有办法的事儿嘛…
E: There's no other way...

C: 你不会以为是我私吞个人财产了吧？我可是有职业道德的。
E: Did you think I just kept all these for my own? I do have work ethics, you know.

C: 老大，这个新人不懂规矩，就劳烦您给{F#她}{M#他}讲讲规矩。
E: Boss, this newcomer doesn't know a thing about our rules. Please explain the rules to {F#her}{M#him}.

C: 我懂了，你们俩各拿5镝！
E: I've got it! You should get 5 strales each!

C: 来人啊！快叫丹鼎司的医士来！！！
E: Help! Somebody call the Alchemy Commission and get a healer here!

C: 一言既出，四座皆惊。在场的所有人似乎都没想到，这位弱不禁风的化外民果真败阵得如此之快，以至于大家根本还没吃饱呢。
E: All are shocked to hear these words. Nobody seemed to think that this weakling of an Outworlder would capitulate so quickly, before anyone else has the chance to get slightly full.

C: 奇怪，画面还是不全…金织似乎指明了其中一部分，但不是全部。我该去哪里找其他部分呢？
E: Weird, still not complete... The goldweaver points to part of it, but not the whole. Where do I look for the rest?

C: 啊…啊…那不是我的记忆！
E: Uh, um... That's not my memory!

C: （读懂空气，不言不语）
E: (You read the room and keep quiet)

C: 对不起，我…我也许确实改放弃这个课题。
E: I'm sorry. I... maybe I should give up on this topic.

C: 听好了：如果你一定要这么做，你就必须支付<color=#dbc291ff>六个崇高道德的赞许</color>，明白吗？
E: Listen, if you insist on it, you must fork up <color=#dbc291ff>six Praises of High Morals</color>. Understand?

C: 哈，太好了。还是按景元将军说的，让十王司来处理它吧。
E: Hah, great. Just listen to General Jing Yuan and let the Ten-Lords Commission handle it.

C: 好了，这件事就到此为止吧。看在结局不算太糟的份上，还你<color=#dbc291ff>三个崇高道德的赞许</color>好了。
E: Alright, let's just leave it at that. Considering the outcome wasn't too bad, I'll return <color=#dbc291ff>three Praises of High Morals</color> to you.

C: 「欢迎来到克劳克影视乐园，愿您在这里度过美好的一天！」
E: "Welcome to the Clock Studios Theme Park. We hope you enjoy a wonderful day here!"

C: 猩红的门后世界，像极了葛瑞迪影业的限制级电影会出现的场景，可能是恐怖片，也可能是……
E: The world behind the scarlet door is similar to what one might find in a Grady Films R-rated movie. It could be a horror film, or perhaps...

C: 什么时候能收工啊？
E: When can I pack up?

C: 愿它的谎言永不败露。
E: May its lies never be exposed!

C: 来都来了，这时候走，就有点不太礼貌了。
E: It's already here. It'd be rude if you left now.

C: 出门在外，凡事还是谨慎一些为好。
E: It's always best to be cautious when on a trip.

C: 你好，你也是来租大地兽的吗？
E: Hello, are you also here to rent a dromas?

C: 今天就算了，下次一定。
E: Not today... Promise I'll do it next time.

C: 不知道英雄们在不在？
E: I wonder if the heroes are around?

C: 请先在祭司那取号。
E: See the priest for your waiting number.

C: 投票前还有些时间犹豫。
E: I still have some time to hesitate before voting.

C: 传说的黄金世，快回到人间！
E: O legendary Era Chrysea, return to the mortal realm!

C: 真是一记精准的射门！硬币准确地命中了玦轮的中心！
E: What an incredible throw! The coins land dead in the center of the Jade Wheel!

C: 不要停下来啊！
E: Don't stop!

C: 哈哈！三月七乘客总是这样，帕姆都见怪不怪啦！咳咳，这句话别告诉她，记得帕！
E: Haha! That's so March 7th. Pom-Pom's not surprised! Ahem, don't tell her about this — remember that!

C: 如果你摘下一枚叶片的话…帕姆的表情一定会很精彩吧？
E: If you plucked off a leaf... Pom-Pom would perk up a bit, right?

C: 不是那个意思！请不要误会！
E: I didn't mean to sound rude. Please don't get me wrong!

C: 一条约有拇指长度的划痕，但这显然不是所谓的「脚印」。
E: There's a scratch about the length of your thumb — it is obviously not some "footprint."

C: 什么叫「晕晕五彩斑斓」配色啦！唔姆…不过确实那个颜色太闪烁了，帕姆现在都还有点头晕呢。
E: That's not the name of the colorway! Well... the colorway is indeed too flashy, and I'm still a bit giddy now.

C: 抱歉啦，{NICKNAME}！以后等我处理完乐队的事情，有机会的话我肯定会送你几张专辑的！
E: Sorry, {NICKNAME}. When I finish handling the band affairs, I will definitely send you some albums if I have the chance!

C: （看来还得再找到一个终端才行。）
E: (Looks like I'll have to find another terminal, then.)

C: 不过「擒什么先擒王」这种说法，你肯定听过吧？如果你真的能战胜全盛状态的银鬃铁卫戍卫官，那这次演练也就没有什么拖下去的必要了。
E: "If you want to kill a snake, chop off its head" — ever heard that one before? If you really can defeat the captain of the Silvermane Guards at his full strength, then there's no need for you to drag this drill on.

C: 唷，大义凛然！有我年轻时的派头，哈哈哈！
E: Wow, you're so righteous! You remind me of myself when I was young, hahaha!

C: 不用担心背后，这里有我在。用上你能利用的所有资源，杀它们个片甲不留！
E: I have your back. Use all the available resources and annihilate them!

C: 但是根据地衡司的猜测，引起异象的元凶就藏在这里。
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission believes that the culprit for this anomaly is hiding here somewhere.

C: 呃，好吧。
E: Uh, okay.

C: 出剪刀！
E: Scissors!

C: 今天弟兄们就要让你知道，破坏禁区公物要付出什么代价！给我上！
E: We'll show you the price to pay for damaging public property in the restricted zone! Get 'em!

C: 你胜利了！歌德宾馆的恶魔已经被驱逐，这片土地已经得到了净化——
E: You won! The Goethe Hotel's devil is now banished, and this land is now purified.

C: 调查
E: Investigate

C: 这些…美型的画像是谁画的？
E: Who painted these... magnificent portraits?

C: 不满意！怎么没给我也画一个？
E: No way! Why haven't you painted one of me?

C: 开玩笑的，送给你了。
E: Just kidding. It's yours.

C: 结果到底会怎么样呢…好期待啊！
E: How is everything going to turn out... I can't wait to see!

C: 错误。你听到一阵沉闷的滋滋声，四个凹槽内的数字恢复到了初始的、无序的状态。糟糕——看来你得从头再试一次了。
E: Wrong. You hear a low buzzing sound as the numbers in all four slots return to their original random state. Shoot, looks like you gotta start all over again.
One.

C: 最后，陌生的男人向后退去，消失在街角。
E: Finally, the stranger backs off and disappears into the streets.

C: 很机警啊。下次遇到什么情况，记得向您身边的地衡司人员求助。
E: Very astute. Next time when you encounter a situation, remember to seek help from your nearby Realm-Keeping Commission officer.

C: 就在几息之前，一位仙舟人望着屏幕，手指不断滑动着。
E: Just a few seconds ago, a Xianzhou man was peering at the screen and sliding his finger around on it.

C: …难道你也…我明白了。
E: ...So you... I see...

C: 你自己来拿吧。
E: Come and get it.

C: 惋惜…
E: Regret...

C: 你也明白，自己不可能留在这里，一辈子扮演那位替人消愁破闷的「逍遥先生」——尽管你或许真的很想这么做。
E: You also know that it's impossible for you to stay here, role-playing as Mr. Carefree and solving problems for everyone for the rest of your life — no matter how much you want to.

C: 那就麻烦您先去处理一下那些怪物了…余下的问题，等我们修好栖木以后再谈。
E: Please go and deal with those monsters first...we can talk about the remaining problems after we fix the roost.

C: 辛苦您了！我们下次再见！
E: Have a nice day. See you soon!

C: 我看看，下一件货物是丢失在…<color=#dbc291ff>流云渡</color>的货道附近。好，我们去看看吧！
E: Let me see, the next item was lost... near the Cargo Lane of <color=#dbc291ff>Cloudford</color>. Let's check the place out!

C: 鹤运物流希望能委托你去到这些货物丢失的地方，操纵机巧鸟来寻找这些丢失的货物。
E: Heron Express hopes to entrust you to go to places where the goods went missing and find them by controlling cycranes.

C: 你的戾气好重啊！
E: You're giving off a hostile vibe!

C: 也许这都是冥冥注定，铁盒的「忆泡」里有着我最美的回忆……
E: This might just be destiny, but this box's Memory Bubble contains all my most precious memories...

C: 好的。不过退货会产生邮费，需要支付<unbreak>1000</unbreak>信用点。
E: Alright, but in that case there's a return fee. It's <unbreak>1000</unbreak> credits.

C: 我不能也选到付吗？
E: Can't that be cash-on-return, too?

C: 开始聊正事吧。
E: Let's get down to business then.

C: …你说的有道理，这不应该询问你。
E: ...You have a point. I shouldn't be asking you about this.

C: 你就是压抑太久了。
E: You bottled everything up for too long.

C: 唉，游戏…游戏的乐趣总有尽头。到最后，宇宙只剩一片灰暗……
E: *sigh* Gaming... The fun of gaming must always come to an end. In the end, only darkness remains in the universe...

C: 皮皮西突然转头，落在你脸上的目光仿佛属于某种掠食性动物。
E: The Pepeshi suddenly turns around and the light that fell upon your face felt like it belonged to some kind of apex predator.

C: 哼，可算能安静会儿了……
E: Hmph, some peace and quiet at last...

C: 闲暇太少、规矩太多；客人太吵闹，领导太啰嗦。
E: No leisure, too many rules, noisy guests, and bossy bosses.

C: 我还挺好奇那里面究竟发生了什么的。不过好奇归好奇，我可不想被卷进奇怪的麻烦里…所以还是不瞎打听了吧。
E: I'm pretty curious about what happened in there. That's one thing, but I don't want to get caught up in any weird trouble... so I'd better stop asking around so much I guess.

C: 我受够了…真的受够了……
E: I've had enough... Really, I've had enough...

C: 肯定是平时工作被压榨得太狠，才和你聊了多大会儿啊，就好像一晚上没睡觉似的。
E: It must be because I'm getting ruthlessly put through the wringer at work, and that's why I've blabbed on so much. It's kinda like when you stay up all night.

C: 是啊！不过我并没有被吓到，我的大心脏可是比钻石都坚固——即便这怪物长着两对眼睛，皮肤比伊须磨人都光滑，我内心也毫无惧意。
E: Yeah! But I wasn't scared. My heart is tougher than diamond — despite this monster having two pairs of eyes and skin smoother than an Insumousu local. There was no dread in my heart.

C: 总之，你能喜欢它真是再好不过了。
E: Anyway, it's great that you liked it.

C: 等年老后，韦兰的脑子已经被过多的改造压垮。疼痛与幻觉每天折磨着他，把他变成了狂躁易怒又神经兮兮的…怪物。
E: In his old age, Wyland's mind became overwhelmed by excessive mods. Pain and hallucinations tortured him daily, twisting him into a mad, irritable, neurotic... monster.

C: 我，我…唉！
E: I—I... *sigh*

C: 这就说来话长了…不得不说，他们的突然袭击确实吓了我一跳。
E: It's a really long story... but I have to admit, their sudden attack really caught me by surprise.

C: 给公司打工？
E: Working for the IPC?

C: <size=28>在我面前，哪怕宇宙规律都得让路！</size>
E: <size=28>Even the maxims of the universe shall step aside before me!</size>

C: 不止，他们还缺少对未知事物的敬畏，将美妙的可能性扼杀在了摇篮中。
E: Not only that, they also lack an awe for the unknown — killing the wonder of possibility in the cradle.

C: 我知道这事很难被原谅啦，但…无名客之间最好还是不要闹得太僵吧？
E: I understand it's hard for you to forgive me, but... As fellow Nameless, we don't want our relationship to be strained, do we?

C: 但我并不抱有太过高远的期望。家族选中了这个团队来进行新城区建设，更多是看中了他们身上的…「噱头」。
E: However, my hopes aren't high. The Family's decision to hire this team is more of a gimmick.

C: 您听过苏萨先生吗？就是那个苏乐达的创始人。
E: Have you heard of Mr. Sousa, the inventor of SoulGlad?

C: 可不是！要是自愿为公司发光发热也就罢了，但浪费时间给一个傻子擦屁股？饶了我吧还是。
E: I couldn't agree more! It would be fine if I did it on my own accord, but cleaning up the mess for a fool? It's a straight no.

C: 这些游戏币给您！我决定抓紧人生中的每一秒，不能再浪费时间在玩乐上了！
E: These tokens are for you! I've decided to use every second of my life well. I can't waste any more time on fun!

C: 嗯？找我有事？
E: Huh? Do you have questions?

C: 咻咻…正在进行侵权风险分析……
E: *Beep*... Initiating infringement risk analysis...

C: 酥酥麻麻，一秒舒爽！
E: Zap away discomfort! Instant relief!

C: 哦对，想起来了，这也是为了宇宙商业规则的公正和进步！当然，我可没忘！
E: Oh yeah, it's also about justice and civilization in the galactic business world! I haven't forgotten it! Of course not!

C: 凡事都要阻挠我，装什么清高！发明家想靠自己的专利挣钱有错吗？啊？！
E: Why does he keep trying to mess with me, acting all high and mighty!? What's the big deal if an inventor wants to cash in on their patents, huh?

C: 现在的艺者这点苦都吃不了，还天天想要成名，真是痴人说梦！
E: Those artists can't handle even the tiniest bit of stress, but they dream of fame. Can you believe that?

C: 是啊。无论是多么美好的事物，它的魅力都会在一次次的重复体验中流失。
E: Yeah, no matter how good something is, its charm diminishes with repeated exposure.

C: 呼——这是我小时候学会的第一首歌，不知道为什么就唱出口了…真是奇怪。
E: Phew... That was the first song I learned as a child, and I don't know why I sang it out loud... How peculiar.

C: 真希望她快点回到之前的样子，不要再拿这些奇怪的音乐戏弄粉丝了，不然我们在乐迷圈怎么抬得起头啊……
E: I really wish she could return to her previous self and stop teasing her fans with such weird noises. Otherwise, how will we face our fellow music fans...

C: 呃…你想啊，拉洛丝小姐为什么要在台上怪叫呢？像不像失败者们在噩梦中的哀嚎？她正是在通过声音来塑造这种情景，表达的正是逐梦客们对梦想求而不得的痛苦！
E: Um... Think about it... Why did Larose scream on stage? Doesn't it resemble the wailing of losers trapped in a nightmare? Through her voice, she captures that very scenario, expressing the pain felt by Dreamchasers who are unable to fulfill their dreams!

C: 我不会再支持你这样的歌手了。
E: I won't support you anymore.

C: 苏乐达的事先放一放。我得去对付它，你赶快找地方避难吧。
E: Let's enjoy a drink of SoulGlad together next time. Now, I have to get rid of that thing. You should find a place to hide.

C: 我无法前进…但最终我会前进。
E: I'm stuck now... but I'll move forward eventually.

C: 听着就不正经，我拒绝。
E: It sounds shady to me. I'm not doing it.

C: 你继续朝着他移动，皮皮西此刻正沉浸在自己的情绪中，没注意到你的动作。
E: You continue to move towards him, but the Pepeshi person is too absorbed in his own emotions to notice your movements.

C: 首先，对于阁下的帮助，我再次表示感谢。
E: First, I wish to thank you again for your aid.

C: …罗斯玛丽啊…你要是想听的话，我倒是可以和你聊聊她。
E: ...Rosemary... If you wish to hear about her, I could tell you about her.

C: 但我还是奉劝各位，在梦境之地尽量恪守家族制定的规则——记住，家族时刻都在看着你。
E: However, I still advise you all while in the Dreamscape to abide by the laws as set out by The Family. Remember, The Family is always watching you.

C: 橡木。
E: The Oaks.

C: 来聊聊么？
E: Got time to chat?

C: 而我更不是什么伟大的星系活动家，只是一个为大家提供平台的领路人罢了。
E: And I'm not some great galactic activist — I'm just a guide who provides a platform for everyone to use.

C: 买走玩具的小孩并不在意把玩具递给他们的双手是否沾了血。直到在未来的某天，他们自己也会变成红色的染料。
E: The kid who buys a toy doesn't care if the hands that sell it to him are covered in blood. Until one day in the future when they themselves are reduced to a red smear.

C: 这样吧，我们来打个赌，你如果能破解我出的谜题，我就不再纠缠你，否则你就得当众宣布自己是通过一些见不得光的手段赢得了冠军，然后对获得第二名的选手郑重道歉。
E: How about this? Let's make a wager: If you can solve my riddle, I'll leave you alone. Otherwise, you'll announce that you won the title through unsavory means, and then properly apologize to the contestant who came in second.

C: 我还不能放弃…无论如何，我都要见知更鸟小姐一面！
E: I can't give up yet... No matter what, I must see Miss Robin!

C: 我有话要问你。
E: I have something to ask you.

C: …对。就在刚才，我意识到修改校规来得太慢了——不是说不修改，但在那之前，我得好好敲打几个学生。
E: Yes... I've just realized that changing the school rules will take too long. I'm still intent on implementing changes, mind you, but before that, I must knock some sense into a few students' minds.

C: 哈、哈哈哈…这老小子，真是一点都不让人意外。
E: Ha... Hahaha... This old man is so predictable.

C: 比起做那些痛苦的差事，我宁愿窝在家里躺平——但这俩选择都不如继续上学。
E: Instead of wearing myself down with tedious trivialities, I'd rather laze about at home... Yet, neither of these choices beats continual education.

C: 考试即将开始，请做好准备——
E: The exam shall commence soon, prepare yourself—

C: 「不相信」
E: No

C: 优雅进餐是对菜肴的尊重。即使面对黑潮的威胁，也别忘了源远流长的用餐礼仪啊。
E: Dining with grace is a sign of respect for the food. Even in the face of the black tide's threat, do not forget the long-standing traditions of dining etiquette.

C: 可最后呢？我们，圣城奥赫玛的公民，理性、智慧和光荣的传承者，在刻法勒的注视之下，我们从未退缩，一次又一次将敌人击垮！咕嘟——
E: And in the end? We, the citizens of the Holy City of Okhema, inheritors of reason, wisdom, and glory, have never faltered under the watchful gaze of Kephale. Time and again, we have crushed our enemies! Gulp—

C: 我知道你们无非是想要些好处。我有利衡币，只消一句话就能提拔你成为戍卫官。
E: I know you just want something in return. I have Balance Coins, and with just a word, I can promote you to Captain.

C: 别乱跑，孩子们，我给你们讲一个大地兽城邦的故事。
E: Don't run off, children. Let me tell you a story about the Dromas's city-state.

C: 「天父阖上了眼睛，我也应当完成自己在此世的使命了。」
E: "The Heavenly Father has closed their eyes. I, too, must fulfill my purpose in this world."

C: 柔软的小爪子轻轻放在了你的掌心，温暖的肉垫摸上去非常有弹性。
E: You place its soft little paws in the palms of your hand. Its warm paw pads are really squishy.

C: 遇到设备问题，请提前在终端上预约，工作以外的事就不要来问我了。
E: If you get any IT problems, please pre-register via your terminal. And please don't ask me about any non-work-related matters.

C: 你最喜欢什么珍稀物种？
E: What is your favorite rare species?

C: 安全区的开辟工作很危险吧？
E: It must be dangerous to establish safe zones, right?

C: 我正在汇报法政科相关的工作。如您所见，我是法政科的向导，您可以叫我希拉。
E: I am reporting on my work in the Department of Galactic Geopolitics. As you can see, I'm a guide in the department. You can call me Sheila.

C: 不，我已经宣誓，用我的灵魂宣誓——必须踏过我的身体，才可入侵这里的生灵！
E: No, I took my vows. I swore on my soul — If anyone is to harm the creatures here, they'll have to step over my dead body.

C: 一颗石子只能翻得起一朵水花，但一枚核弹却能引发一场海啸！
E: A stone can cause a splash, but a nuclear bomb can trigger a tsunami!

C: 他温和谦逊，又成熟冷静。优秀的内在性格促使他拥有了一副完美的外表……啊！这就是相由心生的含义吧！
E: He is gentle and modest, mature and composed. His inner excellence gives him a perfect appearance... Ahhhh! One's appearance is shaped by one's mind!

C: 我看你好像是「公司」的人？
E: You look like someone from the IPC.

C: 我当年可是修了它足足三次，三次都是从濒死边缘把它救回来……
E: I fixed this thing three times. Three times I managed to bring it back from the brink of death ...

C: 再这么下去，也不能怪其他科室看不起咱们地概科。如此堕落！还怎么能有成就啊！
E: If he keeps doing this, we can't blame the other departments for looking down on us. He's hopeless! How is he going to achieve anything?

C: 公司愿意砸钱，我点了个头，就这么简单。具体运作我不知道，你得问艾丝妲。
E: The IPC doesn't mind another investment and I didn't reject their offer. As for its day-to-day, you need to ask Asta.

C: 啊？你再这样说我可要信了……
E: Huh? I'm going to think you mean it if you keep saying that...

C: 独特？如果我真的那么特别，那为什么她不带我一起走？
E: Special? If I'm really special, why doesn't she take me with her?

C: 真的吗，我完全没印象了。
E: I did? I can't remember anything.

C: 我看到了通往空间站其他舱段的路，不过，这里是要怎么上去呢？
E: I see the way to the space station, but how do I get there?

C: 我想问…
E: I'd like to ask...

C: 那群塔兰顿的信徒在公民大会上争执了许久，也不知该如何裁决。最后以一票之差判我们无罪，只交了点罚款，着实惊险啊。
E: Those Talanton disciples bickered for a long time in the citizens' assembly, not knowing how to decide the case. Finally, we were declared innocent by a vote's difference, so we just paid the fine. It was a harrowing experience.

C: 那几道声音沉默不语，并未对你的疑惑做出解答。但你很快就明白了这一切——
E: The voices fall into complete silence, leaving your question unanswered. But you quickly understand what has happened...

C: 而那些腐朽的祭品也已经消失，仿佛从未存在过。
E: The rotten offerings you gave have also disappeared into thin air as if they never even existed.

C: 哈，当然！莫非你想要说，你思想中的阿卡索斯城永恒存在、真实可信，看得见摸得着的城邦，反而不如你的想象那般确定？
E: Hah, of course! Are you trying to claim that the Icatus in your mind will exist forever, whereas a visible and tangible city is not as much a certainty as the one in your imagination?

C: 让我来辩！
E: Let me join the debate!

C: 就算在覆灭前，城邦的面积与人口也在不断发生变化，你童年时见到的城邦，和青年时见到的必然不同。既然如此，你凭什么断定它就是阿卡索斯？
E: Even before its destruction, the area and population of the city were undergoing constant change. The city that you saw as a child was undoubtedly different to the one you saw as a youth. If that is the case, how can you conclude that it was indeed Icatus?

C: 果然，我早猜到这样的推论无法蒙混过关。但异乡的智者，你刚才的驳斥也为我提供了新的论证思路。
E: I knew that it would not be so simple as just presenting my deduction without justification. However, your rebuttal just now has presented me with a new line of thought, wise one from beyond.

C: 讨论一下「石板」。
E: Talk about the "slate."

C: 来都来了，我就听听吧…
E: We're here now, so I'll just listen...

C: 预定的送货时间…就是明天。两位，无论那是场什么宴会，你们一定要赶在这之前找到宁芙。
E: The delivery's scheduled for... tomorrow. No matter what kind of banquet it is, you two must find Nympha before it begins.

C: 我想调查的是几位在黑潮里失踪的朋友，他们分别是「莲食学派」的科洛埃、「绳结学派」的尼科马库斯、还有「敬拜学派」的安德烈亚斯。
E: I wish to inquire about some friends of mine who were lost in the black tide. They are Clio from the Lotophagists, Nicomachus from the Nodists, and Andreas from the Venerationists.

C: 我想再看看。
E: Yes, please.

C: 你将在记忆中的见闻转告给了老费贝尔——告诉他阿塔卡玛是如何英勇奋战到生命的最后一刻，库娜涅又是如何举起长剑，坚定守护在姐姐身前的。
E: You tell Old Fabio everything you saw in the memory — how Artakama fought bravely until her last breath, and how Cynane raised her sword, standing firm to protect her sister.

C: 那要蒜香还是椒盐？
E: So do you want garlic salt, or salt & pepper?

C: 那他们现在肯定以你为荣吧。
E: Then they must be really proud of you right now.

C: 哦…收到！
E: Oh... Duly noted!

C: 简评一下我的最新情诗。
E: Gimme your thoughts about my latest love poem.

C: 呜嗡嗡嗡嗡！
E: Grumphhhh!

C: 发生什么事了？为什么这头大地兽听到我的歌声就逃走了，唱得有那么差吗？
E: What happened? Why did the dromas run away when I started singing? Was it really that bad?

C: 呜啊啊啊啊！
E: NOOOO!

C: 我只是太入戏了…太过于投入了，你懂吧？就是情绪上来了，收不住。
E: I was just too deep into the role... too immersed. You get it, right? The emotions just overwhelmed me.

C: （什么情况？追上去看看吧。）
E: (What's happening? Follow and find out.)

C: 不过他今早不在，也没见其他人把我们拦下来…{F#女士}{M#先生}，我们该往哪走？
E: But he's not here this morning, and nobody else stopped us... {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, where should we go from here?

C: 哇，天生祭司圣体！
E: Wow, a natural-born talent for priesthood!

C: 直到你听见一个浑厚低沉的嗓音传来……
E: ...Until you hear a deep, resonant voice approaching...

C: 我父亲是一名圣城守卫。每当战事吃紧，他就会拿上头盔和长矛，一整宿都不回来。而我只能独自留在家中，把自己埋进被子里，试图隔绝窗外纷争眷属的尖啸声…
E: My father was a guard of the holy city. When battles were fierce, he'd grab his helmet and spear and wouldn't come back all night. And I'd be left alone at home, burying myself under the blankets to drown out the screeching of the Strife Titankins outside...

C: 你还是给我歇歇吧。
E: Give it a rest.

C: 库房不远，在我们回来前，请务必守住这里！
E: The storage room isn't far. Please hold the line until we get back!

C: 再考虑考虑。
E: Let me think it over again.

C: 没救了，奥赫玛已经没救了。比起被怪物杀死，不如让我被陨石砸死算了。
E: We're doomed. Okhema's doomed. But I'd rather get crushed by meteors than killed by monsters.

C: 一带三？太难为我了。
E: Three stowaways? You're really going to do this to me?

C: 想不起来了…先去黎明云崖转一圈看看吧。
E: I'm drawing blanks... Let's case Dawncloud first.

C: 没有被黑潮彻底侵吞理智，沦为怪物，或许是命运对他最后的仁慈。
E: Not being completely consumed of rationality by the black tide and turned into a monstrosity might be fate's final mercy for him.

C: 一阵脚步声传来，在守卫的看护下，希瑞雅、亚森、拉缇娜三人来到了巨像前……
E: Footsteps approach. Under a guard escort, Serena, Yason, and Lathena arrive and stand before the Colossus...

C: 「——孩子们，不妨把眼前的灾难视作一场梦境，等噩梦醒来，无论生者还是死者，都会在新世界重逢——」
E: "—Treat this disaster as a nightmare, children. When you wake, all will reunite in the new world, be they living or dead—"

C: {NICKNAME}，我、我有一个不情之请……
E: {NICKNAME}, I... I have a rather awkward request...

C: 真、真的吗！太谢、谢谢你了！
E: R—Really!? Th—Thank you so much!

C: 真、真的吗！太谢、谢谢你了！
E: R—Really!? Th—Thank you so much!

C: 用这场宴会作为他们的终点，一定是<color=#dbc291ff>那位伙伴</color>的仁慈。
E: Making this banquet their final destination must be <color=#dbc291ff>that companion's</color> act of mercy.

C: 再来一次！
E: One more time!

C: 委托名「纷争的尽头在哪里」，推演结果是「无」。
E: Request: "Where does the strife end?" - Extrapolation Result: "Nowhere."

C: 看看别的。
E: Look at another one.

C: 而方才您步上的，是法吉娜的祭台。通过亲自挤压葡萄，您的来时路便会立刻化作一瓶「专属心酿」，无论失却欢欣多久，都能以它平复心境，重拾笑靥……
E: What you walked across was Phagousa's altar. By personally stepping on the grapes, the journey you took to get here will be instantly turned into a bottle of "exclusive soul brew." One sip is supposed to calm troubled hearts and restore smiles, no matter how long they have been without joy...

C: 许久不见您清醒的样子了，涅赖德斯大人。
E: It's been a while since we've seen you sober, Lady Nereides.

C: 意义非凡啊。
E: This is incredibly significant.

C: 我不是这个意思！我以为你在外面冒险呢，所以有点惊讶。
E: That's not what I'm saying! I just thought you'd be on an adventure somewhere, that's all.

C: 如果有办法把这风景记录下来，带回去给孩子们看就好了。
E: If only there was a way for me to preserve this moment and show it to the kids back home.

C: 呵呵…也是。毕竟在许多人看来，他只是个草菅人命的恶魔……
E: Mm, I don't blame you for that. A disregard for human life doesn't exactly endear you to other humans...

C: 听姬子大姐姐说……
E: I heard Miss Himeko say...

C: 嗯…这倒是还挺贴切。真想不到这样一个男人，居然会对那种东西感兴趣……
E: He doesn't look like the type, but that sounds about right.

C: 嗯…被你这么一说，我感觉也许值得和技术部的铁卫们聊聊列车的事。
E: Hmm... You've given me some food for thought — I should have a chat with the Technology Division about this.

C: 现在，贝洛伯格的自然环境现正在逐步恢复正常，那些令使随时都有可能卷土重来……
E: Things are getting back on track for Belobog, but those Emanators could return one day...

C: 偶尔放松放松，感觉也很不错…谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。
E: Thanks for your advice, {NICKNAME}. It's nice to have a break every now and then.

C: 不知道艾丝妲小姐会不会喜欢这样的气味呢？她偶尔也会喝咖啡，不过一定要加糖加奶，她不爱喝苦涩的东西……
E: I wonder if Lady Asta would like it? She drinks a cup or two occasionally, but she has it with milk and sugar. She can't stand bitter flavors...

C: 不是，你哪位啊？
E: ...Who are you?

C: 以利亚萨拉斯是谁啊？
E: Who is Elias Salas?

C: 乘坐星穹列车徜徉宇宙…真令人羡慕啊。
E: Wandering the universe on the Astral Express... *sigh* One can only be envious!

C: 我闲着无聊，逗你玩的。晕车？我？怎么可能。
E: No, no, I'm just messing with you because I'm bored. Motion sickness? Me? Don't be absurd. Don't forget—

C: 能陪我站一会儿吗…
E: Will you stand here with me for a little while?

C: …刚才你们的列车长是不是咽了一下口水？
E: ...Did the conductor just lick their lips?

C: 你要是有了什么疑难杂症，记得来找我，有我「衔药龙女」在，保证药到病除。
E: If you ever have any unusual ailments, come find me. This Healer Lady is guaranteed to get to the bottom of them.

C: 如果你心中还有困惑，可以随时来找我。当然也可以写信，我喜欢那样传统的交流方式。
E: If you still hold confusion in your heart, please, come find me anytime. Of course, you may also write to me. I like that kind of classical communication method.

C: 也好也好，只要不是无意义地谩骂和批判，我都会好好听着的。
E: Fine fine. I'll take it to heart as long as it's not pointless criticism and slander.

C: 嗨，又见面了，这次是有什么事呢？
E: Hey, we meet again. What can I help you with?

C: 将军总是嘱咐彦卿，滴水之恩当以涌泉相报，即使是与朋友相处，也要礼数周到。
E: The general is always telling me that a drop of water should be repaid with a spring, and that even among friends, etiquette prevails.

C: 我想多听听你扯闲篇…
E: I want to hear more of your gossip...

C: 到了我这把岁数看过去，那啥事都多少有点难以忘怀，你懂这意思吧？
E: At my age, everything is unforgettable. You know what I mean?

C: 哎，洛奇啊，我的傻徒弟…师父早就不怪你了，可你什么时候才会回来哇……
E: Ahhh, Rocky, my silly apprentice... I've never blamed you for leaving, but when are you coming back...?

C: 总之，我想说的是——我们正在想办法消除星核和裂界带来的影响。
E: Anyways, what I'm trying to say is that we're seeking ways to remove the influence of the Stellaron and the Fragmentum.

C: 一开始只是向他请教了列车智库的使用方法…但后面不知怎地，我们就聊到贝洛伯格的地文地貌了。
E: I asked him how to use the Express' data bank... but somehow we ended up talking about Belobog geography.

C: 决定了，我要去和列车长提意见，给你们改造一间训练房出来！
E: I've decided. I'm gonna raise the issue with the conductor and get them to put together a training room for you!

C: 然后加水，加糖，糖要加到…加到茶水里再也溶不进一粒糖为止。
E: Then, add water and sugar until the water is so saturated that not a single grain of sugar can be dissolved further.

C: 你们的下一个目的地是哪？要是我正好有同事在那儿，我可以提前帮各位打声招呼，好好招待下你们。
E: Where are you guys headed next? If a colleague of mine happens to be there, I can give them a heads-up and have them show you guys around.

C: …抱歉，话题一下又拐到工作上去了。我该听取你们的意见，让自己放松一下。
E: Sorry, I'm talking about work again... I should take your advice and try to relax a little.

C: 帕姆吃素？
E: Is Pom-Pom a vegetarian?

C: 不仅仅是「有点」。
E: "A little" would be an understatement.

C: 与列车无缘的无名客？
E: A Nameless whose path never crossed with the Astral Express?

C: 列车上的布设我很喜欢。这些物件，想来是花了不少心思布置的，不知是谁的手笔？
E: I am very fond of the furnishings on the Express — it is apparent that whoever decorated the train truly put their heart into it. I wonder who it was?

C: 我有点小烦恼想咨询……
E: I need some advice...

C: 这就是列车的待客之道。
E: That's Express hospitality for you.

C: 于我，纸本书能令人时刻意识到知识的重量，是数据永远无法替代的感知。
E: To me, holding a physical book constantly reminds one of the gravity of knowledge, an experience that digital data just can't replicate.

C: 想把它们都牢牢记在脑海里，这样，不在列车上的时候也可以经常回忆。
E: I'm trying to capture all these moments in my mind, that way I'll have them with me even when I'm not on the Express.

C: 这些应该是来自不同世界的音乐吧！米沙听到了风雪和寒冷，也听到了古老和生机。
E: This music must be from a different world! I feel the blowing snow, the coldness. It feels ancient.

C: 没…没花多少时间！都是我平时空闲的时候做的。
E: Not much time at all! Just something I worked on in my free time.

C: 不知道丹恒兄弟懂不懂玄学，要不找他来调查调查？
E: Maybe Dan Heng knows about paranormal stuff. Should we get him to check it out?

C: 哈！喜欢就好，送你了！
E: Ha! Glad you like them. I'll give them to you!

C: 既然东西送到，我也该走了。我们有缘再见，朋友！
E: Since I've delivered my gift, I should go now. Till we meet again, friend!

C: 盒子套盒子，才显得礼物有诚意嘛~
E: A box in a box, that's how you know the gift is sincere!

C: 我喜欢听故事！
E: I love listening to stories!

C: 怎么才能温和地打败它？
E: How do you defeat it gently?

C: {NICKNAME}，说话算数！我会常来的！
E: You better keep your word {NICKNAME}! I'll be coming often!

C: 群星无垠，远眺辨不清任何一颗的来处。但身处其中，才发现它们也是四处坐落，各有栖所。
E: The stars are endless. It isn't easy to discern their origins when gazing from afar, yet when one is amidst them, one finds that they all have a spot in the sky... a home of their own.

C: 之前小女子总被窗外的星辰美景吸引，不逛不知道，今日仔细一瞧才发现，尽管穿行宇宙已久，列车却没有一丝风尘仆仆的感觉。
E: Before, I was constantly engrossed in the scenery outside the window. Now that I've walked through the Express, I realize that it doesn't seem dusty or travel-worn at all, despite its long journey through the universe.

C: 爱与关怀，这些东西本就不属于我。
E: Love and care, these things aren't meant for me.

C: 有点冷，我可以趴在你身上睡吗？
E: It's quite cold. Can I sleep on top of your body?

C: 空间站终端的网络连接已经恢复，但广告机音响的修复工作还未提上日程。
E: The network connection of the space station terminal has been fixed, but the repair of the advertising bot's audio system is nowhere on the agenda.

C: 太不像话了，这个人一点都不在乎别人怎么想吗？我才不会和这种人做朋友！
E: This is ridiculous. Doesn't he care how other people might feel? I'll never be friends with people like him!

C: 后来我就转行了，因为来了个新人，比我还会凑字数…哎，你看过《水晶日报》的美食专栏吗？专栏作者艾格尼斯就是我。
E: But then a new girl came and was better at filling in words than I was, so I made a career change. Have you read the cuisine section of the Crystal Daily? I am the author of that section.

C: 不过现在上下层区的物资已经开始正常运输了，下层区的美食从这里也能买得到——而且价格还很便宜。
E: At least goods are already starting to be regularly transported between the Overworld and Underworld. I can buy food from the Underworld here, and the prices are cheap.

C: 我不想买房。
E: I'm not looking to buy a property.

C: 我跟你说，开发城郊那都是板上钉钉的事！之前没人想到这回事，楼盘的价格才低……
E: I told you that the development of areas outside the city was carved in stone. No one had imagined this before, and so property prices were low...

C: 你怎么想到这玩意的？
E: How did you come up with that stuff?

C: 啊，「作家」这称谓我可担不起！我只是个量产劣质文字的写手。我现在以代笔为生，是一堆替人代笔都不知从何写起的垃圾。
E: Ah, I'm afraid I don't deserve the title. I produce less than mediocre writings in great quantity for others. A ghostwriter as they say. I doubt if I'm qualified to write at all, even for the rubbish I produce.

C: 打扰你了。
E: Thank you for your time.

C: …这片汤话谁不会说啊？
E: ...You think I didn't know that?

C: 我们都有同一个家，名字叫贝洛伯格——你连和城市息息相关的新闻都不关心，还算是贝洛伯格人吗？
E: We share a home. It's called Belobog. How can you call yourself a citizen of Belobog if you don't even care about the news in our city?

C: …很有野心。
E: ...That's ambitious.

C: …唉，算了。听着挺高大上，实际上就是个协助铁卫工作的外派法律顾问而已。跟法院里的工作相比，这活计简直就是浪费时间……
E: ...*sigh* Forget about it. It sounds impressive, but I'm just a legal advisor sent to help the guards. Compared to my work at the court, this is a major waste of time...

C: 和以前一样呗，不过…你听说了吗？上下层区马上就要开放了！我就知道大守护者不会放弃我们，之前撤走铁卫果然是形势所迫吧…太好了，我们有希望了！
E: Same as before. But... have you heard? The Underworld and Overworld are being connected soon! I knew the Supreme Guardian would never abandon us, and withdrawing Guards was just out of circumstances... Great! We have hope!

C: 什么非议？我跟大家伙处的都可好了。
E: People aren't saying anything. I get along well with everyone.

C: 大概不是吧。
E: I don't think so.

C: 地髓矿的伴生苔藓，清除有害磁场、驱逐不利……
E: Moss from the Geomarrow mine. It can remove harmful magnetic fields and unhealthy stuff from the air...

C: 这才对嘛。有的事情，{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}还是不知道为好哦？
E: Good. It's better for you to not know everything.

C: 唔，我在聚落跟着几个叔叔阿姨学机械修理…
E: Well, I'm learning to be a mechanic from some folks in the settlement...

C: 你不是扒手吧？
E: You're a pickpocket, aren't you?

C: 唔，怎么突然这么问？最近难道又有什么大新闻吗？
E: Why are you asking that all of a sudden? Is something big going on at the moment?

C: 啊～原来如此。这件事我倒是听别人聊过，不过我还以为他们是开玩笑呢。
E: Oh, so that's how it is~ I heard some people chatting about this, but I thought they were only joking.

C: 我打小就在这里长大，不敢说对行政区了如指掌，但这宾馆，还有宾馆附近有过什么变化，又有过什么样的故事，我多少也知道点。
E: This is where I grew up. I wouldn't say that I know all about the Administrative District. But I do know the history and goings-on around these parts fairly well.

C: 啊，不要看这个…看下面这个——改良型！这道菜是专门用了铁罐来闷炖洞螈肉，这样的话肉的口感会非常好…这是我从书上学来的，哈哈哈。
E: Ah, not this one... look at the one below — this is the modified version! We specifically use an iron pot to braise olm meat. That way the meat becomes really tender... I learned it from a book, hahaha.

C: 说到这个，奥列格大哥也是我们饭店的老客户了，他尤其喜欢吃「铁罐焖螈肉」——这也是我们的招牌菜，建议你有机会尝试一下！
E: Speaking of which, Oleg is also our regular customer. "Iron Pot Braised Olm," our signature dish, is his favorite. You should try it!

C: 但愿这能让「公司」暂时打消干预雅利洛-Ⅵ的念头。希望托帕小姐的承诺有足够的分量……
E: My wish is that this will make the IPC abandon their idea of interfering with Jarilo-VI. I hope Miss Topaz's promise carries enough weight...

C: 只是我以前总想「朗道家的人各有各的坚持」，再加上老弟他确实武艺高强…我也就说服自己不再去担心他了。
E: It's just that I've always thought every Landau has their own drive. And my brother's really good at martial arts... I convinced myself that I wouldn't have to worry about him.

C: ——天才！天才的含金量你懂吗？她和我实在是太有共同语言了！
E: — Genius! Do you know the value of a true genius? She and I have so much in common!

C: 你说得对。她都已经长成大姑娘了，我都没能和她真正地谈过心…
E: You're right. She's a big girl now and we've never really talked...

C: 你也是，内心有什么困惑一定要和自己的亲友好好谈谈！可别像我一样憋在心里，差点耽误了一辈子啊。
E: You too should talk to your friends or family about any confusion you feel inside! Don't keep everything to yourself as I did. It almost ruined my life.

C: 情报官的工作到底是什么？
E: What does an Intelligence Officer do?

C: 正如你所想，戍卫官的工作并不复杂。
E: It is as you imagined, a Captain's job isn't all that complicated.

C: 其实…这是因为，这里本来是史瓦罗先生和他机械网络里的小机器人驻扎的地方。
E: Actually... it's because this place used to be where Mr. Svarog and the Little Robots of his robot network were stationed.

C: 欢迎，{NICKNAME}——你为何而来？
E: Welcome, {NICKNAME}. Why have you come?

C: 由于无法对基地网络外的个体进行持续有效监测，我必须定期根据克拉拉的维护结果进行风险评估，以便在适当的时侯及时干预。
E: Due to the inability to effectively monitor the machines outside the base network, I must regularly perform risk assessment according to Clara's maintenance results, so as to facilitate timely intervention at suitable moments.

C: 从上面的喧嚣世界，透进了温暖的微光
E: From chaos up above, there comes a new light

C: 聊天？行啊，当然可以——毕竟跟大英雄谈心的机会可不是每天都有。
E: Chat? Sure thing! You don't get to chat with a great hero every day!

C: 你应该知道， 现在主流的移动端操作系统都是由公司研发和维护的……
E: As you know, all the major operating systems are developed and maintained by the IPC...

C: 你就没有什么任务交给我吗？
E: Don't you have any quests for me?

C: 好，我走了。
E: All right. See you then.

C: 呜咕…呜咕！
E: Groo... grooo!
...Groo?

C: 啊？她可是最大的角儿啊。
E: What? But she's the star actress!

C: 你们在说啥？
E: What are you guys talking about?

C: 原来这么简单啊，谢谢你。
E: Is that it? Wow, thanks.

C: 我在法务部有一朋友……
E: I've got a friend in the Justice Department...

C: 地下名产岩居蟹！
E: Famous underground Rock Crab!

C: 这是我们唯一一盏灯了……
E: That's the only lamp we have...

C: 所以…海报贴出去之后，有人加入我们的协会吗？
E: So... After our poster campaign, did we get any new members?

C: 你都几天没回家了？！
E: When was the last time you came home!?

C: 近日，磐岩镇多位矿民遭到无赖流浪者敲诈勒索……
E: Recently, a number of miners in Boulder Town have been enduring blackmails by vagrants...

C: 二十八、二十九……
E: Twenty-eight, twenty-nine...

C: 怎么回事，不听话啊……
E: Why isn't it listening to me...

C: 是！
E: Yes, sir!

C: 孩子，你就饶了我吧…
E: Could you just give me a break, kid...?

C: 祝你旗开得胜。
E: Break a leg.

C: 记得是藏在这来着…
E: I remember hiding it right here...

C: 我应该做工程指挥才对。
E: I should work as an engineering director.

C: 想了解您的过去…
E: I want to understand your past...

C: 再见。
E: Bye.

C: 欢迎下次光临！
E: Come back next time!

C: 请慢走，也祝您享受本次博物馆之旅！
E: Please take care, and hope you enjoy the tour!

C: 哈，这可真是不来不知道，一来吓一跳！没想到啊没想到，这帮筑城者居然把宝贵的预算都花在了这种地方……
E: What!? I didn't know that, this is a bombshell! Unbelievable, the Architects would spend all the allotted budget on things like this...

C: 司狱大人可以不理会他们？
E: But you're the Jailer. Can't you ignore them?

C: 这些新推出的怪味菜未必会好吃，但是一定可以给您带来难以忘记的全新体验。
E: These new dishes may not be tasty, but they'll definitely leave you with an unforgettable experience.

C: 只是想和你聊聊天…
E: That's right. I just want to chat...

C: 在想出更好的办法之前，还是要自己试着写写诗啊…哎，写诗真的好难。
E: I'll have to keep trying to write poetry on my own until I come up with a better way... *sigh* writing poems sure is difficult.

C: 树生树长无定数，似我发丝全干枯。呜呼！莫不是水土不服！
E: Nothing is certain when it comes to the growth of the tree, just like the dry hair strands of me. Alas, the environment must be to blame!

C: 因为我是一朵失败的蘑菇。
E: Because I'm a failure of a mushroom.

C: …算了，你压根就不懂幻戏。我就不该指望你的……
E: ...Forget it. You know nothing about immersias...

C: 请您尽管问吧！为客人答疑解惑也是我应尽的义务。
E: Ask anything you like! Answering customers' questions is also part of my duties.

C: 客人您这话说得，好像我们是一群野人似的。这做生意无非讲究一个低买高卖...哦不，互惠互利，有什么难的？
E: You seem to be implying we're uncivilized, dear customer. Doing business is all about buying low and selling high — I mean, mutual profit. It's not that difficult.

C: 幽囚狱的情况您也知道，别说从外边进货，就是连个苍蝇都飞不进来。所以我们集团的商品全部是就地取材，纯手工打造。
E: I'm sure you're aware of the situation in The Shackling Prison. Even a fly can't make its way inside, so we have to forget about importing goods. All the products from our group are sourced from local materials and handcrafted.

C: 但自从战首越狱后，幽囚狱也加强了管理，集团的销售渠道遭遇了重大打击…赤衣大人让我们最近都消停点，不要在这种时候给十王上眼药。哎，难受。
E: But ever since the Warhead escaped from the prison, management of The Shackling Prison has become stricter. Most of the group's sales channels suffered a major blow... Madam Chiyi also instructed us to lie low for now and not cause trouble for the Ten Lords. *sigh* How miserable.

C: 那你攒够多少次了？
E: So how many have you accumulated so far?

C: 之前我跟净砚提过，是不是想办法好好宣传一下地衡司公廨到底有多能干。但是净砚给我列了一下最近小公廨处理的庶务，实在是没有什么可宣传的。
E: I raised this with Jingyan before, whether we should be better at promoting how good the Realm-Keeping Commission Chancery is at what it does. But she gave me a list of all the things we've done recently, and there isn't really anything to be proud of.

C: 当然，这个过程中可不能被地衡司的人逮到。不然轻则罚款，重则吊销执照…那生意可就难做得很咯。
E: Naturally, I can't let the Realm-Keeping Commission catch me while I'm doing this. Otherwise I'll be fined if I'm lucky, or could even lose my license... And then it'll be even harder to do business.

C: 你和那人到底是什么关系？
E: So what exactly is going on between you and him, then?

C: 我懂了，你肯定是个化外民！是不是遇到麻烦了啊？尽管告诉我，我来帮你搞定！
E: I get it. You must be an Outworlder! Are you in any trouble? Just tell me, and I'll help you get things sorted!

C: 这个组织隐秘而伟大，世代守护神策府的安全。
E: This organization is well-hidden and powerful, protecting the safety of the Seat of Divine Foresight for generations.

C: 当然好啊。只是长久不见波澜，难免教人觉得乏味……
E: Sure, it's great. But it's starting to get a little boring at work when nothing ever happens...

C: 侍卫长是做什么的？
E: What do you get up to as the chief guard?

C: 我明白了，仙舟机密不便打探。
E: Got it. Asking about Xianzhou secrets is inappropriate.

C: 路上小心。
E: Safe travels.

C: 内部甚至还有传言说，玉兆阵列藏在塔拉萨的某个海沟里！当然，这就不太现实了，当个故事听就好。
E: There are even internal rumors that the matrix is hidden in one of Thalassa's ocean trenches! Of course, that's not very realistic, so just treat it as a story.

C: 老夫有时候会暗地里想啊…如果他们都只能活十几岁，那如今的工造司一定是另一番景象了吧。
E: Sometimes, I even wonder... If we only lived to be teenagers, what kind of Artisanship Commission would we end up with?

C: 其实也没那么枯燥。毕竟这儿有堆积如山的档案可以看，随便一本就记录了某个大案要犯的一生，可刺激了！
E: It really isn't that boring at all. After all, there is a mountain of files here to read. I can take a flick through a file that records the entire life of a major criminal as I please. It's pretty thrilling!

C: 小孩来管理穷观阵？
E: They put a child in charge of the Matrix of Prescience?

C: 之前还能趁乱摸摸鱼，现在不得不干点活咯…哎呀呀，头大，头大。
E: Before, I could take advantage of the chaos and slack off a bit, but I actually have to do work now... Ugh, this is giving me a headache.

C: 这次我才是第一个提交申请的，那个辛克莱老爷，最好再掂量掂量自己的分量。
E: This time my application was submitted first. And Master Sinclair should really reconsider his position.

C: 又见面了，{NICKNAME}大人！您还是一如既往地潇洒帅气啊！
E: We meet again, esteemed {NICKNAME}! You are looking as dashing and charismatic as ever!

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 您尽管问吧，这流云渡上下的手续我可熟啦！
E: Feel free to ask anything. I know my way around all the freight handling procedures in Cloudford!

C: 能介绍下你的工作吗？
E: Can you tell me a little bit about your work?

C: 口说无凭，得让那人立下字据。
E: Verbal confirmations mean nothing. They should be made to put their promises in writing.

C: 跟我聊聊？行啊，你有什么想知道的尽管问便是了。但我丑话说在前头，太卜司的事我了解的不多，你若是想打探什么消息，那还是请回吧。
E: A chat? With me? Alright, let me know if there's anything in particular you'd like to ask. But let me state up front. I don't know much about the Divination Commission, so if you're after intel, I'll stop you right there.

C: 但是我也希望他们能理解云骑军。如今妖人一日没有清剿干净，这丹鼎司洞天就一日难得平静。有时候也挺羡慕他们的，哎……
E: But I also hope they can understand where the Cloud Knights are coming from, too. As long as the devils were not completely quelled, the Alchemy Commission delve will never see peace. Sometimes I even envy these Vidyadhara, you know...?

C: 听你口气，好像和神策府很熟？
E: Judging by your tone, you sound pretty familiar with the Seat of Divine Foresight?

C: 等等，你是在哪里看到我的？这不可能，我明明一直待在药店里……
E: Hang on, where do you think you saw me? That's impossible. I've definitely been here in my pharmacy the whole time...

C: 太卜司的人曾给我算过一卦，说我会是大富大贵的命。可我不信，江湖行医嘛，为的不过就是一口饭而已。
E: Once, this diviner read my fortune and told me I'd be rollin' in dough and living large. But I ain't buying it. I mean, I'm just a wandering healer trying to make ends meet.

C: 好的，再见。当下时局尚不安定，请阁下务必注意安全。
E: That's good. So long. The current situation is not a stable one, so please take precautions.

C: 没错，据我观察，刚蜕生不久的持明族大多缺乏感情，也理解不了前世的做法。能从这些旧物中辨识出自己寄存之物的，一个也没有。
E: Exactly. From what I've seen, most Vidyadhara lack emotions fresh after their rebirth, and are unable to understand the sentiments of their previous selves. Not a single one has ever been able to identify which one of these items used to belong to them.

C: 欢迎客官您下次再来。
E: I warmly invite you to visit again next time.

C: 我在方壶仙舟交流了一百五十多年，又在博识学会的哈米特空间站交流了一百五十多年，最后在公司的法特森星际医院交流了一百多年……
E: I spent about <unbreak>150</unbreak> years on the Xianzhou Fanghu, and another <unbreak>150</unbreak> years at the Hamet Space Station of the Intelligentsia Guild. And finally, I was at IPC's Fedson Interstellar Hospital for over <unbreak>100</unbreak> years...

C: 在机巧鸟身上附身久了，搞得我经常以为这只鸟才是我的本体。至于真正的本体在哪，我自己都忘了。
E: I've been possessing this cycrane for so long that I often start to believe that this is my actual body. I don't even remember where my real body is anymore.

C: 没有其他想问的事儿了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 以后有机会再聊吧。
E: I'll catch you again next time.

C: 噢，这是一句问候语，具体的含义很复杂我就不展开讲了。大概意思是「你好我好大家好，希望每个世界的大家都能过得更好」。
E: Oh, that's just a greeting. The actual meaning is complicated, but in simple terms, it's about wishing everyone a happy life.

C: 当然可以啦，矿泉水本身是纯净无污染的自然物质，尽管往水里倒就行了。
E: Yes, of course. Mineral water is pure and natural, so you can just pour it into the water.

C: 听你这么说，你很擅长聊天？
E: Sounds like you're good at talking then?

C: 客人这么主动啊？不过很遗憾，我这儿现在没什么新品能给您测试啊…请客人放心，有了新品一定第一个通知您。
E: I'm surprised you're so proactive. Unfortunately, I have no new teas for you at the moment... Don't worry. I'll inform you as soon as I get new teas here.

C: 只是想和你聊聊天…
E: That's right. I just want to chat...

C: 哎哟，瞧您说得，没有的事。我可不是狮子大开口漫天要价的人，我们小本买卖，讲究的就是拓展客源，我要是乱开价，那还哪有回头客呀！
E: Ohh, that's not the case here. Everything here is sold at a fair price. We small businesses need to attract regulars, which isn't gonna happen if I set my prices sky-high!

C: 游客来回折腾一趟，累得气喘吁吁的，不得不找个地方坐下喝两口茶饮，买些小吃，休息休息…交流着一天的收获。
E: All the tourists who went there would be so exhausted that they had to buy some drinks and snacks... while taking a break and exchanging their stories.

C: 我想和你随便聊聊。
E: I'm just here for a casual chat.

C: 好古怪的规矩…
E: Your rules are really weird...

C: 客官要是有合眼缘的物件，待会儿我端出来，找个敞亮的位置，带上放大镜和手套，这样好好把玩才尽兴。
E: If you so happen to be destined for one, I'll place it in a bright place and bring a magnifying glass and gloves to you. Then you can admire it to your heart's content.

C: 是你？「清玩斋」无任欢迎。
E: Oh, it's you again? Welcome to Elegance Pagoda.

C: 而我不一样，我是个丹士啊～你看到厨余垃圾，我看到牙膏、沐浴液、护肤品…你看到蛇虫鼠蚁，我看到药品、滋补品、小零食……
E: Not me, though. I'm an alchemist! Where you see kitchen scraps and trash, I see toothpaste, body wash, skincare products, and more. Where you see pests and irritants, I see medicines, supplements, snacks...

C: 太卜司的事务忙得过来吗？
E: How are you coping with your job at the Divination Commission?

C: 打两把牌而已，不碍事的。
E: It's just a round of Celestial Jade. Go for it.

C: {NICKNAME}，既然你来了司辰宫…我一直想着有些话应该当面和你讲清楚。
E: {NICKNAME}, since you're already at the Palace of Astrum, there are things I think I should tell you face-to-face.

C: 训练基地那边的官员每天都会给我汇报她的情况，但她自己嘛…若不是战友提醒，估计难得能想起来家中还有个空巢老人。
E: The officers at the training camp keep me updated every day, but as for her... I'm sure she wouldn't even remember her old mother if her comrades did not remind her of me.

C: 但一旦被镇入囚笼，岁阳对欲望的渴求无法得到满足…它们就像口渴的人，眼前有水，却永远也喝不着。
E: But when you place them in a prison, the heliobi have no way of satisfying their desires... They are like thirsty humans that can see water, but never taste it.

C: 想问你点事。
E: I'd like to ask you something.

C: 请随我来。金人勾魂使四卅七号将护送你离开这里。
E: Please follow me. Aurumaton Spectral Envoy No. <unbreak>437</unbreak> shall escort you out of here.

C: 景元真的光顾过你们店？
E: Has Jing Yuan really visited your shop?

C: 十王司规训有云，「一司，秉烛守夜，勾摄魔邪。」「二司，威罚罪囚，靖平域内。」「三司，业报公允，天年有尽。」
E: As stated in the Ten-Lords Commission's Discipline, "the first division keeps vigils at night and evils at bay," "the second division punishes the criminals and pacifies the territory," and "the third division ensures fairness in the Karmic Wheel and life expectancy."

C: 来吧，我给您稍微介绍一下。
E: Come then. Let me tell you a bit about it.

C: 亲亲要是想现在做决定也可以，我这边也准备好了体验用的玉兆。
E: If you're ready to make a decision now, darling, I've got a test unit set up here too.

C: 哈哈哈哈，客人这么说就见外了。我一向出言谨慎，审词琢句。
E: Hahaha, surely, you jest. I'm known for my caution, and weigh my words with great care.

C: 既然是客人要求，那我就讲一段「饮月君」的故事。
E: If the customer wishes for it, then allow me to regale you with a tale from the Imbibitor Lunae.

C: 好家伙！云吟法术。
E: My goodness! Cloudcry magic.

C: 「若是我占得上风，请云骑将军赏我个一官半职！」一位银发将军坐在台下，笑眯眯地看见这擂官，懒洋洋地说着「无妨」。
E: "If I were proven to be the better, may the Cloud Knight General confer unto me an official title!" A silver-haired general seating beneath the ring smiled as he looked at this ringmaster, lazily proclaiming "That can be arranged."

C: 饮茶都有些什么讲究啊？
E: What are the rules in tea appreciation?

C: 你去过很多地方吗？
E: Have you been to many places?

C: 要是我像其他仙舟人一样，要面对几百年的孤独和重复…我不敢想象，我这样的性格肯定是受不了的。
E: If I had to face centuries of loneliness and repetition just like everyone else aboard Xianzhou... well, I can't imagine someone like me lasting very long like that.

C: 所以我就远程启动了当初带来的两个金人。那地方也没处维修金人，我搬到镇上以后就一直存在老周家的仓库里，舍不得用。
E: So, I remotely activated the two aurumatons I originally brought here with me. There was nowhere to maintain them, so I just kept them in Old Zhou's storehouse after I moved into town. They were too valuable.

C: 我想，这或许就是筋肉命途对我的束缚。
E: I suppose this is the inevitable destiny of those bound to the Path of Brawn.

C: 感觉仙舟上处处都藏着绝世高手，但却都装作自己平平无奇，真是个有趣的现象。
E: It feels like there are secret masters hidden throughout Xianzhou, each pretending to be super-normal. What a fascinating phenomenon.

C: 从那以后，山君就再也不出来作祟了，大家也过上了一段时间的安生日子。
E: The Mountain Lord never came out to make trouble again, and everyone lived happily for a while.

C: 如果您需要运送的物品特别敏感或者特别重要，我们通常不建议您使用物流机器人，我们这里建议您寻找一个镖局——带有武装押运的物流企业。
E: We usually recommend that you avoid using robots if you're sending anything fragile or important. Instead, we recommend that you hire an armed escort service.

C: 我一看你就是！我有个事想和你打听一下……
E: I knew it! I have something to ask you...

C: 那可真好啊！常听仙舟人说，这就叫「海内存知己，天涯若比邻」吧。
E: Wonderful! I always hear the Xianzhou natives say "even across the heavens, the like-minded cross paths." This must be it.

C: 你看着我干什么，在天舶司就不能说仙舟不好吗？我偏要说。
E: What are you looking at me for? I'll criticize Xianzhou if I want, even if I do happen to work for the Sky-Faring Commission.

C: 你…你能不能打我一下？
E: C—Can you hit me?

C: 其实我也一直很支持彦卿。
E: Actually, I have always been supportive of Yanqing.

C: …你怎么来了？
E: ...What are you doing here?

C: 你傻啊！不是让你真来后门…
E: Idiot! He doesn't mean a literal door in the back alley...

C: 你放心，我不是那种胡搅蛮缠的低端乞丐。我向你保证，情绪价值都有明码标价。
E: Don't worry, I'm not one of those pesky low-class beggars. You have my personal guarantee that all emotional values are clearly marked.

C: 什么加密通话？
E: Is this a secret code or something?

C: 一直以来这事咱们就自己心里知道，谢谢你，愿意来了解我们的工作。
E: That's something we all know, but don't mention. Thank you for taking the time to understand our work.

C: 我有两箱药材要从仙舟运出。
E: I have two boxes of meds to be shipped out of Xianzhou.

C: 你再不开走我就贴条了！
E: If you don't get lost, I'll give you a ticket!

C: 《论碳基生命的仪式性战斗》…
E: Ritualistic Battles of Carbon-Based Lifeforms: A Study...

C: 可以，得练上个几十年吧…
E: Yes, but it requires decades of training...

C: 我爸爸已经订好了票…
E: Daddy has already reserved tickets!

C: 就算我什么也不做，就是站在面前，他们的膝盖和屁股也要隐隐幻痛呢。
E: Even if I do nothing but stand before them, they'll feel a twinge in their knees and behinds.

C: {NICKNAME}，最近过得还好吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, how have you been?

C: …呜呜。
E: ...Wooo.

C: 这是岁阳能发出来的声音？
E: Is that a sound that heliobi can make?

C: 你是资本主义岁阳？
E: Are you a capitalistic heliobus?

C: 您肯定无论到哪里都能结识许多朋友吧。
E: I have faith that you will make many friends wherever you go.

C: 如果再给他几年，说不定会出落成一个帅小伙…噢不是，我是说他会成为一名顶尖的剑术高手～啊～希望那时他还能想起我，找我试试剑……
E: Give him another few years, and he'll be a total showstopper... I mean, a stunningly exceptional swordsman! Oooh, I hope he will still remember me then, and hit me up to try out his piercing sword moves...

C: 别想劝我啊，我也有自己的坚持的。除此之外，你想问些什么？
E: Don't try to dissuade me, I've got my own principles too. Aside from what we just spoke about, What else do you want to ask?

C: 没关系，想要击败新人的话，请随时来问我心得。
E: It's fine. You want to lay the hurt on any newbies, come to me for advice anytime.

C: 唔…保证作息稳定和膳食平衡，多做些体育锻炼？妾身能给出的建议也就是这些了，换句话说，你若身体无恙，这也是最合理的建议了。
E: Umm... Ensure a stable balance of work and rest, make sure to eat properly and train regularly? This is really all the advice I can offer you. In other words, if you are in good health, this is the most logical suggestion.

C: 将军体验卡，你会怀念吗？
E: Do you miss your General trial-period privileges?

C: 和丰饶孽物打？饶了我吧！
E: Fighting Abominations of Abundance? Spare me!

C: 要打就快打。
E: If you wanna play, then play.

C: 二十卖吗？
E: Can I have it for twenty?

C: 作为造物来说…很雄伟…
E: As a divine creation, it's magnificent...

C: …不是…我就是想这么说一次，体会一下当老板的快乐……
E: ...Nope... I just wanted to say it once, and feel the joy of being someone's boss...

C: 所有人都惊叹波月古海…
E: Everyone was amazed...

C: 又好吃，又美味。花钱不多挺实惠。
E: They are delicious, and they don't cost you much.

C: 我想过了，我实在不能为了钱，就这么把我家几代人的珍贵回忆卖出去！起码…起码得让「公司」把赔偿金额翻两倍。
E: I've thought it through. I can't make myself sell the precious memory of my family just for money! Unless... IPC doubles the compensation.

C: 请问…我的云骑军朋友不在了，我应该做些什么事情吗？
E: May I know... what I can do for my deceased Cloud Knight friend?

C: 是你啊，曾和雅辛忒丝一同重登天空的人子，幸能再会。
E: Ah, it's you. The child of humanity who ascended to the skies alongside Hyacinthia. It is a pleasure to meet you again.

C: 材料还蛮多的，也送我一枚吧。
E: You've got plenty of materials there, toss one my way too.

C: 就算有差别也无妨，我们都没有活在过去嘛。
E: It's fine even if there are differences. We don't live in the past.

C: 前世，我的父亲在谋害母亲前曾说：「我与歌耳戈是在血尘弥漫的角斗中相识相爱…那么，便也让我在角斗中，亲手与她作别吧。」
E: In my past life, before father murdered mother, he said: "Gorgo and I met and fell in love in the blood and dust of battle... So, allow me to bid her farewell personally in battle once more."

C: 咦，也、也有我们的份吗？谢谢奶奶！
E: Huh, there's... there's some for us too? Thank you, grandma!

C: 旅程才刚结束，几位老师就忙不迭地送我去昏光庭院诊断了。缇宝老师担心火种会对身体产生影响，那刻夏老师…可能只是纯粹感兴趣。
E: As soon as the journey ended, they rushed me to the Twilight Courtyard for a diagnosis. Lady Tribbie was worried about the Coreflame's effects on my body, while Professor Anaxa... was probably just purely curious.

C: 哈哈，但那位护卫「开拓」的朋友，却是个稳重内敛的人。也许就像从前的你和我，不，他们比起你和我…嗯…要更心意相通些。
E: Haha, but that friend who defends the Trailblaze is quite the reserved and composed one. Perhaps like how you and I used to be... No, they're actually... hmm... more in sync with each other than we ever were.

C: 呀！原来大地兽会说话，不对，以万灵之祖的身份，不会说话才奇怪。
E: Ah! So dromases can speak!? Wait, no, as the ancestor of all souls, it'd be stranger if it couldn't speak.

C: 我说这就不是你。
E: I say that this cannot be you.

C: 是我的错觉么？
E: Was I imagining things?

C: 刚刚熟悉的室友…
E: A roommate that I just got to know...

C: 这就叫冒犯的艺术。
E: That's why it's the art of offending others.

C: 这么神奇？那练你们这个拳能长高么？
E: Really? Can I grow taller by practicing your martial arts?

C: 倒也没差…
E: True...

C: 我腿都站麻了。
E: My leg is going numb.

C: 我是～易燃易爆的香炉！
E: I am~ A highly explosive incense holder!

C: 星历<unbreak>7901</unbreak>年
E: Star Calendar Year <unbreak>7901</unbreak>

C: 赶得早不如赶得巧，要不趁现在想象一下如何？
E: Well, since you're here already, why not take the opportunity to imagine how things will play out?

C: 没有！
E: There's no reward!

C: 你被吓了一跳，难熬的心痒瞬间烟消云散。无论里面原本装着什么，它都再也动弹不得了。咱们还是别打开它比较好。
E: Horrified, your heightened curiosity dissipates all at once. No matter what's inside, it's best that you stay away from the package. No one should ever open it.

C: 精美的纸鸢，最早被用于纪念天舶司阵亡的飞行士。如今，仙舟人已将这种慎终追远的仪式情怀融入到平凡的日常生活中。
E: Kites were first used to commemorate the fallen pilots of the Sky-Faring Commission. Now, the Xianzhou natives have incorporated the remembrance of the heroes in the past into their daily lives.

C: 前些天我不想扫兴，但是我得批评一下咱们的竞锋舰的管理水平了。浮梯里张贴低俗露骨的游戏广告，来看比赛的有这么多孩子，在浮梯里不得尴尬死？
E: I didn't want to dampen the mood the other day, but I really have to lodge a complaint about the management quality of our Skysplitter. Such a crass game ad plastered in the levitator, and so many kids watch the match. I'd die of embarrassment in the levitator!

C: 武功无坚不破，唯快不破。
E: Martial arts are indomitable, except when faced against speed.

C: 往后这就是我的人生格言了！
E: From now on, this will be my life motto!

C: 一拳差点没把我送走。
E: A single punch almost sent me to the afterlife.

C: 主要是，我是下场的选手…
E: The main thing is, I'm the competitor for the next match...

C: 希望卢卡能顺利复活。
E: Hope Luka can make it through the resurrection match.

C: 这是玩「帝垣琼玉」用的牌桌。据说某位年轻卜者经常造访此处，但最近频率有所下降——仙舟科技在发展，她现在用玉兆也能打牌了。
E: This is the table used to play Celestial Jade. A certain young diviner is said to be a regular visitor of this place, but her visits have become less frequent lately. Following the technological advancement on Xianzhou, she can now play the game using a jade abacus.

C: 联盟最强的牌手大多来自虚陵——他们将意识上传金人，几乎不与活物打交道。因此，他们会在脑内与自己斗牌，既砥砺了牌技，又排遣了寂寞。
E: Most of the top players of the alliance come from the Xuling. They transfer their consciousness to aurumatons and hardly interact with living creatures. With that, they can play against themselves in their minds to hone their skills and kill time.

C: 或许可以将已具雏形的星槎种子称作「星槎幼苗」？不，星槎种子并不是真的种子，它不可能长成幼苗。
E: Can we call a starskiff seed in the embryonic phase a starskiff seedling? We can't. As a starskiff seed isn't a real seed, it can't possibly grow into a seedling.

C: 星槎种子演化出了船身、龙骨、甚至船蓬——生物材料根据功能需要，演变成不同的结构。工人们通常将这一阶段称作「育成阶段」。
E: A hull, a keel, and even a canopy have evolved from the starskiff seed, as the biological materials will grow into different structural parts according to the needs. The workers refer to this phase as the "nutritive phase."

C: 这台金人正在享受它难得的美梦，还是不要去打扰它了。
E: Let's not wake the aurumaton up from its nice dream.

C: 「许多被反物质军团所消灭的文明物种，最后都会以某种扭曲的形态重新出现在军团中，例如践踏者或虚卒。」
E: "Many species that have been eliminated by the Antimatter Legion will end up in the legion in some distorted form, such as the Tramplers and the Voidrangers."

C: 「公司在星际争端方面抱持极端谨慎的中立态度，同盟关系仅存在贸易与信息交换可能，无法在战争层面期望其援助。」
E: "IPC adopts a cautious and neutral stance in interstellar disputes. As the corporation only trades and exchanges information related to business with its allies, gaining its support in war is out of the question."

C: …你还好吗？
E: ...Are you okay?

C: 要不去吃点别的…
E: Let's go eat something else...

C: 不错的决定。过分的好奇心通常会将你置于危险的境地，你很明白这点。
E: A good decision. Excess curiosity often places you in dangerous situations — as you well know.

C: 接下来是成摞的画册。从书页卷角的状态可知，主人或许曾无数次在灯下翻阅，不忍释卷。其中的内容不必翻开也能让你羞的满面赤红。
E: Next up, there's a stacked photo album. Judging by the worn edges, the owner must have spent countless hours poring over these by candlelight, unable to turn away. The content of the images is enough to turn you red as a beetroot.

C: 「米糕没幻戏社的各位：我有一个绝妙的技术点子，现打算作价二十万信用点卖给各位。它的代价和它的市场前景相比，划算到不可思议！」
E: "Dear Mellow-Golden-Mayor Immersia Club: I have a wonderful piece of tech that I'd like to sell to you all for the sum of <unbreak>200,000</unbreak> credits. Compared to its market potential, this price is an absolute bargain!"

C: 你拨开箱盖，把手伸了进去，掏出一大蓬稿纸。字迹娟秀可人，犹如端丽仕女行于纸上。
E: You lift the lid, reach into the package, and take out a large pile of manuscripts. The handwriting is pretty, as though a beautiful lady were dancing on the page.

C: 你轻轻碰上持明卵的外壳，一阵可称心碎的感觉传遍你的全身。他抗拒着你的接触。卵中的持明不愿抛下这些回忆，不愿相信自己尊崇的主人犯下了叛乱大罪。
E: You touch the shell of the Vidyadhara egg lightly and experience a heartbreaking sensation. Resistant to your touch, the Vidyadhara in the egg is reluctant to leave his memory behind and refuses to believe that his highly respected master has committed the grave sin of rebellion.

C: 「那这道菜好吃吗？」你急切地想知道答案，但等了很久也不再有声音响起。你愣了愣，看了看眼前的持明卵，你忽然明白了什么。
E: "Does this dish taste good?" You are eager to know the answer, but the voice does not come after a long wait. Feeling confused, you check the Vidyadhara egg in front of you and suddenly feel enlightened.

C: 「天不生无用之人，地不造无用之物。」小小陈机铺，就是想给人心和旧物的一点自留地。
E: "Nothing is truly worthless in the world." This little store, Oldies Depot, is a place reserved for old things and weary hearts.

C: 对仙舟人来说，没什么器物能与他们同寿。因此所谓古董，在他们眼中也不过是些旧物罢了。
E: No physical item can match the Xianzhou people's lifespan. Therefore, these so-called "antiques" are nothing more than old junk for them.

C: 如果需要机巧鸟温柔地将货箱放在对应的取货架上，你得额外支付一笔存物费，不然你就只能在满地一模一样的箱子中寻找属于你的快递。
E: If you want the cycrane to gently place your parcel on the corresponding shelf, you will have to pay an extra storage fee. Otherwise, you will have to search on the floor for your package in an ocean of others that look exactly the same.

C: 但你也可以*随时*回到这里，再来审视一番——毕竟其他人应该是不会动它的！
E: However, you can come back here *any time* and investigate this again. It's not like anyone else will be touching it!

C: 你凑近一看，才发现这三个破旧的箱子并非快递。箱子上赫然写着「信仰质量理论实验用具」几个大字。
E: As you approach, you realize that these old boxes are not actually courier parcels. There is a note on them that reads: "Items for the faith mass theory experiment" in large letters.

C: 为什么要把几个空箱子摆在路边呢？你试着拎起其中一个箱子，却发现他们竟是链接在一起的。
E: Why would someone leave empty boxes on the road? You try picking one of them up, and are surprised to find that they are linked together.

C: 你试图推开戏台后门，但某种思维惯性掐灭了这刚萌发的念想，你想起品行高尚的人只走正门。
E: You try to push open the backstage door, but some kind of ingrained thought extinguishes this budding idea. You remember that a person of a noble character only enters through the front door.

C: 你注视着这块墓碑，碑文上记录着墓主人此生的信条：「谦卑、仁爱、忍耐、节约、勤劳——」
E: You gaze at the tombstone, where the inscription records the life creed of the deceased: "Humility, Charity, Patience, Frugality, Diligence—"

C: 你静静地注视着眼前的墓碑，认真阅读着墓碑上篆刻的字迹：
E: You silently study the tombstone before you as you solemnly read the inscription carved on it:

C: 怎么会这样…我的美梦，我的美梦还没结束！你赔！
E: How could this happen... My dream, my dream is not complete! You have to pay!

C: 走开…别多管闲事！
E: Get lost... This is none of your business!

C: 反正这间房里有那么多气球，没人会介意分你一个的，对吧？
E: There are countless balloons in this room, after all. Who would begrudge you taking one for yourself, right?

C: 你确定还要在这枯燥无味的现实里浪费时间，而不是及早投身美梦中的狂欢？
E: Are you sure you want to continue wasting time in this dry and flavorless reality? Why not cast yourself into the carnival within a beautiful dream?

C: 等回过神来时，你整个人都已经包裹在了糖色的情绪之中，带着些许回甘。
E: When you return to your senses, you've been enveloped in a sugary mood, with a lingering sweet aftertaste.

C: 移开视线。
E: Avert your gaze.

C: 音乐，欢笑，咖啡的清香，杯盏轻碰的脆响…哪怕不曾亲眼所见，你也能猜出门后的景象是多么有格调。
E: Music, laughter, the aroma of coffee, and the crisp clinking of cups... Even if not seen by your own eyes, it is not difficult to imagine the elegant scene behind the doors.

C: 所有城市都需要一座酒店来见证历史，「黄金的时刻」也不例外。
E: All cities need a hotel to witness history, and the Golden Hour is no exception.

C: 当你靠近这扇门时，一段旋律突然从门后传来……
E: As you near this door, a melody can suddenly be heard from behind it...

C: 柔软的沙发。上面可能承载过某些柔软的记忆。
E: A very soft sofa. Many soft memories may have been borne on it.

C: 无法开启的电视机。漆黑屏幕仿佛濒死者涣散的眼睛，空洞地映出四周明艳的色彩与光影。
E: A television set that can't be turned on. The pitch-black screen resembles the glazed eyes of a dying person, hollowly reflecting the splendid colors and light around it.

C: 水幕如帘，波光映亮了墙壁。鲸群自远方巡游，像是要冲入头顶的另一片天地。
E: A cascading curtain, where a glistening light of waves illuminates the walls. A pod of whales is swimming in the distance, as if trying to break through the ceiling of the sky.

C: 这架望远镜内播放着苏乐达的系列广告，而且不断循环，似乎永无休止。
E: The telescope displays an endless loop of SoulGlad commercials.

C: 你与那女孩创造的回忆已经不胜枚举。无论快乐与否，它们都会像吃进肚里的橡木蛋糕卷一样，变成你身体的一部分。
E: The memories you created with that girl are too many to count. Whether they were happy or otherwise, they will become a part of you, like an Oak Cake Roll eaten and ending up in your belly.

C: 破碎的梦境失了惯常的引力，就连循规蹈矩的行李都开始变得放荡不羁。
E: The fragmented dream has lost its usual allure, and even the orderly baggage has begun to stray awry.

C: 猎犬立于老人身侧，高昂着头颅，仿若昨日重现。
E: The Hound stands by the side of the old man, its head held high as if basked in its former glory.

C: 平静…在梦境里是极难达到的心境。
E: It's extremely hard to achieve a peaceful state of mind in the Dreamscape.

C: 摆弄情绪是一项精细的技能，一如高超的钟表工艺。它的过程往往也伴随着很大的风险——为了你的个人的利益着想，我希望你已经充分理解了这一点……
E: Manipulating emotions is a delicate skill, much like the art of watchmaking. The process often comes with great risks. For your own sake, I hope you've fully grasped this concept...

C: 我是橡木家系的派诺！我以我的姓氏为荣！
E: I am Paino of the Oak Family! I wear my family's name with pride!

C: 我其实是一名调查记者。之所以来到匹诺康尼，是因为我想揭穿藏在美梦表象之下的阴谋。
E: I am an investigative reporter. My presence on Penacony is to reveal the conspiracy behind this facade of splendor.

C: 让做梦的人看清楚，这繁华背后究竟有多不堪！
E: I'll show those Dreamweavers the ugly truth behind all this wealth!

C: 到底是什么地方…突破口在哪…星期日？那个人绝对有问题，但行事严密，抓不出破绽…知更鸟？那只小鸟知道些什么，可她同样不好对付……
E: Where could it be... What am I missing... Sunday? Something's definitely off with that person, but all his business is watertight, and I can't find any issues... Robin? What does that little bird know? And she's not a trifle to handle either...

C: 要不是家里还有个不省心的哥哥和大堆产业要打理，我真想现在就请求和您一起去旅行。
E: If I didn't have a worry-wart brother and a ton of business to attend to, I would really like to ask you to take me with you.

C: 无论是这座空间站还是它的主人，我都早已久闻大名，只是一直尚未找到机会前去探访一番。
E: Be it this space station or its master, I've long heard about their fame. I just haven't found a chance to pay a visit.

C: 讲讲雅利洛-VI的事。
E: Talk about Jarilo-VI.

C: 你说起巡猎与丰饶的宿怨，说起星核祸种、建木生发，说起绝灭大君的野心与诡诈。
E: You talk about the feud between The Hunt and Abundance, about the Stellaron seeding ruin through the ship, the Ambrosial Arbor's growth, the ambition and treachery of the Lord Ravager.

C: 这就是体系化的歧视！我前天过马路时差点被球笼给撞了，结果那个司机却说我身高太矮，后视镜里看不到——这说明什么？这种歧视已经严重威胁到了全体皮皮西的生命安全！
E: This is systemic discrimination! I was almost hit by a spheroid while crossing the road a couple of days ago, but the driver somehow told me I was too short to be seen in the rearview mirror — what does that mean? This kind of discrimination gravely threatens the health and safety of the Pepeshi people!

C: 好吧，看来这位，呃……「动物爱好者」并不介意被当作动物对待。
E: Fine. Look at this, er... the "animal enthusiast" doesn't mind being treated like an animal, after all.

C: 你为什么要唱广告词？
E: Why are you singing the advertising jingle?

C: 「斑斓的夜，依偎在梦的陲边；驻足房顶，等候着奇迹浮现…」
E: "A gorgeous night sky, nestled on a dream and a prayer; standing atop the roof, waiting for miracles to appear..."

C: 明明它只需要把钱从观众口袋里掏出来就行了。多简单的事啊，从来没做好过！
E: All it needs to do is pick the money from the audiences' pockets. It only has one job, and it can't do it!

C: 你训练手套…去偷钱？
E: Did you train the glove... to steal?

C: 一个人类的父亲…怎么会是台老旧的机械呢？
E: How can the father of a human... be an old machine?

C: 但也有很多人，其中还不乏一些评论家，把「缺陷」视作美的一部分——我感激他们的赏识。但我笔下的作品到底表达了什么，映射了什么，我不指望他人真正理解。
E: But there are also many people, including some critics, who view "flaws" as beauty — I'm grateful for their appreciation. But what are my works trying to express? What are they portraying? I don't expect anyone to genuinely understand them.

C: 圆台之上，有人指挥着无人演奏的乐器演奏着。
E: Someone is directing the performance of musicianless instruments onstage.

C: 等等…你…你该不会打算拐走麦克斯吧？想都别想！
E: Wait... You... You're not planning to take Max away, are you? Don't even think about it!

C: 而麦克斯先生…他在自我塑造的过程中，始终保持着一种忘我的纯粹，这令我们感到非常*舒适*。
