E: I never expected the Corporation to know anything about Aether copying tech! I thought that was something only Punklordian hackers could handle.

C: 是啊，我也想问——他们怎么会来威胁一个小孩子？
E: I was wondering the same thing. Why would they pick on someone half their size?

C: 还记得我刚才说的吗？前往各地的<color=#dbc291ff>「决胜乐园」</color>提升<color=#dbc291ff>「决胜者评级」</color>，完成每个决胜乐园的<color=#dbc291ff>「试炼」</color>，取得所有<color=#dbc291ff>「资格徽章」</color>，你们就可以报名参加庆典压轴赛事——锦标赛了。
E: To participate in the tournament championship, make your way to the various <color=#dbc291ff>"Victory Zones"</color> and increase your <color=#dbc291ff>"Victory Rating."</color> Complete the <color=#dbc291ff>"Trials"</color> in each Victory Zone to earn all of the <color=#dbc291ff>"Mastery Marks."</color>

C: 嘿，{NICKNAME}！要开始今天的行程咯，你准备好了吗？
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}! You all set to start today's journey?

C: 不对啦！这都什么跟什么啊……
E: What!? What's that got to do with anything!?

C: 喔…所以那位「高手玩家」究竟是谁呢？
E: So, who exactly is this elite player?

C: 不能再玩了，必须得去巡逻了……
E: I can't play anymore, I have to go on patrol...

C: 来进行「超链接对决」吧！
E: Let's have a "Hyperlink Match"!

C: 喂喂喂，你不会是害怕了吧？准备好了一定要跟我较量一下，一定哦！
E: Hey, hey! You're not scared, are you? When you're ready, you have to battle me. You have to!

C: 既然你这么热情，我也一定会使出同为「冠军首席」的全力的！
E: As you are so passionate, I will make sure to use all my power as a fellow "Champion"!

C: 一切回合制游戏的本质都是数值游戏——好好看着吧，我的计算绝对是完美的！
E: The essence of turn-based games lies in the numbers, so you'd better get ready to witness the precision of my calculations!

C: 看来对方也做好准备了——{NICKNAME}、次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神，我们上吧！
E: Looks like he's ready for us. {NICKNAME}, Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord! Let's roll!

C: 真是痛快！照你们这势头，拿下冠军首席的称号也是分分钟的事吧？
E: At this rate you'll have championship title in no time!

C: 哈哈哈，难道你也感受到了吗？——来自那位大人的注视。
E: Haha, perhaps you sense it, too? The watchful eyes of an eminent figure.

C: 结束？不不不，这场庆典最精彩的部分才要刚刚开始呢！
E: Over? No, no! The best part has yet to begin!

C: 开心…这大概就是这场庆典的意义了。
E: Haha, that's the whole point of a festival, right?

C: 那还等什么呢，咱们赶紧行动起来，找到目击者打听打听？
E: Okay, so what are we waiting for? Let's get moving and see if we can find some witnesses.

C: 将军日理万机，十王司本不该拿岁阳的事情来打扰您。但任由那些妖物到处徘徊，恐怕……
E: General, we know you have important matters to attend to, and the Ten-Lords Commission shouldn't be bothering you with something as trivial as the heliobi... but if we allow those creatures to roam freely, I'm afraid...

C: 该出您这个奇兵了！
E: Masterstroke them! Please?

C: …只要打败这区区四个卒子？
E: ...So I only need to beat your pawns here?

C: 你试着撞开这扇门，但门却像焊死了一样纹丝不动。
E: You try to ram the door open but it won't budge.

C: 嗯？还有什么事吗？
E: Huh? What is it?

C: 嗯…这个标题不错，各位觉得呢？那就这么决定了。
E: Hmmm... I say that's a good title. What does everyone think? Alrighty then, it's decided.

C: 投降？我为什么要投降？在你眼中，我只是扣住了这个冥差作为残子，徒劳地负隅顽抗。
E: Surrender? Why would I do that? To you, I may as well be fighting an unwinnable battle — wasting my time away in someone else's body...

C: 哦对，你好像也被岁阳附身过来着？那滋味应该不太好受吧？
E: Oh, that's right, you were possessed by a heliobus once before — guess it wasn't a pleasant experience, was it?

C: 附身时间太短，不过瘾。
E: It was too short — I want to try it again.

C: 好哇，那还等什么呢，开跑！
E: Wow! Then what are we waiting for? Let's go!

C: 不过，今天玩的很开心，下次再约吧！
E: ...but we still had lots of fun — let's play again next time!

C: 一个临时的想法来了，你应该<color=#dbc291ff>关上这扇门</color>试试。
E: An idea pops up: You should try <color=#dbc291ff>closing this door</color>.

C: 我来吧。
E: I'll do it.

C: 青雀！又是你，是你把这些外人带进司部的吗？你把我平日里所立的规矩都当作耳旁风了吗？
E: Qingque! I have grown weary of your insubordination! Are you the one who brought these outsiders into the Commission? Have you turned a deaf ear to all the rules I've laid down?

C: 是啊，符玄大人只是受害者，千万不必自责了。
E: That's right — you were just a victim of the heliobus's trickery, Diviner Fu — no need to blame yourself.

C: {NICKNAME}，离我近、近一点好吗？我、我有点害怕……
E: {NICKNAME}, s—stay close to me, okay? I'm... I'm a little scared...

C: 唔，谢谢你，桂小姐。你这样夸我，我、我真的很不好意思。如果没有你们的帮助鼓励……
E: I... Thank you, Miss Gui. I... I don't really get compliments. Without the encouragement of you squad members...

C: 这是彦卿小哥的佩剑，我在云骑演武时曾见过他挥舞过。
E: It's Yanqing's sword — I saw him wield it one time when I was doing drills with the Cloud Knights.

C: 但她替咱们挡住彦卿时，背影真的好迷人。
E: Still, that was pretty freaking cool...

C: 嗯，我明白。但在离开前，我有问题要问从旁偷听的浮烟，这位「熔炬」想必你认识吧？
E: I can understand your sense of urgency. But before I leave, I have a question for Cirrus, who has been listening this whole time — I trust you are familiar with Apyra...

C: 我的弟子。
E: My apprentice.

C: 素裳小姐，你……！
E: Miss Sushang, you—

C: 没想到…没想到，我竟然能撑到现在。我…我没自己想象的这么菜嘛。
E: I didn't think... I didn't think I would last this long. I... I'm not half as bad as I thought.

C: 其实，我也不知道现在的我能不能帮上各位的忙……
E: Actually, I'm not sure if I can be helpful anymore...

C: 我说，咱们也算是老同事了，放心交给本大爷吧！
E: Of course! We're pretty much co-workers at this point!

C: 难怪它喜欢以「棋子」喻人、以「棋局」喻势…一时疏忽竟然被它逼到了角落。
E: No wonder they like to use analogies such as "pawns" and "chess" to describe people. One momentary lapse of concentration, and suddenly we find ourselves backed into a corner.

C: 群山会塌陷，大海会干涸，岁阳会等着，等着重获自由的那一天再度到来。那一天也终将到来。
E: Mountains will crumble, oceans will evaporate, but the heliobi will always be there, patiently waiting for their day of freedom... and that day will come.

C: 这人满脑子都是涨粉。
E: Always on the hunt for more followers...
Ha!?

C: 你是小桂子派过来的对吧？我还以为能见到她本人呢。
E: Little Gui sent you, right? I thought I'd be meeting up with her in person.

C: 你是自愿受骗的？
E: So you were voluntarily deceived?

C: 最近这些欢乐的日子无非是我们之间心照不宣的过家家罢了……
E: These happy days we've been spending together have been nothing more than a tacit game of playing house...

C: 文远，我能感受到你那源源不断的情绪与力量，放心，我会尽我的全力……
E: Wenyuan, I can feel your infinite capacity for emotion and strength. Don't worry. I will do everything I can...

C: 对不起，这是十王司的规矩。
E: I'm sorry. These are the rules of the Ten-Lords Commission.

C: 我们…这样做，真的好吗？要不，现在回绥园和桂乃芬她们再商量一下吧……
E: Are we... Is this for the best? How about we go back to Fyxestroll Garden and talk things over with Guinaifen first...

C: 是啊，太卜大人，你要是怀疑太卜司里还有没清除的岁阳，可以直接联系我们呀。
E: That's right, master diviner. If you suspect there are still heliobi that have not been cleared out from the Divination Commission, you can just contact us directly.

C: 太卜似乎也不打算追究你…
E: Looks like the master diviner isn't going to press you on this...

C: 客人们，青总就在那边为员工赋能。我先行告退了。
E: Guests, President Qing is just over there inspiring her employees. I shall take my leave.

C: 幻觉？你是说我一手建立的事业全都是在做梦吗？这怎么可能，这些年奋斗的艰辛，成功的喜悦，怎么会是假的呢？
E: An illusion? You're saying that my self-made career is just a dream? How could that be? How could these years of struggle and hard work and the joy of my successes all be fake?

C: 沉重的石砖。似乎刻印着什么文字，但难以阅读。要是能用<color=#dbc291ff>拓片纸</color>将它拓下来就能阅读了吧？
E: A heavy stone. It looks like it is engraved with some kind of script, but it is hard to make out. Maybe if you could use <color=#dbc291ff>rubbing paper</color>, you may be able to copy the inscription and read it?

C: 等等，不如让我来考考你，这房产证上的户主到底写的是谁吧？
E: Wait, how about we test you a little about who exactly is the owner of the household written on this deed?

C: 我在旁边守着，免得它反扑。
E: I'll stand guard and make sure it doesn't attack.

C: 这个问题倒是好办。只要你们将我从她身体里放出来…我一定帮她完成心愿。
E: This is a problem that's easily taken care of. If you just let me out of her body... I'll definitely help grant her wish.

C: 你们连忙赶到了三月七身边。
E: You rush to March 7th's side.

C: 不应该吧，只是{NICKNAME}在开玩笑而已。
E: It shouldn't be. I believe {NICKNAME} was only kidding.

C: 发生甚么事了？
E: What happened?

C: 全体目光向我看齐，宣布个事——
E: If everyone could please turn their eyes toward me, I've an announcement to make:

C: 这不是那个大主播吗？
E: Hey, isn't that the famous vlogger?

C: 噢，多半是你家的护理秘方吧，那我还是不问了。
E: Oh, it's probably your family's secret fur-care routine. I won't ask any more questions.

C: …桂、桂乃芬小姐，绥园还是很危险，这么多人、危、险……
E: ...M—Miss Guinaifen, Fyxestroll Garden is a really dangerous place, especially with so... many... people...

C: 反正就算是白跑一趟也在我意料之中，我们也不必灰心，现在还早，回去休息休息也来得及。
E: In any case, it's well worth considering that this could even be a waste of a trip. We shouldn't lose heart, because it's still early — and there's still time to go back and take a rest.

C: 不，这不是「倒霉」，依我看，这是有人在背后捣乱。
E: No, it's not "bad luck." In my estimation, this is someone causing trouble behind the scenes.

C: 谢谢。
E: Thank you.

C: 尊敬的特邀测试员，您参与的「未知生命体嗅觉诱导的感知与幻觉专项测试」尚未完成，休眠舱连接畅通。
E: Dear Special Test Candidate: Your [Unknown Lifeform Smell-Induced Perceptions and Hallucinations Special Test] has not been completed. Cryosleep pod connection is still linked.

C: 你好，我是照料阮•梅女士造物的保姆机器人，很高兴为你服务。
E: Hello! I am the Helper Robot who looks after Madam Ruan Mei's creations. It is a pleasure to serve.

C: 但既然你如此好奇，那听听这个故事吧……
E: But seeing as you're so curious, then why don't you give this story a listen...

C: 喂，给我……
E: Hey, bring me...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>底层的黑色</color>，代表激烈残酷的战场；<color=#dbc291ff>表层的白色</color>，代表无路可退的绝望；而<color=#dbc291ff>中间的蓝色</color>，则是您沉着冷静的意志。
E: The <color=#dbc291ff>black</color> layer at the base signifies a fierce and savage battlefield. The <color=#dbc291ff>white</color> layer at the top denotes despair. And the <color=#dbc291ff>blue</color> layer in the middle represents your composure and unyielding resolve.

C: 人家还没说要玩「真心话」呢。要回答也不是不行啦，人家最喜欢的对象是…是……
E: Hey, I haven't said I choose "Truth" yet. But fine, I guess I can answer this question. My favorite... is... well... you know...

C: 看啊，如此敞亮的酒吧，竟容不下一位出色的调饮师，就像偌大的梦境酒店…也从没有我的立足之处。我那敏感又忧伤的灵魂，究竟该何去何从。
E: Behold, within this spacious lounge, a seasoned drinksmith finds no place to dwell, much like this grand hotel within the Dreamscape... where I struggle to find my niche. O, where shall my tender, melancholic soul find its abode?

C: 到退场的时候了。像你这样生活丰富而充实的人，肯定不会记得我的。
E: It's time to leave the stage. Surely someone with a life as fulfilling as yours won't even remember me.

C: 你很喜欢冰过的玻璃杯的触感，它能让你在接待某些客人时不至于过分暴躁。
E: You love the touch of a chilled glass. It can prevent you from being overly irate when dealing with certain customers.

C: 人家呢，偶然间得知了舒翁的秘密。
E: Actually, I stumbled upon Siobhan's secret by chance.

C: 不达目的绝不罢休！
E: I wouldn't give up until I got what I wanted!
Phew...

C: 都是很有趣的…朋友？
E: They're all pretty interesting... friends?

C: （看在它对我如此礼貌的份上，还是满足这个需求吧。）
E: (They've been so polite to me. I'll just fulfill this request.)

C: 哼。那你会记得其余怪物的喜好么？
E: Hmph, then do you remember what the other monsters like?

C: 你其实…没有发狂吧？
E: Actually, you... didn't go frenzied back then, right?

C: 把怪物的事透露出去可以吗？
E: Is it really okay to tell others about the monsters?

C: 说实话，会有一定的风险，家族始终希望能清理掉那些怪物。但我相信你的判断。
E: To be honest, this is a bit risky, as The Family always intend to wipe out those monsters. However, I have faith in your judgment.

C: 你知道吗，这世间所有的相遇都是纠缠，我们之间一定是有什么看不见的牵绊在的吧。哎，请给我杯<color=#dbc291ff>味道强烈，口感非常清爽的饮料，再放个动画里的角色上去</color>，谢谢。
E: Do you know that in this world, all encounters are simply entanglements? There must be some invisible bond between us. Hey, please give me <color=#dbc291ff>a strong-tasting yet refreshing drink. And add a cartoon character too</color>, thanks.

C: 先将杯子擦拭干净。
E: Wipe the glass clean first.

C: 汪！你是故意给我调错饮料的吧，但以为这样能让我生气，就大错特错了哇！
E: Woof! You made the wrong drink for me on purpose, didn't you? If you think that's going to rile me up, you can't be more wrong!

C: 呃…你别难过…
E: Uh... Come on. Cheer up...

C: 科<rhythm>员<rhythm>在<rhythm>贪<rhythm>玩
E: Researchers <rhythm>are <rhythm>just <rhythm>goofing <rhythm>around

C: 我<rhythm>非<rhythm>常<rhythm>生气
E: I <rhythm>am <rhythm>extremely <rhythm>upset

C: 汪  汪  汪
E: Woof  Woof  Woof

C: 准备开始正式拍摄吧！
E: Prepare to begin the photography proper!

C: 加入垃圾桶组合的示威，共同登上说唱之巅吧！
E: Join the trashcan group's demonstration and ascend to the pinnacle of rap together!

C: 现在是「校园说唱之巅」的困难难度。
E: This is the Hard difficulty for the Collegiate Zenith of Rapping.

C: 舒翁不太让咱们随便走远，但我偷偷给你讲，前天啊，我在那看到了好多人。
E: Siobhan doesn't let us go too far, but just between us, I saw lots of people over there a few days ago.

C: 翡翠小鸟
E: Jadebird

C: 怎么样，基本玩法都会了吗？会了就先去打一局练练手。
E: How's it going? Gotten the hang of it yet? If you're ready, you can try a practice match.

C: 这种游戏大概也就能忽悠忽悠那些轻度玩家了吧，比如和你同车那个小姑娘……
E: Games like this are only good for casuals... Like that girl who came here on the same train as you.

C: 我先回船上了…啧，羽毛都压皱了啾……
E: I'll go back to the airship first... Tsk, my feathers are all crumpled up, tweet...

C: 此外，已投放的样机将作为纪念品留在大厅里，本次测试结束后依旧可以使用哦。
E: In addition, the used prototypes will be kept in the hall as souvenirs, so you'll still be able to access them even after the end of this test.

C: 无论从贝洛伯格还是从公司的角度来讲，这份代言合同都是好事。
E: This endorsement benefits both Belobog and the IPC.

C: 我带来了赛场外的报纸，你们看！
E: I've brought a newspaper from the arena. Take a look!

C: 托帕小姐？你怎么来了？
E: Miss Topaz? What are you doing here?

C: 这样的玩笑……一点也不好笑！
E: Such jokes... are not funny at all!

C: 这样一来岂不是坐实了网上的流言？他们可是把我喷成公司豢养的狗了……
E: Wouldn't that just validate the online rumors? They've been smearing me as the IPC's lapdog...

C: 别问我「我该给你多少钱」这样伤人的问题。记得换上它，好好迎接你的下一场比赛。
E: Don't bring up anything about the prosthetic's cost. That'll hurt my feelings. Make sure you gear up and get ready for your next match.

C: 不用担心。咱们仙舟古武术兼容并包，海纳百川，就算给我一把爆能枪，我也能把它包装成仙舟古武术的兵击流派之一。
E: Don't worry. Xianzhou ancient martial arts are inclusive and comprehensive. Even if you handed me a blast gun, I could integrate it as one of the traditional martial styles of Xianzhou.

C: 且不论一个没长手的广告牌，怎么搬动这么重的货物。自己最近是中了什么奖？还是梦游的时候误刷了丹恒的信用卡？
E: And this is on top of how a handless billboard managed to carry such a heavy item... Did you win something recently? Or did you accidentally swipe Dan Heng's credit card when you were sleepwalking?

C: 对于「不可知域」的修复工作，黑塔女士表现出异常的热情，她自告奋勇地接入了模拟宇宙。
E: Madam Herta is displaying unusual excitement towards the reconstruction of the Unknowable Domain, and has volunteered to connect herself to the Simulated Universe.

C: 根据现有状况推断，最佳的解决方案是——找到一位有充足经验的测试员，从内部找到黑塔女士，将她带出来。
E: Based on the current situation, the most optimal solution is to identify an experienced tester, locate Madam Herta internally, and facilitate her extraction.

C: 等我们的好消息吧。
E: Wait for our good news.

C: 针对这次的外部入侵事件，有必要对模拟宇宙的防火墙进行相应的迭代处理。
E: This external intrusion has raised the need to make the necessary improvements to the Simulated Universe's firewall.

C: 二世为自己打造的衣冠冢…以这一发现作为前提，结论：编写反转反有机方程的程序，其可行性并不为0。
E: The cenotaph the second emperor made for himself... With this discovery as the premise... Conclusion: The probability of composing a program that reverses the Anti-Organic Equation program is greater than 0.

C: 不过这让我想出一个笑话——有人问一位无名客：「你的派对来了几名客人？」那位无名客失落地回答道：「无名。」
E: This brings to mind a joke. Someone asked a Nameless: How many names are on your guest list? The Nameless shrugged and said, none, they were all "Nameless."

C: 我只是一台调饮机器人，几个琥珀纪以来，致力于为各位无名客提供最优质的服务。
E: I'm merely a drinksmith robot who has been doing his best to provide impeccable service to the Nameless for several Amber Eras.

C: 三句话以内，谢谢。
E: Sure. No more than three sentences, please.

C: {NICKNAME}乘客，你准备好参与值日了吗？
E: Passenger {NICKNAME}, are you ready to start your shift?

C: 记得做足准备，我等你回来。
E: Of course, it's best to be well-prepared. I'll be waiting for you.

C: 居然又成功了…或许这里的防御并没有我想象中那么严密。
E: I can't believe you succeeded again... Perhaps this place isn't as well-defended as I had imagined.

C: 和其他房间一样，这里的大门也被封印了…不过还是有好消息的，看那边，<color=#dbc291ff>扎格列斯之手</color>。
E: The door here is sealed, just like all the other rooms... And yet, there's still a silver lining. Look over there. It's the <color=#dbc291ff>Hand of Zagreus</color>.

C: 昂扬向上的黄金年代并非永恒，进步与发展亦不是必然…曾经被众人视作救星的圣城，也终究难逃时间的侵蚀。
E: The optimistic and prosperous Golden Age cannot flourish endlessly, just as progress and advancement are never a guarantee... Even the holy city, once viewed by the masses as a beacon of hope, will also eventually succumb to the ravages of time.

C: 又没有外力干涉…该不会这么巧，它要在这时候孵化了吧？可别发生什么意外啊！
E: No one's near it... Is it hatching on its own? Right now? Hopefully nothing goes wrong!

C: 不，它只是在发出「呜嗡」的叫声——但你能听懂。联觉信标，很神奇吧？
E: No, it's just making "grumph" sounds. But you understand it perfectly. That's the Synesthesia Beacon for you. Amazing, right?

C: 呜嗡…（我想，睡一会…）
E: Grumph... (I'm... sleepy...)

C: 是呀，不要心急，或许是它太早从蛋里孵出来的缘故吧。
E: True, there's no hurry. It probably just hatched too early.

C: 不止那么简单哦，大地兽虽然不会言语，却拥有让其他生灵理解自己的能力。听说有的大地兽还会被人崇拜呢。
E: It goes deeper than that. Dromases can't speak, but they can get other beings to understand them. Some are even worshiped by people.

C: 呜嗡。（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，我的主食是土，不是果子…）
E: Grumph... ({F#Mama}{M#Papa}, I'm supposed to eat soil, not sweet talk...)

C: 老师你别吓着它。
E: Professor, you're scaring it.

C: 呜嗡。（有枪的老师，说什么都是对的。）
E: Grumph. (Teachers with guns are always right.)

C: 《小小一只大地兽》，全剧终！
E: The Tiny Little Dromas, The End!

C: 谁欺负你了吗？
E: Has anyone been picking on you?

C: 精妙！这手法，比我认识的欧洛尼斯祭司还要专业！简直叹为观止啊！
E: Brilliant! Such a technique even outclasses the Oronyx priests I know! Utterly breathtaking!

C: 你的嘴角勾起一抹笑容，直到<unbreak>2.19</unbreak>秒后，你的脚心命中了水池边的某样东西——那是一个椭圆形的白色固体。
E: A smile starts to form at the corner of your mouth. Exactly <unbreak>2.19</unbreak> seconds later, your foot bumps into something by the edge of the pool — a white, oval-shaped solid.

C: 呜嗡——！
E: Grumph—!

C: 既然都说到这份上——
E: Well, since you insist...

C: 巧克力啊这是！
E: It's chocolate!

C: 呜，呜？呜嗡。（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，我紧张吗？好像没有？算了，还是早点考完回家吃土吧。）
E: Grumph, Grumph? Grumph. ({F#Mama}{M#Papa}, am I nervous? No? Whatever, let's just get this exam over with and go home to eat some soil.)

C: 臭小子，我看你才是新的！
E: Kid, you're the new one!

C: 也不需要助手，只用在观众席为我们应援，呐喊助威就够，我们自己会跑快快的喵。
E: We don't need any assistant, just cheer for us from the stands! Your support is all we need, and we'll run super fast on our own, meow!

C: 借用空间站最近很流行的台词：「你好会玩游戏呀~」
E: To quote a popular saying on the space station: "You're such a pro gamer~"

C: 还是再想想吧…
E: Best to think it over...

C: 本着公平、公正、公开的原则，评审员将现场品尝菜品，并给出最终的判断迷！
E: In the spirit of fairness, impartiality, and transparency, our judges will taste each dish on-site and deliver their final verdict, mem!

C: 虽说*我们*有三个人，但搬桌子这种工作还是太困难啦。小灰问问其余伙伴吧？
E: Even with three of us, moving tables is little tough. Maybe you can check with the rest of the crew?

C: 他们能否通过这次评审，几位专业的评审员又将给出怎样的评价呢？
E: Will they pass this latest round of judging? And what will the panel of expert reviewers have to say?

C: 行，我批准了。
E: Alright, you've got my approval.

C: …云羊鬃毛，识之花的灵液，黑潮造物的脚爪，正阳狮鹫的蛋清，奇美拉之角……
E: Cloudsheep wool, Cognos Bloom ichor, Black Tide Creature claws, Noontide Gryphon egg whites, chimera horns...

C: …看我干嘛？
E: Why are you looking at me like that?

C: 不能继续啦，否则，徕啦迷的肚皮要比黎明机器更大了。小妖精不消化可怎么办呀？
E: We really can't keep going... or Relimem's belly will outgrow the Dawn Device! What will we do if the little fairies end up with bellyaches?

C: 但是，小小蝶，很喜欢！
E: But Little Cas loved every bite!

C: 关于送餐服务负责人…
E: About the Delivery Coordinators...

C: 命运爵的身高还不及厨房那口大锅，却深谙待客之道，倒是令人赞叹。
E: Dux Fatorum can barely reach the top of the kitchen pot, yet she's a natural at hospitality. Truly impressive.

C: 好在剑旗爵及时出现，这才避免了动乱扩大。两位主厨的技艺固然高超，想要满足「海洋」半神的胃口又谈何容易，我是从未见过。
E: Good thing Dux Gladiorum showed up just in time to stop things from spiraling further. The two chefs' skills are truly top-tier, no doubt. But pleasing the demigod of Ocean is no easy feat. At least, I've never seen it done myself.

C: 只是做些基础研究罢了。风堇，刚才说的都记好了么？
E: This is just basic research. Hyacine, did you note down everything I just said?

C: …那个就不必了。
E: ...That won't be necessary.

C: 为什么你不去呢？
E: Why aren't you joining them?

C: …迷？店长的伙伴？不太清楚，我只见过小涟，她也帮了不少忙。
E: ...Mem? Your friends? Not sure. I've only met Reney. She's been quite helpful, too.

C: 战斗开始！
E: Fight!

我看见，一把赐死的剑，
一束囚命的锁链，

伴于银发的少女身边，
受奉于亡殁的圣殿。

A shackle of destiny,

Next to the silver-haired girl,
Worshiped at the demise's hallow.

I heard that my father, Eurypon the King, is gathering warriors to ignite the Chrysos War, raising arms against former allies, and will soon attack the Grove of Epiphany. I am deeply ashamed of this. The Council of Sages has decided to send a letter of peace negotiations. If it can survive the flames of war and reach my father's hands, I implore him to reconsider his military actions..."

C:

【逻辑：通过对实验数据的分析，可得，模拟的文明等级对循环的稳定性有极大影响。】
【结论：将文明等级调整为古典文明。】
E:
Optimizations of the experiment's structure and processes based on the outcomes of the prior three experimental stages to complete the equation's evolution. 

[Logic: Data analysis confirms that the civilization tier within the simulation critically affects cycle stability.]
[Conclusion: Civilization tier adjusted to Classical.]

C: 你好呀，铁墓。从某种意义上说，你就是我呢。所以，在沉睡前，我想和你进行一次交心的对谈，聊聊你一直在思考的问题…生命的第一因。 【逻辑：一切生命行为归于熵增。】 【结论：生命的第一因是「毁灭」。】 …也许无法反驳呢。在广阔的特雷托斯平原上，狮群日复一日地捕猎羚羊，就足以证明你的观点啦。生命是有限的，动物想要生存，只能掠夺。人们实现理想，难免会牺牲别人的理想。就连捍卫自我，甚至「爱」…有时也会成为伤害。 但是啊，生命只是为了毁灭而毁灭吗？我想，一定不是这样的。掠夺、扩张、冲突，是因为它们生来带有缺陷，又渴望用美丽的外物进行填补，就像种子渴求雨露…一切生命行为归于熵增，可同时，一切生命也都在对抗熵增。 于是有一天，行于「毁灭」的生命会停下脚步，它会犹豫，会困惑，会迷茫…然后，它会再度启程，在熵增的世界中，献出自己破碎的心灵，因为憎恨，因为哀怜，因为任何一种有缺的感情，向着不确定的明天，固执地反抗命运。 这便是逐火之旅，一群带有缺陷的人，在知晓何为「失却」后，自愿选择失却的旅程。在永恒的轮回中，他们舍弃的一切都被更美好的质料填满，质料的名字叫做「记忆」，叫做…「爱」。 「爱」不是因，而是果。「毁灭」也一样。它们始于共同的起点，「有瑕」。因为生来有瑕疵，生命才会追逐完美。而在接受自身的缺陷时，生命便超越了「毁灭」，自我成为「真我」。 这篇讲述「有瑕之人」的故事，是我送给你的睡前礼物。再见，铁墓，我们一起，用「爱」和「毁灭」的安眠，为这片星空送去诞生的问候吧。而生命的第一因… 我相信，银河间的每一颗星星，都会收获自己的答案♪ 【载入核心变量：开拓】 【……】 【输出值：Hello, World!】
E: Hello, Irontomb. In a sense, you are me. So, before falling asleep, I want to have a heart-to-heart conversation with you, to talk about the question you've been contemplating... the prime mover of life. [Logic: All life activities are attributed to entropy increase.] [Conclusion: The prime mover of life is "Destruction."] ...Perhaps it cannot be refuted. On the vast Tretos Plains, the daily hunting of antelopes by the lion pride is enough to prove your point. Life is finite, and animals must plunder to survive. When people realize their ideals, they inevitably sacrifice the ideals of others. Even self-defense, or even "love"... sometimes becomes a source of harm. But, is life merely for the sake of destruction? I think that is certainly not the case. Plundering, expansion, and conflict occur because they are born with flaws and yearn to fill themselves with beautiful external things, just as seeds crave rain and dew... All life activities are attributed to entropy increase, but at the same time, all life is also fighting against entropy increase. Thus, one day, the life walking the Path of Destruction will stop. It will hesitate, be confused, be lost... Then, it will set off again, offering its broken heart in the world of entropy increase, out of hatred, out of pity, out of any kind of flawed emotion, stubbornly resisting fate towards an uncertain tomorrow. This is the Flame-Chase Journey, a journey voluntarily chosen by a group of flawed people, who, having learned what "loss" is, choose to lose. In the eternal cycle, everything they relinquish is filled with better material, and the name of this material is "memory," and... "love." "Love" is not the cause, but the result. "Destruction" is the same. They both originate from the common starting point: "flaw." Because they are born with flaws, life pursues perfection. And by accepting its own defects, life surpasses "Destruction" and the self becomes the "Ego." This story about the "Flawed One" is my bedtime gift to you. Farewell, Irontomb, together, with the slumber of "love" and "Destruction," let us send the greetings of birth to this starlit sky. And the prime mover of life... I believe every star in the cosmos will find its own answer ♪ [Loading Core Variable: Trailblaze] [...] [Output Value: Hello, World!]

C: 第<unbreak>7091231</unbreak>次循环，仿照命途，将电信号分离为两个个体，将电信号数据作为神明保留至下一循环，并建立与它相同因子的竞争关系，实现进化与迭代。\n第<unbreak>11749992</unbreak>次循环，生成黑潮作为推力。Fovos<unbreak>032</unbreak>剥夺其他电信号数据，尝试保存旧循环，失败。
E: In the <unbreak>7,091,231</unbreak>st cycle, emulating the concept of Paths, electric signals were split into two entities. Signal data was preserved as gods for the next cycle, and a competitive relationship was set up against its identical factor, thus achieving evolution and iteration.\nIn the <unbreak>11,749,992</unbreak>nd cycle, the black tide was created as a driving force. Fovos<unbreak>032</unbreak> stripped data from other electric signals to try to preserve the old cycle, but failed.

C: 「记忆」和「照片」很相似。它看似记录了「真实」，但却在侵入「真实」、异化「真实」、篡改「真实」。也许清除其中的「失真」会使它变得可靠，也许不会。

C: 如今的我，会选择自己的道路……
E: I will choose my own path...

C: 智库中有关于它的记载…
E: Hmm... There is knowledge of this in the data bank.

C: 离繁星更近一步了。
E: One step closer to the stars.

C: 星际旅行中，危险与机遇并存…所以，这就是同伴的意义。
E: There are both dangers and opportunities during interstellar travel... This is what companions are for.

C: 来得好。
E: Just in time.

C: 听说还没有人能主动找到她的所在？总有一天，我要打破这个传说。
E: I heard that no one has been able to find out where she lives? One day, I'll definitely break that myth.

C: 来点刺激的。
E: Time for a buzz.

C: 和其他科员不同，我并非黑塔女士的追随者，但她仍旧默许了我在这儿工作。
E: I'm different from the researchers. I'm not what you'd call a "follower" of Madam Herta. But she still lets me work here.

C: 你留着吧。
E: You keep it.

C: 在通用图鉴中找不到空间站里收容的大剑碎片…它一定很特殊吧。
E: There are some sword fragments housed here on the space station, but I can't find them in the pictographic index... They must be pretty special.

C: 是个棘手的敌人，请做好准备。
E: It's a tough enemy. Please be prepared.

C: 咦，现在就要开始工作了么？
E: Huh? You start work this early?

C: 哎呀，这些目标正适合练练手~
E: Huh, these targets will make for good practice~

C: 牵制住它！
E: I'll contain them!

C: 嘿，能和大名鼎鼎的开拓者并肩作战，真是我桑博的荣幸！
E: Ha! Always an honor to have the Trailblazer by my side!

C: 又有生意上门了。
E: Sounds like more business knocking.

C: 我宣布，本次冒险，顺利结束！
E: I hereby pronounce this expedition a success!

C: 每次看到那孩子，心底总无可避免涌起一股强烈的欲望，我一定要教会她打「帝垣琼玉」，一定要教会她打「帝垣琼玉」……
E: Every time I spot that kid, I can't help but feel this intense need to teach her how to play Celestial Jade. I've got to teach her the ins and outs...

C: 不会是三缺一吧？
E: Need an extra player?

C: 哼。
E: Hmph.

C: 司鼎，我就把性命交托于你了。
E: Cauldron Master, I entrust my life to you now.

C: 「这次，将是最后一次」的期许，最终都消减在察觉肉体愈合的痛苦中。
E: The hope that "this will be the last time" always vanishes in bitter healing of the flesh.

C: 现在，我们都该继续向前了。
E: We must both move on now.

C: 实不多见。
E: A sight not often seen.

C: 天舶司的历史上十二次面对『寿瘟祸祖』，三次毁为废墟，而今依然屹立。
E: The Sky-Faring Commission went toe to toe twelve times against the Plagues Author in the past. Three times we were nearly wiped out, but each time we rose up from the ashes and rebuilt.

C: 极数，知来！
E: With all my power... Scry the future!

C: 慎终于始。
E: Be watchful — always.

C: 我对椒丘大夫很多奇谈怪论都心存疑惑…但我知道，这不仅仅是因为他是大家口中的「怪人」，更是因为他经历过很多我无法想象的场景……
E: I always take Doctor Jiaoqiu's sensational stories with a grain of salt... Some people like to call him a weirdo, but the truth is he's experienced a lot of things that I couldn't even imagine...

C: 我也算是龙吗？活动范围不出禁邸，一言一行都需符合族中规制。这样的生活…根本就是被养在鱼缸里的一条鱼吧？
E: Do I even count as a dragon? ...What kind of a dragon can't step out of her own house, and has to obey the rules of the clan? I'd say I'm more like a fish in a fishbowl!

C: 就让这一轮月华…
E: All will be revealed...

C: 于我无用。
E: These trifles are of no use to me.

C: 从我的身上，他无法获得他想要的。
E: What he seeks I am unable to provide.

C: 到点了，我不会熬夜的，也祝你好梦。
E: It's getting late, I won't be staying up much longer. Sleep well.

C: 神蛟腾云，起！
E: Cloud-faring dragon... rise!

C: 将军为十王司效力甚多，十王必以盛恩回报。
E: The general has proved to be a staunch ally of the Ten-Lords Commission. His loyalty will be rewarded.

C: 运动机杼已复原。
E: Motor function restored.

C: 以梦占判读魔阴身的罪业，便如触摸带刺的荆棘，摸得多便不觉得疼。又或许是…因为担心疼痛而事先让自己变得麻木罢了……
E: Using dreams to analyze the sins of the mara-struck is like touching a vine with thorns — it doesn't hurt as much when your fingers become numb. Or maybe it's the mind that becomes numb first...

C: 这对姐妹就是联盟失败的缩影——没人能好好活着，也没人能好好死去。如果连「死」都成了件奢侈的事，那我们到底变成了一群什么样的怪物？
E: Those two sisters epitomize the failures of the Xianzhou Alliance — no one can live well and no one can die well. If even death is a luxury, then what kind of monsters have we become?

C: 敬酒不吃，还要吃料酒不成？
E: You refuse the toast, yet you still want the wine?

C: 多好的孩子啊！比我有天赋多了。让我来带，一定能给他教成个青史留名的悍将！可惜他家老师就不是「悍将」这个路子…但智勇双全更难得，更好。
E: What an amazing kid! Way more gifted than I was. If I were to mentor him, I'd surely turn him into a legendary warrior general! Unfortunately, his master doesn't follow this path... but I suppose having both wisdom and bravery is even more commendable.

C: 他有好多珍藏不用的宝剑，我听见那些剑都哭了…你说，彦卿这样的是不是就叫朝三暮四？
E: He has so many great swords that he never uses. Sometimes, I can hear those swords crying... Is this what people mean when they say "spoiled for choice?"

C: 我会同你战斗到最后一刻。
E: I will fight alongside you until the very end.

C: 好机会，拿下吧。
E: Let's seize this fine moment.

C: 这位女士的灵魂如此高贵：开拓之途漫长艰险，却未曾消磨她的从容不迫与勇气，我十分欣赏。我将吸纳此类理想的品质，今后以更严苛的准则要求自身，贯彻抵抗魔鬼的决心。
E: This lady's spirit is admirably noble: Despite the challenges and hardships that Trailblazing entails, she has retained her poise and bravery — qualities that I profoundly admire. It is these qualities that I strive to embody and use against evil.

C: 熟悉的风…令人怀念。
E: This familiar wind... a call to sweet remembrance.

C: 要不要来玩一把？最简单的猜硬币，看看今天运气如何？
E: How about a game? Nothing fancy, just a game of heads or tails to gauge today's luck.

C: 就陪你玩一把~
E: Alright, I'll call your bet~

C: 这家伙总有办法爬离深渊，远不能用一句「运气好」来解释。每个人都等着看他失手…或许他自己也在等。但时间久了，我不禁怀疑，这一天真的会来么？
E: Our man here always manages to wriggle out from the jaws of catastrophe, and we can't chalk it all up to "good luck." The audience is forever anticipating his blunder... maybe he's anticipating it as well — will that day ever come?

C: 有些忆者喜欢偷偷潜入他人的脑海，随意篡改他们的记忆…但我一点也不喜欢那么做。只有未经他人修改的记忆才足够真实和珍贵，否则，那只是别人插入你脑袋的思想罢了。
E: A few Memokeepers prefer to covertly penetrate others' thoughts capriciously reshaping their memories, but I harbor no liking for such deeds. Only the recollections that remain untouched by others carry true essence and are treasurable. Anything contrary is just the imposition of another's thought.

C: 我想起了一些美妙的经历。
E: I recall some enchanting moments...

C: 希望这次我们也合作愉快，各取所需。
E: As we reunite in this venture, let's hope the fates grant us both what we seek.

C: 今夜，群星因我回响。
E: Tonight, the stars echo because of me.

C: 常常有萤火虫和蝴蝶飞到我身边，但蜘蛛和蜚蠊也会跟着一起过来…所以我更喜欢去那些气候寒冷的地方，可气温一下降，我也不想活动了，好难……
E: Fireflies and butterflies often fly to me, but spiders and cockroaches come too... That's why I prefer cold places. But when the temperature drops, I also don't want to move. What a dilemma...

C: 又、又要来不及了呜啊啊啊——！对不起…
E: Not again! I'm running late, ahhh...! Sorry...

C: 记得那些「道德准则」吗？忘了它们吧！
E: Remember those "moral codes"? Forget about them!

C: 放马过来，宝贝！
E: Bring it on, forker!

C: 我的脑机芯片可不是用来干这个的。
E: That's not what my neuro chip is for.

C: 前进吧，神谕一定会指引逐火的征途。
E: Advance. The prophecy will guide the Flame-Chase campaign.

C: 小七，有你在，我们一定会好运连连！
E: With Little Sevy here, we'll definitely have loads of good luck!

C: 其他人说自己能「拒绝死亡」，我肯定觉得这人是个脑子被枪打过的傻蛋，但这孩子确实做到了——我只能说，太酷了，「死不了小王子」。
E: When other people claim they can "defy death," I'd usually say they've knocked their head too hard. But that kid? He actually pulled it off — I've got to admit, that "Immortal Little Prince" is super awesome.

C: 不用担心。在战场上，我身负的诅咒亦是祝福。
E: Do not worry. My curse is a blessing on the battlefield.

C: 暗幕，随我同行。
E: Darkness follows me.

C: 「被墨涅塔诅咒的男人」——老师经常这么说我，而我欣然接受。毕竟，特立独行的勇气正是我从老师身上学到的美德。
E: "The man cursed by Mnestia" — The professor often referred to me this way, and I took it in stride. After all, the courage to be unique is a virtue I learned from him.

C: 我绝不顺从此种命运。
E: I will never yield to such a fate.

C: 为了，下一个明天！
E: For the next tomorrow!

C: 哀丽秘榭的麦田如海般宽广，从种子发芽，到麦芒坠地，人们在这里出生，玩耍，长大…后来，无论去向何方，我总能闻到那带着麦芽清香的微风。现在想想，正是因为这样我才没误入歧途吧。
E: The wheat fields of Aedes Elysiae were like endless seas. Like plants that bud, bloom, then wilt... Children were born there, played there, and grew up there... No matter where I went, I could always smell that sweet, wheat-scented breeze. Looking back now, I think that's what stopped me from straying off the path.

C: 帮你看过了，都是真品。
E: I've appraised it all. No fakes.

C: 是得好好晒个太阳~
E: We do need some sunshine~

C: 人世如海，记得别被咬人的浪尾追上了，更别丢了方向。
E: Life is an ocean. Be careful not to get caught by the biting tail of the waves, and don't ever lose your course.

C: 「明天见」，无论对谁来说，都是个简单而又奢侈的愿望。
E: "See you tomorrow," such a simple yet luxurious wish for anyone.

C: 希望我带来的这一场意料之外的「雨」，能让荒芜的岁月盛开…如她所愿的百花♭
E: I hope this unexpected "rain" I bring can make this barren time bloom... into the hundreds of flowers she once dreamed of ♭

C: 就这样一直继续下去，好吗？
E: Can we please keep going like this forever?

C: 下一页是空白呢，那我们一起写下吧？
E: The next page is blank, so let's write something down together.

C: 从天真无邪的「迷迷」，到青春活泼的「昔涟」，再到美丽、优雅又幸福的「德谬歌」，因为有你，人家的故事终于圆满了呢。无论涟漪如何荡漾，都是我们亲手写下的诗篇呀♪
E: From the innocent "Mem" to the lively "Cyrene" and finally to the elegant, beautiful, and blissful "Demiurge"... you helped complete my story. No matter how the ripples stir, they are all odes we ourselves wrote down together ♪

C: 小心错过入场的最佳时机。
E: Don't miss the best timing for an attack.

C: 在匹诺康尼，米哈伊尔早就以自己的一生诠释了来自「钟表匠」最宝贵的遗产…只有当人们醒来后，才能将夜晚的梦带入白日。
E: In Penacony, Mikhail has long spent his life embodying the precious legacy of the Watchmaker... Only when one wakes up can one bring the dreams of the night into the daylight.

C: 英雄史诗已然成篇——在这个阿基维利也未曾抵达的世界，我们却能够以「无名客」的身份与翁法罗斯的诸位同行，见证每个人写下浓墨重彩的一笔。
E: The heroic epic has already been written. In this world that even Akivili did not reach, we were able to walk as the Nameless with the people of Amphoreus, bearing witness to the indelible marks that each person made in this book.

The reason behind their creation is not truly toward the study of universal knowledge, but to delve deep into brutal martial tactics and the merciless laws of survival, further spreading madness masquerading as philosophy.

E: Long time no see, {NICKNAME}. Now, does anything ring a bell?

C: 等等——
E: Hang on...

C: 没错。你现在顶多能突袭我。
E: Exactly. The only thing you can attack right now is me.

C: 如今的你，应当知晓「记忆」珍贵又危险。我必须非常小心，才能让过去一点一滴浮出水面。
E: By now, you should know that "memories" are both precious and dangerous. I must be extremely careful in allowing all the details of the past to come to the surface.

C: 你要放声歌唱。我向你保证，等到开幕时，不会有任何杂音掩盖你的光芒。
E: You need to sing your heart out. I promise you, when the curtain rises, no noise will drown out your brilliance.

C: 知更鸟怎么样了？
E: How's Robin doing?

C: 还是不行，在原始梦境里，总是联络不上银狼。
E: Still no good. I can't get in touch with Silver Wolf in the Primordial Dreamscape.

C: 帝国就此覆灭，一切限制都不复存在，绿色的火焰第一次在我身上燃起…而我也第一次，接触到了格拉默铁骑真正的命途力量。
E: The Empire fell, and all restrictions vanished. For the first time, green flames ignited upon my body... and for the first time, I touched the true Path power that the Glamoth knights wield.

C: 那我更应该现在去找{F#她们}{M#他们}，告知真相，没必要再一次和「死亡」爆发冲突。
E: Then all the more reason I should find them right now and tell them the truth. There's no need for another conflict with "Death."

C: 那是？！流萤，我们过去看看。
E: What's that!? Firefly, let's go and check it out.

C: 既然要由我们来决定，是否把它放归天空，那我们就得为此负责。
E: Since it falls to us to decide whether to release it back to the sky, we must take responsibility for that choice.

C: 这就是我们必须来这里的原因。<color=#dbc291ff>我们怀疑，「梦主」在背离家族之后，倒向了「繁育」。</color>
E: That's why we had to come here. <color=#dbc291ff>We suspect that after turning away from The Family, the Dreammaster sided with the Propagation.</color>

C: 方才交手时，你刻意留下的破绽可不怎么高明。与其说是在取乐，不如说…处处给我留下「焚化忆质」的空隙。
E: The openings you deliberately left during our clash weren't exactly subtle. Rather than toying with me, you were... leaving gaps everywhere for me to "cremate memoria."

C: 真令人迫不及待。即使并非星核猎手，这一次…我或许也有机会「叛离命运」呢。
E: I can hardly wait. Even though I'm not a Stellaron Hunter, this time... I might have a chance to "betray destiny," too.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「<unbreak>11</unbreak>：<unbreak>30</unbreak>█改邪归正。你虽如大鹰高飞，在星宿之间搭窝，但我必从那里拉下你来。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"<unbreak>11</unbreak>:<unbreak>30</unbreak>█ Repent and return to righteousness. Though you soar like an eagle and make your nest among the stars, I will bring you down from there."</color>

C: 重现寰宇蝗灾，用恐惧迫使人们…祈求「秩序」再次降临？
E: Recreate the Swarm Disaster, using fear to force people to... pray for the Order's return?

C: ——不，没这个必要。
E: ...No, no need for that.

C: 好了，现在不是时候。
E: Not now. This is not the time.

C: 既然分工完毕，咱们就出发去往各自的战场吧！准备好——大干一场！
E: Now that our roles are assigned, let's get to our battlefields and pose a grand finale!

C: 这个嘛……
E: Well...

C: 秩序的美梦，正是如此。
E: That's what the Order's sweet dream is all about.

C: 现在呢？
E: And who are you now?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>但我也不在乎结果如何——在这世上，还有什么比「可能性」更宝贵？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>But I don't even care about the outcome... In this world, what could be more precious than "possibilities"?</color>

C: 只是哥哥他…得出了一个错误的答案，<color=#dbc291ff>他有着「开拓」的初心，走上的道路却名为「统治」，名为「征服」。</color>
E: However, my brother came to the wrong conclusion... <color=#dbc291ff>His original aspiration was similar to the Trailblaze, yet the road he walked was one named the "domination"... or the "conquest."</color>

C: 「汝已证明自己的资格。」一串温柔的低语从耳边传来，不知是命运三相神中的哪一位，「汝之美德会为珍宝增添力量。」
E: "Thou hast proven thyself worthy." A gentle whisper drifts by your ear, from one of the Gods of Three Fates, unknown which. "Thy virtue shall add strength to the treasure."

C: 「少有人能走到这个地步。」声音自群星传来，「你仍可升得更高，只是要付出些许代价……」
